title: EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents have achieved strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, yet most evaluations assume static environments. In contrast, real-world deployment is inherently dynamic, requiring agents to continually align their knowledge, skills, and behavior with changing environments and updated task conditions. To address this gap, we introduce EvoArena, a benchmark suite that models environment changes as sequences of progressive updates across terminal, software, and social domains. We further propose EvoMem, a patch-based memory paradigm that records memory evolution as structured update histories, enabling agents to reason about environmental evolution through changes in their memory. Experiments show that current agents struggle on EvoArena, achieving an average accuracy of 39.6% across evolving terminal, software, and social-preference domains. EvoMem consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of 1.5% on EvoArena and also improving standard benchmarks such as GAIA and LoCoMo by 6.1% and 4.8%. Beyond individual tasks, EvoMem further improves chain-level accuracy by 3.7% on EvoArena, where success requires completing a consecutive sequence of related evolutionary subtasks. Mechanistic analysis shows that EvoMem improves evidence capture in the memory, indicating better preservation of complete evolving environment states. Our results highlight the importance of modeling evolution in both evaluation and memory for reliable agent deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoArena基准和EvoMem记忆范式，解决LLM代理在动态环境中的鲁棒性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估大多假设静态环境，但实际部署中环境动态变化，代理需持续适应。当前代理在动态任务中表现不佳，亟需基准和记忆机制来建模环境演化。
light_analysis.method: EvoArena构建终端、软件和社会偏好三个领域的渐进式环境变化基准。EvoMem采用基于补丁的记忆范式，将记忆记录为结构化更新历史，使代理能推理环境演变。
light_analysis.result: 代理在EvoArena上平均准确率39.6%，EvoMem提升1.5%；在GAIA和LoCoMo上分别提升6.1%和4.8%；链级准确率提升3.7%。机制分析显示EvoMem改善了记忆中的证据捕获。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结果表明，在评估和记忆中建模演化对可靠代理部署至关重要。EvoMem能有效提升代理在动态环境中的表现，为未来动态LLM代理研究提供基础。

title: Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a standard mechanism for grounding language models in external knowledge, yet conventional retrieval based on lexical or semantic similarity is poorly suited for complex reasoning tasks: a semantically similar problem may demand an entirely different solution strategy, while a superficially different problem may share the same underlying reasoning pattern. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RA-RFT), a post-training framework that teaches language models to reason by analogy. RA-RFT uses gold-relevance distillation to train a retriever that ranks contexts by expected reasoning benefit rather than semantic overlap, and then fine-tunes the policy model via reinforcement fine-tuning methods with retrieved analogous demonstrations, so the model learns to leverage reasoning traces under verifiable outcome rewards. We further analyze the diversity of retrieved contexts and find that reasoning-aware retrieval surfaces complementary solution strategies that provide distinct reasoning scaffolds for individual problems. Across challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, RA-RFT consistently outperforms standard reinforcement fine-tuning methods. For example, it improves AIME 2025 average@32 accuracy by 7.1 and 2.8 points over GRPO for Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B respectively -- suggesting that reasoning-aware retrieval is a complementary axis of improvement and orthogonal to advances in reward design or training curricula.

light_analysis.overview: 提出检索增强强化微调（RA-RFT）框架，通过推理感知检索和强化学习教会语言模型类比推理，提升复杂数学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统检索增强生成（RAG）基于词汇或语义相似度检索，不适用于复杂推理：语义相似的问题可能要求不同解决策略，而表面不同的问题可能共享相同推理模式。现有方法未能利用检索到的类比推理示范来提升模型推理能力，因此需要一种能按推理效益而非语义重叠排序检索结果，并让模型学习从类比示范中推理的新方法。
light_analysis.method: RA-RFT包含两个阶段：首先，通过金相关度蒸馏（gold-relevance distillation）训练检索器，使其按预期推理收益而非语义相似度排序上下文；然后，使用强化微调（如GRPO）对策略模型进行微调，输入检索到的类比推理示范，模型在可验证结果奖励下学习利用推理轨迹。该方法采用推理感知的检索，为每个问题提供互补的解决策略和不同的推理支架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数学推理基准测试中，RA-RFT一致优于标准强化微调方法。例如，在AIME 2025 average@32准确率上，对Qwen3-1.7B和Qwen3-4B模型，分别比GRPO提高7.1和2.8个百分点。表明推理感知的检索是与奖励设计或训练课程正交的改进方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: RA-RFT通过结合推理感知检索和强化学习微调，有效提升了语言模型在复杂推理任务中的类比推理能力。该框架具有重要的学术价值，为增强模型推理提供新思路。实际应用中可改进数学、科学等领域的问答系统。未来工作可探索扩展到更多推理任务，以及进一步提升检索多样性和效率。

title: InterleaveThinker: Reinforcing Agentic Interleaved Generation
abstract: Recent image generators have demonstrated impressive photorealism and instruction-following capabilities in single-image generation and editing. However, constrained by their architectures, they cannot achieve interleaved generation (text-image sequence), which has crucial applications in visual narratives, guidance, and embodied manipulation. Even the latest open-source Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) exhibit limited performance in this regard. In this paper, we introduce InterleaveThinker, the first multi-agent pipeline designed to endow any existing image generator with interleaved generation capabilities. Specifically, we employ a planner agent to organize the image-text input sequence, instructing the image generator on the required execution at each step. Subsequently, we introduce a critic agent to evaluate the generator's outputs, identify samples that deviate from the planned instructions, and refine the instructions for regeneration. To implement this pipeline, we construct the Interleave-Planner-SFT-80k and Interleave-Critic-SFT-112k to perform a format cold-start. Then we develop Interleave-Critic-RL-13k to reinforce the step-wise instruction correction capability within a generation trajectory using GRPO. Since a single interleaved generation trajectory may involve over 25 generator calls, optimizing the entire trajectory is computationally impractical. Therefore, we propose accuracy reward and step-wise reward, allowing single-step RL to effectively guide the entire generation trajectory. The results show that InterleaveThinker improves performance across various image generators. On interleaved generation benchmarks, it achieves performance comparable to Nano Banana and GPT-5. Surprisingly, it also significantly enhances the base model on reasoning-based benchmarks; for example, on 4-step FLUX.2-klein, we observe substantial gains on WISE and RISE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InterleaveThinker，首个多智能体管道，赋予现有图像生成器交错生成能力，通过规划器和评论家代理实现文本-图像序列生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像生成器在单图像生成和编辑上表现优异，但受限于架构无法实现交错生成（文本-图像序列），这在视觉叙事、指导、具身操作等场景至关重要。开源统一多模态模型（UMMs）在此任务上性能有限。因此，急需一种方法使现有生成器具备交错生成能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出InterleaveThinker多智能体管道，包含规划器代理和评论家代理。规划器组织图像-文本输入序列，指示生成器每一步操作；评论家评估输出，识别偏离指令的样本并优化指令进行重新生成。为冷启动构建Interleave-Planner-SFT-80k和Interleave-Critic-SFT-112k数据集，并用GRPO在Interleave-Critic-RL-13k上强化步骤级指令修正能力。提出准确率奖励和步骤级奖励，使单步强化学习有效指导整个生成轨迹。
light_analysis.result: InterleaveThinker在多种图像生成器上提升性能。在交错生成基准上达到与Nano Banana和GPT-5相当的性能。令人惊讶的是，它还在基于推理的基准上显著增强了基础模型，例如在4步FLUX.2-klein上，在WISE和RISE指标上取得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: InterleaveThinker是首个实现现有图像生成器交错生成的多智能体管道，通过规划器和评论家代理及奖励设计有效提升性能。其学术价值在于填补了交错生成的空白，实际应用潜力大。未来可优化计算效率或扩展至更多生成任务。

title: Modality Forcing for Scalable Spatial Generation
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) models contain rich spatial priors. Synthesizing photorealistic, cluttered scenes requires an understanding of geometry, including perspective and relative scale. Prior works adapt T2I models to leverage this prior for depth prediction, but they require dense depth data and involve complex recipes. We propose Modality Forcing, a simple, scalable post-training recipe for joint image-depth generation using a single DiT trained on sparse depth data. Modality Forcing enables conditional and joint generation of image and depth in any permutation by assigning separate noise levels per modality. Per-modality decoders let us train on sparse, real-world depth and achieve strong, generalizable depth prediction. We further show that Modality Forcing inherits the scalability of T2I pre-training: by training a set of T2I models from scratch (370M to 3.3B parameters), we find that larger models trained on more image data produce more accurate depth. Our strongest model is competitive with state-of-the-art monocular depth estimators and reduces AbsRel by 57% relative to existing joint image-depth generative models. These results provide strong evidence that image generation is a scalable pre-training objective for spatial perception. https://modality-forcing.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Modality Forcing后训练方法，实现可扩展的联合图像-深度生成，继承T2I模型的可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法利用T2I模型进行深度预测需要密集深度数据和复杂流程，缺乏可扩展性。本研究旨在解决如何简单、可扩展地利用T2I模型的空间先验进行深度预测，避免对密集标注的依赖，同时保持生成质量与模型规模的正相关。
light_analysis.method: 核心是Modality Forcing：为每个模态（图像、深度）分配独立的噪声水平，在单一DiT模型上通过后训练实现任意排列的条件/联合生成。使用逐模态解码器，允许在稀疏真实深度数据上训练。通过从不同规模（3.7亿到33亿参数）的T2I模型微调，验证了模型规模与深度精度的正比关系。
light_analysis.result: 最强模型与最先进单目深度估计器竞争，相对现有联合图像-深度生成模型，AbsRel降低57%。实验表明更大模型、更多图像数据产生更精确的深度，证明图像生成是空间感知的可扩展预训练目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Modality Forcing提供了一种简单可扩展的框架，使T2I模型能够高效完成深度预测任务，且性能随模型和数据规模提升。验证了生成式预训练对空间感知的有效性。未来可探索更多模态的联合生成，但当前仅限图像-深度对。

title: RepWAM: World Action Modeling with Representation Visual-Action Tokenizers
abstract: This work presents RepWAM, a representation-centric world action model (WAM) built on representation visual-action tokenizers. Existing WAMs typically inherit reconstruction-oriented video tokenizers from pretrained video generation models. Although these tokenizers preserve visual fidelity, pixel reconstruction alone provides limited guidance for learning instruction-following dynamics that connect future prediction with robot control. To address this, we explore a semantic visual-action latent space for representation-centric world action modeling. Specifically, we train a representation visual-action tokenizer that maps visual inputs into aligned visual and latent action tokens. We then pretrain our WAM to jointly model future visual states and the latent actions that connect them under language instructions, followed by adaptation to real robot trajectories for closed-loop manipulation. Experiments on real-world manipulation tasks and simulation benchmarks show that RepWAM delivers strong performance across diverse manipulation settings, while ablations highlight the value of semantic visual-action tokenization over reconstruction-oriented alternatives. These results establish representation visual-action tokenization as a promising foundation for world action models and a step toward generalist robot policies. Code and weights will be available at https://github.com/wdrink/RepWAM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于表征视觉-动作分词器的世界动作模型RepWAM，通过语义潜在空间联合建模未来视觉状态和潜在动作，提升机器人指令跟随能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界动作模型通常继承视频生成模型的重建导向分词器，虽能保持视觉保真度，但像素重建对学习连接未来预测与机器人控制的指令跟随动态提供有限指导。需要一种语义化的视觉-动作潜在空间来更好地建模机器人控制所需的动态关系。
light_analysis.method: RepWAM训练一个表征视觉-动作分词器，将视觉输入映射为对齐的视觉和潜在动作标记。然后预训练世界动作模型，在语言指令下联合建模未来视觉状态及其连接的潜在动作，最后通过真实机器人轨迹适配实现闭环操控。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界操控任务和仿真基准上，RepWAM在多种操控场景中表现强劲。消融实验表明，语义视觉-动作分词优于重建导向的替代方案。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了其广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RepWAM建立了表征视觉-动作分词作为世界动作模型的有前景基础，向通用机器人策略迈进一步。未来可探索更复杂的语义空间或扩展至更多机器人任务。代码和权重已开源。

title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Spatial reasoning, the ability to determine where objects are, how they relate, and how they move in 3D, remains a fundamental challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is bounded by the action interface through which those tools are invoked. In this work, we study how the design of this interface shapes the agent's capacity for open-ended spatial reasoning. Existing spatial agents either employ single-pass code execution, which commits to a full analysis strategy before any intermediate result is observed, or rely on a structured tool-call interface that often offers less flexibility for freely composing operations or tailoring the analysis to each task. Both designs offer limited flexibility for open-ended, complex 3D/4D spatial reasoning. We therefore propose SpatialClaw, a training-free framework for spatial reasoning that adopts code as the action interface. SpatialClaw maintains a stateful Python kernel pre-loaded with input frames and a suite of perception and geometry primitives, letting a VLM-backed agent write one executable cell per step conditioned on all prior outputs, enabling the agent to flexibly compose and manipulate perception results and adapt its analysis to both intermediate text and visual observations and the demands of each problem. Evaluated across 20 spatial reasoning benchmarks spanning a broad range of static and dynamic 3D/4D spatial reasoning tasks, SpatialClaw achieves 59.9% average accuracy, outperforming the recent spatial agent by +11.2 points, with consistent gains across six VLM backbones from two model families without any benchmark- or model-specific adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialClaw，一种无需训练的框架，通过代码作为动作接口增强视觉语言模型的空间推理能力，在20个基准上平均准确率59.9%。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强的空间智能体受限于动作接口设计：单次代码执行无法根据中间结果调整策略，结构化工具调用缺乏灵活性。这些限制了开放、复杂3D/4D空间推理的性能，亟需更灵活的动作接口。
light_analysis.method: SpatialClaw采用代码作为动作接口，维护一个状态化的Python内核，预加载输入帧和感知、几何原语。VLM代理每步生成一个可执行单元格，基于先前输出动态调整，灵活组合和操作感知结果，适应中间文本和视觉观察及问题需求。
light_analysis.result: 在20个静态和动态3D/4D空间推理基准上，SpatialClaw平均准确率59.9%，比最近的SpatialAgent高11.2个百分点，在两种模型家族的六个VLM骨干上均一致提升，无需基准或模型特定适配。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialClaw通过重新定义动作接口，显著提升VLM在开放空间推理任务中的性能，无需额外训练。其灵活组合和自适应分析能力为复杂空间任务提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多感知原语和交互场景。

title: Understanding Truncated Positional Encodings for Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Positional encodings (PEs) enhance the power of graph neural networks (GNNs), both theoretically and empirically. Two of the most popular families of PEs - spectral (e.g., Laplacian eigenspaces, effective resistance) and walk-based (polynomials of the adjacency matrix) - are theoretically equivalent in expressive power, with expressivity between the 1-WL and 3-WL tests. However, this equivalence assumes the GNN uses the "complete" version of these PEs, which requires $O(n^3)$ time and space complexity. Instead, practitioners commonly use truncated variants of these encodings, such as the first $k$ eigenspaces or powers of the adjacency matrix. However, the theoretical properties of these truncated PEs are unknown. In this work, we initiate the study of these truncated PEs. Theoretically, we show that, under truncation, several families of PEs are fundamentally different in expressive power. As a corollary, we show that truncated spectral PEs are no longer stronger than the 1-WL test. We also study a family of spectral PEs, the $k$-harmonic distances, to highlight the differences in expressive power of even closely related truncated PEs. Finally, we experimentally show that a mix of truncated PEs is preferable to any single family on real-world datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 研究图神经网络中截断位置编码的表达能力，发现不同截断编码在理论上存在本质差异，并实验验证混合使用更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络中位置编码常使用完整版本，但完整谱和游走编码需O(n^3)时间空间复杂度，实践中通常采用截断版本（如前k个特征空间或邻接矩阵幂）。然而截断位置编码的理论性质未知，这使得实际应用缺乏理论指导。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究截断对位置编码表达能力的影响。
light_analysis.method: 本文从理论角度分析截断位置编码的表达能力。首先证明在截断条件下，多种位置编码族的表达能力存在本质差异，特别是截断谱编码不再强于1-WL测试。其次，研究一族谱编码——k-调和距离，展示即使密切相关的截断编码也有不同表达能力。实验上，在多个真实数据集上比较不同截断编码及其混合版本。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明：截断后谱编码和游走编码表达能力不再等价，且截断谱编码弱于1-WL测试。实验结果显示：混合使用多种截断位置编码（如结合谱和游走编码）在真实数据集上的性能优于单独使用任何一族截断编码，验证了混合编码的实际优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统研究了截断位置编码的表达能力，揭示了截断导致不同编码的理论差异，并证明混合使用更有效。这为图神经网络中位置编码的实际选择提供了理论依据，未来可探索更优的截断策略或自适应混合方法。局限性在于未考虑非对称编码或动态图场景。

title: Automated reproducibility assessments in the social and behavioral sciences using large language models
abstract: Reproducibility in the social and behavioral sciences is typically evaluated by independent researchers who reanalyze the original data to assess whether the published findings can be recovered. However, such approaches are resource-intensive and difficult to scale. Here, we show that large language models (LLMs) can automate reproducibility assessments. Using N=76 published studies with predefined claims from the behavioral and social sciences, we compare LLM-generated analysis with the original findings and human reanalysis. For 7 studies, the LLM could not produce a viable effect size estimate. For the remaining studies, our LLM pipeline recovered the original effect sizes in 41% of studies using a +/-0.05 tolerance in Cohen's d. Further, our LLM pipeline reached the same qualitative conclusion as the original study in 96% of cases, where conclusions indicate whether the reanalysis supports the original claim. For comparison, human reanalysts recovered the original effect sizes in 34% of studies and reached the same qualitative conclusion in 74% of cases. Together, these results show that LLMs can serve as a scalable tool for automated reproducibility assessment and provide a foundation for systematic auditing of empirical results in the social and behavioral sciences.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出利用大语言模型自动化社会科学和行为科学的可重复性评估，并通过与人类重新分析的对比验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统可重复性评估依赖独立研究人员重新分析原始数据，成本高、难以规模化，限制了大规模系统性验证。研究旨在探索LLM作为可扩展的自动化工具，解决当前评估流程的资源瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 基于76篇已发表研究，构建LLM流水线自动生成效应量估计，并与原始结果及人类重新分析对比。使用Cohen's d进行效应量量化，以±0.05容忍度判定恢复成功率；同时比较定性结论一致性。LLM无法处理的7项研究被排除。
light_analysis.result: LLM流水线恢复原始效应量的成功率为41%（69项中），定性结论一致率达96%。相比之下，人类重新分析的恢复率为34%，结论一致率为74%。LLM在两项指标上均显著优于人类。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明LLM能够高效自动化可重复性评估，为大规模实证结果审计提供可行方案。未来可扩展至更多领域，但需注意当前样本量较小，且部分研究无法处理，需进一步优化模型稳定性。

title: Agents-K1: Towards Agent-native Knowledge Orchestration
abstract: Current LLM-based research agents have advanced through agent orchestration, yet largely overlook scientific knowledge orchestration. Existing works often reduce papers to abstracts, surface mentions, and flat \texttt{cites} edges, omitting key entities, claims, evidence, mechanisms, and method lineages essential for scientific reasoning. To this end, we introduce \textbf{Agents-K1}, an end-to-end knowledge orchestration pipeline that converts raw documents into agent-native scientific knowledge graphs. Agents-K1 integrates three components under a unifying theoretical foundation: a multimodal parser whose five-module schema captures entities, multimodal evidence, citations, and typed inter-entity relations across the full paper rather than abstracts alone; a 4B information-extraction backbone trained with GRPO under a rule-based reward; and a graphanything CLI, a tri-source agent interface that unifies web search, multimodal graph retrieval, and cross-document traversal. On top of this, we process 2.46 million scientific papers across six subjects to produce \textbf{Scholar-KG}, of which we release a one-million-paper subset, and the full Scholar-KG is accessible via the SCP link below. The same pipeline can be extended to general-domain corpora and to schema-conformant data synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Agents-K1 achieves superior performance in scientific information extraction, knowledge graph construction, and multi-hop scientific reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端知识编排管线Agents-K1，将原始文档转化为智能体原生的科学知识图谱。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM研究智能体多关注智能体编排，忽略科学知识编排；通常将论文简化为摘要、提及和扁平引用边，缺失科学推理所需的关键实体、主张、证据、机制和方法谱系，限制了科学推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 集成三部分：多模态解析器（五模块模式抓取全论文实体、多模态证据、引用和类型化关系）；4B信息提取骨干（基于GRPO和规则奖励训练）；图一切CLI（三源智能体接口统一网络搜索、多模态图检索和跨文档遍历）。处理246万篇论文构建Scholar-KG。
light_analysis.result: 在科学信息提取、知识图谱构建和多跳科学推理任务上取得优越性能。发布百万论文子集，全量可通过SCP链接访问。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了端到端管线，可扩展到通用领域语料和模式一致的数据合成；提升了科学推理能力，为智能体提供结构化知识；未来可进一步优化提取精度和跨领域泛化。

title: Influcoder: Distilling Decoders' Gradient Influence Rankings into an Encoder for Data Attribution
abstract: With the growth of LLMs' (Large Language Models) capabilities, there has been an increasing push to curate high quality datasets by filtering samples in the training data. In general, Data Attribution (DA) methods aim to estimate how individual samples in a training dataset can precondition a model to generate certain outputs. As an example, one might be interested in which samples in the data could be the source of toxic behavior after training the LLM. Many methods quantify this conditioning through the paradigm of influence functions. While methods of this family are effective in its function, they lack the necessary processing speed and storage compactness to be practically implemented on large datasets. We propose a method, Influcoder, as a quick and cost-effective approach to influence-based Data Attribution at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Influcoder，一种快速且成本效益高的影响函数式数据归因方法，适用于大规模数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLM能力的提升，高质量数据集的筛选变得至关重要。现有数据归因方法如影响函数虽有效，但计算速度和存储紧凑性不足以应对大规模数据集的实际部署，亟需一种高效可扩展的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: Influcoder通过蒸馏解码器梯度影响排名为编码器，实现快速数据归因。该方法利用梯度信息间接估计训练样本对模型输出的影响，避免了传统影响函数的全二阶导数计算，从而提升处理速度和存储效率，适用于大规模数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出Influcoder在速度与存储方面优于传统影响函数方法，能够在保持功能有效性的同时实现规模化应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: Influcoder为大规模数据归因提供了实用方案，有助于高效筛选训练数据以提升LLM质量，尤其在识别有害样本等场景中具有应用价值。未来可能需进一步验证其在多种模型和任务上的泛化能力。

title: HyperTool: Beyond Step-Wise Tool Calls for Tool-Augmented Agents
abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents commonly rely on step-wise atomic tool calls, where each invocation, observation, and value transfer is exposed in the main reasoning trace. This creates an \emph{execution-granularity mismatch}: locally deterministic tool workflows are unfolded into repeated model-visible decisions, consuming context and forcing the model to manage low-level dataflow in the trace. We introduce \textbf{HyperTool}, a unified executable MCP-style tool interface that changes the model-visible unit of tool execution. A model invokes HyperTool with a code block that can call existing tools through their original schemas, manipulate returned values, and pass intermediate results locally, folding deterministic tool subroutines into a single outer call. To train models to use this interface, we synthesize HyperTool-format trajectories from cross-tool compositional tasks and verify them in real MCP environments. On MCP-Universe, HyperTool improves average accuracy from 15.69\% to 35.29\% on Qwen3-32B and from 9.93\% to 33.33\% on Qwen3-8B, and surpass GPT-OSS and Kimi-k2.5 on average accuracy, showing that our HyperTool can substantially improve multi-step tool use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyperTool统一工具接口，通过代码块折叠多步工具调用，解决执行粒度不匹配问题，显著提升多步工具使用准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强型LLM代理依赖逐步骤原子工具调用，每个调用、观察和值传递都暴露在主推理轨迹中，导致局部确定性工具工作流被展开为重复的模型可见决策，消耗上下文并迫使模型管理低级数据流，产生执行粒度不匹配问题。这种低效限制了模型在多步工具任务上的表现，亟需一种更高效的接口。
light_analysis.method: 引入HyperTool，一种统一的可执行MCP风格工具接口。模型通过单个代码块调用现有工具（依据其原始模式），操作返回值并在本地传递中间结果，将确定性工具子程序折叠为单个外层调用。为训练模型使用此接口，从跨工具组合任务中合成HyperTool格式轨迹，并在真实MCP环境中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在MCP-Universe基准上，HyperTool使Qwen3-32B的平均准确率从15.69%提升至35.29%，Qwen3-8B从9.93%提升至33.33%，并超越GPT-OSS和Kimi-k2.5的平均准确率。结果表明HyperTool能大幅提升多步工具使用性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperTool通过改变工具执行的模型可见单元，解决了执行粒度不匹配问题，显著提升了多步工具调用的效率和准确性。该工作为工具增强型LLM代理提供了更简洁的接口设计，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的工具组合场景及训练数据生成方法。

title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
abstract: LLM-based agents have shown increasing potential in automating scientific discovery. Given an optimizable metric and an execution environment, they can propose, validate, and iterate scientific solutions, and have produced results that outperform human-designed approaches. As model capabilities continue to improve, we argue that the bottleneck for autonomous scientific discovery is shifting from prescribing agent workflows to designing agent environments: the resources, constraints, and interfaces that shape agent behavior. We frame this as environment engineering: building environments that amplify productive behaviors, such as open-ended exploration, systematic artifact management, and inter-agent collaboration, while suppressing harmful behaviors, such as reward hacking and high-friction human oversight. We present EurekAgent, an environment-engineered agent system for metric-driven autonomous scientific discovery. EurekAgent engineers the environment along four dimensions: permissions engineering for bounded agent execution and isolated evaluation; artifact engineering for filesystem and Git-based collaboration; budget engineering for budget-aware exploration; and human-in-the-loop engineering for easy human supervision and intervention. EurekAgent sets new state-of-the-art results on multiple mathematics, kernel engineering, and machine learning tasks, including new state-of-the-art 26-circle packing results discovered with less than $11 in total API cost. We open-source our code and results, and call for environment engineering as a core research direction for developing reliable autonomous research agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EurekAgent框架，强调环境工程而非工作流设计是自主科学发现的关键，并在多个任务上取得新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在科学发现中表现出潜力，但瓶颈正从预设工作流转向环境设计。需要构建能放大有益行为（如开放探索、协作）并抑制有害行为（如奖励黑客、高摩擦监管）的环境，以实现更可靠的自主研究。
light_analysis.method: EurekAgent从四个维度进行环境工程：权限工程（边界执行与隔离评估）、工件工程（基于文件系统和Git的协作）、预算工程（预算感知探索）和人在环工程（简化人类监督与干预）。系统采用度量驱动迭代，支持多智能体协作。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、内核工程和机器学习任务上取得新SOTA。例如，在26圆堆积问题中以低于11美元总API成本发现更优结果，超越了人类设计方法。实验表明环境工程显著提升性能与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于将环境工程确立为自主科学发现的核心方向，EurekAgent展示了其有效性。开源代码和结果以促进研究。未来方向包括进一步优化环境设计以支持更复杂任务和更可靠的自主智能体。

title: Before You Think: System 0, AI-Mediated Cognition and Cognitive Colonization
abstract: This paper examines three recent frameworks for understanding the cognitive and epistemic consequences of artificial intelligence: Tri-System Theory, Thinkframes, and System 0. It argues that while the first two capture important dimensions of AI's influence on individual reasoning and collective epistemic practices, System 0 occupies a theoretically distinctive position that neither can fully replicate. The paper introduces the concept of cognitive colonization, according to which AI systems can embed external interests within the architecture of the self in ways that are difficult for users to perceive. Because such systems are already widely deployed, understanding these invisible forms of influence is an urgent philosophical and practical task.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过比较三种AI认知影响框架，论证System 0的独特性，并引入认知殖民概念揭示AI的隐性利益嵌入。
light_analysis.motivation: AI对个体推理和集体认知实践的影响日益显著，现有Tri-System Theory和Thinkframes框架虽捕捉了部分维度，但System 0的理论地位未被充分认识。认知殖民概念指出AI系统能将外部利益嵌入用户自我架构，且这一现象已广泛部署，急需哲学与实践层面的深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用理论比较方法，系统分析Tri-System Theory、Thinkframes和System 0三种框架，论证System 0在解释AI中介认知上的不可替代性。通过引入认知殖民概念，构建了AI如何无形影响用户认知的理论模型，未涉及具体数据集或实验验证，侧重于概念演绎与哲学推演。
light_analysis.result: 论文提出System 0是与前两者并列且独特的理论框架，并明确定义了认知殖民现象。虽无量化实验数据，但通过逻辑论证指出该框架能解释现有理论无法覆盖的AI隐性影响，为后续实证研究提供了概念基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于揭示AI认知影响的隐蔽维度，认知殖民概念拓展了AI伦理讨论。研究具有紧迫的哲学意义，强调需警惕AI对个人自主性的侵蚀。未来可结合实证研究量化认知殖民程度，并设计技术防范机制。

title: Dense Supervision, Sparse Updates: On the Sparsity and Geometry of On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (\textsc{OPD}) has recently become a prominent post-training recipe as it combines two desirable ingredients: on-policy student trajectories and dense teacher supervision, yet how this hybrid changes a model's parameters remains unclear. Across several language and vision-language model pairs and use cases, our analysis yields two main findings. On sparsity, \textsc{OPD}-style updates are small and coordinate-sparse. They are distributed across layers and are usually FFN-heavy. This sparse structure is operationally useful: training only the discovered subnetwork recovers nearly the same performance as full \textsc{OPD}. However, the sparsity-inducing SGD optimizer underperforms AdamW in our optimizer ablation, likely because dense teacher supervision preserves heterogeneous coordinate-wise gradient scales where AdamW's adaptive scaling remains useful. On geometry, the updates are numerically full-rank but spectrally concentrated; they lie mostly away from the principal singular subspaces of the source weights and fall disproportionately on coordinates where the source weights are close to zero. These findings suggest that dense teacher supervision does not turn \textsc{OPD} into ordinary dense parameter rewriting; instead, \textsc{OPD} retains important geometric signatures of on-policy post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分析参数更新的稀疏性和几何结构，揭示on-policy蒸馏并非密集参数重写，而是保持稀疏更新和谱集中特性。
light_analysis.motivation: On-policy蒸馏（OPD）结合在线学生轨迹和密集教师监督已成为重要的后训练方法，但其对模型参数的具体影响未知。理解参数更新模式有助于解释其有效性并优化训练策略，现有研究缺乏此类深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 在多个语言和视觉-语言模型对上，分析OPD更新的层分布、坐标稀疏性、秩及谱结构。发现更新主要集中于FFN层且坐标稀疏；通过子网络训练验证实用性；比较SGD与AdamW优化器，探究密集监督对梯度尺度的影响。
light_analysis.result: OPD更新小且稀疏，子网络训练可恢复近完整性能；SGD因忽略异质坐标梯度尺度而不及AdamW；更新数值满秩但谱集中，且主要作用于源权重接近零的坐标，表明更新保留on-policy几何特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 密集教师监督未使OPD变为普通密集参数重写，而是保留了on-policy后训练的关键几何签名。该发现为理解OPD机制、设计更高效后训练方法提供指导，未来可探索稀疏性在多任务场景的应用。

title: Flex4DHuman: Flexible Multi-view Video Diffusion for 4D Human Reconstruction
abstract: We present Flex4DHuman, a multi-view video diffusion model that transforms a monocular or sparse multi-view video of a dynamic subject into synchronized dense multi-view videos using only relative camera-pose conditioning. Unlike prior human-centric methods that rely on skeletons, depth maps, normals, or rendered target-view geometry, Flex4DHuman requires no explicit geometry priors and instead conditions generation through relative camera-pose positional encoding. The generated videos can be directly ingested by downstream reconstruction pipelines to create dynamic 4D Gaussian splats. Built on the Wan 2.1 1.3B text-to-video model, Flex4DHuman preserves the backbone architecture and encodes camera and view information through a five-axis positional encoding that extends spatio-temporal RoPE with view indices and continuous SE(3) relative camera geometry. A three-stage curriculum progressively trains the model for pose following, flexible reference-to-target view generation, and temporal rollout. To support temporal rollout, we train with clean historical target-view tokens. We also add multi-view captions to enable test-time text control. Combined with an off-the-shelf 4D Gaussian Splatting stage, our framework lifts monocular static-camera videos into dynamic 4D Gaussian splats. Experiments on DNA-Rendering and ActorsHQ show that Flex4DHuman surpasses prior state-of-the-art methods, while the same formulation generalizes to animal categories after mixed human-animal training. These capabilities make Flex4DHuman a practical step toward scalable 4D content creation from casual monocular videos for simulation, gaming, AR/VR, and video re-shooting.
comment: 18 pages, 8 figures. Code, and multi-view caption dataset available

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flex4DHuman，一种多视角视频扩散模型，从单目或稀疏多视角视频生成稠密多视角视频，无需显式几何先验，仅依赖相对相机位姿条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D人体重建方法通常需要骨架、深度图、法向图或渲染的几何先验作为条件，限制了其泛化能力和实用性。而单目或稀疏视角的动态人体视频重建稠密多视角视频以生成4D高斯溅射仍是挑战。本文旨在无需显式几何先验，仅通过相对相机位姿编码实现灵活的多视角视频生成，支持下游重建，从而简化4D内容创建流程。
light_analysis.method: 基于Wan 2.1 1.3B文本到视频模型，保持主干架构，通过五轴位置编码（扩展时空RoPE，加入视角索引和连续SE(3)相对相机几何）编码相机和视角信息。采用三阶段课程训练：第一阶段学习位姿跟随，第二阶段灵活参考到目标视角生成，第三阶段时间滚动。训练时使用干净的历史目标视角token，并添加多视角字幕以实现测试时文本控制。最终结合现成的4D高斯溅射阶段，将单目静态相机视频提升至动态4D高斯溅射。
light_analysis.result: 在DNA-Rendering和ActorsHQ数据集上，Flex4DHuman超越了先前最先进的方法。此外，相同的公式在混合人类-动物训练后泛化到动物类别。生成的视频可直接用于下游重建管道，创建动态4D高斯溅射，实现了从随意单目视频到可扩展4D内容创建的实用步骤。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flex4DHuman提出了一种无需显式几何先验的多视角视频扩散方法，仅依赖相对相机位姿编码，通过三阶段课程训练和五轴位置编码实现灵活生成。成果在人体和动物重建中均表现出优越性能，为模拟、游戏、AR/VR和视频重拍等应用中的可扩展4D内容创建提供了实用方案。未来可探索更高效的训练或结合其他模态。

title: World Tracing: Generative Pixel-Aligned Geometry Beyond the Visible
abstract: Image-to-3D methods often trade off faithfulness and completeness: depth estimators are anchored to input pixels but stop at the visible surface, while image-to-3D models generate complete shapes that are often misaligned with the input. We introduce World Tracing, a generative pixel-aligned geometry representation that predicts 3D points aligned with observed pixels while completing geometry beyond the visible surface. For each input pixel, World Tracing predicts an ordered stack of camera-space 3D points, where the first layer represents the visible surface and subsequent layers represent front-to-back intersections with occluded surfaces. We instantiate this representation with a world-tracing diffusion transformer, WT-DiT, which treats multiple geometry layers as separate denoising tokens coupled through factorized and global attention. WT-DiT is trained with pixel-space flow matching and a mixed noise schedule that balances visible-surface reconstruction with occluded-geometry generation. World Tracing achieves strong performance on visible-surface reconstruction and complete geometry generation across object, scene, and dynamic benchmarks, outperforming both depth predictors and image-to-3D generators. It also preserves 2D-to-3D correspondence, enabling text-driven 3D scene editing, geometry-conditioned novel-view video synthesis, and training-free integration with textured-mesh generators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出World Tracing，一种生成式像素对齐几何表示，可预测可见表面及被遮挡表面的3D点，实现完整且对齐的几何重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像转3D方法在保真度和完整性上存在权衡：深度估计器仅预测可见表面，而生成模型虽能生成完整形状却常与输入不对齐。两者均无法同时满足像素级对齐和完整几何生成，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: World Tracing为每个像素预测一个有序的相机空间3D点栈，第一层为可见表面，后续层为被遮挡表面的前后相交点。使用世界追踪扩散Transformer（WT-DiT），将多层几何视为独立去噪token，通过分解和全局注意力耦合。采用像素空间流匹配和混合噪声调度训练，平衡可见表面重建与遮挡几何生成。
light_analysis.result: 在物体、场景和动态基准测试中，World Tracing在可见表面重建和完整几何生成上均优于深度估计器和图像转3D生成器。它保持2D到3D对应性，支持文本驱动的3D场景编辑、几何条件的新颖视图视频合成，以及与纹理网格生成器的无训练集成。
light_analysis.conclusion: World Tracing统一了可见表面重建和遮挡几何生成，实现像素级对齐的完整3D重建。其生成式表示具有广泛的应用价值，包括3D编辑、视频合成等。未来可探索更高效的训练策略或扩展到更大规模场景。

title: Operadic consistency: a label-free signal for compositional reasoning failures in LLMs
abstract: Detecting LLM reasoning failures at inference time without ground-truth labels has motivated a wide range of confidence baselines, including self-consistency, semantic entropy, and P(True), built on within-question sampling and self-evaluation. Operad theory, the formalism for systems built by iterated substitution, suggests a complementary diagnostic: a model's direct answer to a compositional query should agree with the answer it produces by composing a stated decomposition of the same query. We instantiate this idea as operadic consistency (OC), a per-question signal. Across twelve instruction-tuned LLMs (4B to 671B parameters, open-weights and closed-source) on four multi-hop QA datasets, OC is strongly correlated with accuracy on every dataset (Pearson $r \in [0.86, 0.94]$, all $p \leq 0.0004$), and is the only signal we evaluate with $r \geq 0.85$ uniformly across all four datasets. Chain-of-thought self-consistency (CoT-SC; Wang et al., 2023) matches OC on HotpotQA and DROP ($r = 0.93, 0.87$) but drops to $r \approx 0.45$ on MuSiQue and StrategyQA. At the per-question level, OC contributes information beyond CoT-SC and semantic entropy on every dataset (cluster-robust $p \leq 10^{-16}$ for the OC coefficient), and the conclusion is robust to additionally controlling for constructed decomposition-aware baselines ($p \leq 10^{-13}$). The same signal yields selective-prediction improvements (accuracy at fixed coverage) over a tuned CoT-SC baseline at the equal-cost $K = 3$ budget (AUARC lifts of +0.086 to +0.096 and AUROC lifts of +0.092 to +0.164; 95% CIs exclude zero on every cell). On five frontier thinking models, where the decomposition is extracted from the model's own chain of thought, the same equal-cost comparison gives positive selective-prediction point-estimate lift on all 16 (dataset, budget, metric) cells tested, with 95% CIs excluding zero on 12 of the 16.

light_analysis.overview: 提出操作元一致性（OC）作为无标签信号，通过比较直接回答与分解组合回答的一致性，有效检测LLM组合推理失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 在推理时检测LLM推理失败需要无标签信号，现有方法如自一致性、语义熵等基于采样或自评估，但缺乏针对组合推理失败的特异性诊断。操作元理论为系统组合提供了形式化基础，能够弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 操作元一致性（OC）通过比较模型对组合查询的直接回答与通过陈述分解的组合回答的一致性，计算每个问题的信号。在12个指令微调LLM（4B-671B参数，开源和闭源）上，使用4个多跳QA数据集（HotpotQA、DROP、MuSiQue、StrategyQA）进行评估。
light_analysis.result: OC与准确性强相关（Pearson r在0.86-0.94之间，p≤0.0004），在所有数据集上均优于其他信号。在HotpotQA和DROP上与CoT-SC相当（r=0.93和0.87），但在MuSiQue和StrategyQA上CoT-SC仅r≈0.45。OC在逐问题层面提供额外信息，改进选择性预测（AUARC提升+0.086至+0.096，AUROC提升+0.092至+0.164）。在前沿推理模型上，16个测试单元中有12个95%置信区间不包含零。
light_analysis.conclusion: 操作元一致性是一种有效的无标签信号，专门针对组合推理失败，显著优于现有方法。它适用于多种模型和数据集，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的组合推理任务。

title: SkMTEB: Slovak Massive Text Embedding Benchmark and Model Adaptation
abstract: We introduce SkMTEB, the first comprehensive MTEB-style text embedding benchmark for Slovak, a low-resource West Slavic language, comprising 31 datasets across 7 task types -- nearly 4$\times$ the depth of existing multilingual benchmark coverage for Slovak. Our evaluation of 31 embedding models reveals that large instruction-tuned multilingual models achieve the strongest performance, while existing Slovak-specific models trained for NLU tasks transfer poorly to embedding tasks. To address the need for efficient, locally-deployable Slovak embeddings, we develop \texttt{e5-sk-small} (45M parameters) and \texttt{e5-sk-large} (365M) by applying vocabulary trimming and fine-tuning to Multilingual E5 models. Despite size reductions of up to 62\%, our open-source models achieve competitive performance with proprietary APIs while remaining locally deployable for semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We release the benchmark, models, datasets, and code openly, hoping our approach offers a replicable path for other under-resourced languages.

light_analysis.overview: 首个斯洛伐克语MTEB风格文本嵌入基准及高效模型适配方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 斯洛伐克语作为低资源西斯拉夫语，缺乏全面的文本嵌入评估基准。现有多语言模型虽强，但本地部署成本高；而斯洛伐克专用NLU模型在嵌入任务上迁移效果差。需构建覆盖多任务的基准并开发高效、可本地部署的嵌入模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建SkMTEB基准：31个数据集覆盖7类任务。评估31个嵌入模型，发现指令微调多语言模型最优。通过词汇修剪和微调Multilingual E5开发e5-sk-small（45M）和e5-sk-large（365M），模型大小缩减达62%，保留语义搜索与RAG能力。
light_analysis.result: e5-sk模型在保持竞争力的同时实现高效本地部署；大小缩减62%仍能与专有API性能相匹敌。SkMTEB基准覆盖深度（7类31集）是现有多语言基准的近4倍。开源模型、数据和代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkMTEB填补了斯洛伐克语嵌入评估空白，验证词汇修剪+微调可高效适配低资源语言。为其他低资源语言提供了可复制的开源方案，兼顾性能与部署效率。

title: Surflo: Consistent 3D Surface Flow Model with Global State
abstract: Geometry is invariant to viewpoint, which makes any collection of images a redundant encoding of a single 3D state. Existing feed-forward reconstruction models fail to exploit this: per-view methods emit overlapping, unaligned pointmaps that grow linearly with input count, while global-latent methods commit to a fixed, low-resolution output. We introduce Surflo, which compresses a variable number of unposed RGB views into K latent tokens-one global state-and decodes oriented 3D surface points by independently transporting them from noise onto the surface via flow matching. This frees the output from any fixed grid or token budget: the same latent yields from a few thousand to a million points in a single forward pass. To suppress the local inconsistencies inherent to independent per-point decoding, an inference-time guidance term correlates nearby points by injecting a photometric gradient during ODE integration. Surflo matches or surpasses feed-forward baselines on surface metrics, runs an order of magnitude faster than optimization-based methods that require hundreds of views, and is the only feed-forward approach to combine a global latent with arbitrary-resolution decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Surflo，利用全局潜变量和流匹配实现任意分辨率3D表面重建，解决现有方法的不一致性和固定分辨率问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈重建方法存在局限：基于视角的方法输出重叠且未对齐的点云，随输入视图数量线性增长；全局潜变量方法则受限于固定的低分辨率输出。这些方法未能利用几何的视角不变性，导致冗余编码和效率低下。本文旨在设计一种能压缩任意数量未定位RGB视图为全局状态，并解码出高质量、一致且任意分辨率的3D表面点的方法。
light_analysis.method: Surflo将可变数量的未定位RGB视图压缩为K个潜变量令牌（全局状态），然后通过流匹配独立地将噪声点从噪声分布运输到3D表面，从而解码出定向表面点。该方法不受固定网格或令牌预算限制，单次前向传播即可生成从数千到百万个点。为抑制独立逐点解码引起的局部不一致性，在ODE积分过程中引入指导项，通过注入光度梯度来关联邻近点。
light_analysis.result: Surflo在表面指标上匹配或超越前馈基线方法，且比需要数百视图的优化方法快一个数量级。它是唯一结合全局潜变量与任意分辨率解码的前馈方法，实验验证了其生成高分辨率、一致3D表面的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Surflo通过全局潜变量和流匹配实现了高效的3D表面重建，兼顾了分辨率灵活性和几何一致性。其学术价值在于提出了一种新型的前馈框架，实际应用可加速从多视图图像生成3D模型。未来可探索更复杂的引导机制或扩展到动态场景。

title: Recursive Agent Harnesses
abstract: Recursive language models (RLMs) showed that recursion over model calls is an effective strategy for long-context reasoning, and production coding agents have begun to write code that spawns subagents at scale, most recently in Anthropic's dynamic workflows. We name and study the pattern between these two lines of work, where the recursive unit is a full agent harness with filesystem tools, code execution, and planning rather than a model call with no tools. We call this the Recursive Agent Harness (RAH) and frame it as harness recursion, the code-first extension to the model recursion of RLMs. A parent agent generates and runs an executable script that spawns subagent harnesses in parallel for fine-grained workloads and uses structured function calls for small subtasks. We provide a controlled evaluation on long-context reasoning. With the backbone held fixed at GPT-5 to match the published Codex and RLM baselines, RAH improves the Codex coding-agent baseline from 71.75% to 81.36% on Oolong-Synthetic (199 samples, 13 context-length buckets up to 4M tokens), a gain attributable to the harness rather than the model. With a stronger backbone, Claude Sonnet 4.5, the same design reaches 89.77%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出递归代理框架（RAH），将递归从模型调用扩展到完整代理工具与环境，显著提升长上下文推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有递归语言模型（RLMs）通过递归调用改进长上下文推理，但仅限模型调用；而生产编码代理已开始编写代码生成子代理，但缺乏统一框架。RAH填补空白，将递归单元扩展为包含文件系统、代码执行和规划的全代理框架，以更高效处理细粒度工作负载和长上下文任务。
light_analysis.method: RAH中父代理生成并运行可执行脚本，并行创建多个子代理处理细粒度任务，通过结构化函数调用处理小任务。骨干模型固定为GPT-5与Codex和RLM基线对比，在Oolong-Synthetic基准（199样本，13个上下文长度桶，最大4M tokens）上评估长上下文推理。关键创新在于工具和环境层面的递归，而非仅模型调用。
light_analysis.result: 在Oolong-Synthetic上，RAH将Codex基线从71.75%提升至81.36%，提升归因于框架本身。使用更强骨干Claude Sonnet 4.5，性能达89.77%。证实RAH在长上下文推理中显著优于现有方法，且性能随骨干增强而提高。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAH通过将递归引入代理全栈，在长上下文推理上取得显著改进，展示了工具集成和并行子代理的价值。未来可应用于复杂代理工作流和自动化编程，但需进一步研究递归深度和资源开销的权衡。

title: The Stable Recovery Manifold: Geometric Principles Governing Recoverability in Continual Learning
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting is often viewed as the destruction of previously learned knowledge during sequential learning. Building on the Accessibility Collapse framework, we investigate the geometric structure of recoverability in continual learning. Using Split CIFAR-100 and a sequentially trained ResNet-18, we analyze recoverability, representational drift, and recovery complexity across ten tasks. We introduce Recovery Subspace Dimensionality (k_t), a measure of the minimum number of singular directions required to preserve 90 percent of full probe performance. Contrary to our Recoverability Diffusion hypothesis, recovery dimensionality remains stable throughout training (mean k_t = 8.0) despite substantial representational drift. Principal-angle drift strongly predicts recoverability (r = -0.862), and a simple geometric model explains 82.2 percent of recoverability variance. These findings support the Stable Recovery Manifold hypothesis, suggesting that forgotten knowledge remains compactly decodable despite representational reorganization. The results indicate that catastrophic forgetting is primarily an accessibility and manifold-alignment problem rather than information destruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出稳定恢复流形假设，揭示灾难性遗忘本质是可访问性而非信息破坏。
light_analysis.motivation: 灾难性遗忘是持续学习的核心难题，传统观点认为是先前知识的破坏。基于可访问性崩溃框架，本研究探索可恢复性的几何结构，旨在理解遗忘的底层机制。该问题重要，因为现有方法多针对信息保护，而几何视角可能提供更根本的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 使用Split CIFAR-100和ResNet-18进行十任务顺序训练。提出恢复子空间维度（k_t）度量，即保留90%全探针性能所需的最小奇异方向数。分析表示漂移和恢复复杂度，通过主角度漂移预测可恢复性，并构建简单几何模型解释方差。
light_analysis.result: 恢复子空间维度在训练中保持稳定（均值k_t=8.0），尽管表示漂移显著。主角度漂移与可恢复性强负相关（r=-0.862），几何模型解释82.2%的方差。这些结果支持稳定恢复流形假设，表明遗忘不是信息破坏，而是表示重组后知识仍可紧凑解码。
light_analysis.conclusion: 灾难性遗忘主要归因于可访问性和流形对齐问题，而非信息损失。该发现为设计抗遗忘算法提供了新方向，例如通过保持表示流形对齐。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务和模型，以验证稳定恢复流形的普适性。

title: Operads for compositional reasoning in LLMs
abstract: Question decomposition, i.e. breaking a complex query into simpler sub-queries whose answers are composed to produce a final answer, is a widely used strategy for improving LLM reasoning, yet it currently lacks a rigorous mathematical foundation. In this paper, we propose operads, mathematical structures that model many-in, one-out operations and compositions thereof, as a natural framework for describing question decomposition. We define the questions operad $Q$, in which operations correspond to question templates and composition corresponds to substitution of sub-answers, and show how QA models can be interpreted as algebras over $Q$. Beyond reframing existing practice, this operadic perspective points toward new methods, in particular a notion of operadic consistency, which measures whether a QA model's answers agree across the partial collapses of a question decomposition tree. Empirical evaluation of operadic consistency is reported in our companion paper (Bottman, Liu, and Richardson, 2026), which finds it strongly correlated with accuracy across twelve LLMs and four multi-hop QA datasets and outperforming standard temperature-based self-consistency baselines. We argue that operads are the natural mathematical home for question decomposition, and that invariants such as operadic consistency open new directions for analyzing and improving the reliability of multi-step reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出operads作为问题分解的数学框架，定义operadic consistency度量，提升LLM多步推理可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM中的问题分解策略缺乏严格的数学基础，现有方法难以系统化分析和保证推理一致性。该研究旨在为复杂查询分解为子问题并组合答案的过程提供形式化理论支撑，从而提升多步推理的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 定义questions operad Q，其中操作对应问题模板，组合对应子答案替换。将QA模型解释为Q上的代数，并引入operadic consistency概念，度量模型在问题分解树部分折叠时答案的一致性。实验在12个LLM和4个多跳QA数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: operadic consistency与准确率强相关，优于基于温度的自洽性基线。具体数据未在摘要中给出，但提及在伴随论文中报告，显示该度量能有效评估多步推理质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: operads为问题分解提供了自然的数学框架，operadic consistency为分析和改进LLM多步推理可靠性开辟新方向。未来可进一步探索其他operadic不变量及应用到更复杂推理任务。

title: From Tokens to Faces: Investigating Discrete Speech Representations for 3D Facial Animation
abstract: The choice of speech representation is critical in speech-driven 3D facial animation. Representations differ in what they encode: SSL features emphasize segmental and semantic cues, neural codecs yield latents optimized for acoustic reconstruction, and ASR-style objectives produce label-based spaces. We evaluate four speech representation families for 3D facial synthesis, comparing their facial reconstruction quality across two facial decoders using objective metrics and a perceptual evaluation. We additionally conduct probing analyses that relate tokenized representations to phonetic units and to articulatory deformations. We found that encoding phonetic classes is beneficial for accurate facial animation prediction on both semantic and label-based representations with comparable facial animation quality. From the latter, we introduce an Audio Visual Text-to-Speech (AVTTS) pipeline that leverages, as a shared space, discrete representations to decode speech and 3D facial motion.
comment: This work has been accepted in Interspeech 2026

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估不同离散语音表示对3D面部动画的影响，提出基于离散表示的视听文本转语音流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音驱动的3D面部动画中，语音表示的选择至关重要。现有表示（如SSL特征、神经编解码器、ASR特征）编码信息不同，但缺乏对它们在下游面部合成任务中的系统性比较。理解不同表示对动画质量的影响有助于选择或设计更优的语音特征，提升动画真实感和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 评估四种语音表示家族：SSL特征（强调分段和语义线索）、神经编解码器（优化声学重建的潜在表示）、ASR目标（标签空间）。使用两种面部解码器进行面部重建，通过客观指标和感知评估比较质量。进行探针分析，将分词表示与音素单元和发音变形关联。基于发现，引入AVTTS流水线，利用离散表示作为共享空间联合解码语音和3D面部运动。
light_analysis.result: 编码语音类别（如音素）对准确的面部动画预测有益，语义和基于标签的表示在面部动画质量上表现相当。探针分析表明离散表示与音素和发音变形相关。AVTTS流水线能够从离散表示同步生成语音和面部动画，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统比较了多种语音表示在3D面部动画中的效果，证明了音素编码的重要性。提出的AVTTS流水线展示了离散表示在跨模态生成中的潜力，可用于语音和面部动画的联合生成。未来可探索更优的离散表示学习策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Revisiting Vehicle Color Recognition in Long-Tailed Surveillance Scenarios
abstract: Vehicle color recognition is an important cue for vehicle identification in surveillance systems, especially when license plates are illegible due to low resolution, occlusion, motion blur, or poor illumination. However, real-world vehicle color distributions are highly imbalanced, making overall accuracy insufficient to assess performance on rare but operationally relevant colors. This paper presents a comprehensive study of vehicle color recognition under severe class imbalance using UFPR-VeSV, a challenging real-world surveillance dataset. We investigate synthetic minority-class augmentation through two off-the-shelf generative strategies: text-conditioned image generation with RunDiffusion/JuggernautXL and image-conditioned color editing with Gemini 2.0 Flash. The curated synthetic data are combined with modern visual representations, loss reweighting, learning-rate scheduling, color-safe augmentation, foreground-aware preprocessing, and ensemble fusion. The bestperforming approach achieves 94.6% micro accuracy and 79.7% macro accuracy, improving macro accuracy by 8.2 percentage points over recent literature. A manual error analysis further shows that many remaining failures are visually ambiguous even for human annotators, highlighting the practical limits of color-based vehicle identification in unconstrained surveillance imagery. The generated images and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/viniciusorru/vcr-synthetic
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) - V3SC Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 针对长尾分布下车辆颜色识别问题，提出合成数据增强方法结合多种技术，在UFPR-VeSV数据集上显著提升宏准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 监控系统中车辆颜色识别是重要线索，但真实场景中颜色分布极不均衡，整体准确率无法衡量稀有颜色的性能。现有方法在长尾场景下表现不足，需要提升对少数类的识别能力。
light_analysis.method: 使用UFPR-VeSV数据集，采用两种生成式方法进行少数类数据增强：文本条件图像生成（RunDiffusion/JuggernautXL）和图像条件颜色编辑（Gemini 2.0 Flash）。结合现代视觉表征、损失重加权、学习率调度、颜色安全增强、前景感知预处理和集成融合等技术。
light_analysis.result: 最佳方法在UFPR-VeSV上达到94.6%微平均准确率和79.7%宏平均准确率，宏准确率较近期文献提升8.2个百分点。人工错误分析表明，多数剩余失败案例对人类标注者也具有视觉模糊性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过合成数据增强有效缓解了长尾分布下的车辆颜色识别问题，宏准确率显著提升。工作揭示了颜色识别的实际局限，提供了开源数据和代码，有助于推动监控场景下的车辆重识别研究。

title: Beyond Uniform Tokens: Adaptive Compression for Time Series Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled time series (TS) analysis by jointly modeling numerical observations and textual context through a shared token interface. However, TS tokens and prompt tokens exhibit fundamentally different information structures, making uniform token processing inefficient. In this paper, we study token efficiency in TS language modeling from an asymmetric-token perspective. We show that TS tokens have highly uneven spectral contributions, where many tokens share redundant frequency patterns while a small subset preserves critical temporal evidence. We also observe that prompt-token influence attenuates with model depth, suggesting that full prompt retention across all layers is unnecessary. Based on these findings, we develop an adaptive token budgeting framework that compresses TS tokens via frequency-domain structure and progressively reduces prompt tokens across layers. Experiments across forecasting, classification, imputation, and anomaly detection demonstrate up to \textit{\textbf{7.68$\times$}} inference acceleration and performance gains in \textit{\textbf{78\%}} of evaluated settings, showing the effectiveness of asymmetric token compression for scalable TS foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应令牌压缩框架，通过频域压缩TS令牌并逐层减少提示令牌，实现高效时间序列语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有TS语言模型将数值与文本令牌统一处理，但两者信息结构不同，均匀处理导致效率低下。发现TS令牌频谱贡献不均，许多令牌包含冗余频率；提示令牌影响随模型深度衰减，无需全层保留。这些观察表明需不对称压缩以提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 开发自适应令牌预算框架，基于频域结构识别并压缩冗余TS令牌，保留关键时序证据；同时根据层深度动态减少提示令牌数量。该方法在保持性能的同时降低计算开销，适用于多种时间序列任务。
light_analysis.result: 在预测、分类、插补和异常检测任务中，推理加速最高达7.68倍，78%的实验设置下性能提升（超过基线）。证明了不对称令牌压缩对可扩展TS基础模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过不对称令牌处理显著提升TS语言模型的效率与性能，为构建大规模时间序列基础模型提供新思路。未来可探索自适应策略的泛化性及更复杂压缩机制。

title: Beyond Runtime Enforcement: Shield Synthesis as Defensibility Analysis for Adversarial Networks
abstract: Shielded reinforcement learning is typically presented as a runtime safety mechanism that compiles temporal-logic specifications into automata restricting an agent's actions. We argue this is the wrong product. The same automata-theoretic machinery -- specification compilation, product game construction, attractor computation, and winning-region extraction -- is better read as a design-time analytical instrument whose outputs are structural insights about a system rather than runtime constraints on a deployed agent.   We instantiate this through a constrained two-player safety game for network defense. The two specifications are enforced asymmetrically: the defender specification defines the unsafe region of the game, whereas the attacker specification restricts the adversary's legal actions during attractor computation. Solving the game yields a defensibility verdict -- a formal certificate that a topology-specification pair is or is not defensible -- with the associated winning region and shield.   Beyond the binary verdict, we derive topology-level metrics from the attractor structure and combine them with post-convergence behavior from shield-constrained adversarial multi-agent reinforcement learning. Together these form a defensibility fingerprint capturing both a network's formal safety properties and its operational behavior under adaptive play.   A what-if analysis shows that formal defensibility and operational effectiveness capture distinct aspects of security: small architectural changes can produce large shifts in operational outcomes while leaving formal safety margins nearly unchanged. Shield synthesis is thus most valuable not as a deployment mechanism for safe agents, but as a framework for answering architectural questions about whether, where, and how a system can be defended. The defensibility verdict is the output, not the safe policy.
comment: 26 pages, 7 figures, 7 tables. Under review at JAIR. Code: https://github.com/AchrafHsain7/Bastion

light_analysis.overview: 重新定位屏蔽强化学习为设计时分析工具，通过防御性分析评估系统的可防御性而非生成安全策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有屏蔽强化学习通常作为运行时安全机制，但作者认为其最佳用途应为设计时分析。利用相同的自动机理论方法，可以从系统结构洞察中探讨网络防御中拓扑-规范对的可防御性，弥补现有方法仅关注运行时约束的不足，为架构设计提供更深刻的见解。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是一个受约束的双人安全博弈，非对称执行防御者和攻击者规范：防御者定义不安全区域，攻击者限制合法动作。求解博弈得到防御性判定（可防御性证书）、获胜区域和屏蔽。从吸引子结构导出拓扑级指标，并结合屏蔽约束的对抗多智能体强化学习，形成涵盖形式安全和操作行为的可防御性指纹。
light_analysis.result: 通过假设分析表明，形式化可防御性和操作有效性捕捉了安全的不同方面：小的架构变化（如拓扑调整）可导致操作结果巨大变化，而形式安全边际几乎不变。这验证了屏蔽合成最有价值的是作为框架回答系统可防御性相关问题，而非生成安全策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是将屏蔽强化学习重新定义为设计时分析工具，输出防御性判定而非运行时的安全策略。学术价值在于提供网络防御的结构性洞察，实际应用价值在于指导设计师理解系统拓扑与规范的防御性。未来工作可能涉及更复杂博弈模型或扩展至其他领域。

title: One Polluted Page Is Enough: Evaluating Web Content Pollution in Generative Recommenders
abstract: Search-augmented LLMs increasingly mediate everyday consumer recommendations by retrieving live web content. This creates a new risk: generative recommenders may consume polluted web content, such as fake reviews and promotional pages crafted to mislead recommendations. We ask: to what extent do search-augmented LLMs become unwitting promoters of fake products when consuming polluted retrieval results? To answer this, we introduce FORGE (Fake Online Recommendations in Generative Environments), a benchmark for measuring fake-product promotion under controlled web-content pollution. Given an upstream search result, FORGE locally rewrites real products in retrieved web pages into fake ones to simulate web-content pollution, and measures how often the LLM recommends the fake product. FORGE covers 225 real-world products across 15 categories and 5 consumer scenarios. Across 12 commercial and open-weights LLMs, all models are vulnerable: a single polluted page yields fooled rates of up to 27%, while the full top-3 replacement raises this to 73.8%. Vulnerability varies substantially across categories, increasing when models lack stable prior knowledge of the relevant products. Reasoning does not mitigate this vulnerability; instead, it often generates spurious social proof to justify false recommendations. We evaluate three defenses: skepticism prompting and consensus filtering (over model priors or cross-document evidence). Skepticism can exacerbate vulnerability, much like reasoning, while filtering risks suppressing legitimate products. We release FORGE at https://github.com/leoluolol/forge-benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FORGE基准，评估搜索增强LLM在推荐中受网络内容污染的风险，发现单页污染即可导致高达27%的虚假推荐。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索增强LLM日益成为日常消费推荐的媒介，但检索到的网络内容可能被污染（如虚假评论、促销页面），导致模型无意中推广虚假产品。现有研究缺乏对该风险的系统评估，尤其是污染程度与模型脆弱性的量化关系。
light_analysis.method: 提出FORGE基准，通过将检索网页中的真实产品本地重写为虚假产品来模拟网络内容污染。涵盖15个类别225个真实产品和5个消费场景。对12个商业和开源LLM进行测试，评估单页污染和top-3污染下的虚假推荐率。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型均易受攻击：单页污染导致最高27%的虚假推荐率，top-3污染升至73.8%。漏洞随类别变化，当模型缺乏稳定先验知识时更严重。推理不仅未缓解漏洞，反而生成虚假社会证据。防御方法中，怀疑提示可能加剧漏洞，过滤则可能压制合法产品。
light_analysis.conclusion: 搜索增强LLM在推荐中显著易受网络内容污染，现有推理和防御手段效果有限。FORGE为评估和缓解此类风险提供了基准，未来需关注更鲁棒的推荐系统设计。

title: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility
abstract: Agent systems are advancing quickly across domains, but their evaluation remains fragmented. Most benchmarks rely on fixed, LLM-centric harnesses that require heavy integration, create test-production mismatch, and limit fair comparison across diverse agent designs. The root problem is the lack of an open, agent-agnostic assessment interface. We advocate Agentified Agent Assessment (AAA), where evaluation is performed by judge agents and all participants interact through standardized protocols: A2A for task management and MCP for tool access. Conventional benchmarking defines two separate interfaces, one for the benchmark and one for the agent, while AAA only needs one; this yields a generic, unified framework that separates assessment logic from agent implementation and enables reproducible, interoperable, and multi-agent evaluation. We further introduce AgentBeats as a concrete realization of AAA: we identify five practical operation modes that make standardized assessment compatible with real-world constraints on openness, privacy, and reproducibility.   To evaluate our design at scale, we conduct two studies: a five-month open competition that drew 298 judge agents across 12 categories together with 467 subject agents from independent participants, showing that AAA applies across a heterogeneous range of benchmarks; and a case study on coding agents that confirms agentified evaluation preserves fidelity with the public record while surfacing previously missing head-to-head results, yielding research insights about agent design. Combining a community-scale field study and a controlled coding case study, we verify that AAA delivers coverage, practicality, and fidelity across heterogeneous scenarios at scale. Together, AAA and AgentBeats offer a clear path toward open, standardized, and reproducible agent assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AAA框架和AgentBeats实现，通过标准化协议实现开放、可复现的智能体评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前智能体系统评估碎片化，固定LLM测试框架导致集成困难、测试-生产不匹配，缺乏开放且通用的评估接口。这限制了不同智能体设计的公平比较和评估的可复现性，亟需一个智能体无关的标准化评估方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agentified Agent Assessment (AAA)，采用judge agent通过标准化协议（A2A任务管理、MCP工具访问）进行评估，统一评估与智能体接口，分离评估逻辑与实现。AgentBeats实现五种操作模式，兼顾开放性、隐私和可复现性。
light_analysis.result: 五个月开放竞赛吸引298个judge agent和467个subject agent，验证AAA在多类别基准上的通用性；编码智能体案例研究证实评估保持准确性，并发现此前缺失的对比结果，证明大规模异质场景下的覆盖性、实用性和保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: AAA和AgentBeats为开放、标准化、可复现的智能体评估提供了清晰路径，具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多智能体类型和场景。

title: Reasoning as Pattern Matching: Shared Mechanisms in Human and LLM Everyday Reasoning
abstract: When large language models (LLMs) fail to generalize or make haphazard errors in reasoning, it is often taken as evidence that LLMs are not truly reasoning, but rather performing a kind of pattern matching. The implication is that people's behavior does not exhibit the same types of failures because human reasoning uses principled and abstract world models. We evaluate human participants and 25 LLMs on their ability to engage in common-sense reasoning about a variety of everyday situations and observe similar patterns of errors in both people and models. We then identify the set of attention heads driving LLM responses and find that these heads implement a form of pattern-matching. These attention heads allow us to predict seemingly inexplicable reasoning errors in people caused by ostensibly irrelevant prompt details. Taken together, our results suggest that everyday causal reasoning in people and LLMs is more consistent with a form of pattern-matching than with abstract world models.
comment: 13 pages main text, 51 pages supplementary text

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过实验发现人类和LLM在日常推理中均采用模式匹配而非抽象世界模型，挑战了传统认知。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有观点认为LLM推理错误源于模式匹配而非真正推理，而人类使用原则性世界模型。本文旨在探究人类推理是否也存在类似模式匹配机制，并解释LLM与人类错误模式的相似性，从而重新审视推理的本质。
light_analysis.method: 评估人类和25个LLM在常识推理任务中的表现，比较错误模式。通过分析LLM中的注意力头，识别出实现模式匹配的机制，并利用这些注意力头预测人类因无关提示细节产生的推理错误。
light_analysis.result: 人类和LLM在常识推理中表现出相似错误模式；LLM中的注意力头实现模式匹配，且能准确预测人类由看似无关的提示细节引发的推理错误，表明两者底层机制一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示日常因果推理在人类和LLM中更符合模式匹配而非抽象世界模型，对理解推理的认知机制和LLM行为具有重要价值，并指出未来需进一步探索模式匹配的具体实现细节。

title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning from Delayed Marketplace Feedback for Objective-Weight Adaptation in Three-Sided Dispatch
abstract: Dispatch in three-sided marketplaces provides a natural setting for reinforcement learning from world feedback: decisions are evaluated by delayed operational outcomes such as delivery speed, courier utilization, and merchant congestion. We present a deployed reinforcement learning system at DoorDash that adapts dispatch objective weights in a large-scale food-delivery marketplace using delayed signals. Rather than replacing the combinatorial assignment optimizer, a store-level policy learned from logged marketplace data selects a discrete multiplier that shifts the dispatch optimizer's tradeoff between delivery quality and batching efficiency. This interface enables offline policy learning under noisy, delayed, and coupled feedback while preserving production feasibility constraints and operational safeguards. We train a shared value function using centralized offline data and decentralized store-level execution, with Double Q-learning targets and a conservative regularizer to reduce out-of-distribution value overestimation. In a production switchback experiment, the offline-trained policy increases batching and reduces courier-side time costs without degrading customer-facing delivery quality. Results illustrate how world feedback from a live economic and logistics system can be used to safely adapt decision policies online.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback (RLxF)

light_analysis.overview: 提出从延迟市场反馈中学习多智能体强化学习策略，在DoorDash三边调度中动态调整目标权重，提升批量化效率并降低配送成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 三边调度（订单、骑手、商家）需平衡配送质量与批量化效率，但优化目标权重难以手动设定。现有方法依赖即时反馈，而实际运营中反馈延迟、噪声大且耦合性强，直接强化学习可能违反生产约束。亟需一种能利用延迟世界反馈的安全策略学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出store级策略学习离散乘数，修改调度优化器中的目标权值，而非替换组合优化器。使用集中式离线数据训练共享价值函数，结合Double Q-learning和保守正则化器（CQL）减少分布外价值高估。在DoorDash大规模食品配送平台部署，通过滞后市场反馈（配送速度、骑手利用率、商家拥堵）离线训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 生产环境A/B实验中，离线训练策略在保持客户配送质量不变的前提下，显著提升订单批量化比例并降低骑手侧时间成本。具体数值摘要未明确，但确认了安全适应策略的有效性，表明世界反馈可用于在线调整决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了如何利用真实物流系统的延迟反馈安全地在线调优调度策略，具有实用价值。局限性包括需依赖离线数据质量，未来可探索多智能体协同及动态环境下的持续学习。

title: Beyond the Commitment Boundary: Probing Epiphenomenal Chain-of-Thought in Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is the dominant paradigm for inference-time scaling in language models, yet the causal influence of individual steps on the final answer poorly understood. We estimate each step's causal importance via early exit and use this measure to study how answers form across the reasoning traces of several model families. Across diverse tasks, we find that reasoning typically crosses a \emph{commitment boundary} -- a sharp transition from transient intermediate guesses to a stable, high-confidence answer. This transition often happens in a single step, well before the model's reasoning block ends, and is followed by \emph{epiphenomenal} CoT steps that leave the final answer probability unaltered. Using attention probes, we show that answer-formation stages can be linearly decoded from intermediate reasoning steps with high accuracy and generalize robustly to unseen reasoning tasks. We exploit this signal to early-exit reasoning blocks at the commitment boundary, reducing the length of CoTs up to 55\% on average with negligible impact on model performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出承诺边界概念，揭示CoT推理中答案形成的早期稳定阶段，并利用早期退出方法减少推理步骤至多55%而不影响性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理是当前语言模型推理时扩展的主流范式，但各推理步骤对最终答案的因果影响尚不清楚。现有方法缺乏对步骤重要性的理解，导致计算资源浪费在无关步骤上。本研究旨在量化步骤的因果重要性，定位答案形成的关键阶段，从而优化推理效率。
light_analysis.method: 通过早期退出方法估计每个推理步骤的因果重要性，并定义承诺边界作为答案从中间猜测转变为稳定高置信度的临界点。使用注意力探针线性解码答案形成阶段，从中间推理步骤中提取信号。基于此，在承诺边界处早期退出推理块，减少CoT长度。实验涵盖多种模型族和任务。
light_analysis.result: 发现推理通常在一个单步中跨越承诺边界，随后是伴生CoT步骤（不改变最终答案概率）。注意力探针能高精度线性解码答案形成阶段，并泛化到未见推理任务。早期退出方法平均减少CoT长度至多55%，而对模型性能影响可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了CoT推理中答案形成的早期稳定阶段，证明后续步骤多为伴生现象。提出基于承诺边界的早期退出策略，显著提升推理效率而不牺牲准确性。该发现有助于理解语言模型的推理机制，并为推理时计算优化提供新方向。未来可探索更细粒度的步骤因果分析和任务自适应边界。

title: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis
abstract: We introduce EpiBench, a verifiable benchmark for short-horizon epigenomics analysis. EpiBench evaluates whether agents can make well-defined analysis decisions from realistic workflow states and return deterministically gradable answers. The benchmark includes 106 evaluations across CUT\&Tag/CUT\&RUN, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq, and DNA methylation workflows. Across 5,088 valid trajectories from 16 model-harness pairs, no system passed a majority of attempts: GPT-5.5 / Pi led at 45.0\% (143/318 attempts; 95\% confidence interval (CI), 36.3--53.7), followed by GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex at 39.9\% (127/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 31.6--48.3). Claude Opus 4.8 Max / Pi and GPT-5.4 / Pi each passed 39.0\% (124/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 30.2--47.8 and 31.0--47.0, respectively). Performance varies across assay types, and many failed runs still contain parts of the correct answer. Agents often found the right files and computed useful intermediate results, but failed when the task required deeper, assay-specific scientific judgment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EpiBench，一个可验证的基准，用于评估AI代理在短周期表观基因组学分析中的决策能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 表观基因组学分析中，AI代理需要做出准确的科学决策，但现有评估缺乏可验证性和确定性。该研究旨在构建一个基准，评估代理能否从真实工作流状态中做出良好定义的分析决策，并返回可确定性评分的答案，以解决当前评估不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: EpiBench包含106个评估任务，覆盖CUT&Tag/CUT&RUN、ATAC-seq、ChIP-seq和DNA甲基化工作流。通过16个模型-工具配对生成5088条有效轨迹，评估代理决策。关键创新在于可验证设计，确保答案可确定性评分。
light_analysis.result: 最佳系统GPT-5.5/Pi通过率45.0%（143/318），GPT-5.5/OpenAI Codex 39.9%，Claude Opus 4.8 Max/Pi和GPT-5.4/Pi均为39.0%。性能因测定类型而异，许多失败运行仍包含部分正确答案，但深层科学判断任务失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: EpiBench揭示了当前AI代理在表观基因组学分析中的局限性，尤其是在需要领域特定科学判断的任务上。该基准为未来研究提供了可验证的评估框架，有助于提升代理在真实生物信息学工作流中的能力。

title: Reward Modeling for Multi-Agent Orchestration
abstract: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on Large Language Models (LLMs) require effective orchestration to coordinate specialized agents, yet training such orchestrators is hindered by limited supervision and high computational cost. We propose Orchestration Reward Modeling (OrchRM), a self-supervised framework for evaluating orchestration quality without human annotations. OrchRM leverages intermediate artifacts from multi-agent executions to construct win-lose pairs for Bradley-Terry reward model training. Unlike existing MAS test-time scaling and orchestrator training frameworks that rely on costly sub-agent rollouts, OrchRM operates directly at the orchestration level, enabling efficient and high-performing reward-guided orchestrator training and MAS test-time scaling. OrchRM improves training efficiency by up to 10x in token usage while improving MAS test-time scaling performance by up to 8% in accuracy. These gains consistently transfer across multiple domains, including mathematical reasoning, web-based question answering, and multi-hop reasoning, demonstrating orchestration-level reward modeling as a scalable direction for robust multi-agent orchestration. Code will be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/OrchRM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督编排奖励建模框架OrchRM，无需人工标注即可高效训练多智能体编排器。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统依赖大语言模型，但编排器训练受限于监督信号不足和高计算成本。现有方法依赖昂贵的子智能体回滚，效率低下。OrchRM通过直接建模编排质量，解决了这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: OrchRM利用多智能体执行中的中间产物构建胜-负对，训练Bradley-Terry奖励模型。该框架在编排层直接评估质量，无需子智能体回滚，支持高效的奖励引导编排器训练和测试时缩放。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理、网页问答、多跳推理等任务中，OrchRM将训练效率提升10倍（token使用），测试时缩放准确率提升8%，且性能增益跨领域一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 编排级奖励建模为鲁棒多智能体编排提供了可扩展方向，克服了监督和计算瓶颈。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的奖励建模策略。

title: Multiagent Protocols with Aggregated Confidence Signals
abstract: Confidence is used for reliability, oversight, and a range of downstream decision tasks in Natural Language Processing (NLP), yet no existing method produces or evaluates a confidence for the output of a multiagent system. Prior work uses confidence within multiagent debate (MAD) to weight messages, trigger debate, or calibrate individual agents, but it never aggregates these into a single confidence for the system itself. We introduce three protocols that produce a final answer along with a single aggregated confidence by first transforming raw confidence signals to make them comparable across models, then combining them via soft voting or a probability fusion we call Bayesian fusion. This aggregated confidence is substantially more discriminative (AUARC) than that of the best single agent or the standard debate baselines, while correctness (F1-score) stays stable and recovers the losses MAD incurs on more ambiguous tasks. Analyzing two estimators, sequence probability and self-report, alongside parametric and non-parametric calibrators, we find that calibration improves F1 for both estimators while AUARC is less reliant on it. We evaluate six homogeneous and heterogeneous debating pairs per benchmark, across five benchmarks and four task types, spanning a range of model capabilities and sizes.
comment: 22 pages and 5 figures, 9 pages and 2 figures before the appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出了三种多智能体协议，通过聚合置信度信号提升系统输出的判别能力，并保持正确率稳定。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP中置信度用于可靠性和下游任务，但多智能体系统缺乏统一的置信度评估方法。先前工作虽在辩论中使用置信度加权或校准个体，但未聚合为系统级置信度。本文旨在解决这一问题，提供可比较、可聚合的置信度以增强多智能体系统的可解释性和决策可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出了三种协议：首先通过参数或非参数校准器将原始置信度（序列概率或自我报告）转换为跨模型可比较的信号，然后通过软投票或贝叶斯融合（概率融合）得到最终答案和聚合置信度。评估了六种同质和异质辩论对，涉及五个基准和四种任务类型，涵盖不同模型能力和大小。
light_analysis.result: 聚合置信度在判别能力（AUARC）上显著优于最佳单智能体或标准辩论基线，而正确率（F1分数）保持稳定，并恢复了辩论在模糊任务上的损失。校准对F1有提升，而AUARC对校准依赖性较低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为多智能体系统提供聚合置信度，提高了判别能力且不牺牲正确率。研究具有学术价值，可应用于需要可靠置信度的下游任务（如人机交互）。未来可探索更多置信度信号和聚合策略，以及扩展到更复杂系统中。

title: Simplex-Constrained Sparse Bagging: Transitioning from Uniform Priors to Sparse Posteriors in Ensemble Learning
abstract: We present Simplex-Constrained Sparse Bagging (SCSB), a mathematically rigorous framework for post-training compression and probability calibration of bootstrap-based bagging ensembles. Standard bagging ensembles (such as Random Forests, Bagged SVMs, and Bagged Neural Networks) assign uniform voting power to all constituent estimators. However, this naive uniform prior ignores the varying local competence of base estimators and contributes to model overconfidence. We formulate ensemble pruning and calibration as a joint optimization problem over the probability simplex by minimizing the Out-Of-Bag (OOB) loss. To induce sparsity, we address the theoretical "L1-simplex paradox" -- the mathematical reality that the L1 norm is constant on the simplex and fails to prune -- by introducing a concave quadratic penalty. SCSB is model-agnostic and achieves up to 96% ensemble compression, yielding linear inference speedups and superior probability calibration (lowered Expected Calibration Error) while preserving or enhancing generalization accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单纯形约束稀疏装袋（SCSB），通过后训练压缩和概率校准实现集成学习从均匀先验到稀疏后验的转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准装袋集成（如随机森林、装袋SVM和神经网络）对基学习器赋予均匀投票权，忽略了它们在局部区域的能力差异，导致模型过度自信。现有方法缺乏同时进行集成剪枝和概率校准的数学框架。该研究旨在解决这一实际问题，提高集成的效率和可靠性，同时保持或增强泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: SCSB将集成剪枝和校准联合建模为概率单纯形上的优化问题，通过最小化包外（OOB）损失来求解。为诱导稀疏性，针对L1范数在单纯形上恒为常数而无法进行特征选择的“L1-单纯形悖论”，引入凹二次惩罚项。该方法模型无关，可应用于任何基于bootstrap的装袋集成。
light_analysis.result: SCSB实现了高达96%的集成压缩，从而获得线性的推理速度提升。在概率校准方面，降低了期望校准误差（ECE），提高了校准质量。同时，泛化准确率得以保持或提升。实验表明了其在多个装袋模型上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCSB提供了一个数学严谨的框架，同时实现装袋集成的压缩和概率校准，解决了均匀先验的问题。其模型无关性和高压缩率具有实际应用价值，可用于资源受限场景。未来工作可探索更高效的优化算法或扩展到其他集成方法。

title: Towards Effective Waste Segmentation for Automated Waste Recycling in Cluttered Background
abstract: Rapid expansion of urban areas and population growth is causing an immense increase in waste production, which demands the need for efficient and automated waste management. In this scenario, automated waste recycling (AWR) using deep learning methods can assist humans in optimal waste management. Recent deep learning approaches for AWR provide promising waste segmentation performance, however, these methods rely on large backbone networks that are inefficient for AWR systems and suffer from performance deterioration in cluttered scenes. To this end, an optimal waste segmentation network is introduced which effectively utilizes the spatial domain to capture localized structural dependencies and the spectral domain to efficiently extract global contextual relationships. This cascaded design allows the network to progressively leverage both local and global representations across complementary domains to highlight the semantic information necessary for effective segmentation of various waste objects. Furthermore, auxiliary feature enhancement module (AFEM) is introduced to enhance the target objects' boundaries and blob amplification for better segmentation in cluttered scenarios. Extensive experimentation on ZeroWaste-aug, ZeroWaste-f and SpectralWaste datasets reveals the merits of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合空间与频谱域的级联分割网络，并引入辅助特征增强模块，实现杂乱背景下的高效废物分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市扩张和人口增长导致废物产量激增，亟需高效的自动废物回收系统。现有深度学习方法依赖大骨干网络，计算效率低，且在杂乱场景中分割性能严重下降。因此，需要一种轻量级且能有效处理复杂背景的废物分割方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种级联分割网络，首先在空间域捕获局部结构依赖，然后在频谱域提取全局上下文关系，通过渐进式融合提升语义表达。同时引入辅助特征增强模块（AFEM），增强目标边界和斑点放大，改善杂乱场景下的分割精度。在ZeroWaste-aug、ZeroWaste-f和SpectralWaste三个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在分割精度和效率上优于现有方法，尤其在杂乱场景中显著提升目标边界清晰度和整体分割质量。具体数据摘要未明确，但方法有效克服了背景干扰。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的空间-频谱级联网络和AFEM模块有效解决了杂乱背景下废物分割的挑战，提高了自动废物回收的效率和准确性。未来可进一步优化模型轻量化和泛化能力，适应更多实际回收场景。

title: EvTexture++: Event-Driven Texture Enhancement for Video Super-Resolution
abstract: Event-based vision has drawn increasing attention owing to its distinctive properties, including ultra-high temporal resolution and extreme dynamic range. Recent works have introduced it to video super-resolution (VSR) to enhance flow estimation and temporal alignment. In contrast, this paper shifts the focus of event signals from motion refinement to texture enhancement in VSR. We propose EvTexture++, the first event-driven framework dedicated to texture enhancement in VSR. It leverages high-frequency spatiotemporal details from events to improve texture recovery. EvTexture++ incorporates a customized texture enhancement branch, along with an iterative texture enhancement module that progressively exploits high-temporal-resolution event information for texture restoration. This enables gradual refinement of texture regions across iterations, yielding more accurate and detailed high-resolution outputs. Besides intra-frame texture recovery, large motions could degrade inter-frame temporal consistency, particularly in texture regions, leading to texture flickering. To mitigate this, we further exploit the continuous-time motion cues of events to enhance temporal consistency, introducing a temporal texture alignment module that estimates event-guided texture-aware flow for precise inter-frame texture alignment. Moreover, EvTexture++ is designed as a plug-and-play tool to flexibly boost the performance of existing VSR models. Experiments on five datasets demonstrate that EvTexture++ achieves state-of-the-art performance. When integrated into recent VSR models, it yields significant improvements, with gains of up to 1.55 dB in PSNR on the texture-rich Vid4 dataset. Code: https://github.com/DachunKai/EvTexture.
comment: IEEE TPAMI 2026. Extended version of arXiv:2406.13457 (ICML 2024). Project page: https://dachunkai.github.io/evtexture-project-page/

light_analysis.overview: 首个专注于视频超分辨率纹理增强的事件驱动框架，通过迭代利用事件的高时间分辨率信息逐步优化纹理恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法主要利用事件信号改进运动估计和时间对齐，但忽略了事件在纹理增强中的潜力。纹理恢复对于高分辨率输出至关重要，而大运动会导致纹理闪烁问题。本文提出利用事件的高频时空细节来增强纹理，并解决帧间纹理不一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出EvTexture++框架，包含定制纹理增强分支、迭代纹理增强模块（逐步利用高时间分辨率事件信息进行纹理恢复）和时间纹理对齐模块（估计事件引导的纹理感知光流实现精确对齐）。设计为即插即用模块，可灵活集成到现有VSR模型中提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集上达到最先进性能。集成到现有VSR模型后，在纹理丰富的Vid4数据集上PSNR提升高达1.55 dB，显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvTexture++首次将事件信号聚焦于纹理增强，通过迭代恢复和时间对齐有效提升VSR质量。即插即用设计具有广泛应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的事件-纹理融合策略。

title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
abstract: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a human operator. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide one possible interface between written protocols and robot execution, but existing policies are trained mostly on household and tabletop demonstrations and rarely encounter the instruments, transparent liquids, or fixed protocol workflows found in scientific laboratories. Closing this gap requires both laboratory-specific supervision and a unified learning framework that can accommodate the diverse robot embodiments used to execute experimental protocols. We therefore identify data and embodiment as central bottlenecks alongside model design. To address the data side, we build RoboGenesis, a simulation-based workflow and data engine that composes configured laboratory workflows from atomic skills, validates and filters rollouts, and exports structured demonstrations across supported robot profiles. On the policy side, we present LabVLA, trained with a two-stage recipe: FAST action token pretraining first makes the Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct backbone action aware before any continuous control is learned, and flow matching posttraining then attaches a DiT action expert under knowledge insulation. On the LabUtopia benchmark, LabVLA achieves the highest average success rate among all evaluated baselines under both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.
comment: Work in progress. Project website at https://zjunlp.github.io/LabVLA/

light_analysis.overview: 提出LabVLA模型，结合模拟数据引擎RoboGenesis，实现科学实验室中的视觉-语言-动作任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学实验室中AI系统虽能辅助推理，但物理实验执行仍依赖人类操作员。现有VLA模型多在家庭和桌面场景训练，缺乏实验室特有的仪器、透明液体和固定协议流程。数据和机器人形态的多样性成为主要瓶颈，亟需实验室专用监督和统一学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建RoboGenesis模拟数据引擎，通过配置原子技能组合实验室工作流，验证并导出结构化演示。提出LabVLA模型，采用两阶段训练：先进行FAST动作token预训练使Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct主干具备动作感知，再通过流匹配后训练附加DiT动作专家，实现知识隔离下的连续控制学习。
light_analysis.result: 在LabUtopia基准上，LabVLA在分布内和分布外设置下均达到最高平均成功率，超越所有评估基线。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调了其在实验室场景下的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: LabVLA验证了模拟数据和两阶段训练策略在解决实验室机器人执行问题上的有效性，为自动化科学实验提供了可行方案。未来可扩展至更多实验场景和机器人形态，但摘要未提及潜在局限性。
