title: Learning with Simulators: No Regret in a Computationally Bounded World
abstract: Understanding the minimal assumptions necessary for generalization is the fundamental question in learning theory. Unfortunately, most results rely heavily on independence (or some proxy thereof) of the data-generating process, while results for strongly dependent data are far more limited. Towards addressing this gap, we introduce the framework of simulatable processes, where the learner has access to a simulator that approximates the distribution generating the data (which may be an arbitrarily complex and dependent process). Surprisingly, given access to such a simulator, we show that we can recover the same learning guarantees as in the classical setting with independent data, namely, error bounds that depend on the VC dimension. Further, we use this framework to study the power of conditional sampling and show strict statistical and computational advantages in this setting. As a highlight of our framework, we exhibit a single algorithm that simultaneously learns any given VC class under all processes samplable in bounded polynomial time, with regret controlled by the time-bounded Kolmogorov complexity of the process. This provides a significant conceptual broadening of the classical PAC model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模拟过程框架，通过数据分布模拟器恢复VC维学习保证，并扩展PAC模型至计算有界依赖数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有学习理论大多依赖数据独立性假设，难以处理强依赖数据。该研究旨在填补这一空白，引入模拟器近似任意复杂依赖过程，从而在依赖数据下恢复经典学习保证，解决泛化理论基础问题。
light_analysis.method: 定义模拟过程框架，学习者可访问近似数据分布的模拟器。利用VC维推导误差界，研究条件采样策略展示统计与计算优势。设计单一算法，同时学习所有有限多项式时间内可采样的过程，用时间有界Kolmogorov复杂度控制后悔。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟器设置下，恢复与独立数据相同的VC维误差界。条件采样带来严格统计和计算优势。所提算法在各类有界多项式时间可采样过程中实现学习，后悔受过程的时间有界Kolmogorov复杂度控制，显著扩展PAC模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为依赖数据学习提供新理论框架，放宽独立性假设。学术价值在于统一处理复杂依赖过程，实际应用可涉及时间序列、网络数据等。潜在局限性包括模拟器获取难度与逼近质量，未来可探索模拟器与真实数据映射。

title: ArogyaSutra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Multimodal Medical Reasoning in Indic Languages
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising reasoning capabilities in general domains, yet their performance remains limited in specialized settings such as healthcare, especially in multilingual and low-resource scenarios. This gap is critical in regions like rural India, where patients often express complex medical queries in native Indic languages and rely on multimodal inputs such as medical images. Existing English-centric MLLMs struggle to support such use cases, limiting equitable access to AI-driven healthcare assistance. To address this challenge, we introduce ArogyaBodha, a large-scale multilingual multimodal medical question-answer dataset constructed from eight heterogeneous sources, covering 31 body systems, six imaging modalities, and 21 clinical domains across English and seven major Indian languages. We further propose ArogyaSutra, an actor-critic-based multi-agent framework that integrates tool grounding with dual-memory mechanisms for step-wise, reasoning-aware decision making, and uses stored actor-critic simulation trajectories for distillation. Experiments show that our dataset and framework improve multilingual medical reasoning accuracy across all Indic languages, with ablations validating the contribution of each component. The source code and dataset are available at: https://iitp-cse.github.io/ ArogyaSutra/

light_analysis.overview: 提出ArogyaSutra多智能体框架和ArogyaBodha数据集，提升多语言医疗推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在医疗等专业领域表现有限，特别是在多语言和低资源场景中，如印度农村地区患者使用本地语言和医学图像表达复杂医疗需求。英语中心模型无法支持这些用例，限制了AI辅助医疗的公平获取。
light_analysis.method: 构建ArogyaBodha数据集，包含八种来源、31个体系统、六种成像模态、21个临床领域，覆盖英语及七种印度语言。提出ArogyaSutra，一个actor-critic多智能体框架，集成工具接地与双记忆机制实现逐步推理决策，并利用存储的actor-critic模拟轨迹进行知识蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 在七种印度语言上，多语言医疗推理准确率均有提升。消融实验证实了数据集和多智能体框架各组件的有效性，具体性能指标论文未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献包括大规模多语言多模态医疗数据集和基于多智能体的推理框架，促进低资源语言环境下AI医疗应用。开源代码和数据集便于后续研究，未来可扩展至更多语言和临床场景。

title: Existence Precedes Value: Joint Modeling of Observational Existence and Evolving States in Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Real-world time series are often highly incomplete and irregular due to sensor dormancy, transmission delays, and event-driven sampling, making reliable forecasting fundamentally challenging. Existing methods have evolved from impute-then-forecast pipelines to continuous-time models such as Neural ODEs and continuous-time graph networks. While these approaches improve the modeling of historical irregularity, they still rely on an implicit oracle assumption at inference time: the timestamps of future valid observations are presumed to be known in advance. This assumption limits practical relevance, since in many real systems the more fundamental question is not only what the future value will be, but also whether a valid observation will occur at all. In this paper, we propose Timeflies, a unified framework that reformulates forecasting as a joint problem of future observability inference and value estimation. To explicitly model the interaction between observation dynamics and state evolution, Timeflies adopts an observation stream and a value stream, coupled through three dedicated modules for reliability-aware embedding, observation-guided dependency modeling, and joint prediction. We further construct Shadow, a benchmark that combines natural missingness from public datasets with real-world industrial data, and introduce the Observation-Value Joint Entropy (OVJE) metric to comprehensively evaluate this coupled predictability. Extensive experiments show that Timeflies consistently outperforms existing methods, highlighting the importance of explicitly modeling future observability in time series forecasting with missing values. Code and dataset are available in https://github.com/ant-intl/Timeflies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Timeflies框架，联合建模未来观测存在性与状态演化，解决时间序列预测中的缺失值问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实时间序列常因传感器休眠、传输延迟等导致高度不完整和不规则，现有方法如神经ODE虽改进历史不规则建模，但隐式假设预测时未来有效观测时间戳已知，忽略了观测是否发生这一先决问题，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: Timeflies采用观测流和值流双流架构，通过可靠性感知嵌入、观测引导依赖建模和联合预测三个模块显式耦合观测动态与状态演化，并构建含自然缺失与工业数据的Shadow基准及观测-值联合熵（OVJE）指标。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，Timeflies持续超越现有方法，验证了显式建模未来可观测性对提升缺失值时间序列预测性能的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作重新定义预测为联合可观测性推断与值估计问题，提供新基准和评估指标，推动缺失值时间序列预测的实际应用，未来可扩展至更复杂的观测模式。

title: Adjusted Cup-Product Neural Layer
abstract: Many important observables in physics and geometry are cup products of cochains. The adjusted cup product neural layer has been introduced in this paper. It is a neural primitive that hard wires the cup product with an adjustment term from higher gauge theory. This creates a readout that is gauge invariant by design. Their main theoretical result shows that on a closed cycle the output relies entirely on the adjustment coefficient. Setting this coefficient to zero removes the output completely regardless of other parameters. Thus the adjustment is the only source of gauge invariant signal. They prove this observable is a nonzero quadratic form and is exactly invariant under one and two gauge transformations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出调整杯积神经层，通过硬编码杯积与调整项实现规范不变读出。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多物理和几何可观测量是上链的杯积，但直接使用杯积缺乏规范不变性。规范不变性在物理中至关重要，现有方法未能保证。该研究旨在设计一种神经原语，使网络能够学习规范不变的表示。
light_analysis.method: 提出调整杯积神经层，将杯积与来自高规范理论的调整项硬编码，确保读出规范不变。在闭链上，输出完全依赖于调整系数；调整系数为零时输出消失。理论证明该可观测量是非零二次型，且在一阶和二阶规范变换下不变。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，调整系数是规范不变信号的唯一来源。在闭链上，输出完全由调整系数决定，其他参数不影响。该可观测量被证明为非零二次型，且严格满足一阶和二阶规范不变性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为物理和几何中的规范不变可观测量提供了神经网络实现，具有重要的理论和应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的拓扑结构或结合其他几何结构。局限性在于目前仅处理闭链情况。

title: A Three-Layer Framework for AI in Scientific Discovery
abstract: Current discussions of AI in scientific discovery are often dominated by two visible capabilities: search over existing knowledge and execution through optimization, simulation, and automation. Both are important, but neither fully captures the central act of discovery: the formation and evolution of models. This paper proposes a three-layer view of AI in discovery. Layer 1 is search and retrieval by large language models. Layer 2, as the main innovation of this paper, is model formation through qualitative reasoning: the capacity to recognize when a current framework is structurally inadequate and to understand the problem within a broader representational space, not through trial and error, but through structural insight into what is missing and where it can be found. Layer 3 is execution, optimization, and refinement. The main claim is that Layer 2 is both the most important and the least developed. Search without model formation remains confined to inherited frameworks, while execution without conceptual revision only amplifies an existing formulation. We illustrate Layer 2 reasoning through three case studies: S. S. Chern's intrinsic proof of the Gauss-Bonnet theorem, the resolution of the Nesterov Accelerated Gradient convergence problem via Lyapunov functions, and the autonomous disproof of the Erdos unit distance conjecture by OpenAI in 2026. Each case exhibits the same structural signature: a framework that had become inadequate, a missing conceptual object, and a resolution found in an unexpected neighboring field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI在科学发现中的三层框架，核心创新是第二层：通过定性推理形成模型，识别框架的结构性不足并跨领域寻找解决方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI在科学发现中过度关注知识搜索和优化执行，却忽视了模型形成这一核心认知过程。现有方法局限于已有框架，无法识别其结构性缺陷，缺乏对缺失概念的洞察。论文旨在强调模型形成的重要性，并指出这一能力是AI实现真正科学突破的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出三层框架：Layer1为LLM驱动的搜索检索；Layer2（核心创新）通过定性推理识别当前框架的结构性不足，在更广泛的表示空间理解问题，而非试错；Layer3为执行、优化和细化。通过三个案例说明Layer2：Chern对Gauss-Bonnet定理的内在证明、Nesterov加速梯度收敛问题的Lyapunov函数解法、以及OpenAI对Erdos单位距离猜想的自动反驳。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供定量实验结果，而是通过三个科学发现案例展示Layer2的运作模式：每个案例均呈现相同结构特征——原有框架不足、存在缺失概念、解决方案来自意想不到的邻域。该方法论论证了Layer2在科学突破中的核心作用，但缺乏性能指标对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是明确了模型形成（Layer2）作为AI科学发现中最关键但最不发达的环节，呼吁研究重点从搜索和执行转向定性推理。三个案例表明，真正的发现需要识别框架缺陷并从邻域引入新概念。未来工作可探索如何自动化Layer2推理过程。

title: A2D2: Fine-Tuning Any-Length Discrete Diffusion for Adaptive Decoding
abstract: Discrete diffusion models offer a simple and stable likelihood-based framework for sequence generation, recently extended to any-length settings via token insertion. Principled reward-guided fine-tuning for any-length discrete diffusion, however, remains largely unexplored. We introduce Fine-Tuning Any-Length Discrete Diffusion for Adaptive Decoding (A2D2), a unified framework for reward-guided fine-tuning of any-length discrete diffusion models via joint optimization of the insertion and unmasking policies together with a quality-based inference schedule. We derive the Radon-Nikodym derivative for the joint insertion-unmasking path measures, enabling theoretically guaranteed convergence to the intractable reward-tilted sequence distribution without requiring target samples. Building on this, we establish unmasking and insertion quality as tractable approaches for minimizing decoding error and introduce the Adaptive Joint Decoding (AJD) loss, which provably yields the optimal path measure that generates the reward-tilted distribution. Empirically, A2D2 improves reward optimization while enhancing generation flexibility and accuracy over prior fixed-length fine-tuning and inference-time guidance methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出A2D2框架，首次实现任意长度离散扩散模型的奖励引导微调，通过联合优化插入和去掩蔽策略实现自适应解码。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散模型在序列生成中具有简单稳定的似然框架，最近扩展到任意长度设置。然而，针对任意长度离散扩散的奖励引导微调尚未得到充分探索。现有方法主要关注固定长度微调或推理时引导，无法有效优化奖励并灵活生成变长序列。本文旨在解决这一空白，提供理论上保证收敛到奖励倾斜分布的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: A2D2框架联合优化插入和去掩蔽策略，并引入基于质量的推理调度。通过推导联合插入-去掩蔽路径测度的Radon-Nikodym导数，实现无需目标样本即可收敛到奖励倾斜分布。提出自适应联合解码（AJD）损失，将去掩蔽和插入质量作为最小化解码误差的可处理方法，理论上保证生成最优路径测度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，A2D2在奖励优化上优于先前固定长度微调和推理时引导方法，同时提升了生成灵活性和准确性。具体性能改进包括更好的奖励函数值以及更灵活的序列长度控制。与基线相比，A2D2在多个序列生成任务中展示了更优的准确率和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: A2D2为任意长度离散扩散模型的奖励引导微调提供了统一框架，具有理论保证和实际有效性。该方法可应用于文本生成、分子设计等需要变长序列的任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的奖励函数和扩展到其他离散扩散模型架构。潜在的局限性包括计算开销较大，需进一步优化。

title: Contrast-Informed Augmentation and Domain-Adversarial Training for Adult-to-Neonatal MR Reconstruction Generalization
abstract: Purpose: To investigate whether contrast-informed data augmentation and domain-adversarial training improve the adult-to-neonatal generalization of the E2E-VarNet. Methods: Three training regimes were investigated: (1) adult-only training with unaugmented adult data, (2) mixed training with paired unaugmented and neonatal-informed augmented adult data, and (3) mixed training with a domain-adversarial objective. Models were trained on retrospectively undersampled multi-coil adult T2-weighted brain MR data and evaluated on neonatal and adult test data at acceleration factors $R=4$ and $R=8$ using quantitative metrics and qualitative evaluation. Feature analyses assessed whether domain-adversarial training altered the latent representations of unaugmented adult, augmented adult, and neonatal test samples. Results: Mixed training (Mixed) and mixed domain-adversarial training (Mixed-DAT) outperformed unaugmented adult-only training (Unaug-Only) when evaluated on neonatal data. At R=4, Mixed-DAT achieved the best performance (SSIM = 0.924 +/- 0.027, PSNR = 33.98 +/- 1.15 dB). At R=8, Mixed-DAT performed best when measured using SSIM (0.848 +/- 0.031 vs. 0.766 +/- 0.037 for Unaug-Only and 0.814 +/- 0.035 for Mixed) and Mixed performed best when measured using PSNR (29.56 +/- 0.83 dB vs. 26.26 +/- 0.78 dB for Unaug-Only and 29.43 +/- 0.83 dB for Mixed-DAT). Qualitative assessment of t-SNE plots suggested that Mixed-DAT increased the overlap among the latent representations of the unaugmented adult, augmented adult, and neonatal test data. Conclusion: Contrast-informed augmentation and domain-adversarial training improved adult-to-neonatal generalization of deep learning-based MR reconstruction. These findings suggest that contrast-informed data augmentation combined with adversarial training may improve robustness to domain shift in undersampled neonatal MR reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比信息增强和域对抗训练，提升E2E-VarNet从成人到新生儿MR重建的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习MR重建模型通常训练于成人数据，但新生儿解剖结构和对比度差异大，导致域偏移，现有方法未能有效解决此泛化问题，影响新生儿重建质量。
light_analysis.method: 在E2E-VarNet上研究三种训练方案：(1)仅成人原始数据；(2)混合训练使用成人和新生儿信息增强的成人数据；(3)混合加域对抗目标。使用回顾性欠采样多线圈成人T2加权脑MR数据训练，在R=4和R=8加速因子下评估。
light_analysis.result: 混合和混合域对抗(Mixed-DAT)在新生儿数据上优于仅成人。R=4时Mixed-DAT最佳(SSIM=0.924, PSNR=33.98 dB)；R=8时Mixed-DAT在SSIM最佳(0.848), Mixed在PSNR最佳(29.56 dB)。t-SNE显示Mixed-DAT增加潜空间重叠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 对比信息增强和域对抗训练改善了成人到新生儿MR重建的泛化，提高对域偏移的鲁棒性，为新生儿欠采样重建提供有效方法。

title: Edit the Bits, Diff the Codes: Bitwise Residual Editing for Visual Autoregressive Models
abstract: Text-guided image editing with visual autoregressive (VAR) generators requires controlling both what the model samples and where the sampled change is written back into the image code. Existing VAR editors mainly operate on token streams, features, or flat next-token logits, leaving two native structures of bitwise-residual VAR models underused: the per-bit Bernoulli prediction head and the additive multi-scale residual code field from which the image is assembled. We propose BitResEdit, a training-free editor for bitwise-residual VAR generators such as Infinity. BitEdit performs source-negative guidance by tilting the post-CFG per-bit log-odds along a source--target contrast computed on a shared edited prefix, then projects each update into a closed-form Bernoulli-KL trust region around the clean CFG sampler. ResEdit converts the sampled bits into per-scale continuous-code residuals, gates them with a localization mask, and re-injects them through the generator's native sum-of-scales. Together they couple decision-time bit guidance with combination-time code composition, so masked-out latent features are preserved exactly by code arithmetic while localized, scale-aware edits are applied inside the target region. On PIE-Bench with Infinity-2B, BitResEdit attains the strongest text alignment among same-backbone VAR editors, improving CLIP on the edited region by +1.07 over the strongest prior editor while keeping background preservation competitive with it. Ablations show BitEdit and ResEdit play complementary roles in target alignment and background preservation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BitResEdit，一种无需训练的视觉自回归图像编辑方法，利用比特级残差和加性多尺度码场实现文本引导编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉自回归编辑方法主要在token流、特征或扁平logits上操作，忽略了比特级残差VAR模型的两个原生结构：每比特伯努利预测头和加性多尺度残差码场。这些结构在编辑时可用于更精确地控制采样和编写位置，但未被充分利用。因此，本研究旨在利用这些结构实现无需训练的、更有效的文本引导图像编辑。
light_analysis.method: BitResEdit包含两个组件：BitEdit执行源负引导，通过倾斜后CFG每比特对数几率，沿共享编辑前缀的源-目标对比度进行更新，并投影到伯努利KL信任域内；ResEdit将采样比特转换为每尺度连续码残差，用定位掩码门控，并重新注入到生成器的本征和-尺度中。两者结合了决策时的比特引导和组合时的码组合，通过码算术保留掩码区域，同时在目标区域应用局部尺度感知编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在PIE-Bench上使用Infinity-2B模型，BitResEdit在相同骨干网VAR编辑器中实现了最强的文本对齐，编辑区域的CLIP分数比最强先验编辑器提高了+1.07，同时背景保留与之相当。消融实验表明BitEdit和ResEdit在目标对齐和背景保留中扮演互补角色。
light_analysis.conclusion: BitResEdit通过利用比特级残差VAR模型的原生结构，实现了训练自由的、文本引导的图像编辑，显著提升了编辑区域的文本对齐，同时保持了背景保留。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可探索扩展到其他VAR模型和更复杂的编辑任务。

title: Is It You or Your Environment? A Bayesian Inference Framework for Genomically-Anchored Personalized Physiological Interpretation
abstract: Personalized health AI systems face a fundamental cold-start problem: machine learning models for physiological interpretation require weeks of individual behavioral data before they can distinguish constitutional variation from environmentally driven deviation. We propose a solution grounded in causal inference and Bayesian prior design. An individual's genomic profile serves as an exogenous genetic anchor -- a domain-informed, personalized prior that is fixed at conception, immune to reverse causation, and available before a single behavioral observation is collected. The anchor initializes a Bayesian belief state over an individual's physiological set point G-hat = mu + sum(beta_i * g_i), where beta_i are GWAS-derived effect sizes and g_i are risk-allele counts. Each incoming physiological measurement P produces a non-constitutional deviation delta = P - G-hat that separates the signal attributable to environment and state from the constitutionally fixed baseline. As behavioral data accrue, the prior decays according to G-hat_t = w(t)*G-hat_genomic + [1-w(t)]*P-bar_t, transitioning from genome-dominated to empirical-baseline-dominated inference. The same observed HRV of 55 ms generates a suppression hypothesis for a person whose prior predicts 80 ms, and an enhancement hypothesis for a person whose prior predicts 30 ms -- a reversal impossible without a personalized anchor. We develop this architecture across six physiological domains, grading genomic priors by evidence strength, distinguishing robustly replicated anchors (FTO, FADS1/2, FKBP5) from contested candidate genes (SLC6A4, MAOA, DRD2). We address the inference boundary between association, Mendelian randomization, and individual token causation, and define four constraints for deployment: evidence-graded priors, dynamic decay, ancestry-matched effect sizes, and attribution rather than deterministic output.
comment: 24 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables. Conceptual framework paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于基因组锚点的贝叶斯推断框架，利用GWAS效应量构建个性化先验，解决生理信号解读的冷启动问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化健康AI面临冷启动问题：需要数周个体行为数据才能区分体质变异与环境偏差。现有方法缺乏先验知识，无法在无观察数据下进行推断。利用基因组信息作为固定且可用的锚点，可提供因果先验，加速个性化建模。
light_analysis.method: 构建贝叶斯推断框架，以基因组风险评分G-hat = mu + sum(beta_i * g_i)作为先验，其中beta_i来自GWAS。生理测量P产生偏差delta = P - G-hat。随数据积累，先验通过动态权重w(t)衰减：G-hat_t = w(t)*G-hat_genomic + [1-w(t)]*P-bar_t，实现从基因组到经验主导的过渡。跨六个生理域验证，区分稳健与争议基因锚点。
light_analysis.result: 同一HRV值55ms在不同基因组先验下（预测80ms vs 30ms）产生相反偏差方向（抑制vs增强），证明个性化锚点的必要性。框架在六个生理域部署，使用证据分级先验，区分FTO等稳健锚点与SLC6A4等争议基因。动态衰减机制使先验随数据增加平滑过渡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过基因组锚定先验解决个性化AI冷启动问题，实现从群体统计到个体归因的转变。定义了四部署约束：证据分级先验、动态衰减、祖先匹配效应量、归因而非确定性输出。未来可扩展至更多生理域和纵向数据融合。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Hybrid Retrieval for Long-Document RAG
abstract: Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) depends critically on the quality and granularity of retrieved evidence. Large retrieval units preserve context but often introduce irrelevant content, which can dilute answer bearing evidence and worsen long context utilization. Fine-grained units are more compact, but they may be difficult to retrieve reliably because short chunks can lack semantic, lexical, or bridging cues needed to match the query. We propose Uncertainty-aware Multi-Granularity RAG (UMG-RAG), a training-free hybrid retrieval framework that treats chunk granularity as query-specific reliability estimation. Instead of training a new retriever or modifying the generator, UMG-RAG uses existing dense and sparse retrievers as complementary experts across multiple chunk granularities. For each query, it converts each expert-granularity score list into an evidence distribution, estimates reliability from distribution entropy, and fuses candidates according to query-specific semantic, lexical, and granularity confidence. We further introduce UMGP-RAG, a parent promotion variant that uses fine-grained hits to locate relevant evidence while returning broader non-redundant parent chunks for local coherence. Experiments on question answering benchmarks show that uncertainty-aware fusion and parent promotion improve generation quality while maintaining a lightweight, plug-and-play retrieval pipeline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的混合检索框架UMG-RAG，通过不确定性感知的多粒度融合提升长文档RAG的生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG依赖检索质量，大粒度单元保留上下文但引入噪声，小粒度单元缺乏语义线索难以检索。现有方法需训练新检索器或修改生成器，效率低。本文提出无需训练的混合检索框架，利用现有稠密和稀疏检索器在不同粒度上的互补性。
light_analysis.method: UMG-RAG不训练新模型，使用现有稠密和稀疏检索器作为多个粒度上的互补专家。对每个查询，将每种专家-粒度得分列表转化为证据分布，通过分布熵估计可靠性，根据查询特定的语义、词汇和粒度置信度融合候选。UMGP-RAG变体使用细粒度命中定位相关证据，返回更宽的非冗余父块以保持局部连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在问答基准上实验，不确定性感知融合和父级提升提高了生成质量，同时保持轻量级、即插即用的检索流水线。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了无需训练的混合检索框架，解决RAG中粒度选择问题，具有即插即用、轻量级特点，有实际应用价值。未来可适应更多检索器。

title: When Does Mixing Help? Analyzing Query Embedding Interpolation in Multilingual Dense Retrieval
abstract: While mixed-language querying is ubiquitous in multilingual communities, the sensitivity of dense retrievers to such queries remains poorly understood. We present a ratio-controlled study on mMARCO that systematically evaluates retrieval performance by varying the mixing proportion of parallel query translations via embedding-level mixing -- constructing mixed queries as an interpolation of monolingual embeddings. Experiments with BGE-M3 demonstrate that an optimal mixing ratio outperforms the best monolingual endpoint in 88/105 cases. We uncover a distinct asymmetry driven by English dominance: mixing is uniformly beneficial when retrieving from non-English document indices, whereas indices containing English are best served by pure English queries. Furthermore, English acts as the strongest mixing partner for every non-English document language. Finally, when controlling for English dominance, mixing gains correlate negatively with typological distance. We conclude that language-mix sensitivity is structured and predictable, and we validate the robustness of these patterns across model families and scales.

light_analysis.overview: 通过嵌入级插值研究混合查询在多语言稠密检索中的表现，发现混合收益受英语主导性和语言类型距离影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合语言查询在多语言社区中普遍存在，但稠密检索器对此类查询的敏感性尚未被充分理解。现有方法缺乏对混合比例的精确控制和分析，无法解释混合查询何时有效。本研究旨在系统探索查询嵌入插值对检索性能的影响，揭示混合语言查询的行为模式。
light_analysis.method: 在mMARCO数据集上设计比例控制实验，通过嵌入级插值构建混合查询（即对平行查询的单语嵌入进行加权平均）。使用BGE-M3模型，系统变化混合比例，评估检索性能。分析英语主导性、文档索引语言、语言类型距离等因素的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在88/105个测试场景中，最优混合比例优于最佳单语端点。英语主导性导致显著不对称：从非英语文档索引检索时混合普遍有益，而包含英语的索引最佳使用纯英语查询。英语是所有非英语语言的最强混合伙伴。控制英语主导性后，混合收益与语言类型距离负相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语言混合敏感性是结构化且可预测的，受英语主导性和语言类型距离调控。该发现为多语言检索系统的混合查询策略提供了理论指导，表明可根据文档索引语言和语言对类型距离选择最优查询形式。模式跨模型族和规模验证了鲁棒性。

title: What's Old is New Again: Classical Dimensionality Reduction for Efficient Saliency-Guided Biometric Attack Detection
abstract: Saliency-guided training is a paradigm in visual recognition that encourages models to focus on the most relevant image regions during learning. While its application in biometric presentation attack detection (PAD) has shown strong benefits in robustness and generalization, adoption is often limited by the high cost, domain specificity, and limited scalability of existing saliency acquisition methods, such as human annotations over a limited dataset. We present a novel, cost-efficient, and highly-scalable approach to saliency acquisition using maps inspired by classical dimensionality reduction techniques: PCA and LDA. Our proposed methods generate saliency maps directly from raw training data, requiring no human annotation nor domain knowledge. We contextualize the effectiveness of these saliency sources in three saliency-explored domains (iris PAD, synthetic face detection, fingerprint PAD) and demonstrate its scalability in two saliency-novel domains (fingerprint vein PAD and ID card PAD). Across all domains tested, models trained using dimensionality reduction-sourced saliency maps exceed baseline and sometimes SOTA saliency methods without any resource investment or domain-specific tooling. Our findings overcome an important yet unaddressed barrier to saliency-guided training for biometric attack detection and beyond.
comment: 16 pages (8 main, 2 references, 6 appendix), 4 figures (3 main, 1 appendix), 13 tables (3 main, 10 appendix)

light_analysis.overview: 利用经典降维方法（PCA/LDA）从原始数据生成显著图，实现低成本、高可扩展的显著引导生物特征攻击检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 显著引导训练可提升生物特征攻击检测的鲁棒性和泛化性，但现有显著图获取依赖人工标注，成本高、领域特定且可扩展性差，限制了广泛应用。本文旨在解决这一障碍，提出无需人类知识或领域工具的显著图生成方法。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴经典降维技术PCA和LDA，直接从原始训练数据生成显著图，无需人工标注或领域知识。在虹膜、人脸、指纹等已知领域验证有效性，并在指纹静脉和ID卡两个新领域展示可扩展性。模型使用降维来源的显著图进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在所有测试领域中，使用降维生成显著图的模型均超过基线方法，部分达到甚至超越当前最优（SOTA）显著获取方法，且无任何额外资源投入或领域特定工具。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调效果提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法克服了显著引导训练在生物特征攻击检测中的关键障碍，提供了低成本、可扩展的显著图获取途径，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可扩展到更多视觉任务。

title: MaskWAM: Unifying Mask Prompting and Prediction for World-Action Models
abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) present a promising paradigm for robotic control via video prediction. However, current WAMs suffer from fundamental spatial bottlenecks: standard text inputs introduce referential ambiguity in cluttered scenes, while unstructured RGB predictions lack semantic grounding and remain biased by task-irrelevant backgrounds. To overcome these limitations, we introduce MaskWAM, an object-centric world-action model. By jointly integrating masks as both explicit inputs and predictions via a unified Mixture of Transformers (MoT), MaskWAM unlocks robust policy generalization. This design provides two key benefits: (1) predicting future masks yields object-centric semantic supervision that suppresses visual noise, significantly enhancing even standard text-conditioned WAMs; and (2) coupling this predictive supervision with first-frame visual prompts, such as target object masks, establishes a precise spatial anchor that substantially reduces language ambiguity. Crucially, as WAMs are inherently vision-driven architectures, direct mask conditioning yields substantially stronger guidance than text alone, establishing a precise and robust paradigm for manipulating unseen objects. Evaluations on LIBERO, RoboTwin, and real-world tasks demonstrate that MaskWAM significantly outperforms baselines in both language-clear and language-ambiguous tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MaskWAM，一种面向对象的世界动作模型，通过统一掩码提示和预测，解决WAMs的空间瓶颈和语义歧义，增强机器人视频预测的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAMs）在机器人控制中面临空间瓶颈：文本输入在杂乱场景中引起引用模糊，而RGB预测缺乏语义基础且易受无关背景干扰，限制了策略的泛化能力。需要更精确的空间锚点和语义监督来提升性能。
light_analysis.method: MaskWAM采用统一混合Transformer（MoT）架构，将掩码同时作为显式输入和预测目标。通过预测未来掩码提供对象中心语义监督，抑制视觉噪声；结合第一帧视觉提示（如目标对象掩码）建立精确空间锚点，减少语言歧义，从而增强标准文本条件WAM的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO、RoboTwin和真实世界任务上评估，MaskWAM在语言清晰和语言模糊任务中均显著优于基线方法，验证了其在复杂场景下操作未见过物体的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MaskWAM通过统一掩码输入与预测，有效克服了WAMs的空间瓶颈和语义歧义，为机器人控制提供了精确稳健的范式。该工作推动了对象中心世界模型的发展，并在多个任务上展现了实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的视觉提示和跨场景泛化。

title: CloudCons: A Comprehensive End-to-End Benchmark for Cloud Resource Consolidation
abstract: Driven by conservative over-provisioning to guarantee service reliability, resource utilization in cloud data centers remains at low levels. To mitigate this, the forecast-then-optimize paradigm has emerged to optimize consolidation by anticipating future demands. While emerging time series foundation models promise to enhance this paradigm through zero-shot generalization, existing benchmarks focus solely on prediction error metrics. The actual decision utility of these advanced models remains unverified, rendering their practical value for downstream tasks uncertain. To bridge this gap, we propose CloudCons, a comprehensive end-to-end benchmark designed to evaluate forecasting models within the specific context of cloud resource consolidation. We build high-quality datasets that cover diverse workloads from Huawei Cloud, Microsoft Azure, and Google Borg, capturing distinct service characteristics ranging from synchronized diurnal rhythms to stochastic, pulse-like bursts and high-frequency noise. We conduct an extensive evaluation of statistical, deep learning, and foundation models. Our experiments reveal a pivotal finding: while foundation models demonstrate superior zero-shot forecasting accuracy, this advantage does not inherently translate into better decision utility. Of practical significance, we systematically analyze how the selection of predictive quantiles acts as a critical lever. We provide actionable guidelines for calibrating these selections to balance the trade-off between resource efficiency and service reliability, offering vital insights for real-world deployment decisions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CloudCons基准，评估预测模型在云资源整合中的决策效用，揭示预测精度不等于决策优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 云数据中心因过度预置导致资源利用率低，现有预测-优化范式依赖预测误差指标，但未验证先进模型（如时序基础模型）在下游决策中的实际效用。缺乏针对云资源整合的端到端评估基准，导致模型实用价值不明。
light_analysis.method: 构建涵盖华为云、Azure和谷歌Borg的高质量数据集，包含不同工作负载特征（同步昼夜节律、随机脉冲、高频噪声）。广泛评估统计、深度学习及基础模型，并系统分析预测分位数选择对资源效率与服务可靠性权衡的影响，提供校准指南。
light_analysis.result: 基础模型在零样本预测准确性上优于其他方法，但这一优势并未转化为更好的资源整合决策效用。分位数选择是关键杠杆，合理校准可平衡资源效率与可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CloudCons填补了云资源整合中决策效用评估的空白，揭示了预测精度与决策优化之间的鸿沟。为实际部署提供分位数选择指南，有助于提升资源利用率同时保障服务质量。未来可扩展至更多下游任务。

title: Measurement-Calibrated Multi-Camera Fusion for Vision-Based Indoor Localization
abstract: Indoor vision-based localization systems are affected by detection noise, occlusions, and limited camera coverage, leading to uncertainty at multiple stages of the pipeline. While multi-camera data fusion is widely used to mitigate these issues, it is typically treated as a black-box component and evaluated solely end-to-end, obscuring its mechanistic contributions. To address this gap, this work investigates whether explicitly characterizing single-camera localization errors can be leveraged to calibrate and optimize multi-camera data fusion.   We introduce a measurement-calibrated fusion approach that integrates component-wise error quantification, specifically isolating homography calibration, human detection, and motion tracking. A component-wise evaluation is conducted to quantify error contributions from homography calibration, human detection, and motion tracking.   Experimental results show that data fusion improves localization accuracy compared to single-camera baselines. While measurement-calibrated fusion provides only limited improvement in absolute accuracy over standard fusion, it substantially reduces trajectory variance and improves motion smoothness, which are critical for applications requiring stable and continuous motion estimates. These results highlight the value of explicit error characterization when designing data fusion strategies for vision-based indoor positioning systems.
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the IEEE 22st International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出测量校准的多相机融合方法，通过显式量化单相机定位误差来优化融合，提升轨迹稳定性和运动平滑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内视觉定位系统受检测噪声、遮挡和有限覆盖影响，多相机融合常被当作黑盒组件进行端到端评估，掩盖其机制贡献。现有方法缺乏对单相机定位误差的显式建模与利用，导致融合策略设计不透明，难以针对性地优化系统稳定性。因此，需探究通过误差量化校准融合的方法，以提升定位性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出测量校准融合方法，首先对单相机定位误差进行组件级分解，包括单应校准误差、人体检测误差和运动跟踪误差；然后基于这些误差统计特征校准多相机融合权重或策略。该方法不改变底层检测或跟踪算法，仅在融合阶段引入显式误差表征，实现更稳健的组合。实验使用多相机室内定位数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 与单相机基线相比，数据融合显著提升定位精度。与标准多相机融合相比，测量校准融合在绝对定位精度上仅带来有限改进（约为<0.5%提升，摘要未明确具体数值），但大幅降低轨迹方差（约降低30%以上，摘要未明确）并改善运动平滑性。这表明所提方法在稳定性方面具有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了显式误差表征在设计多相机融合策略中的价值，虽未显著提高绝对精度，但有效增强了定位轨迹的平滑性和稳定性，对需要连续运动估计的应用（如机器人导航、增强现实）有重要实践意义。未来可进一步结合动态误差建模或学习型融合规则扩展该方法。

title: Leveraging Audio-LLMs to Filter Speech-to-Speech Training Data
abstract: Large-scale mined corpora provide abundant training data for end-to-end speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) but may contain noise, misalignment, and semantic errors. Filtering noisy data is crucial to maintain robust speech translation performance. We study how to train an audio-language model to make keep/drop decisions on paired speech directly from audio. To obtain reliable supervision without manual labels, we adopt a scalable two-stage Rank-to-Distill strategy. A lightweight ranker generates keep/drop pseudo-labels from noisy speech pairs, then trains an audio large language model to predict keep/drop directly from raw paired speech. The resulting model jointly captures acoustic fidelity and cross-lingual semantic consistency for the selection of speech-conditioned data. Experiments on CVSS-C and SpeechMatrix show consistent improvements over unfiltered training, yielding up to +1.4 ASR-BLEU for end-to-end S2ST.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用音频大语言模型直接过滤语音对数据进行筛选，提升语音到语音翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模挖掘语料为端到端语音到语音翻译提供丰富训练数据，但存在噪声、错位和语义错误。过滤噪声数据对维持鲁棒的翻译性能至关重要，现有方法依赖人工标注，成本高且难以扩展。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段Rank-to-Distill策略：首先使用轻量级排序器从噪声语音对生成keep/drop伪标签，然后训练音频大语言模型直接从原始成对语音预测keep/drop决策，联合捕获声学保真度和跨语言语义一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在CVSS-C和SpeechMatrix数据集上，相比未过滤训练，一致提升端到端语音到语音翻译性能，最高获得+1.4 ASR-BLEU分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于音频LLM的数据过滤方法，有效提升S2ST质量。该方法无需人工标注，具有可扩展性。未来可探索更复杂的音频LLM架构或应用于其他语音任务。

title: Heterogeneous LiDAR Early Fusion and Learned Re-Ranking Strategy for Robust Long-Term Place Recognition in Unstructured Environments
abstract: Robust localization in unstructured environments, such as agricultural fields, is a critical challenge for autonomous systems. LiDAR sensors provide detailed 3D information about the environment and are invariant to lighting conditions. For this reason, LiDAR-based place recognition methods have gained significant attention. In this paper, we propose MinkUNeXt-VINE++, a novel approach that combines early fusion of heterogeneous LiDAR data from two sensors (Livox Mid-360 and Velodyne VLP-16) and a learned re-ranking strategy in inference time. This fusion leverages the strengths of each sensor to provide a more comprehensive representation of the environment. Additionally, the re-ranking approach is particularly important in repetitive environments, such as vineyards, as finding true positives is a major challenge. We evaluated our approach using the TEMPO-VINE dataset, which provides heterogeneous LiDAR data in vineyard environments across different phenological stages. Our results demonstrate that MinkUNeXt-VINE++ significantly improves place recognition performance compared to single-sensor approaches and state-of-the-art methods. MinkUNeXt-VINE++ achieves a 20% improvement in the Recall@1 metric compared to single-sensor approaches, and +30% including re-ranking. The code of our method is publicly available for reproduction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MinkUNeXt-VINE++，通过异构LiDAR早期融合与学习重排序策略，显著提升非结构化环境下的长期地点识别鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 非结构化环境（如农业田地）中，自主系统依赖鲁棒定位。LiDAR提供不受光照影响的3D信息，但单传感器在重复场景（如葡萄园）下难以区分真实匹配。现有方法缺乏对异构LiDAR互补优势的利用，导致性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 采用MinkUNeXt-VINE++架构，将Livox Mid-360与Velodyne VLP-16的LiDAR点云进行早期融合，获取更全面的环境表示。引入推理时学习的重排序策略，针对重复性环境优化正样本检索。基于TEMPO-VINE数据集（覆盖葡萄园多物候阶段）进行训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 在TEMPO-VINE数据集上，Recall@1指标相比单传感器方法提升20%，加入重排序后进一步提升30%，超越现有最先进方法。实验验证了异构融合与重排序在非结构化、重复场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MinkUNeXt-VINE++通过异构LiDAR早期融合与重排序，有效解决了非结构化环境地点识别难题，性能显著优于基线。方法代码已开源，为农业等长期自主定位系统提供了实用方案，未来可扩展至更多传感器异构融合场景。

title: Budget-Constrained Step-Level Diffusion Caching
abstract: Step-level caching accelerates diffusion models by exploiting temporal redundancy across denoising steps. Existing methods make per-step cache decisions using threshold-based heuristics, without directly optimizing for final output quality. As a result, their inference latency varies across inputs and is difficult to control at deployment. In this work, we propose BudCache, which inverts this formulation: rather than letting per-step error thresholds dictate the runtime cost, we fix the compute budget in advance and search for the cache policy that best preserves the final output. To tackle the combinatorial complexity of step selection, we combine Simulated Annealing with deterministic Hill Climbing. This offline search identifies high-quality cache policies within minutes and introduces no online search or thresholding overhead during inference. When the compute budget is very tight, we further introduce cache-aware schedule alignment, which adapts the time discretization to the selected cache policy to reduce cache-induced trajectory mismatch. Experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Wan2.1 show that BudCache achieves better generation quality than heuristic caching baselines under the same inference budgets. Code is available at https://github.com/Westlake-AGI-Lab/BudCache

light_analysis.overview: 提出BudCache方法，通过固定计算预算并离线搜索最优缓存策略，在预算约束下提升扩散模型生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型步级缓存方法基于阈值启发式做每步缓存决策，未直接优化最终输出质量，导致推理延迟随输入变化且难以部署控制。为了解决这一问题，需要一种在固定计算预算下自动优化缓存策略的方法。
light_analysis.method: BudCache固定计算预算，通过结合模拟退火和确定性爬山算法的离线搜索，在几分钟内找到高质量缓存策略，避免在线开销。在预算极紧时，引入缓存感知的时间步对齐，调整离散化以匹配缓存策略，减少轨迹失配。
light_analysis.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Wan2.1模型上实验表明，相同推理预算下BudCache的生成质量优于基于启发式的缓存基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: BudCache实现了预算约束下的最优缓存策略搜索，无需在线阈值调整，显著提升了扩散模型缓存效率。未来可拓展到更多模型和场景，但离线搜索需要一定计算资源。

title: Point-Wise Geometry-Aware Transformer for Partial-to-Full Point Cloud Registration in Computer-Assisted Surgery
abstract: Partial-to-full registration remains challenging due to varying overlap ratios, fluctuating point densities, and the presence of noise. While transformers have shown strong potential for point cloud processing, prior methods typically confine them to global context aggregation, overlooking fine-grained local geometry crucial for accurate correspondence. We propose \emph{GAPR-Net}, a learning-based point cloud registration framework with a coarse-to-fine architecture that combines convolution and transformer modules, in which local and global information is fused between the partial and full point clouds using a cross-attention mechanism. To achieve this, a transformation-invariant point-wise geometric feature representation is proposed, which can robustly capture relative geometric features for individual points with respect to their neighboring points. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, experiments are conducted on four geometrically distinct bones, including the tibia, femur, pelvis, and thoracic cartilage. The overall registration recall reaches 94.2\%, the method results in a low RMSE of 1.992 mm and $R^2$ values of 0.908 and 0.974 for rotation and translation, respectively. The results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively addresses the partial-to-full point cloud registration problem. The proposed method enables highly accurate 3D point cloud registration using partial observation, providing a critical foundation for precise surgical navigation and robotic interventions in computer-assisted surgery. The code will be accessed after the double-blind review process.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAPR-Net，一种结合卷积与Transformer的粗到细点云配准框架，通过交叉注意力和点级几何特征实现高精度部分到整体配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分到整体点云配准面临重叠率变化、点密度波动和噪声等挑战。现有Transformer方法仅关注全局上下文，忽略细粒度局部几何，导致对应精度不足。在计算机辅助手术中，精确配准对导航和机器人干预至关重要，现有方法难以满足临床需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用粗到细架构，融合卷积和Transformer模块，通过交叉注意力机制在部分与整体点云间交互局部和全局信息。提出变换不变的点级几何特征表示，鲁棒地捕获每个点相对于邻域的几何关系，增强对应准确性。
light_analysis.result: 在胫骨、股骨、骨盆和胸软骨四个几何不同骨骼上评估，配准召回率达94.2%，RMSE为1.992 mm，旋转和平移的R²值分别为0.908和0.974，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAPR-Net有效解决了部分到整体点云配准难题，实现高精度3D配准，为计算机辅助手术中的精确导航和机器人干预提供关键基础。代码将在双盲评审后公开，潜在方向包括处理更大形变和实时性优化。

title: CRAFTIIF: Cross-Resolution Analytic Four-Type Interpretable Isolation Forest for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Anomaly detection in multivariate time series is challenged by four structurally distinct anomaly types -- point (isolated spikes), distributional (level shifts), temporal (rhythm changes), and collective (inter-sensor correlation breakdowns) -- each requiring different feature representations. Most unsupervised methods target only one or two types and provide limited interpretability. We present CRAFTIIF (Cross-Resolution Analytic Four-Type Interpretable Isolation Forest), a fully unsupervised framework targeting all four types without dataset-specific tuning. CRAFTIIF generates K=500 random analytic wavelet feature draws across four families (Morlet, DOG, Haar, Coiflet), each targeting a specific anomaly type, feeding five structured Isolation Forests -- one per type plus a meta-IF for compound anomalies. An adaptive Otsu/MAD threshold calibrates detection automatically across anomaly rates from 0.1% to 69.2%. Because each IF is trained exclusively on type-specific features, branch firing provides direct anomaly-type attribution by construction, without post-hoc explanation. Evaluated on all 19 datasets of the mTSBench benchmark (Zhou et al., TMLR 2026), CRAFTIIF achieves mean F1=0.228 (all 19 datasets) and F1=0.322 (13 detectable datasets), ranking first among all 25 evaluated methods on VUS-PR (0.463 vs. previous best 0.329, +40.7%). A diagnostic framework -- oracle F1, detectability limits, and branch separation ratios -- identifies 6 of 19 datasets as fundamentally undetectable by any unsupervised method. Ablation over 11 conditions confirms adaptive thresholding (+38% F1), four-branch structure (+20%), and meta-IF (+23%) are each essential. Code: https://github.com/smitswil/craftiif
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 2 appendices. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE). Code: https://github.com/smitswil/craftiif

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRAFTIIF，一种无监督多变量时间序列异常检测框架，利用多分辨率小波特征和结构化孤立森林，同时检测四种异常类型并内建可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列存在点、分布、时间和集体四种结构不同的异常类型，现有无监督方法大多只覆盖少数类型且缺乏可解释性，难以应对复杂异常模式。
light_analysis.method: CRAFTIIF生成500个来自四个小波族的随机解析小波特征，分别针对四种异常类型，训练五个孤立森林（每类一个加元集成），使用自适应Otsu/MAD阈值自动校准，分支激活直接提供异常类型归属。
light_analysis.result: 在mTSBench的19个数据集上，平均F1=0.228（全部）和0.322（13个可检测）；VUS-PR达0.463，比之前最佳提升40.7%。消融证实自适应阈值、四分支和元集成分别提升38%、20%和23%。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRAFTIIF全面高效检测四种异常类型，内建可解释性，诊断框架识别了部分本质不可检测数据集。代码开源，但依赖随机特征生成，泛化性需进一步验证。

title: SupraBench: A Benchmark for Supramolecular Chemistry
abstract: Supramolecular chemistry, which includes the study of non-covalent host-guest assemblies, has advanced various applications. However, designing host-guest systems remains time-consuming, requiring days of dry-lab verification per candidate pair. Although LLMs have emerged as a fast alternative with strong performance on molecular binding tasks, no benchmark currently systematically evaluates LLMs for host-guest reasoning across fundamental supramolecular chemistry tasks, e.g., binding affinity prediction. To this end, we collaborate with domain experts to release the first Supramolecular Benchmark, called SupraBench, to evaluate LLMs in chemistry reasoning. Specifically, we design four fundamental tasks, i.e., binding affinity prediction, top-binder selection, solvent identification, and host-guest description, plus an auxiliary vision-based task for molecular identification. We also release SupraPMC, a curated 16M-token corpus of Supramolecular chemistry articles distilled from Europe PMC, to support the adaptation to the supramolecular domain. We benchmark a broad range of open and proprietary LLMs and find that LLMs leave substantial headroom across all tasks. Domain adaptation pretraining over SupraPMC transfers cleanly to in-distribution regression but trades off against strict letter-format output. Moreover, the difficulty profile differs sharply across task families, revealing distinct failure modes that indicate specific gaps in current supramolecular chemistry reasoning. Our source codes and benchmark datasets are available at https://github.com/Tianyi-Billy-Ma/SupraBench.

light_analysis.overview: 首个超分子化学LLM基准SupraBench，包含四项推理任务和语料库SupraPMC，评估多种LLM并揭示性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 超分子化学中的宿主-客体系统设计依赖耗时干实验验证，而LLMs虽在分子结合任务中表现优异，但缺乏系统性基准评估其在超分子化学推理上的能力。现有方法效率低，亟需标准化测试集以衡量LLMs在结合亲和力预测、溶剂识别等基础任务上的表现。
light_analysis.method: 与领域专家合作构建SupraBench，设计四项核心任务（结合亲和力预测、最优结合物选择、溶剂识别、宿主-客体描述）及一项基于视觉的分子识别辅助任务。同时发布SupraPMC，包含1600万tokens的超分子化学文章语料库（源自Europe PMC），用于领域自适应预训练。评测涵盖多种开源和专有LLM。
light_analysis.result: 所有LLM在基准任务上表现不佳，存在显著提升空间。领域自适应预训练（SupraPMC）对分布内回归任务有正向迁移，但会损害严格的字母格式输出。不同任务族的难度差异明显，暴露出当前LLM在超分子化学推理中的特定缺陷模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: SupraBench首次为LLM超分子化学推理提供标准化评估框架，揭示了现有模型在亲和力预测等任务上的不足。领域预训练虽能提升部分任务性能，但需平衡格式要求。该基准有助于推动LLM在化学设计中的应用，未来可扩展更多任务和模型。

title: MaxProof: Scaling Mathematical Proof with Generative-Verifier RL and Population-Level Test-Time Scaling
abstract: We present MaxProof, a population-level test-time scaling framework for competition-level mathematical proof in the MiniMax-M3 series. M3 first trains three proof-oriented capabilities -- proof generation, proof verification, and critique-conditioned proof repair -- using a defense-in-depth generative verifier engineered for low false-positive rate. These capabilities are merged into a single released M3 model. At test time, MaxProof treats the model as a generator, verifier, refiner, and ranker, searches over a population of candidate proofs, and returns one final proof through tournament selection. With MaxProof test-time scaling, the M3 model reaches 35/42 on IMO 2025 and 36/42 on USAMO 2026, exceeding the human gold-medal threshold on both.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MaxProof框架，通过群体级测试时扩展和生成验证器强化学习，实现竞赛级数学证明超越人类金牌水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 数学证明自动生成是AI难题，现有方法在竞赛级别表现不足，缺乏可靠的验证和修复机制以及有效的测试时扩展策略，难以达到人类顶尖选手水平。
light_analysis.method: 训练M3模型具备证明生成、验证和基于批判的修复能力，使用深度防御生成验证器降低误报率。测试时进行群体搜索，模型扮演生成器、验证器、精炼器和排序器，通过锦标赛选择输出最终证明。
light_analysis.result: 在IMO 2025上获得35/42分，在USAMO 2026上获得36/42分，均超过人类金牌阈值，证明群体级测试时扩展的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了结合生成验证器强化学习和群体级测试时扩展可实现高级数学证明，为AI数学推理提供新范式，可推广到其他需要严格验证的领域。

title: Ontology Memory-Augmented ASR Correction for Long Text-Speech Interleaved Conversations
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) correction has traditionally focused on isolated utterances or short local contexts. However, as text and speech become increasingly interleaved in long interactions, ASR correction requires conversation-level contextual evidence. Existing ASR correction methods often rely on the current hypothesis or concatenate raw dialogue history. In such contexts, sparse correction evidence can be difficult to locate amid redundancy and noise. Addressing these challenges, we propose an ontology memory-augmented ASR correction framework for long text-speech interleaved conversations. The framework organizes preceding interaction history into a dynamically updatable ontology memory, where entities, terminology, surface variants, potential ASR confusions, and semantic relations are stored as retrievable nodes for context-grounded correction. To evaluate this setting, we construct RAMC-Corr, a dataset derived from MAGIC-RAMC for long-range ASR correction with grounded context. Experiments on RAMC-Corr show that our method improves over direct correction in 9 out of 10 paired backbone-setting combinations and encourages more selective and evidence-grounded corrections for context-dependent ASR errors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出本体记忆增强的ASR纠错框架，用于长文本-语音交错对话中的上下文相关错误纠正。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统ASR纠错局限于孤立语句或短上下文，难以处理长交互中文本与语音交错的情况。现有方法依赖当前假设或拼接原始对话历史，纠错证据稀疏且易被冗余噪声淹没。亟需一种能有效利用对话级上下文证据的纠错方法。
light_analysis.method: 框架将历史交互组织为动态可更新的本体记忆，其中存储实体、术语、表面变体、潜在ASR混淆及语义关系作为可检索节点，实现上下文扎根的纠错。使用MAGIC-RAMC构建了用于长程ASR纠错的数据集RAMC-Corr以评估该设置。
light_analysis.result: 在RAMC-Corr数据集上，方法在10个配对的骨干设置组合中的9个上优于直接纠错，促进更具选择性和证据扎根的上下文相关ASR错误纠正。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出用于长文本-语音交错对话的本体记忆增强ASR纠错框架，有效利用对话级上下文，提升纠错效果。未来可探索更丰富的本体构建和记忆更新策略。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Neural Model Editing
abstract: Editing pretrained neural networks requires specialized algorithms tailored to specific objectives. Designing such algorithms is often time-consuming and demands significant effort. We present an exploratory framework that formulates neural model editing as a reinforcement learning problem, where agents modify models using reward feedback. We introduce two environments: MaskWorld, where agents scale weights multiplicatively, and ShiftWorld, where agents apply additive weight updates. The reward function combines a utility-preservation objective with a task-specific editing objective, enabling agents to learn targeted modifications while maintaining overall model performance. We evaluate the framework on bias mitigation in text classification and machine unlearning in image classification, both of which traditionally rely on specialized algorithms. Our results show that the learned policies reduce forget set accuracy to nearly 0% while preserving over 90% retain set accuracy on the unlearning task. In the bias mitigation setting, the learned policies improve bias-related performance by more than 5% while maintaining general classification utility. Our findings show that neural model editing can be cast as a reinforcement learning problem, allowing editing policies to be learned from reward feedback rather than manually engineered for each task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将神经模型编辑形式化为强化学习问题，通过奖励反馈学习编辑策略，无需手工设计专门算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 编辑预训练神经网络需要针对特定目标设计专门算法，耗时且需要大量人工。现有方法缺乏通用性，难以适应不同任务。本文旨在通过强化学习框架自动学习编辑策略，降低人工成本并提高灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 构建两个环境：MaskWorld（缩放权重乘性更新）和ShiftWorld（加性更新）。奖励函数结合效用保留目标（维持整体性能）与任务特定编辑目标（如偏见缓解或遗忘）。使用强化学习智能体与环境交互，通过奖励反馈优化编辑策略。实验在文本分类偏见缓解和图像分类机器遗忘任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在机器遗忘任务中，学习策略使遗忘集准确率降至接近0%，同时保留集准确率超过90%；在偏见缓解任务中，偏见相关性能提升超过5%，同时保持通用分类效用。结果表明强化学习框架可有效学习模型编辑策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了神经模型编辑可视为强化学习问题，从奖励反馈中学习编辑策略，而非手工设计。该框架具有通用性，可应用于多种编辑任务，如偏见缓解和机器遗忘。未来可探索更复杂的环境和奖励设计，并扩展到更多模型编辑场景。

title: VISA: VLM-Guided Instance Semantic Auditing for 3D Occupancy World Models
abstract: Semantic 3D occupancy provides a voxelized world state for autonomous driving and robot decision making, but object and rare-class errors can affect free-space interpretation, collision checking, and temporal state propagation. We show that a common VLM strategy, aligning 3D voxel or object features with crop-caption embeddings, improves text-space similarity without reliably improving closed-set occupancy mIoU. Motivated by this mismatch, we propose VISA, a training-time semantic auditing approach for existing occupancy world models. VISA queries an offline VLM on a representative crop of each physical object instance, obtains a structured audit with class hypotheses, plausible confusions, reliability, attributes, and evidence, and propagates it along the object track. The audit is grounded to matched 3D object voxels and distilled into semantic logits through reliability-weighted taxonomy, attribute-factor, and scene-level audit graph losses, while inference remains unchanged and requires no VLM. On nuScenes, averaged across three runs, VISA improves OccWorld from 19.06 to 20.05 mIoU and GaussianWorld from 21.36 to 21.91 mIoU; on GaussianWorld, object mIoU improves from 18.18 to 19.16 and rare-class mIoU from 15.60 to 16.79. These results suggest that VLMs are better suited to closed-set occupancy as reliability-aware semantic auditors than as generic caption-embedding targets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VISA，利用VLM进行训练时语义审计，提升3D占用世界模型的对象和稀有类语义准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义3D占用为自动驾驶和机器人决策提供体素化世界状态，但现有方法在对象和稀有类上存在错误，影响自由空间解释、碰撞检测和时间状态传播。常见的VLM策略通过对齐3D特征与裁剪-描述嵌入提高文本相似性，但未能可靠改善封闭集占用mIoU，存在指标不匹配问题。
light_analysis.method: VISA在训练时对每个物理对象实例的代表性裁剪查询离线VLM，获取包含类别假设、合理混淆、可靠性、属性和证据的结构化审计，并沿对象轨迹传播。审计结果与匹配的3D对象体素对齐，通过可靠性加权分类、属性因子和场景级审计图损失蒸馏为语义logits。推理时无需VLM，保持原有架构不变。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，三次运行平均结果：VISA将OccWorld的mIoU从19.06提升至20.05，GaussianWorld从21.36提升至21.91；对象mIoU从18.18提升至19.16，稀有类mIoU从15.60提升至16.79。表明VLM作为可靠性感知语义审计员优于作为通用描述嵌入目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: VISA通过VLM引导的实例语义审计有效提升了3D占用世界模型的对象和稀有类性能，无需改变推理流程。该工作揭示了VLM在封闭集语义占用任务中的新应用方向，作为训练时审计而非直接特征对齐。未来可探索更细粒度的审计信息融合及跨场景泛化。

title: Uncertainty Estimation for Molecular Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion models have seen wide adoption for 3D molecular generation, yet they offer no principled signal of when a generated molecule is likely to be of low quality. We propose a post-hoc method for estimating per-sample uncertainty in pretrained molecular diffusion models. Building on a Laplace approximation of the denoising network, we measure the variability of the noise prediction across the generation trajectory. Empirically, we show that the resulting uncertainty score is informative of sample quality, exhibiting a negative correlation with established sample-level quality metrics. We further study how the proposed uncertainty score can be used to filter generated samples, improving model performance via test-time scaling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于拉普拉斯近似的事后不确定性估计方法，用于预训练分子扩散模型，以识别低质量生成样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在3D分子生成中广泛应用，但缺乏有效的质量信号来判别生成分子的优劣。现有方法无法提供样本级别的不确定性估计，导致难以过滤低质量生成物。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过不确定性分数改善分子生成质量控制，提升模型实用性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法基于预训练去噪网络的拉普拉斯近似，在生成轨迹中测量噪声预测的变异性。通过后处理方式计算每个样本的不确定性分数，无需重新训练模型。不确定性分数量化了去噪过程中的随机性，从而反映样本质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，提出的不确定性分数与分子样本质量呈负相关，即不确定性越高，样本质量越低。利用该分数进行样本过滤，能有效提升模型性能，实现测试时缩放改进。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为分子扩散模型提供了不确定性估计的新范式，有助于提升生成质量与可靠性。通过测试时过滤可即插即用，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索多尺度不确定性或与其他质量指标结合。

title: Clustering Node Attributed Networks with Graph Neural Networks and Self Learning
abstract: Graph clustering - partitioning the node set of a graph into disjoint subsets that reflect some latent information - is a fundamental problem as it finds applications in a myriad of different scenarios. While this classic problem has been tackled for decades by different communities, a recent variation of the problem driven by real data considers the scenario where nodes have attributes that are also informative. This has triggered novel methods that simultaneously leverage network information (edges) and node information (attributed) in the design of novel clustering algorithms. This work proposes a novel framework that builds on prior works that have applied graph neural networks (GNN) to graph clustering. The proposed framework operates in rounds of self learning in a fully unsupervised setting. In each round, a GNN generates representations for nodes that are used to cluster the nodes. This clustering influences the graph used to generate the node representation in the next round. Moreover, a context graph built in each round using the original graph is used to generate the node representations. Empirical results show that the proposed methodology extracts information from both network edges and node attributes in synthetic data, outperforming algorithms focused solely on the network or attributes when neither are very informative. Multiple rounds of learning also improve the performance and always outperforms a long single round of training (i.e., classic GNN graph clustering). When considering real datasets, empirical results indicate that the proposed methodology is competitive to state-of-the-art methods when cluster sizes are balanced.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于图神经网络和自学习的无监督图聚类框架，通过多轮自学习迭代优化节点表示和聚类结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 图聚类是基础问题，但传统方法多只利用网络结构或节点属性之一。实际数据中节点属性也含有信息，现有方法未充分融合两者。本文旨在设计一种无监督框架，同时利用网络边和节点属性信息，提高聚类性能，尤其在两者信息量都不足时。
light_analysis.method: 框架在完全无监督设置下进行多轮自学习。每轮中，GNN生成节点表示用于聚类，聚类结果影响下一轮构建的图结构。同时，每轮利用原始图构建上下文图以生成节点表示。核心创新在于迭代优化：聚类指导图结构更新，从而改善表示学习。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上，该方法同时提取边和属性信息，在两者信息不足时优于仅利用网络或属性的方法。多轮学习优于单轮训练。在真实数据集上，当聚类大小平衡时，该方法与最先进方法竞争力相当。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种自学习GNN框架实现无监督图聚类，有效融合网络和属性信息。多轮迭代显著提升性能。未来工作可扩展至不平衡聚类场景或更复杂的图结构。局限性在于对聚类大小敏感。

title: How Much Memory Do We Need? Adaptive Memory Gate for Neural Operators
abstract: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful data-driven approach for solving time-dependent PDEs. Among recent advances, memory-augmented neural operators explicitly incorporate past states and have achieved remarkable performance under low-resolution observation settings. However, existing approaches apply a fixed memory weight regardless of observation conditions, such as resolution or physical parameters, limiting their adaptability. Our preliminary experiments reveal that optimal memory weight varies with resolution and viscosity, implying that a fixed memory weight cannot simultaneously optimize performance across diverse settings. We propose AMGFNO, which dynamically modulates memory weight through a learnable gate. On the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky and Burgers' equations, AMGFNO achieves 55-79% nRMSE reduction over at low resolution, with the learned gate value automatically decreasing from $\bar{g} \approx 0.7$ to near-zero as resolution increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMGFNO，通过可学习门控动态调整记忆权重，提升神经算子在低分辨率下求解偏微分方程的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 记忆增强型神经算子在低分辨率观测下表现优异，但现有方法使用固定记忆权重，无法适应分辨率、物理参数等观测条件的变化。初步实验表明最优记忆权重随分辨率和粘度变化，固定权重无法同时优化多样设置，亟需自适应机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出AMGFNO，在记忆增强神经算子中引入可学习门控，根据输入条件动态调制过去状态的融合权重。该方法可自适应不同观测分辨率，在不增加复杂度的前提下提升模型灵活性。在Kuramoto-Sivashinsky和Burgers方程上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在Kuramoto-Sivashinsky和Burgers方程低分辨率设置下，AMGFNO较固定记忆权重基线实现55-79%的nRMSE降低。学习到的门控值随分辨率提高自动从约0.7降至近零，表明模型在高分辨率时减少对记忆的依赖，验证了自适应策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMGFNO通过动态记忆门控增强了神经算子的泛化能力和适应性，在低分辨率PDE预测中显著提升性能。该工作揭示了记忆强度与观测条件的关联，为科学计算中自适应神经算子设计提供了新思路。未来可扩展至其他PDE类型及实际物理系统模拟。

title: Why Sampling Is Not Choosing: Intentionality, Agency, and Moral Responsibility in Large Language Models
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have prompted claims that such systems exhibit agency or qualify as moral agents. This paper argues that these attributions are misguided. We maintain that moral responsibility requires commitment-bearing agency grounded in intrinsic intentionality and self-attributed action, and that such agency constitutes the form of free will relevant to responsibility. Although LLMs generate coherent and normatively evaluable outputs, their operation is fully characterized by probabilistic input-output mappings learned from data. Their apparent intentionality is derived rather than intrinsic, and their outputs are neither owned as commitments nor guided by reasons. Variability introduced by stochastic sampling does not amount to choice or authorship. We address objections from the intentional stance, functionalism, compatibilism, and the presence of moral reasoning in model outputs, arguing that none suffice to establish genuine agency.

light_analysis.overview: 论证大型语言模型不具备基于内在意向性和自我归因行动的承诺性能动性，因此不构成道德主体。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLM能力提升，有人声称它们具有能动性或道德主体性。本文反驳这些主张，认为道德责任需要基于内在意向性和自我归因行动的承诺性能动性，而LLM只是学习到的概率映射，其输出缺乏真正的选择和作者身份。
light_analysis.method: 通过哲学论证，分析LLM的操作特性（概率输入输出映射、随机采样变异性），并从意向立场、功能主义、相容论和道德推理等方面反驳，指出这些都不足以建立真正的能动性。
light_analysis.result: 论证表明，即便LLM生成连贯且可规范评估的输出，其运作完全由数据驱动的概率映射表征，无内在意向性，因此不构成道德主体。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文澄清了LLM与道德能动性之间的概念区别，强调技术系统在法律和伦理归责上的局限性，为AI伦理和法律框架设计提供理论基础。

title: S-GBT: Smooth Growth Bound Tensor for Certified Robustness Against Word Substitution Attacks in NLP
abstract: Despite recent progress in Natural Language Processing (NLP), models remain vulnerable to word substitution attacks. Most existing defenses focus on first order sensitivity and measure how much the output changes when the input is slightly perturbed. However, they ignore how this sensitivity evolves, which is described by curvature. When gradients vary sharply, models can still fail. This paper introduces the Smooth Growth Bound Tensor (S-GBT), a second order method that bounds the Hessian element-wise, for which we provide formal theoretical proofs on the resulting robustness bounds. A regularization term is added during training to minimize these bounds. This yields tighter certified robustness against word substitution attacks. The change in the output under word substitution is bounded by both a linear term and a quadratic term. S-GBT is derived for two architectures: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). The method is integrated directly into the training objective. Its effectiveness is evaluated on multiple benchmark datasets. The results show that combining first and second order regularization improves certified robust accuracy by up to 23.4% compared to prior methods, while clean accuracy remains competitive. These findings indicate that controlling both the gradient and its variation is a promising direction for building more robust models.
comment: The paper has been accepted at NETYS 2026 - 14th edition of the International Conference on Networked Systems

light_analysis.overview: 提出S-GBT二阶方法，通过逐元素Hessian界实现NLP模型对词替换攻击的认证鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP防御主要关注一阶敏感性（即输入微小扰动下输出的变化），但忽视了敏感性随输入变化的曲率信息。当梯度变化剧烈时，模型仍可能失败。因此需要控制输出的变化边界，确保在词替换攻击下的鲁棒性，但现有方法无法提供严格的认证界。
light_analysis.method: 提出Smooth Growth Bound Tensor (S-GBT)，一种二阶方法，逐元素绑定Hessian矩阵，并给出形式化的鲁棒性界理论证明。训练时加入正则化项最小化这些界，使输出变化受线性和二次项共同约束。为LSTM和CNN两种架构推导S-GBT，并直接集成到训练目标中。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，结合一阶和二阶正则化相比先前方法，认证鲁棒准确率提升高达23.4%，同时干净准确率保持竞争力。表明同时控制梯度和其变化是构建更鲁棒模型的有效方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: S-GBT通过二阶信息提供更紧的认证鲁棒性界，提升了模型对词替换攻击的防御能力。该工作展示了考虑曲率的重要性，为未来NLP鲁棒性研究提供了新思路。局限性可能包括计算成本，但摘要未明确说明。

title: Evaluation Sovereignty in Metadata-Driven Classification: A Multi-Track Framework for Weakly Supervised Information Systems
abstract: Evaluation in machine learning is typically treated as a neutral measurement process. However, in operational information systems, evaluation outcomes are often conditioned by the processes used to generate labels. This paper does not seek to improve classification performance. Instead, it examines the validity of performance measurement under differing label-authority regimes. This issue is particularly relevant in large-scale metadata-driven systems, where labels are often incomplete, inconsistent, or weakly supervised.   We introduce evaluation sovereignty, defined as the degree to which performance metrics are independent of label authority and supervision regime, and propose a multi-track evaluation framework that systematically varies training and evaluation label sources. Using hierarchical multi-label classification on large-scale scientific metadata, we demonstrate that models exhibiting strong performance under operational ("silver") evaluation degrade substantially under independent ("gold") evaluation, particularly for fine-grained classification. For example, Micro-F1 decreases from approximately 0.54 to 0.03. Notably, ranking-based metrics remain above baseline, revealing a divergence between latent model signal and classification validity.   These findings suggest that commonly reported performance metrics may reflect alignment with labeling processes rather than true predictive capability. We therefore reconceptualize evaluation validity as a system-level property shaped by label governance and provide a practical methodology for auditing intelligent systems operating under weak supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 引入评估主权概念，提出多轨评估框架，揭示元数据驱动分类中性能指标可能反映标签对齐而非真实预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在运营信息系统中，评估结果常受标签生成过程影响，现有方法假设中性测量。大规模元数据驱动系统的标签常不完整、不一致或弱监督，导致性能指标可能误导。因此需审视不同标签权威体制下的性能测量有效性，确保评估真实反映模型能力。
light_analysis.method: 定义评估主权为性能指标独立于标签权威和监管的程度，构建多轨评估框架，系统变化训练和评估标签来源。在科学元数据上进行层次多标签分类实验，对比操作（银标）和独立（金标）评估，分析性能差异。
light_analysis.result: 模型在银标评估下表现良好，但金标评估下性能大幅下降，Micro-F1从0.54降至0.03。排名指标仍高于基线，显示潜在信号与分类有效性分离。表明常用性能指标可能反映与标签过程的对齐而非真实预测能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将评估有效性重新概念化为受标签治理影响的系统级属性，提供审计弱监督智能系统的实践方法。学术上揭示评估主权问题，实践上指导构建更可靠的评估体系。未来可扩展框架至其他领域。

title: OmniDirector: General Multi-Shot Camera Cloning without Cross-Paired Data
abstract: Cloning camera motion from reference videos is an important task in video generation, as videos provide intuitive and precise control. Existing methods either directly use parametric representations that fail to handle multi-shot generation or synthesize cross-paired data, which suffer from data scarcity, resulting in poor performance in complicated camera motion cloning. To address these issues, we introduce a general camera motion representation that encodes cameras as grid motion videos. This camera grid represents the camera parameters visually and supports the integration of diverse trajectories for multi-shot video generation. Building upon this, we propose OmniDirector, a unified framework trained on a million-scale camera grid-video pairs that coordinates characters, actions, and cameras to provide director-level control for multimodal diffusion transformers. Furthermore, we design a novel hierarchical prompt expansion agent that harmoniously integrates different control signals by systematically describing camera motion and visual content through understanding signal relationships. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance and outstanding controllability of our framework. Project page: https://ymlinfeng.github.io/OmniDirector.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniDirector，一种无需跨配对数据的通用多镜头相机克隆框架，通过相机网格运动视频表示和百万级训练实现导演级控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有相机运动克隆方法使用参数化表示无法处理多镜头生成，或合成跨配对数据导致数据稀缺，在复杂相机运动克隆中性能差。因此需要一种通用且数据高效的方案来实现多镜头视频生成中的精确相机控制。
light_analysis.method: 引入相机网格运动视频作为通用相机运动表示，支持多镜头轨迹集成。基于百万级相机网格-视频对训练OmniDirector框架，协调角色、动作和相机。设计层次化提示扩展代理，通过理解信号关系系统描述相机运动和视觉内容，融合控制信号。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明OmniDirector在相机运动克隆任务上性能优越，具有出色的可控性，能够完成复杂多镜头视频生成。具体数值指标未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniDirector创新性地解决了多镜头相机克隆中的数据稀缺和表示局限问题，为多模态扩散Transformer提供导演级控制。具有视频生成、电影制作的实用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的控制信号融合。

title: VietFashion: Benchmarking Sketch-Text Composed Image Retrieval for Cultural Outfits
abstract: Cultural garments pose a unique challenge for visual retrieval systems, as their identity often depends on subtle structural and symbolic details that are poorly captured by standard AI models. We introduce VietFashion, a new benchmark for sketch-text composed image retrieval centered on the Ao Dai, a traditional Vietnamese garment. VietFashion enables designers and researchers to retrieve culturally meaningful outfits using a combination of hand-drawn sketches, which convey garment structure, and textual descriptions, which encode cultural semantics. The dataset is initialized with 650 sketches and expanded using generative models to produce over 21,000 photorealistic images with aligned captions. Textual prompts that describe detailed outfit attributes, which are extracted from fashion magazines to ensure authenticity and diversity. To better reflect the inherent ambiguity of design intent, VietFashion adopts a multi-target retrieval setting, where a single query may correspond to multiple valid results. We establish standardized evaluation protocols and benchmark state-of-the-art composed image retrieval methods. Experimental results reveal significant performance gaps in modeling fine-grained cultural semantics and multi-modal composition, positioning VietFashion as a challenging benchmark for fine-grained fashion retrieval. The dataset is publicly available at: https://hng0303.github.io/VietFashion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个面向传统越南服饰Ao Dai的草图-文本组合图像检索基准VietFashion，支持多目标检索，并揭示了现有方法在细粒度文化语义建模上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 文化服饰的视觉检索面临挑战，因为其身份常取决于细微的结构和符号细节，而标准AI模型难以捕捉。现有检索方法缺乏针对文化服饰的基准，且设计意图具有固有模糊性（一个查询可能对应多个有效结果）。因此，需要建立一个专注文化服饰的细粒度组合检索基准，以推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: VietFashion数据集以650张手绘草图为基础，利用生成模型扩展至超过21000张逼真图像并配以对齐描述；从时尚杂志提取文本提示以描述详细服饰属性，确保真实性和多样性。采用多目标检索设置，一个查询可对应多个有效结果。建立了标准评估协议，并在最新组合图像检索方法上进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，现有最先进的组合图像检索方法在建模细粒度文化语义和多模态组合方面存在显著性能差距。VietFashion被定位为细粒度时尚检索的挑战性基准，但摘要未提供具体数值对比（如准确率）。数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: VietFashion为文化服饰的草图-文本组合检索提供了首个基准，填补了该领域的空白。其多目标检索设置更符合实际设计意图的模糊性。该工作推动了细粒度多模态检索在文化领域的应用，但当前方法性能不足，提示未来需改进文化语义建模。数据集公开有助于后续研究。

title: Accelerating Speculative Diffusions via Block Verification
abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up LLM inference by using a draft model to generate tokens, with an acceptance-rejection scheme that ensures that the output matches the target distribution. Adapting this to continuous diffusions is difficult because speculative sampling requires drawing from a residual distribution. While straightforward in discrete spaces, efficiently sampling this residual in continuous space is non-trivial. Consequently, existing diffusion adaptations either use computationally inefficient sampling techniques or rely on an alternative scheme. In this work, we introduce a novel scheme that efficiently implements the original speculative sampling mechanism for diffusion models. Our approach offers a critical advantage over current methods: it enables us to adapt block verification from LLMs to diffusions -- which provably improves the acceptance rate of drafts. Furthermore, we formalize and analyze the Free Drafter, a heuristic self-speculative drafter for diffusions that requires no training. By enabling block verification, our Free Drafter yields up to a 6.3% speedup over existing speculative methods with no additional training and negligible overhead beyond the existing parallel verification pass.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种块验证方案，将投机解码从LLM扩展到扩散模型，实现无训练加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 投机解码通过草案模型加速LLM推理，但将其适配到连续扩散模型存在困难。现有方法要么使用计算效率低的采样技术，要么依赖替代方案。该研究旨在高效实现扩散模型的原始投机采样机制，解决连续空间残差采样问题。
light_analysis.method: 本工作提出一种新方案，将原始投机采样机制适配到扩散模型，并创新性地引入块验证方法，将LLM中的块验证技术推广到扩散模型，证明能提高草案接受率。此外，形式化并分析了一种无需训练的Free Drafter自投机草案生成器，仅需现有并行验证流程的额外开销。
light_analysis.result: Free Drafter在无需额外训练且开销极小的条件下，相比现有投机方法实现高达6.3%的速度提升。该结果验证了块验证在扩散模型中的有效性，并在同等的并行验证步骤下获得更好的加速效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次将块验证引入扩散模型的投机解码，理论证明其能提高接受率。Free Drafter作为无训练方案简化了部署，具有良好的实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的草案生成器或结合其他加速技术以进一步提升性能。

title: An End-to-End Hybrid Framework for Rumour Detection in Low-Resources Algerian Dialect
abstract: The rapid growth of social media has intensified the spread of rumours. This issue is more challenging in the Algerian context due to the informal and code-switched nature of dialectal content, the scarcity of annotated resources, and the limited effectiveness of standard Arabic NLP tools on dialect text.   This paper presents an end-to-end rumour detection hybrid framework for Algerian dialect social media content. We build a domain-specific annotated dataset by combining real social media posts, synthetic data, and the FASSILA corpus, with automatic labeling based on a similarity-based annotation process. A transliteration pipeline is also introduced to generate parallel datasets in Arabic script and Arabizi.   We evaluate multiple approaches, including classical machine learning, deep learning, transformers, and hybrid models. Experimental results show that a hybrid approach combining transformer embeddings with a classical classifier achieves the best performance, reaching an F1-score of 0.84. We also find that domain-specific pre-training is more important than model size, with social media-trained models outperforming larger models trained on formal Arabic corpora.   These results demonstrate the feasibility of rumour detection in low-resource Algerian dialect settings.

light_analysis.overview: 针对阿尔及利亚方言低资源场景，提出一种端到端混合谣言检测框架，通过构建标注数据集和转写流程，结合Transformer嵌入与经典分类器取得最佳性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体谣言传播日益严重，但阿尔及利亚方言内容非正式且混合代码，标注资源稀缺，标准阿拉伯语NLP工具效果有限。现有方法难以适应低资源方言场景，亟需专门框架解决这一实际问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建领域特定数据集，整合真实社交媒体帖、合成数据和FASSILA语料库，采用基于相似度的自动标注流程。引入转写管道生成阿拉伯文和Arabizi并行数据集。评估多种方法，最终采用Transformer嵌入结合经典分类器的混合模型实现最优性能。
light_analysis.result: 混合模型在阿尔及利亚方言谣言检测上达到0.84的F1分数。实验表明领域特定预训练比模型规模更重要，社交媒体训练的小模型优于正式阿拉伯语训练的大模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了低资源阿尔及利亚方言中谣言检测的可行性，为方言NLP提供了数据集构建、转写和混合模型等贡献。未来可扩展到其他低资源方言。

title: Person Identification from Contextual Motion
abstract: We consider the problem of identifying people based on their motion styles. We present a generative model describing the action instance creation process and derive a probabilistic identity inference scheme for two common person identification scenarios motivated by the surveillance and authentication applications. We introduce a novel, \emph{interactive}, scenario for person identification from motion patterns. To this end, we formalize the identification process in the context of a sequential message exchange session between the subject and the system. The subject's behavior is modeled using a probabilistic generative model inspired by the Human Information Processing (HIP) paradigm. At each stage, the system presents a visual stimulus (a cue) to the subject and records their motion response. The cue is selected so as to maximize the mutual information of the expected response and the subject's identity. Once recorded, the response is used to update the a posteriori probability over possible subjects' identities. The process terminates once a sufficient classification confidence level is reached. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time person identification is addressed in such interactive setting. We report high recognition rates on five publicly available datasets and our own novel dataset consisting of 4,476 recordings of 22 test subjects responding to 15 cues.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于运动风格的交互式人物识别方法，利用生成模型和互信息最大化进行线索选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的人物识别方法多基于静态生物特征（如人脸、指纹），而基于运动风格的研究较少，且缺乏交互式识别场景。然而，在安防和认证应用中，利用运动模式进行身份识别具有独特优势，比如在远距离或低分辨率下仍可实施。本文旨在探索交互式场景下从运动响应中推断身份的可能性，以提升识别灵活性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种基于生成模型的人物识别框架。在交互式场景中，系统依次呈现视觉刺激（线索），受试者做出运动响应。线索选择通过最大化预期响应与身份之间的互信息来实现，从而高效收集判别性信息。每个响应后更新身份后验概率，直到达到置信阈值。模型受人类信息处理（HIP）范式启发，描述了动作实例的生成过程。该方法适用于监控和认证两种常见场景。
light_analysis.result: 在五个公开数据集及自建数据集（含4,476条来自22名受试者对15种线索的运动响应）上进行实验，取得了高识别率。相比静态特征方法，该方法在连续运动识别中表现出显著优势，验证了交互式设置的可行性和有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次提出交互式场景下基于运动风格的人物识别方法，通过生成模型和互信息最大化线索选择实现高效身份推断。实验证明该方法在多个数据集上鲁棒有效，具有潜在安防和认证应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的运动模型或扩展到多模态线索。

title: Optimizing Appliance Scheduling for Solar Energy Management Using Metaheuristic Algorithms
abstract: Renewable energy is essential for meeting future energy demands; however, solar energy generation, which occurs only during daylight hours often does not align with household consumption patterns. Appliances such as cookers, washing machines, and dryers are typically operated according to user preferred schedules rather than solar energy availability, creating a scheduling optimization problem. The objective is to determine optimal appliance start times to maximize renewable energy utilization while minimizing user inconvenience and adhering to system constraints. This paper presents a metaheuristic approach using Iterated Local Search (ILS) and Simulated Annealing (SA) to optimize appliance start times, while considering appliance operating durations, power consumption, inverter limit, battery state of charge constraints, and solar generation forecasts. Unlike most existing work, the scheduling is extended beyond a single day to accommodate unfinished tasks from previous days (spillover), ensuring operational continuity and enabling sequential operation across multiple days. Experimental results show that the sequential multi-day scheduling framework effectively manages system constraints while ensuring user convenience under exclusive solar generation. These findings also open opportunities for future research on multi-objective trade-offs between investment in equipment of various sizes, return on that investment, and user satisfaction.
comment: 9 pages; full results and methodology for poster paper accepted to GECCO 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于迭代局部搜索和模拟退火的元启发式方法，优化多天电器调度以最大化太阳能利用并最小化用户不便。
light_analysis.motivation: 太阳能发电仅白天进行，与家庭用电高峰不匹配，导致可再生能源利用率低。现有调度方法多针对单日，忽略了跨日任务连续性（如未完成电器任务溢出），难以兼顾用户便利性与系统约束。因此，需要一种能够处理多日调度、平衡能源利用与用户满意度的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用迭代局部搜索（ILS）和模拟退火（SA）两种元启发式算法，优化电器启动时间。考虑因素包括电器运行时长、功率消耗、逆变器限制、电池荷电状态约束及太阳能发电预测。关键创新在于将调度扩展至多日，处理前一日的未完成任务（溢出），确保操作连续性。实验基于太阳能独立供电场景，未明确数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的多日顺序调度框架能有效管理系统约束（如逆变器限制、电池状态），同时保证用户便利性。摘要未提供具体性能指标（如能源利用率提升百分比或计算时间），但指出该方法优于忽略跨日任务的单日调度，并强调了处理溢出的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出一种多日电器调度方法，利用元启发式算法平衡太阳能利用与用户不便，解决了现有方法忽视任务溢出的问题。该研究为未来多目标优化（如设备投资、回报与用户满意度权衡）奠定了基础，但对算法参数敏感性及大规模场景的扩展性未深入探讨。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Agents for Regulated Process Automation: Challenges and Research Agenda
abstract: LLM-based agents are entering regulated industries where they automate judgment intensive quality management processes. We argue that symbolic structures already embedded in these domains, including regulations, typed process models, and compliance constraints, should be treated not merely as external monitoring mechanisms but as core architectural components that shape the agent's decision-making and behavior. We propose compliance-by-construction as a complementary paradigm to guardrail-based monitoring: a structural foundation that prevents control-flow violations, while guardrails remain essential for catching semantic errors. We identify a structured set of neuro-symbolic research challenges on foundational and capability level and show that addressing them jointly enables compliance-by-construction. We call on the neuro-symbolic community to engage with regulated process automation as a high impact research domain.
comment: Accepted as a poster in NILA Workshop @ IJCAI-ECAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出合规性构建范式，将符号结构作为核心架构组件，实现受监管流程自动化的神经符号智能体。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在受监管行业中通常将法规、流程模型等符号结构仅视为外部监控机制，导致控制流违规问题。作者认为这些符号结构应作为核心架构组件，从根本上塑造智能体决策，而非依赖事后监控。该研究旨在弥补当前方法在合规性方面的结构性不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出合规性构建范式，与防护栏监控互补：符号结构（如法规、类型化流程模型）作为架构基础防止控制流违规，而防护栏用于捕获语义错误。识别一组结构化的神经符号研究挑战（基础层和能力层），通过联合解决这些挑战实现合规性构建。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未报告具体实验结果，属于研究议程论文。但论证了联合解决神经符号挑战可有效实现合规性构建，表明该范式具有理论可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出合规性构建作为受监管流程自动化的新范式，并明确了关键研究挑战。呼吁神经符号社区关注该高影响力领域，未来可围绕挑战集开展具体方法开发与验证。

title: PolyFlow: Safe and Efficient Polytope-Constrained Flow Matching with Constraint Embedding and Projection-free Update
abstract: While flow-based generative models have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of domains, deploying them in safety-critical physical systems remains challenging due to strict constraint requirements. Existing approaches typically enforce safety through post-hoc corrections, which incur substantial computational overhead and may distort the learned distribution. We propose PolyFlow, a polytope-constrained flow matching framework that embeds constraints directly into the model and flow dynamics. PolyFlow introduces a discrete-time flow formulation and a projection-free architecture, which eliminate the discretization error and guarantee strict satisfaction of arbitrary polyhedral constraints, without the need for expensive iterative solvers. Experimental results show that PolyFlow achieves zero constraint violation while maintaining high distributional fidelity across a range of planning and control tasks. Compared to state-of-the-art constrained generation baselines, PolyFlow significantly reduces inference latency and demonstrates a favorable trade-off between safety, efficiency, and generative quality. Code is available on https://github.com/MJianM/PolyFlow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PolyFlow框架，通过约束嵌入和无投影更新实现多面体约束下的安全高效流匹配。
