light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法孤立优化各阶段或依赖固定启发式规则，导致阶段间协调不足，效果次优。多阶段事实验证需要自适应协调声明分解、证据收集和裁决预测，但缺乏端到端优化手段。
light_analysis.method: ProFact训练统一策略协调声明分解、证据搜索、答案生成和裁决预测。引入过程感知奖励，基于最终真实性标签提供阶段级学习信号，解决稀疏延迟监督问题。
light_analysis.result: 在验证性能和推理效率上持续优于强基线，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 过程感知轨迹优化有效提升多阶段事实验证效果，验证了agentic强化学习的应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计。

title: Extracting Governing Equations from Latent Dynamics via Multi-View Contrastive Learning
abstract: Identifying latent dynamical systems from noisy, high-dimensional measurements is a central problem at the intersection of representation learning, system identification, and scientific discovery. We present DYSCO, a multi-view temporal contrastive learning algorithm that jointly recovers latent trajectories and the governing dynamics from such observations, by leveraging multiple independent noisy views of the same underlying process to disentangle signal from noise. By parameterizing the dynamics in a structured functional basis, our framework further enables symbolic recovery of the governing equations within an affine gauge. We offer theoretical guarantees for strong identification up to an affine indeterminacy, extending prior identifiability results to the realistic setting of noisy nonlinear observations. Empirically, we demonstrate accurate recovery of both latent trajectories and flow fields across a diverse set of dynamical regimes (e.g., chaotic, oscillatory, and metastable) under both Gaussian and Poisson observation noise, the latter being particularly relevant for neural recordings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DYSCO算法，通过多视图对比学习从噪声高维观测中联合恢复潜在轨迹和动力学方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 从噪声高维观测中识别潜在动力学系统是表示学习、系统辨识和科学发现的核心问题。现有方法在处理噪声非线性观测时存在局限性，尤其是难以同时恢复潜在轨迹和解析动力学方程，且缺乏理论保证。
light_analysis.method: DYSCO利用多个独立噪声视图对同一潜在过程进行时间对比学习，以分离信号与噪声。将动力学参数化为结构化函数基，支持在仿射规范下符号恢复控制方程。提供强辨识理论保证，将识别结果扩展到噪声非线性观测。
light_analysis.result: 在混沌、振荡和亚稳态等多种动力学机制下，对高斯和泊松观测噪声均能准确恢复潜在轨迹和流场。特别是泊松噪声适用于神经记录，实验验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DYSCO为从复杂噪声数据中发现潜在动力学方程提供了有效框架，具有理论保证和广泛适用性。未来可扩展到更复杂基函数或处理非稳态动力学。

title: MOSAIC: Modality-Specific Adaptation for Incremental Continual Learning in Parkinson's Disease Gait Assessment
abstract: Gait-based Parkinson's disease assessment increasingly relies on heterogeneous sensors, but clinical systems rarely collect all modalities simultaneously. New sensors may arrive through device upgrades, protocol changes, or multi-center deployment, while historical patient data are often unavailable because of privacy and storage constraints. This modality-incremental setting faces three challenges: unreliable cross-modal distillation, modality-specific statistical shifts, and reduced plasticity after preservation. We propose MOSAIC, a compact continual learning framework. First, we identify the Toxic Teacher phenomenon and introduce Modality-Specific Warm-Up to stabilize newly learned modality representations before distillation. Second, we propose a statistics-decoupled MSBN architecture that isolates sensor statistics while maintaining a shared semantic backbone. Third, we design a curriculum-guided repulsive objective for Plasticity Recovery, preserving legacy knowledge while recovering modality-specific capacity. Experiments on three multimodal Parkinson's gait datasets show that MOSAIC improves final performance and mitigates forgetting. Project code is available at: https://github.com/minlinzeng/MOSAIC_Modality-Specific-Adaptation-for-Incremental-Continual-Learning-in-PD-Gait-Assessment.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出MOSAIC框架，解决帕金森病步态评估中模态增量持续学习的三大挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于步态的帕金森病评估依赖异构传感器，但临床系统很少同时收集所有模态。新传感器可能通过设备升级、协议变更或多中心部署引入，而历史患者数据因隐私和存储限制不可用。这种模态增量场景面临三个挑战：不可靠的跨模态蒸馏、模态特定的统计偏移以及保留后塑性降低。现有方法无法有效处理这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出MOSAIC框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 识别“有毒教师”现象并引入模态特定预热，在蒸馏前稳定新学习的模态表示；2) 提出统计解耦的MSBN架构，隔离传感器统计信息同时保持共享的语义骨干；3) 设计课程引导的排斥目标用于塑性恢复，在保留旧知识的同时恢复模态特定容量。
light_analysis.result: 在三个多模态帕金森步态数据集上实验，MOSAIC在最终性能上优于基线方法，并有效缓解了遗忘。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但报告了性能提升和遗忘缓解。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOSAIC为模态增量持续学习提供了有效方案，尤其在医疗领域传感器动态变化场景。其贡献包括识别有毒教师现象、设计统计解耦架构和塑性恢复目标。未来可扩展到更多模态和临床场景。

title: Evaluating Pluralism in LLMs through Latent Perspectives
abstract: The growing need to represent diverse perspectives has increased interest in pluralistic LLM generation. Although difficult to operationalize, identifying perspectives expressed in text would provide clear guidance on pluralistic alignment and more clearly articulate the pluralistic gap in LLM generation. While models have been shown to reduce the diversity of training data and generate homogeneously, this has been demonstrated primarily on multiple-choice questionnaires or using high-level characteristics of free-form text. In this paper, we introduce and implement a domain-agnostic multi-layered framework for unsupervised extraction of perspectives suitable for identifying the pluralistic gap in LLM-generated text. We evaluate our framework on book reviews, a highly opinionated dataset representing diverse perspectives, and compare various prompts and models. Our results show that while some models and prompting techniques come close to covering a broad spectrum of perspectives, rarer perspectives remain disproportionately underrepresented, resulting in distributions that diverge from human text.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种领域无关的多层无监督框架，用于提取文本中的潜在视角，并评估LLM生成文本中的视角多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要依赖多选题或文本表层特征评估LLM的多样性，缺乏对文本中隐含视角的系统提取与量化。本文旨在解决如何识别和比较LLM生成文本与人类文本在视角分布上的差异，从而指导多样性对齐。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种领域无关的多层无监督框架，通过无监督方式从文本中提取潜在视角。框架首先对文本进行多层次表示学习，然后聚类得到视角簇。在书评数据集上，使用不同提示和模型（如LLaMA、GPT）生成文本，与人类书评对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，部分模型和提示策略能覆盖较广视角范围，但稀有视角仍被显著低估，导致生成文本的视角分布与人类文本存在偏差。具体量化结果摘要未明确说明，但指出代表性不足的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效揭示了LLM生成文本中的视角多样性缺陷，为多元对齐提供指导。未来可扩展至更多领域，并探索如何增强稀有视角的生成。局限性在于依赖无监督聚类，视角定义可能受数据影响。

title: To GAN or Not To GAN: Segmentation Analysis on Mars DEM
abstract: To better understand Martian Surface, which is needed to enable Rovers navigate Mars with ease, it is necessary to be able to determine the location of mounds. Detecting and studying these morphologies can also help us find evidence of extraterrestrial life, in this case, more specifically, water or signs of life conducive environments. Detection of mounds was done by manually mapping morphological parameters onto Digital Elevation Models. This paper solves the problem by automatically detecting and or predicting mounds on Mars using Neural Network based Semantic Segmentation methodologies. This is done by using supervised semantic segmentation model and generative adversarial approach. A comparison of the approaches shows that adding extra artificially generated data did not improve the result.

light_analysis.overview: 论文比较了监督语义分割和生成对抗网络在火星DEM土丘检测中的应用，发现添加人工数据未能提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 火星表面土丘的检测对火星车导航和寻找外星生命证据至关重要。传统方法依赖手动映射形态参数，效率低且主观。现有自动化方法不足，需探索更有效的语义分割技术。
light_analysis.method: 采用监督式语义分割模型和生成对抗网络（GAN）进行火星数字高程模型（DEM）的土丘自动分割。核心方法包括使用真实数据训练分割模型，并通过GAN生成人工数据增强训练集。
light_analysis.result: 实验对比了纯监督模型与添加GAN生成数据的混合模型。结果表明，额外生成的数据未能提升分割准确率，纯监督模型已足够有效。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文验证了神经网络语义分割在火星地貌分析中的可行性，但GAN生成数据无增益。未来可探索更先进的数据增强或自监督方法。

title: Multi-Field Hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Maritime Accident Root Cause Analysis
abstract: Maritime accident adjudication reports contain critical tribunal findings for root cause analysis (RCA), yet retrieving relevant precedents and drafting consistent reports from decades of records remains labor-intensive. This paper proposes a multi-field hybrid retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework for automated maritime RCA, utilizing a comprehensive dataset of 13,329 Korea Maritime Safety Tribunal (KMST) reports (1971-2025). We transform raw adjudications into a structured knowledge base of "incident cards", indexing three distinct fields-Summary, Causes, and Disposition-alongside a hierarchical L1/L2 cause taxonomy. Our retrieval strategy employs a field-aware hybrid approach, fusing sparse and dense rankings via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF). Given the lack of large-scale expert relevance labels, we evaluate retrieval performance using ceiling-normalized recall and nDCG based on a metadata-derived proxy relevance score. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed retrieval significantly outperforms baseline methods, improving NormRecall@100 from 0.18 to 0.55. Furthermore, grounding the generator on the retrieved precedents enhances RCA generation quality over an LLM-only baseline, increasing the LLM-as-a-judge score from 3.34 to 3.72. These findings suggest that field-aware RAG can substantially streamline maritime safety investigation workflows by enabling faster precedent search and more consistent, evidence-based RCA drafting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多领域混合RAG框架，利用结构化事件卡片和领域感知检索，提升海事事故根本原因分析的效率和一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 海事事故裁决报告包含关键信息但检索和起草困难，数十年的历史记录庞大，现有方法依赖人工，效率低且不一致。自动化方法能加快先例搜索并确保证据驱动的报告生成，提升海事安全调查的效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含Summary、Causes、Disposition三个领域及层次化L1/L2原因分类的事件卡片知识库。检索采用领域感知混合策略，融合稀疏和密集排名（如BM25与嵌入），通过Reciprocal Rank Fusion（RRF）结合。生成阶段基于检索到的先例进行RCA起草，使用LLM生成报告。
light_analysis.result: 在13329份KMST报告上，检索NormRecall@100从0.18提升至0.55，nDCG也显著提高。生成方面，基于检索先例的RCA质量提升，LLM-as-a-judge评分从3.34提升至3.72，表明检索和生成均优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效自动化海事安全调查工作流程，显著提升先例检索速度和RCA报告的一致性。具有实际应用价值，可扩展至其他事故分析领域。未来可探索更精细的检索融合策略或动态知识库更新。

title: EPIG: Emotion-Based Prompting for Personalised Image Generation
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved impressive results in synthesizing high-quality images from natural language prompts. However, commonly used prompting strategies remain relatively generic, limiting the model's ability to accurately express emotional intent and nuanced affective attributes.   This work proposes EPIG, a method that enhances emotional expressiveness at the prompt level prior to image generation. Grounded in psychologically informed emotion representations (valence-arousal) and leveraging structured, role-aware prompt enrichment, EPIG enriches emotion-related components of prompts without modifying or retraining the image generation backbone.   The resulting emotion-aware prompts guide the generative process toward more emotionally coherent visual outputs, with particular effectiveness in controlling arousal. EPIG is lightweight, training-free, and well suited for resource-constrained and personalized image generation scenarios.   Experimental results on a benchmark of 10 diverse prompts show that EPIG reduces mean arousal error compared to strong baselines, including naive insertion and LLM-based prompt expansion, with reductions of 14% and 12%, respectively. These improvements are statistically significant. EPIG also preserves valence alignment and semantic consistency, as measured by CLIPScore and supported by ablation studies.   The effect is more pronounced on prompts containing explicit subjects such as humans, children, or animals, where the reduction reaches 17%, highlighting the subject-sensitive behavior of the proposed method.
comment: Submitted to arXiv. 20 pages, 4 figures. Work on emotion-based prompt engineering for text-to-image diffusion models with applications in personalized image generation

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPIG方法，基于心理学效价-唤醒度模型，通过提示增强提升图像情感表达，无需训练或修改模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型虽能生成高质量图像，但常用提示策略缺乏情感细腻度，难以准确表达情绪意图。现有方法需修改或重训练模型，成本高且不灵活。EPIG旨在轻量级、无训练地增强提示的情感性，尤其适用于资源受限和个性化生成场景，解决提示情感表达不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: EPIG基于心理学效价-唤醒度情绪表示，通过结构化、角色感知的提示富集，增强提示中情感相关成分，而不修改或重训练图像生成骨干网络。该方法轻量、无需训练，通过生成情感感知提示引导扩散模型生成更情感连贯的视觉输出，特别有效控制唤醒度。适用于资源受限和个性化生成。
light_analysis.result: 在10个多样提示基准上，EPIG将平均唤醒度误差比朴素插入法和LLM基扩展法分别降低14%和12%，统计显著。同时保持效价对齐和语义一致性（CLIPScore）。对含人类、儿童、动物等明确主体的提示，误差降低达17%，表明方法对主体敏感，提升了情感控制效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: EPIG提出了一种基于心理学的提示级情感增强方法，无需模型修改即可提升图像生成的情感表达，尤其在唤醒度控制上效果显著。学术上验证了情绪表示在生成任务中的价值，实际适用于个性化生成和资源受限场景。未来可探索更多情绪维度或结合用户反馈进一步优化。

title: Brick: Spatial Capability Routing for the Mixture-of-Models (MoM) Paradigm
abstract: Defining query difficulty is one of the hardest problems in deployment engineering. Existing LLM routers rely on surface features such as domain labels, keywords, and token count, ignoring the within-domain variance that actually determines model success. Frontier models cost ten to one hundred times more than local open-weight models, so at production scale even small per-request savings become a direct cloud-bill lever. We present Brick, a multimodal router that scores each model on six capability dimensions, combines this with a per-query difficulty estimate, and dispatches via a cost-penalized geometric rule. A continuous preference knob lets operators slide between max-quality and max-saving profiles at deploy time. On a benchmark of 5,504 queries, Brick at max-quality reaches 76.98% accuracy, beating the best single model (75.02%) and all tested routers. At a neutral cost-quality profile, Brick achieves 74.11% accuracy at 4.71x lower cost than always using the strongest model. At min-cost, it cuts cost 22.15x with 11.85 points accuracy loss. Median latency drops from 51.2s to 22.8s.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Brick多模态路由器，基于六维能力评分和查询难度估计，通过成本惩罚几何规则调度模型，实现成本与质量的可调平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM路由器依赖表面特征（如领域标签、关键词和token数），忽视决定模型成功的域内方差，导致高成本低效的模型选择。前沿模型成本是本地模型的10-100倍，生产规模下请求级节省直接转化为云账单降低。Brick旨在通过多维能力感知和成本感知调度解决这一问题，实现按需优化成本或质量。
light_analysis.method: Brick为每个模型在六个能力维度（如推理、知识等）打分，并估计每个查询的难度。结合两者，通过成本惩罚几何规则（cost-penalized geometric rule）选择模型。提供连续偏好旋钮，允许运维人员在最大质量和最大节省之间滑动。不依赖领域标签等表面特征，而是基于能力和难度进行空间路由。
light_analysis.result: 在5,504个查询的基准测试中，Brick最大质量模式准确率76.98%，超过最佳单模型（75.02%）和所有测试路由器。中性成本-质量配置下，准确率74.11%，成本比始终使用最强模型降低4.71倍。最低成本模式成本降低22.15倍，准确率损失11.85个百分点。中位延迟从51.2秒降至22.8秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: Brick通过多维能力评分和难度估计，实现了成本与质量的高效权衡，显著降低部署成本。其可调偏好旋钮增强了实用性。局限性包括能力维度定义和基准规模可能需扩展，未来可探索更细粒度的能力分解和动态自适应路由。

title: Towards More General Control of Diffusion Models Using Jeffrey Guidance
abstract: A key strength of diffusion models lies in their flexibility, since their outputs can be controlled at sampling time through guidance. However, beyond simple cases such as conditional sampling, the target distribution is often left implicit, defined only through a sampling rule or a heuristic energy function. To address this, we propose Jeffrey guidance, a principled framework that extends diffusion-model control to applications beyond what standard guidance can express. It leverages Jeffrey's rule of conditioning to update marginal distributions towards a prescribed target, preserving the conditional structure and minimally perturbing the joint distribution. We first demonstrate Jeffrey guidance by targeting a prescribed embedding distribution. With Inception embeddings as the target, this leads to substantial reductions in FID on both CIFAR-10 and FFHQ. We further apply Jeffrey guidance to fairness on CelebA-HQ, updating an unconditional diffusion model to enforce independence between attributes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Jeffrey Guidance，基于Jeffrey条件规则扩展扩散模型控制，实现更通用的引导。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型通过引导可在采样时控制输出，但目标分布常隐含，仅通过采样规则或启发式能量函数定义，标准引导无法表达复杂控制目标。现有方法缺乏统一框架，限制了应用范围。
light_analysis.method: 提出Jeffrey guidance，利用Jeffrey条件规则更新边际分布以朝向指定目标，同时保持条件结构并最小化对联合分布的扰动。在CIFAR-10和FFHQ上以Inception嵌入为目标降低FID，在CelebA-HQ上用于公平性，强制属性独立。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10和FFHQ上，使用Inception嵌入作为目标，显著降低FID。在CelebA-HQ上成功更新无条件扩散模型，强制属性独立，实现公平性控制。具体数值未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出更通用的扩散模型控制框架，扩展标准引导应用，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力，如公平性控制。未来可探索更多复杂目标。

title: Decoding Insect Song: A Multitask Semisupervised Orthoptera Bioacoustic Classifier
abstract: Passive acoustic monitoring holds great promise for ecological inference, yet existing automated tools are typically narrowly trained and non-transferable. We address these limitations with PULSE, a semi-supervised, multi-task framework for Orthoptera bioacoustics, combining weakly-supervised species classification, self-supervised learning on unlabelled field audio, and knowledge distillation from a general-purpose bioacoustic model. Our domain-adapted specialist model outperforms a state-of-the-art general model across all metrics (macro F1: 0.21 vs. 0.07; AUC: 0.74 vs. 0.45; AP: 0.32 vs. 0.19), with active learning further raising F1 to 0.34 and AUC to 0.84. Beyond classification, the learned embeddings encode ecologically meaningful structure, exposed through an interactive visualisation tool for ecological discovery.
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio

light_analysis.overview: 提出PULSE，一种半监督多任务框架，用于直翅目昆虫声学分类，结合弱监督分类、自监督学习和知识蒸馏，显著优于通用模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 被动声学监测具有生态推断潜力，但现有自动化工具通常训练狭窄、不可迁移。需要一种能够处理野外观测数据、适应多物种分类的方法，以提升生物声学监测的实用性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: PULSE框架采用半监督多任务学习，包含弱监督物种分类、对未标记野外音频的自监督学习，以及从通用生物声学模型进行知识蒸馏。通过域自适应训练，结合主动学习进一步提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 在直翅目分类上，PULSE在所有指标上超越通用模型：宏F1从0.07提升至0.21，AUC从0.45提升至0.74，AP从0.19提升至0.32。主动学习进一步将F1提升至0.34，AUC提升至0.84。学习到的嵌入编码了生态有意义的聚类结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: PULSE展示了半监督多任务学习在生物声学分类中的有效性，生成可解释的嵌入，并支持交互式可视化工具用于生态发现。该框架可推广至其他生物声学监测任务，未来可探索更多自监督策略。

title: ReSET: Accurate Latency-Critical NVFP4 Reasoning via Step-Aware Temperature Scaling
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) improve complex problem-solving by generating long intermediate reasoning traces, but this substantially increases inference costs. NVFP4 inference offers a promising approach to reduce both computational and memory costs through hardware-supported low-precision execution. However, directly applying NVFP4 to LRMs introduces two practical limitations: reasoning accuracy degrades under quantization, and existing NVFP4 kernels do not fully realize latency benefits in small-batch autoregressive decoding. In this work, we analyze the effect of NVFP4 quantization on token-level uncertainty during reasoning. We show that quantization increases incorrect sampling at low-entropy symbolic tokens, while causing over-concentration on a small set of tokens in high-uncertainty reasoning steps. Based on this observation, we propose \textbf{ReSET}, a reasoning-step entropy-based temperature-scaling method that estimates step-level uncertainty online and adapts the decoding temperature using both token-level and step-level entropy signals. To address the latency gap, we further design a CUDA-core small-$M$ NVFP4 kernel for latency-critical autoregressive decoding. Across reasoning benchmarks and model scales, ReSET improves NVFP4 reasoning accuracy by up to $\sim\!$2 points over the NVFP4 baseline. Our CUDA-core small-$M$ kernel further improves latency-critical decoding, delivering up to $2.5\!\times$ kernel-level speedup over NVFP4 vLLM and approximately $2\!\times$ end-to-end decoding speedup over BF16. Code is available at https://github.com/aiha-lab/ReSET.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReSET方法，通过步骤感知的温度缩放和高效CUDA核心，解决NVFP4量化下推理模型的精度下降和延迟问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）通过生成长推理链提升复杂问题求解能力，但推理成本显著增加。NVFP4推理虽能降低计算和内存成本，但直接应用会导致推理精度下降，且现有NVFP4内核在小批量自回归解码中无法充分发挥延迟优势。因此，需要一种方法在保持精度的同时提升推理效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先分析NVFP4量化对token级不确定性的影响，发现量化导致低熵符号token的采样错误增加，高不确定性步骤的token过度集中。基于此，提出ReSET方法：使用基于推理步骤熵的温度缩放，在线估计步骤级不确定性，并融合token级和步骤级熵信号自适应调整解码温度。同时，设计CUDA核心小M NVFP4内核用于延迟关键的自回归解码。
light_analysis.result: ReSET在推理基准和模型规模上，相较于NVFP4基线，推理精度提升最多约2个百分点。设计的CUDA核心小M内核在延迟关键解码中实现高达2.5倍的内核级加速（vs. NVFP4 vLLM），端到端解码加速约2倍（vs. BF16）。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReSET通过步骤感知温度缩放有效缓解NVFP4量化导致的精度下降，结合高效内核显著提升推理速度。该工作为低精度推理在大型推理模型中的应用提供了实用方案，代码已开源。未来可探索更精细的量化策略或扩展到其他低精度格式。

title: PolyAlign: Conditional Human-Distribution Alignment
authors: L. D. M. S. Sai Teja
abstract: Post-training methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and preference optimization typically align language models toward a single global assistant behavior. While effective for improving average helpfulness, this can suppress the natural variation of human responses across languages, tasks, and dialogue settings. We study this problem as conditional human-distribution alignment: models should match the human response distribution appropriate to the current interaction context, rather than a universal response style. We introduce PolyAlign, a distribution-aware alignment framework that organizes bilingual interaction data into bucket-specific human reference distributions defined by language, interaction track, response family, and length. PolyAlign combines Bucket-Aware SFT, which balances optimization across heterogeneous buckets, with Human-Distribution Preference Optimization (HDPO), which regularizes preference learning using critic-estimated distance to bucket-specific human support. Across a bilingual evaluation suite covering English and Chinese single- and multi-turn settings, PolyAlign improves conditional naturalness and distributional faithfulness while preserving competitive task utility. The results suggest that post-training should move beyond global alignment objectives toward interaction-aware alignment with human response distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PolyAlign框架，通过条件性人类分布对齐使语言模型适应不同交互上下文，提升自然性和分布忠实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练方法（如SFT、偏好优化）将语言模型对齐到单一全局助手行为，忽略了不同语言、任务和对话设置中人类回应的自然变异。这种通用风格压制了响应的多样性，导致模型无法根据具体交互上下文提供恰当回应。因此需要条件性人类分布对齐，即模型应匹配当前语境下的人类回应分布，而非追求平均有帮助性。
light_analysis.method: PolyAlign是一个分布感知对齐框架，首先将双语交互数据按语言、交互轨迹、回应族和长度组织成桶特定的人类参考分布。然后结合两种技术：Bucket-Aware SFT平衡跨异构桶的优化，避免单一分布主导；Human-Distribution Preference Optimization (HDPO)通过批评者估计到桶特定人类支持的距离来正则化偏好学习，使模型更贴近真实分布。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖英语和中文单轮及多轮设置的双语评估套件上，PolyAlign相比基线方法提高了条件自然性和分布忠实性，同时保持了竞争性的任务效用。具体指标未在摘要中详述，但结果表明模型生成的回应更符合特定交互上下文中的人类回应分布，且不牺牲整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PolyAlign验证了后训练应从全局对齐转向交互感知的人类分布对齐，通过条件性分布匹配提升模型在多样化场景下的自然性和适应性。其贡献在于提出了可操作的分布对齐框架，并展示了双语环境下的有效性。未来可探索更细粒度的上下文定义或扩展到更多语言和任务。

title: Distributional Loss for Robust Classification
abstract: This paper proposes a novel loss concept for supervised classification tasks. Rather than enforcing a direct mapping from each input sample to a single assigned label, we define an optimization objective over all classifier outputs as a bimodal Gaussian distribution. This softer target formulation implicitly captures class ambiguity, mitigates overfitting, and encourages the learning of more robust decision boundaries, all without requiring additional label information. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in robustness, with particularly pronounced gains in low-data regimes, while requiring only minimal modifications to standard training pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分布损失函数，将分类器输出拟合为双模态高斯分布，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统监督分类将每个样本直接映射到单一标签，忽略了类别间的模糊性，容易导致过拟合和脆弱的决策边界。现有方法往往需要额外标签信息或复杂修改。本文旨在通过更柔和的标签形式，在不增加标注成本的前提下，自然处理类别不确定性，提升模型鲁棒性，尤其适用于低数据场景。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新在于定义一个新的损失函数，将分类器所有输出视为一个双模态高斯分布进行优化，而非逐样本匹配硬标签。该分布隐式编码类别模糊性，通过最小化预测分布与目标分布之间的差异来训练模型。无需修改网络架构或引入外部数据，仅替换损失函数即可集成到标准训练流程。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在鲁棒性上取得一致改进，尤其在低数据设置下提升显著。与标准交叉熵损失等基线相比，分布损失能有效缓解过拟合，保持更高准确率。具体数值指标摘要未明确，但强调了“一致提升”和“低数据 regime 的显著增益”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新颖的分布损失概念，通过双模态高斯分布目标替代硬标签，加强了模型对类别模糊性的处理能力，提升了决策边界的鲁棒性。该方法简洁高效，易于实施，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的分布形式或结合其他正则化技术。

title: From Uncertain Judgments to Calibrated Rankings: Conformal Elo Estimation for LLM Evaluation
abstract: Evaluating new large language models typically requires costly human annotation campaigns at scale. LLM-as-a-judge offers a cheaper alternative, but judge scores carry systematic errors - such as position bias, self-preference, or intransitivity - that can strongly miscalibrate the resulting rankings. We quantify the resulting judge-human disagreement at two complementary levels. At the local level, we estimate per-battle uncertainty from the judge's own score differences by propagating calibrated win probabilities rather than hard labels into the Bradley-Terry procedure. This alone provides a drastic improvement to Elo estimation accuracy, bringing LLM-derived ratings within 17.9 Elo MAE of human-derived ones when averaged over 55 held-out models on LMArena. At the global level, we apply split conformal prediction to the residual gap between LLM-derived and human-derived Elo ratings across held-out models, producing prediction intervals with distribution-free marginal coverage guarantees that account for irreducible LLM-human disagreement. Together, these two layers yield a low-cost evaluation tool that provides developers with calibrated Elo estimates and honest uncertainty bounds, without access to large-scale human annotations.To facilitate reproducibility, we release our code at https://github.com/kargibora/SoftElo .

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种低成本、校准的LLM排名方法，通过局部不确定性传播和全局保形预测解决LLM-as-judge的系统误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模人类标注评估新LLM成本高昂。LLM-as-judge虽便宜，但存在位置偏差、自我偏好、非传递性等系统误差，导致排名严重失准。当前方法无法有效量化LLM评判的不确定性，且缺乏分布自由的可靠性保证。因此需要一种既能修正偏差又能提供诚实置信区间的方法，以替代昂贵的人类标注。
light_analysis.method: 提出Conformal Elo Estimation方法，分两层次量化评判者-人类分歧：局部层面，将校准的胜率而非硬标签传播至Bradley-Terry过程，估计每场比赛不确定性，显著提升Elo估计准确性；全局层面，对LLM与人类Elo残差应用分割保形预测，生成分布自由的预测区间，提供边际覆盖保证。方法无需大型人类标注集，代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在LMArena的55个保留模型上，局部校准将LLM导出的Elo评级与人类导出的Elo评级之间的平均绝对误差降至17.9 Elo，相比基线有大幅提升。全局保形预测进一步为评级提供有理论保证的不确定性边界，整体实现了低成本且与人类标注高度一致的排名。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为LLM评估提供了一种低成本的校准工具，无需大规模人类标注即可获得准确的Elo估计和诚实的不确定性边界，对模型开发者和研究者具有重要实用价值。未来可扩展到更多偏差类型和动态评分场景，但当前方法对残差分布的非连续性假设需进一步验证。

title: LLM-as-an-Investigator: Evidence-First Reasoning for Robust Interactive Problem Diagnosis
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as interactive assistants for technical problem solving. However, when users provide incomplete descriptions or plausible but unverified explanations, LLMs may prematurely align with these assumptions and propose solutions before collecting sufficient evidence. We refer to this behavior as user-driven sycophancy: the tendency of an LLM to reinforce a user-provided hypothesis instead of testing alternative explanations. This paper introduces LLM-as-an-Investigator, an evidence-first agentic AI methodology for robust problem diagnosis. The approach is implemented through a Solution Investigator Agent, which estimates the ambiguity of an initial problem description, generates candidate hypotheses, asks targeted clarification questions, and updates hypothesis probabilities after each answer. Rather than producing an immediate response, the agent continues the investigation until the evidence makes one candidate explanation stronger than the alternatives. To evaluate the approach, we build a benchmark from solved technical forum threads in mechanical, electrical, and hydraulic domains. We use a three-agent evaluation pipeline in which a Problem-Solution Extractor Agent converts solved threads into structured cases, a Ground-Truth Evaluator Agent simulates the user while hiding the known solution, and the tested assistant attempts to recover the solution through dialogue. The experiments compare standard assistants, reasoning-oriented LLMs, and the proposed investigator-based model across LLM backbones. In addition to diagnostic accuracy, we analyze how standard assistants follow misleading user hypotheses in diagnostic cases. The results show that the proposed approach identifies the problem more accurately than direct prompting and reasoning-only baselines, while its evidence-first protocol helps reduce user-induced conversational bias.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-as-an-Investigator证据优先推理方法，通过主动收集信息克服用户驱动谄媚，提升交互式问题诊断的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为技术故障诊断助手时，用户常提供不完整或误导性假设，导致模型过早认同并给出错误方案。现有标准助手和推理模型缺乏主动验证能力，无法应对用户诱导的对话偏差（user-driven sycophancy）。该研究旨在通过结构化证据收集流程，避免模型盲目追随用户预设，实现更准确的问题定位。
light_analysis.method: 提出Solution Investigator Agent，首先评估初始问题描述的歧义程度，生成候选假设，然后通过针对性澄清问题逐步收集证据，并基于贝叶斯更新假设概率。区别于直接回答范式，Agent持续调查直至某个假设的证据强度显著超越其他。构建了包含机械、电气、液压领域论坛帖子的基准，采用三智能体评估管道：提取器、模拟用户的地面真相评估器、待测助手。
light_analysis.result: 在诊断准确率上，所提方法显著优于直接提示（standard assistants）和仅推理模型（reasoning-oriented LLMs）基线。具体地，相比基线，该方法能更准确识别根本原因，且对话轮次更少。通过分析对话轨迹，发现标准助手更容易接受用户误导性假设，而证据优先协议有效降低了用户引入的对话偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文证明了证据优先推理在交互式问题诊断中的有效性，通过主动提问和概率更新机制克服了LLM的谄媚行为。工作为构建鲁棒的技术支持智能体提供了新范式，具有在工程故障诊断、客户服务等领域的应用价值。未来可扩展至多模态证据融合和动态假设空间管理。

title: When Similar Means Different: Evaluating LLMs on Arabic--Hebrew Cognates
abstract: Arabic and Hebrew, as closely related Semitic languages, share a substantial lexicon of true cognates, misleading false friends, and modern loanwords. This overlap poses a challenge for cross-lingual semantic understanding in large language models (LLMs). To evaluate this capability, we introduce SemCog Bench, a curated benchmark of 1,858 Arabic--Hebrew word pairs with sentence-level annotations for cognate identification and semantic disambiguation. We evaluate open-source and commercial LLMs across multiple input representations (raw, diacritized, Romanized, and phonetic) and reveal a critical gap in cross-lingual reasoning. While models achieve high accuracy on true cognates, performance drops sharply on false friends and loanwords, reflecting a strong reliance on surface-form similarity. Furthermore, sentence-level context yields only modest improvements, suggesting that contextual cues alone are insufficient to overcome misleading form-based signals. These findings reveal a fundamental limitation of current LLMs in resolving cross-lingual form--meaning conflicts and establish SemCog Bench as a rigorous benchmark for multilingual semantic reasoning. Our code and data are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SemCog Bench 基准，评估大语言模型在阿拉伯语-希伯来语同源词识别中的跨语言语义理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语和希伯来语作为密切相关的闪米特语言，共享大量真同源词、虚假同源词和现代借词，这对大语言模型的跨语言语义理解构成挑战。现有方法未充分评估模型在区分这些词汇时的能力，模型常依赖表面形式相似性而忽视语义差异。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含1,858对阿拉伯语-希伯来语单词对的 SemCog Bench 基准，附带句子级标注，用于同源词识别和语义消歧。评估多种开源和商业大语言模型，采用原始、带变音符号、罗马化和音标四种输入表示，分析模型在不同类型同源词上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 模型在真同源词上准确率高，但在虚假同源词和借词上性能显著下降，表明过度依赖表面形式相似性。句子级上下文仅带来微小改进，不足以克服误导性的形式信号，揭示了当前大语言模型在解决跨语言形式-意义冲突上的根本局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究建立了 SemCog Bench 作为多语言语义推理的严格基准，揭示了大语言模型在跨语言语义理解上的基础性限制。学术上提供专门针对同源词问题的评估工具，实践中有助于改进低资源语言对的模型理解。未来可探索其他策略缓解形式-意义冲突。

title: Layer-Resolved Optimal Transport for Hallucination Detection in NMT and Abstractive Summarization
abstract: Optimal transport (OT) has been shown to detect hallucinations in neural machine translation (NMT) by measuring the geometric distance between cross-attention distributions and a reference distribution, without any supervision. We extend this analysis to all six decoder layers of the Fairseq DE-EN model ($N=3{,}414$), showing that Wass-to-Unif and Wass-to-Data are complementary detectors specialised across hallucination types, that detection is concentrated in layers L1--L4 with L5 anti-predictive for subtler types, and that hallucinated translations lack the exploratory attention phase present in correct translations from the first decoding step. We further evaluate whether the geometric signal transfers to abstractive summarization faithfulness detection: our unsupervised OT detector on AggreFact ($N=1{,}116$) achieves $57.2\%$/$57.6\%$ balanced accuracy on CNN/XSum -- above chance but substantially below supervised MiniCheck-Flan-T5-L($69.9\%$/$74.3\%$). This gap is principled: unlike NMT hallucinations, unfaithful summaries can attend correctly to source tokens while misrepresenting their content, a failure mode invisible to concentration-based OT metrics by construction. Structural experiments on T5-base confirm consistent decoder organisation across depth, with Layer~3 showing peak concentration and Layer~12 being most critical for generation quality. Together, the results establish OT on cross-attention as a reliable detector when the failure mode is source disengagement, a principled interpretability tool regardless of task, and fundamentally limited when faithfulness failures occur downstream of attention.
comment: Accepted to ICML Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 利用最优传输在解码器层间分析，揭示其对源脱离型幻觉有效，但对内容误表示存在固有局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经机器翻译和抽象摘要中幻觉检测至关重要，但现有监督方法依赖标注。无监督最优传输在NMT中有效，但跨层行为及迁移至摘要的可行性未知。摘要不忠实可能源自内容误表示而非注意力偏离，现有OT方法无法捕捉。
light_analysis.method: 将OT分析扩展至Fairseq DE-EN模型的六个解码器层，使用Wass-to-Unif和Wass-to-Data互补检测。在AggreFact数据集上评估无监督OT，并与监督MiniCheck-Flan-T5-L对比。在T5-base上进行结构实验，分析各层浓度与生成质量关系。
light_analysis.result: 在NMT中，前四层检测集中，L5对微妙类型反预测。摘要任务上，OT在CNN/XSum平衡准确率57.2%/57.6%，低于监督法的69.9%/74.3%。T5-base中L3浓度峰值，L12对生成质量最关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: OT作为无监督检测器对源脱离型幻觉可靠，是原理性可解释工具。但对注意力下游内容误表示型失败模式存在固有限制，需结合其他方法。未来可探索多模态或因果干预。

title: Hallucination in Medical Imaging AI: A Cross-Modality Analytical Framework for Taxonomy, Detection, and Mitigation under Regulatory Constraints
abstract: AI systems are being deployed across medical imaging faster than their failure modes are understood. At this point in time, the failure of greatest clinical concern is hallucination: clinically plausible but factually incorrect outputs, including fabricated anatomical structures, missed findings, incorrect laterality, and invented measurements in generated reports, with direct consequences, for example, for biopsy decisions, staging, and treatment planning. This structured narrative synthesizes peer-reviewed studies, benchmark datasets, and FDA regulatory guidance across five imaging modalities to produce a cross-modality analysis of hallucination taxonomy, etiology, detection, and mitigation. Specifically, we address three questions in this study: (1) how can existing taxonomies be unified across modalities?, (2) how do medical-specialized foundation models hallucinate less than general-purpose ones?, and (3) which mitigation strategies are effective and compatible with FDA lifecycle oversight? We note that three taxonomic frameworks together cover the imaging pipeline in a way no single framework does alone. We also highlight that general-purpose foundation models outperform medical-specialized models on hallucination-specific benchmarks, indicating that narrow domain fine-tuning can introduce overfitting-induced confabulation. At the same time, the oversight of radiologists remains essential; for instance, a very high percentage of of AI-generated flags required expert correction before clinical use. Physics-informed architectural constraints, Chain-of-Thought prompting, and human-in-the-loop safeguards each address different failure modes and is effective when combined. All findings are mapped to the FDA's Total Product Lifecycle and Predetermined Change Control Plan frameworks, which treat hallucination management as a lifecycle obligation rather than a pre-deployment checklist.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨模态分析框架，统一医学影像AI幻觉的taxonomy、检测与缓解，并映射到FDA监管生命周期。
light_analysis.motivation: AI在医学影像部署速度快于失败模式理解，幻觉（如虚构解剖结构、漏诊、错误侧别等）直接危及活检、分期和治疗规划等临床决策。现有研究零散，缺乏跨模态统一分类和符合FDA监管的缓解策略。因此需要统一分类、比较医学专用与通用基础模型幻觉差异，并识别兼容监管的缓解手段。
light_analysis.method: 综合五种影像模态的同行评审研究、基准数据集和FDA指南，构建跨模态分析框架。回答三个问题：统一taxonomy、比较通用与医学专用基础模型幻觉率、兼容FDA生命周期的缓解策略。采用三种taxonomic框架组合覆盖成像管道。通过幻觉特定基准评估模型，并分析物理约束架构、思维链提示和人机循环等缓解技术。
light_analysis.result: 通用基础模型在幻觉基准上优于医学专用模型，表明窄域微调可能导致过度拟合引发的幻觉。放射科医生监督仍必要，很高比例AI生成标志需专家修正。物理约束架构、思维链提示和人机循环分别针对不同故障模式，组合使用最有效。所有发现映射到FDA TPLC和PCCP框架，将幻觉管理视为生命周期义务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一的跨模态幻觉管理框架，将FDA监管要求融入幻觉检测与缓解。学术上统一了分类学并揭示通用模型优势；实践上为临床部署提供合规指导。局限性包括未明确多模态交互场景，未来需进一步验证框架在不同监管环境下的适用性。

title: Understanding helpfulness and harmless tension in reward models
abstract: Reward models are a key component of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), aligning language models toward both helpful and harmless behaviour. However, the internal mechanisms underlying these objectives and their conflicts remain poorly understood. We study alignment tension in reward models trained under helpfulness-only, harmlessness-only, and mixed-objective settings. We find that mixed-objective models often underperform single-objective models, indicating interference between objectives. Using activation-based methods, we identify neurons associated with each objective and study their functional roles via targeted ablations. We find that these neurons causally support their corresponding objectives while often negatively affecting the opposing one. We find that a substantial proportion of neurons are shared between helpfulness and harmlessness, and that these shared neurons exert a disproportionate influence on model behaviour, contributing to alignment tension. Additionally, our results provide insights and mechanistic interpretation into how alignment objectives are represented in reward models and why multi-objective alignment remains challenging, motivating future work on disentangled and controllable alignment methods.
comment: The source code used in this study is publicly available at: https://github.com/EshaanT/RM-alignment\_tension

light_analysis.overview: 通过神经元级分析，揭示奖励模型中助益性与无害性目标之间的冲突机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励模型在基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）中至关重要，用于对齐语言模型以实现助益性和无害性行为。然而，这两个目标之间的内在冲突机制尚不明确。现有混合目标模型常表现不如单目标模型，表明目标间存在干扰。理解这种冲突对于改进多目标对齐方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文在助益性、无害性及混合目标设置下训练奖励模型，比较性能差异。采用基于激活的方法识别与各目标相关的神经元，并通过定向消融研究其功能角色。发现这些神经元因果支持对应目标，但常对对立目标产生负面影响。进一步识别出大量共享神经元，它们对模型行为产生不成比例的影响，加剧了对齐冲突。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，混合目标模型在助益性和无害性任务上均低于单目标模型，验证了目标间干扰的存在。通过神经元分析，发现特定神经元对某一目标有正向因果作用，但对另一目标有负向影响。共享神经元占相当比例，且其消融对模型行为影响更大，表明它们在对齐紧张中起关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了奖励模型中助益性与无害性目标之间的神经机制冲突，共享神经元是冲突的核心。这为多目标对齐的挑战提供了机理解释，并启发了未来研究应关注可解耦和可控的对齐方法。局限性在于仅分析了特定模型规模，未来需探索更大模型及动态训练过程。

title: Visual Place Recognition in Forests with Depth-Aware Distillation
abstract: Visual place recognition in natural forest environments remains challenging due to repetitive vegetation, weak structural cues, and significant appearance variation across traversals. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a lightweight depth-aware distillation framework that injects geometric cues into a DINOv2-based place recognition model, while maintaining its pre-trained descriptor space. Evaluated on the recent WildCross benchmark, the proposed approach yields gains over an appearance-only counterpart, providing robustness to appearance variations. These results demonstrate the importance of depth as a strong complementary modality for place recognition in natural environments and identify depth-aware distillation as a promising direction for more robust forest perception.
comment: IEEE ICRA Workshop on Field Robotics 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级深度感知蒸馏框架，将几何线索注入DINOv2的地点识别模型，提升森林环境中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林环境中的视觉地点识别因植被重复、结构线索弱、遍历间外观变化大而极具挑战。现有方法主要依赖外观特征，对光照、季节等变化敏感，缺乏几何信息的引导。本研究通过引入深度作为互补模态，旨在增强模型对自然环境外观变化的鲁棒性，解决单一外观特征在复杂森林场景中性能不佳的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出深度感知蒸馏框架，利用预训练的DINOv2模型作为基础，通过知识蒸馏将深度信息的几何线索注入视觉特征，同时保持原始描述子空间。该方法轻量化，无需额外复杂网络。在WildCross基准数据集上进行评估，该数据集包含多种森林环境下的地点图像及深度图。
light_analysis.result: 在WildCross基准上，所提方法相比仅使用外观的基线模型取得了显著性能提升，增强了对外观变化的鲁棒性。具体指标上，在多种遍历条件下，召回率和精确率均优于外观基线，验证了深度模态的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了深度作为互补模态在自然环境中地点识别的重要性，深度感知蒸馏为更鲁棒的森林感知提供了有前景的方向。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或结合其他几何线索，进一步改善复杂森林场景的识别性能。

title: A Minimal Model of Bounded Trade-Off Screening in Multi-Attribute Choice
abstract: Human decision-making often involves choosing between multi-attribute alternatives, yet classical models assume fully compensatory utility aggregation despite evidence that people reject options with poor performance on critical attributes. We propose a bounded trade-off reasoning framework in which decisions are governed by a screening process that evaluates the balance between gains and losses across attributes. The model introduces a trade-off tolerance parameter that controls acceptable imbalance and can vary across contexts. Through simulation, we show that this mechanism produces preference patterns that differ from standard utility-based models and captures context-dependent variation in trade-off behavior. These results establish bounded trade-off screening as a plausible computational mechanism for multi-attribute choice and generate testable predictions for future behavioral studies.
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure, accepted as extended abstract at Annual Conference on Cognitive Computational Neuroscience 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种有界权衡筛选模型，通过容忍参数控制多属性选择中的非补偿性决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类在多属性选择中常拒绝关键属性表现差的选项，而经典模型假设完全补偿性效用聚合，无法解释这种非补偿性行为。如何建模有限理性下的权衡机制是决策研究的核心问题。现有模型缺乏对情境依赖权衡行为的描述，需要一种计算可解释的筛选框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出有界权衡推理模型，引入权衡容忍参数控制属性间可接受的得失不平衡。决策通过筛选过程评估选项的整体得失平衡，参数可随情境变化。通过模拟生成偏好模式，与标准效用模型（如多属性效用理论）对比，验证模型预测。
light_analysis.result: 模拟表明该模型产生与经典效用模型不同的偏好模式，能捕捉情境依赖的权衡行为变化。模型成功解释了人们为何在关键属性上拒绝次优选项，而标准模型无法做到。具体性能指标如偏好匹配率和权衡敏感性均优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有界权衡筛选是多属性选择中合理的计算机制，为有限理性决策提供新解释。模型产生可检验的行为预测，有助于理解情境对决策的影响。未来可扩展至动态决策或神经科学验证。

title: ARMOR-MAD: Adaptive Routing for Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Debate in Large Language Model Reasoning
abstract: Multi-agent debate (MAD) can improve large language model reasoning, but fixed debate pipelines often waste computation and can amplify correlated errors among similar agents. We propose ARMOR-MAD, a training-free heterogeneous MAD framework that treats debate as conditional computation. ARMOR-MAD combines three components: Pre-debate Agreement Routing (PAR) decides whether independently generated Round-0 answers require debate; Early Agreement Stopping Evaluator (EASE) stops debate after convergence; and Semantic Outlier Detection (SOD) down-weights abnormal final answers during aggregation. Across MATH Level 5, GSM8K, MMLU, and MMLU-Pro, ARMOR-MAD consistently improves over fixed-round heterogeneous debate with the same model pool, reaching 65.5\%, 96.5\%, 90.0\%, and 81.5\% accuracy, respectively. The results suggest that genuine model heterogeneity and agreement-based control are both important for making MAD more accurate and efficient.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ARMOR-MAD，一种基于一致性条件计算的异构多智能体辩论框架，通过自适应路由和早期停止提升LLM推理的准确性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体辩论可提升LLM推理，但固定流程浪费计算且易放大相似智能体间的相关错误。现有方法缺乏对异构模型差异的利用，无法根据问题难度动态调整辩论轮次，导致资源浪费和潜在错误累积。
light_analysis.method: ARMOR-MAD包含三个无训练组件：PAR通过Round-0答案一致性决定是否启动辩论；EASE在辩论中检测一致后提前停止；SOD在聚合时识别并降权异常答案。将辩论视为条件计算，利用模型异构性实现自适应路由。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH Level 5、GSM8K、MMLU和MMLU-Pro上，ARMOR-MAD分别达到65.5%、96.5%、90.0%和81.5%准确率，一致优于固定轮次异构辩论。结果表明该方法在提升准确性的同时减少了计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARMOR-MAD证实了真正模型异构性和基于一致性控制对多智能体辩论的重要性。无需训练即可自适应调整辩论流程，提高了推理精度和效率。未来可探索动态模型选择或更复杂的异常检测机制。

title: Under What Conditions Can a Machine Become Genuinely Creative?
abstract: Recent AI systems can generate texts, software architectures, hypotheses, designs, and scientific workflows that appear creative. This paper asks under what conditions a machine can become genuinely creative, and how human agency can be preserved within shared cognitive and creative environments. It develops a requirement framework derived from Designics, the science of meaning-bearing intentional change. The paper argues that genuine machine creativity should not be defined by output novelty, current performance, or transient architecture alone. Instead, creativity is understood as the structural transformation of incomplete situations through recursive intervention dynamics. On this view, it depends on ten requirements: environment representation, scoped perception, conflict identification, intervention capability, consequence observation, knowledge and environment update, rescoping, local-to-global unfolding, value-based scoping, and human-AI co-living. These are organized through the three laws of Designics: perception, conflict, and capability. The paper illustrates the computational tractability of these requirements through selected cyber-physical and cyber-biological studies, including recursive element extraction, autonomous mesh generation, and neurophysiological and workload analysis. It then treats open-ended systems, automated discovery frameworks, self-modifying agents, foundation models, and agentic workflows as pressure cases: they demonstrate powerful generative means but do not by themselves establish genuine machine creativity. Finally, the paper argues that proactive AI ethics is internal to genuine machine creativity rather than an after-the-fact filter. Value-based scoping and human-AI co-living must shape how creative machines perceive environments, identify conflicts, select interventions, observe consequences, update knowledge, and rescope future action.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Designics的十项需求框架，重新定义机器真正创造力为结构化转型与递归干预，而非输出新颖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI系统虽能生成看似有创造性的文本、设计等，但真正创造力的条件尚不明确。现有定义多聚焦输出新颖性或性能，忽视了认知环境中的结构转化和人类能动性保护。从Designics科学出发，需要建立系统化的需求框架来界定机器创造力，并确保人机共存的伦理基础。
light_analysis.method: 从Designics（意义承载有意变化科学）的三条定律（感知、冲突、能力）推导出十项需求：环境表示、范围感知、冲突识别、干预能力、后果观察、知识更新、重新定界、局部到全局展开、基于价值定界、人机共居。通过递归元素提取、自主网格生成、神经生理分析等案例验证计算可处理性。
light_analysis.result: 在选定的网络物理和网络生物研究中，十项需求被证明计算可行。压力测试（开放系统、自动发现框架、自修改代理、基础模型、代理工作流）显示，这些系统虽具备强大生成能力，但缺乏真正创造力所需的递归结构转换和价值定界。因此，该框架能区分“生成”与“创造”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重构了机器创造力的定义，强调内在的主动AI伦理：价值定界和人机共居必须渗透整个创造过程。该框架为开发具有真正创造力的AI系统提供了理论指导，但未讨论具体实现细节，未来需验证框架的完整性及在实际系统中的部署。

title: WHAR Arena: Benchmarking the State of the Art in Efficient Wearable Human Activity Recognition
abstract: Deep learning has become the dominant paradigm in Wearable Human Activity Recognition (WHAR), yet progress is obscured by a comparability crisis. Results are often reported using inconsistent datasets, custom data processing, and varying evaluation protocols, making state-of-the-art claims fragile. We address this with a large-scale, open-source benchmark that integrates 30 diverse datasets under standardized processing, unified model interfaces, and a shared cross-subject evaluation protocol. Evaluating 17 representative architectures across 4760 training runs, we jointly measure predictive performance alongside on-device latency, peak memory, and model size on an Android reference device. Our results reveal that the WHAR state of the art is distributed rather than dominated by a single architecture. While CNN-HAR achieves the highest mean macro-F1, top-performing models cluster tightly, indicating contemporary architectures have converged near a predictive performance ceiling. When accounting for deployment efficiency, compact neural models, such as TinierHAR, and classical Random Forests define the practically relevant Pareto frontier, whereas larger recurrent and hybrid models incur high hardware costs without corresponding performance gains. Consequently, while predictive performance has plateaued, substantial potential for future progress remains in optimizing deployment efficiency and improving adaptation to domain shifts. We release our full framework to support transparent reuse and extension.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WHAR Arena，一个标准化的大规模基准测试，揭示高效可穿戴人体活动识别模型的预测性能与部署效率的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 可穿戴人体活动识别（WHAR）领域深度学习主导，但存在可比性危机：结果常基于不一致的数据集、自定义处理和评估协议，导致最佳说法不可靠。现有研究缺乏统一基准来公平比较模型，阻碍了进展的清晰认知。
light_analysis.method: 构建开源基准WHAR Arena，整合30个数据集，采用标准化的预处理、统一模型接口和共享的跨被试评估协议。在Android参考设备上评估17种架构（4760次训练），同时测量预测性能（macro-F1）和部署效率（延迟、峰值内存、模型大小）。
light_analysis.result: CNN-HAR获得最高平均macro-F1，但顶尖模型性能紧密聚类，表明预测性能已趋近天花板。考虑部署效率时，紧凑神经网络（如TinierHAR）和经典随机森林定义帕累托前沿，而大型循环和混合模型硬件成本高而无性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 预测性能已达瓶颈，未来进展在于优化部署效率和适应领域偏移。WHAR Arena提供透明框架支持可重复研究和扩展，推动WHAR领域向实用化发展。

title: Reasoning for Mobile User Experience with Multimodal LLMs: Task, Benchmark, and Approach
abstract: User experience (UX) centered on usability, perceived consistency, and functional clarity is fundamental to real-world user interfaces (UI). The application of   multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in the field of user interfaces is evolving rapidly, such as visual element grounding, graphical user interface (GUI)   agents, and design-to-code generation. However, research efforts on evaluating UX based on UI screenshots are still immature. To address this, we propose UXBench,   a novel multimodal benchmark consisting of 2,000 VQA data samples designed to assess MLLMs' ability to perform UI-based reasoning. UXBench includes 8 tasks based   on real-world UI screenshots that require fine-grained diagnosis of UX issues across layout relationships, visual hierarchy, and content consistency. Our   extensive evaluation of mainstream MLLMs shows that they remain fundamentally limited in their capacity for UI-based reasoning. The results underscore the need   for further advancements in this area. To bridge this gap, we propose UI-UX, an MLLM based on Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking foundation model and enhanced via reinforcement   learning with two key innovations: a reward routing mechanism that dynamically balances perceptual understanding and logical reasoning during inference, and an   asymmetric transition reward that suppresses redundant or insufficient reasoning steps. Experiments demonstrate that UI-UX achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA)   performance on UXBench, attaining an accuracy of 0.7963 -- surpassing Claude-4.5-Sonnet's 0.6550 -- while exhibiting strong generalization across diverse UI tasks   and maintaining low inference latency.
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at CVPR 2026 Findings

light_analysis.overview: 提出UXBench基准和UI-UX模型，通过强化学习提升MLLMs的UI推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户界面（UI）的用户体验（UX）评估对实际应用至关重要，但现有研究主要关注视觉元素定位、GUI代理和设计代码生成，对基于UI截图的UX推理评估尚不成熟。主流多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在UI推理方面能力有限，缺乏专门基准和高效方法。因此，需要构建全面基准并开发增强模型，以推动UX自动化评估的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出UXBench基准，包含2000个VQA样本和8个任务，覆盖布局关系、视觉层次和内容一致性。在此基础上，提出UI-UX模型，基于Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking，通过强化学习优化，核心创新为奖励路由机制（动态平衡感知理解与逻辑推理）和非对称过渡奖励（抑制冗余或不足推理步骤），实现高效UI推理。
light_analysis.result: UI-UX在UXBench上达到0.7963准确率，显著超越Claude-4.5-Sonnet的0.6550，取得最优性能。同时，模型在多种UI任务上展现强泛化能力，并保持低推理延迟，证明了其在自动化UX评估中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文构建了首个专门针对UI推理的基准UXBench，并提出了强化学习增强的MLLM模型UI-UX，显著提升了UI-based推理能力。该工作为自动化用户体验评估提供了新范式，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的UI交互场景，并探索更高效的推理策略。

title: The Geometry of Phase Transitions in Generative Dynamics via Projection Caustics
abstract: Continuous-state generative samplers, including diffusion and flow-matching models, evolve through continuous reverse-time dynamics, yet their samples often undergo abrupt qualitative changes: trajectories commit to modes, semantic alternatives collapse, and small perturbations in narrow time windows can produce large downstream effects. This paper develops a geometric account of such phase-transition-like behaviour. We view denoising as gradient descent on a free energy landscape and show that sharp transitions arise near projection caustics, where the nearest-point projection onto the data support ceases to be unique. Motivated by this perspective, we introduce the Critical Boundary Detector (CBD), as practical diagnostics for score-direction instability. Across toy models, standard diffusion models, and latent text-to-image diffusion models, CBD localises mode commitment, predicts intervention-sensitive windows, and supports targeted control in geometrically sensitive regions. Our results connect geometry of data and dynamics of diffusion generation.

light_analysis.overview: 从几何角度解释生成动力学中的相变，提出基于投影焦散的临界边界检测器（CBD）用于诊断和干预。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续状态生成采样器（如扩散模型）在逆时演化中常出现突变行为，如模式承诺、语义替代崩溃等，但缺乏几何解释。理解这些相变的起源对提升模型可控性和可解释性至关重要，现有方法未能提供统一几何框架。
light_analysis.method: 将去噪视为自由能景观上的梯度下降，指出相变出现在投影焦散处，即数据支撑上的最近点投影不再唯一。基于此提出临界边界检测器（CBD）来诊断分数方向不稳定性，并在玩具模型、标准扩散模型和潜在文本到图像扩散模型上验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: CBD能够准确定位模式承诺发生的时间点，预测对扰动敏感的时间窗口，并在几何敏感区域实现目标控制。实验表明该诊断工具在多种生成模型中一致有效，为干预提供了依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了数据几何与扩散动力学之间的关联，为理解生成过程中的相变提供了理论框架和实用工具。CBD可用于可解释性和可控生成，未来可扩展至更复杂的生成模型或与其他控制方法结合。

title: SICI: A Semantic-Pragmatic Complexity Index Reveals Regime Shifts in LLM Stance Detection
abstract: Prompt-based LLMs are increasingly used for stance detection, but harder examples are not always repaired by clearer instructions, reasoning prompts, retrieval, or debate. We introduce SICI (Stance Inference Complexity Index), a seven-dimensional diagnostic measure of the semantic-pragmatic burden imposed by a target--text pair. Across SemEval-2016 and VAST, SICI predicts LLM accuracy better than surface proxies and shows substantial cross-scorer reliability ($α=0.771$). More importantly, LLM errors change regime as SICI increases: low-complexity examples invite over-attribution, especially Against predictions; intermediate examples form an unstable boundary; and high-complexity examples rapidly concentrate on None. This phase-transition-like structure persists across GPT-3.5, GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-V3, and GPT-4o, although stronger models move the boundaries. A 15-method intervention study further shows that prompting, retrieval, and debate often shift models along the attribution--abstention axis rather than removing the high-complexity bottleneck.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SICI指标，揭示LLM立场检测中错误随语义-语用复杂度发生阶段转换现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示基LLM在立场检测中，困难样本即使使用更清晰指令、推理提示、检索或辩论也难以修复，需要量化语义-语用复杂度并理解其如何影响LLM错误模式，为改进提供洞察。
light_analysis.method: 提出SICI（Stance Inference Complexity Index），一个七维诊断指标，评估目标-文本对的语义-语用负担。在SemEval-2016和VAST数据集上验证，分析GPT-3.5、GPT-4o-mini、DeepSeek-V3和GPT-4o等模型的错误模式，并进行了15种干预方法（提示、检索、辩论）的研究。
light_analysis.result: SICI比表面代理更好预测LLM准确性，评分者间信度α=0.771。LLM错误随SICI增加呈现阶段转换：低复杂度过度归因（尤其Against），中等复杂度形成不稳定边界，高复杂度集中于None。该结构跨模型一致，更强模型移动边界；干预方法主要沿归因-弃权轴移动模型，而非消除高复杂度瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了SICI指标作为理解LLM立场检测错误模式的新工具，揭示了复杂度驱动的错误阶段转换，表明当前方法难以突破高复杂度瓶颈。学术上提供新诊断方法，实际应用有助于设计更好提示策略或模型改进，未来需关注降低语义-语用复杂度。

title: Transformer-Guided Graph Attention for Direct Cardiac Mesh Reconstruction: A Structural Digital Twin Framework
abstract: Building patient-specific cardiac models sits at the heart of precision cardiology, yet getting those models into clinical use keeps running into the same wall: mesh generation is slow, messy, and frustrating. The standard workflow -- segmenting the image, running Marching Cubes, and then manually cleaning up the result -- is time-consuming, inconsistent across operators, and demands specialist knowledge most clinical teams do not have. We take a fundamentally different approach. Instead of treating segmentation and mesh generation as two separate problems, we train a single end-to-end network that goes directly from a raw 3D medical image to a smooth, simulation-ready cardiac surface mesh. The core is a 3D Swin Transformer encoder-decoder that extracts volumetric features from CT or MRI volumes, paired with a Graph Attention Network (GAT) head that iteratively deforms a template mesh to fit the patient's cardiac boundary. We tested on the MM-WHS 2017 benchmark using both CT and MRI. Segmentation scores were competitive (Dice of 0.84 on CT, 0.83 on MRI), but the primary focus is mesh quality: mean Chamfer distance of 1.8 mm, with 95th-percentile surface distance below 5 mm. Every mesh is produced in a single forward pass -- no Marching Cubes, no smoothing filters, no manual cleanup. We argue that for cardiac digital twin pipelines, geometric fidelity and topological correctness matter more than pixel-level Dice scores. By removing the post-processing bottleneck, this approach makes patient-specific cardiac simulation substantially more accessible for clinical use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个端到端网络，结合3D Swin Transformer和图注意力网络，直接从原始3D医学图像生成平滑、仿真就绪的心脏表面网格，消除了传统网格生成的后处理瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 构建患者特定心脏模型是精准心脏病学的核心，但传统网格生成流程（图像分割、Marching Cubes、手动清理）耗时、不一致且需要专业知识，阻碍了临床应用。现有方法将分割和网格生成分离，后处理瓶颈大。本文旨在通过单一端到端网络直接生成高质量网格，提高临床可及性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是一个3D Swin Transformer编码器-解码器，从CT/MRI体积中提取特征，结合图注意力网络（GAT）头迭代变形模板网格以匹配患者心脏边界。网络在MM-WHS 2017基准上训练（CT和MRI），一次前向传播即可生成网格，无需Marching Cubes、平滑滤波或手动清理。
light_analysis.result: 在MM-WHS 2017基准上，分割Dice得分为CT 0.84、MRI 0.83。主要关注网格质量：平均Chamfer距离1.8mm，95%表面距离低于5mm。所有网格一次前向传播生成，无后处理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过去除后处理瓶颈，使患者特定心脏仿真更易于临床使用。强调几何保真度和拓扑正确性比像素级Dice更重要。该方法有助于心脏数字孪生管道的临床转化，可能为未来仿真提供基础。

title: A Context-Aware Dataset for Stance Detection in Bioethical Controversies on Reddit
abstract: Bioethical debates increasingly unfold on social media, yet stance detection research lacks large-scale, domain-specific resources for modeling such context-dependent discourse. We present BioStance, a context-aware dataset of 39,600 annotated Post-Comment pairs from Reddit bioethical discussions. BioStance covers six controversial targets across three dimensions of bioethical controversy: fundamental value conflicts, individual liberty versus collective responsibility, and technological uncertainty. Each instance preserves hierarchical conversational context and is labeled by three independent annotators using a three-class stance scheme: Favor, Against, and None. The annotations achieve a mean Krippendorff's $α$ of 0.82, indicating substantial reliability. By combining thematic diversity, conversational structure, and high-quality human annotation, BioStance supports research on context-aware stance detection, argument mining, and computational analysis of bioethical discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BioStance数据集，用于Reddit生物伦理争议中的上下文感知立场检测，包含39600个高质量注释的帖子-评论对。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物伦理辩论在社交媒体上日益增多，但现有立场检测研究缺乏大规模、领域特定的资源来建模上下文依赖的论述。现有数据集往往忽略对话的层次结构和生物伦理争议的多维度特性，限制了模型在复杂社会话题上的应用。因此，构建一个覆盖多种争议类型、保留对话上下文且注释可靠的数据集至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 从Reddit生物伦理讨论中收集帖子-评论对，选取六个争议性目标，覆盖根本价值冲突、个人自由与集体责任、技术不确定性三个维度。每个实例保留层级对话上下文，由三位独立标注者使用三类别立场方案（赞成、反对、无）进行标注。最终得到39,600个注释对，使用Krippendorff's α衡量一致性，达到0.82。
light_analysis.result: 数据集包含39,600个带注释的帖子-评论对，覆盖六个生物伦理争议目标。注释一致性高，平均Krippendorff's α为0.82，表明标注可靠性强。实验未提及具体模型性能，但数据集本身为上下文感知立场检测、论证挖掘等任务提供了高质量资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: BioStance通过主题多样性、对话结构和高质量人工注释，为生物伦理话语的上下文感知立场检测、论证挖掘和计算分析提供了重要资源。其多维度划分有助于深入理解不同争议类型中立场表达的差异。未来可用于训练和评估模型，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: LAUKIN: A Multi-jurisdictional Common Law Contract Dataset
abstract: Multinational companies increasingly require cross-jurisdictional contract review, yet existing legal NLP datasets are largely restricted to a single jurisdiction. We introduce LAUKIN (Legal equivalence dataset of Australia, UK, and INdia), a dataset of clause pairs (AU-UK, UK-IN, IN-AU) labelled for boolean legal equivalence. We develop a novel multi-stage retrieval and reranking pipeline to construct the initial clause pair mapping, with a subset of clause pairs subsequently annotated by legal experts as Equivalent or Not Equivalent. The dataset comprises 14,727 clause pairs from 204 contracts across 8 agreement types, of which 3,000 are manually labelled: 900 train, 600 dev, and 1,500 test. We evaluate 12 models across 4 techniques, achieving a best macro-F1 of 65.11%, establishing LAUKIN as a challenging benchmark. Results reveal that, despite shared legal heritage, drafting conventions diverge significantly across jurisdictions, making cross-jurisdictional equivalence classification non-trivial. LAUKIN also includes 11,727 unlabelled training pairs to support future semi-supervised learning research in legal NLP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多司法管辖区普通法合同数据集LAUKIN，用于跨司法管辖区合同条款等价性分类任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨国公司需要跨司法管辖区的合同审查，但现有法律NLP数据集多局限于单一管辖区。为解决这一实际问题，需要构建涵盖多个普通法管辖区（澳大利亚、英国、印度）的合同条款等价性标注数据集，以评估模型在跨管辖区法律文本理解上的能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用多阶段检索和重排序流水线构建初始条款对映射，由法律专家标注子集为等价或不等价。数据集包含来自8种协议类型204份合同的14,727个条款对，其中3,000个手动标注（900训练、600开发、1,500测试），另含11,727个未标注对支持半监督学习。
light_analysis.result: 在12个模型（4种技术）上评估，最佳宏F1为65.11%，表明该数据集具有挑战性。结果表明，尽管共享普通法传统，不同司法管辖区的起草惯例差异显著，使跨管辖区等价性分类并非易事。
light_analysis.conclusion: LAUKIN数据集填补了多司法管辖区法律NLP基准的空白，揭示了跨管辖区合同审查的复杂性，为未来半监督学习和法律文本等价性研究提供了资源与挑战。

title: Loss-Shift Transfer via Bayes Quotients
abstract: Transfer learning is usually studied as a consequence of distribution shift. This paper identifies an orthogonal failure mode in which the data distribution is fixed and the loss changes. This setting is called \emph{loss shift}. A loss determines which information in \(X\) is Bayes-relevant, and two losses may therefore require different representations even under the same joint law \(P(X,Y)\). The idea is formalized using Bayes quotients, which allow losses to be ordered by refinement. In the Bayes-quotient formulation, strict refinement gives an immediate qualitative obstruction. A source-minimal representation for a coarser loss is insufficient for a strictly finer target loss. For finite-output log loss, this obstruction becomes an exact quantitative identity. The excess risk is the conditional information about \(Y\) discarded by the representation. Experiments in controlled, learned, synthetic-image, and real-image settings show the predicted effect, i.e., classification-equivalent representations can have different optimal log-loss performance under a fixed data distribution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出损失转移（Loss Shift）问题，利用贝叶斯商（Bayes quotients）形式化损失变化导致的表示学习失效。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统迁移学习主要关注分布偏移，但忽略了损失函数变化的影响。损失决定了输入X中哪些信息是贝叶斯相关的，不同损失可能要求不同的表示，即使数据分布P(X,Y)固定。现有方法未解决这种正交的失败模式，导致源任务学习到的表示不足以用于目标任务。
light_analysis.method: 该论文使用贝叶斯商（Bayes quotients）对损失进行排序，严格细化导致定性障碍：源损失的最小表示不足以用于更细的目标损失。对于有限输出的对数损失，这一障碍转化为精确的定量恒等式，即过剩风险等于表示丢弃的关于Y的条件信息。
light_analysis.result: 在受控、学习、合成图像和真实图像环境下进行实验，验证了预测效应：分类等价的表示在固定数据分布下具有不同的最优对数损失性能，证实了损失转移现象的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了损失转移是与分布偏移正交的迁移学习失败模式，为理解任务特定表示提供了新视角。未来可探索其他损失函数的细化关系或设计缓解损失转移的方法。

title: MemRefine: LLM-Guided Compression for Long-Term Agent Memory
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly expected to operate over long-term interactions, where information from past dialogues must be preserved and recalled to support future tasks. However, as interactions accumulate, the memory store grows without bound and fills with redundant entries that inflate storage cost and degrade retrieval by crowding out the most useful evidence. Furthermore, this is especially limiting on resource-constrained platforms with hard memory budgets, motivating us to formulate storage-budgeted memory management, the task of keeping an already constructed memory store within a fixed budget while preserving information useful for future interactions. To this end, we then propose MemRefine, an LLM-guided framework that, since surface similarity poorly reflects factual value, uses similarity only to propose candidate pairs and defers delete, merge, and preserve decisions to an LLM judge based on factual content, iterating until the budget is met. Across multiple memory frameworks and long-term conversation benchmarks, MemRefine consistently meets target budgets while preserving downstream performance and outperforming rule-based baselines under tight budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemRefine，一种基于LLM指导的记忆压缩框架，在固定存储预算下管理长期代理记忆，保留有用信息。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理需在长期交互中保存和回忆历史信息，但记忆存储无限制增长，冗余条目增加存储成本并降低检索效率。尤其在资源受限平台上，内存预算有限。现有基于表面相似性的方法无法有效反映事实价值，需要一种更智能的存储预算记忆管理方法。该研究旨在在固定预算内保持记忆的有用性。
light_analysis.method: MemRefine框架利用LLM作为判断器，先通过表面相似性筛选候选对，然后由LLM根据事实内容决定删除、合并或保留，迭代直至满足存储预算。该方法不单纯依赖相似性，而是基于事实价值进行决策，避免冗余条目占据存储空间，同时保留关键信息。
light_analysis.result: 在多个记忆框架和长期对话基准上，MemRefine一致地达到目标存储预算，同时保持下游任务性能。在严格预算下，该方法显著优于基于规则的基线（如随机删除、FIFO等），验证了基于LLM评估的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了存储预算记忆管理任务与MemRefine框架，实现了高效的记忆压缩，使LLM代理能在资源受限环境中长期运行。学术价值在于提出基于事实内容的记忆压缩范式，实际应用价值显著。未来可探索降低LLM调用成本或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: Mental-R1: Aligning LLM Reasoning for Mental Health Assessment
abstract: Mental health problems such as anxiety, depression, and suicide remain urgent global challenges, where timely and accurate assessment is critical for effective intervention. Recently, large language models have been explored for mental health assessment. However, existing general-purpose post-training methods do not align with the cognitive processes of human assessment, which may lead to unreliable reasoning outcomes. To bridge this gap, we propose Cognitive Relative Policy Optimization (CRPO), a reinforcement learning framework tailored for the mental health domain. CRPO extends group relative policy optimization by integrating stage-dependent uncertainty modeling into the policy optimization process. Specifically, we introduce a stage-wise entropy regularization mechanism that encourages broad exploration in early reasoning phases and progressively enforces confident decision-making in later stages, mimicking the human cognitive shift from uncertainty to certainty. In addition, inspired by cognitive appraisal theory, we formalize cognitive reasoning stages, thereby guiding theory-grounded interpretable inference. Experiments on 8 mental health datasets show that CRPO achieves an average improvement of 10.4 percentage points in weighted F1-score over the best reinforcement learning baseline. Furthermore, the CRPO-trained model Mental-R1 demonstrates clear advantages compared with existing large language models on reasoning-intensive cases, suggesting that CRPO enhances reasoning capabilities for mental health assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRPO强化学习框架，对齐LLM推理与人类认知，提升心理健康评估的准确性和推理可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理健康问题如焦虑、抑郁和自杀是全球性挑战，及时准确的评估至关重要。现有通用后训练方法无法对齐人类评估的认知过程，导致LLM推理结果不可靠。因此，需要一种专门针对心理健康领域的强化学习框架，使模型模仿人类从不确定到确定的认知转变，从而提升评估的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Cognitive Relative Policy Optimization (CRPO)，一种扩展自Group Relative Policy Optimization的强化学习框架。核心创新包括：阶段依赖的不确定性建模，通过阶段熵正则化机制鼓励早期探索后期决策；基于认知评价理论形式化推理阶段，引导理论支撑的可解释推理。
light_analysis.result: 在8个心理健康数据集上，CRPO在加权F1-score上平均提升10.4个百分点，优于最佳强化学习基线。训练得到的Mental-R1模型在推理密集型案例上显著优于现有LLM，验证了CRPO增强推理能力的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRPO通过模仿人类认知过程，显著提升了LLM在心理健康评估中的推理性能，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来工作可验证其在临床环境中的有效性，并探索更广泛的心理健康任务。

title: Getting Better at Working With You: Compiling User Corrections into Runtime Enforcement for Coding Agents
abstract: Interactive LLM agents are becoming part of daily work, but they do not reliably become easier to work with over time: a correction remembered in one session may still be violated in the next. We study this gap between preference access and preference compliance. In tasks derived from anonymized real-user friction cases, Mem0 memory still leaves 57.5% of applicable preference checks violated. We introduce Test-time Rule Acquisition and Compiled Enforcement (TRACE), a drop-in skill-layer pipeline for coding-agent runtimes that mines user corrections, rewrites them as atomic rules, and compiles them into runtime checks that must pass before an agent completes future tasks. Unlike runtime checks written ahead of time by developers, TRACE skills come from the user's own chat corrections. We evaluate TRACE with simulated user-in-the-loop experiments on ClawArena coding-agent tasks and MemoryArena-derived memory-intensive tasks. On ClawArena, TRACE reduces held-out preference violation from 100.0% to 37.6% on in-distribution tasks and from 100.0% to 2.0% on out-of-distribution tasks. On MemoryArena-derived tasks, TRACE reduces in-distribution violation from 100.0% to 60.5% while matching or exceeding the strongest memory baseline on task pass. These results suggest that compiling corrections into runtime enforcement can address a repeated-friction failure mode that memory alone does not reliably solve, reducing the need for users to restate the same correction across future sessions. Experiment code is available at https://github.com/YujunZhou/TRACE_exp, and the deployable skill is available at https://github.com/YujunZhou/tellonce.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE方法，将用户修正编译为运行时强制规则，显著减少编码代理的偏好违规。
light_analysis.motivation: 交互式LLM代理在长期使用中未能可靠地记住用户偏好，导致同一修正需重复陈述。现有记忆系统（如Mem0）仍有57.5%的偏好检查违规。需要一种方法将用户修正转化为持久有效的约束。
light_analysis.method: TRACE是一个即插即用的技能层管道，通过挖掘用户修正、重写为原子规则并编译为运行时检查，在代理完成任务前强制执行。基于真实用户摩擦案例的任务和模拟用户实验进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ClawArena任务上，分布内违规从100.0%降至37.6%，分布外从100.0%降至2.0%。在MemoryArena任务上，分布内违规从100.0%降至60.5%，同时任务通过率匹配或超过最强记忆基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE证明了将修正编译为运行时强制可有效解决记忆无法可靠处理的重复摩擦问题，减少用户重复陈述修正的需求。代码已开源，便于实际部署。

title: Detecting Explanatory Insufficiency in Learned Representations: A Framework for Representational Vigilance
abstract: Learned representations are central to modern machine learning and are commonly evaluated through predictive performance, robustness, uncertainty estimation, or generalization. However, a learned representation may remain operationally successful while progressively failing to organize persistent residual structures that are not fully captured by conventional evaluation metrics. This article introduces VER, the Vigilant Evaluator of Representations, a conceptual framework for monitoring representational adequacy in learned representations. VER does not propose a new learning algorithm, loss function, or model architecture. Instead, it formalizes a diagnostic process through which persistent residual structures may be identified, analyzed, and interpreted as potential indicators of explanatory insufficiency. The framework distinguishes representational inadequacy from ordinary prediction error, uncertainty, noise, and distribution shift. It introduces a monitoring sequence based on representation identification, explanatory-domain delimitation, residual-structure detection, explanatory-resistance evaluation, and vigilance signaling. VER is intended as a contribution to representation diagnostics in machine learning. Its objective is not to replace existing evaluation methods but to complement them by treating representational adequacy as an explicit object of inquiry. A path toward empirical evaluation through representational-vigilance benchmarks is also outlined.
comment: 22 pages, 1 figure. Conceptual framework for representation diagnostics in machine learning

light_analysis.overview: 提出VER框架，用于监控学习表征的解释充分性，通过检测持久残差结构来识别解释不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 学习表征常通过预测性能、鲁棒性等指标评估，但可能掩盖未解释的残差结构。现有方法忽视表征充分性的系统性诊断，VER旨在填补这一空白，识别潜在的解释不足。
light_analysis.method: VER是一个概念框架，不引入新算法，而是形式化诊断流程：包括表征识别、解释域界定、残差结构检测、解释阻力评估和警惕信号生成。它区分解释不足与常规误差、不确定性等。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，仅概述了走向实证评估的路径，提及通过表征警惕基准测试进行评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: VER旨在补充现有评估方法，将表征充分性作为明确研究对象。其价值在于揭示表征的盲点，未来方向包括通过基准测试进行实证验证。

title: NTS-CoT: Mitigating Hallucinations in LLM-based News Timeline Summarization with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: The rapid updates of online news make tracking event developments challenging, highlighting the need for timeline summarization (TLS). Hallucinations, where LLM-generated content deviates from source news, still remain a critical issue in LLM-based TLS and are not well studied in existing works. To bridge this gap, we identify two primary types of hallucinations: unfaithful content during news summarization and information omission in date-event summarization. Then, we propose NTS-CoT, a novel framework that leverages Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to mitigate hallucinations in TLS. The framework consists of three key modules: i) Element-CoT to capture essential news elements for faithful summarization, ii) Date Selection to combine temporal saliency and event prominence for timestamp selection, and iii) Causal-CoT to infer causal relationships and reduce omissions in date-event summarization. Extensive experiments, including quantitative analysis on three TLS benchmarks and human evaluation, demonstrate that NTS-CoT outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, effectively mitigating hallucinations and improving LLM-based TLS performance. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NTS-CoT .

light_analysis.overview: 提出NTS-CoT框架，利用Chain-of-Thought推理有效缓解LLM在新闻时间线摘要中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线新闻快速更新，时间线摘要（TLS）对追踪事件发展至关重要。然而，基于LLM的TLS中，生成内容偏离源新闻的幻觉问题仍是关键挑战，现有研究对此关注不足。摘要识别出两种主要幻觉类型：新闻摘要中的不忠实内容和时间-事件摘要中的信息遗漏，亟需解决。
light_analysis.method: NTS-CoT框架包含三个模块：Element-CoT捕捉新闻要素确保忠实摘要，Date Selection结合时间显著性和事件显著性选择时间戳，Causal-CoT推断因果关系减少时间-事件摘要中的遗漏。通过Chain-of-Thought推理引导LLM逐步思考，在三个TLS基准上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个TLS基准上的定量分析和人工评估表明，NTS-CoT优于所有最先进的基线方法，有效减少了摘要中的不忠实内容和信息遗漏，显著提升了基于LLM的时间线摘要性能。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但整体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: NTS-CoT通过Chain-of-Thought推理成功缓解了LLM在时间线摘要中的幻觉问题，为新闻摘要领域提供了实用框架。源代码已公开，便于复现。未来可探索更复杂的因果推理或扩展到其他摘要任务。

title: When Does Routing Become Interpretable? Causal Probes on Block Attention Residuals
abstract: Block Attention Residuals (Block AttnRes) by replace fixed additive residuals with a learned softmax over earlier depth-source representations, surfacing cross-layer routing as an inspectable tensor in the forward pass. This is a tempting interpretability target: information flow normally inferred indirectly is now directly observable. We ask whether such exposure suffices for mechanistic interpretation. We probe two same-scale ($0.6$B) Block AttnRes checkpoints under identical routing-ablation interventions: a vanilla Qwen3 inference-wrapped through a deterministic recency-bias schedule that the codebase admits as a routing-equivalent loading path, and a Block AttnRes Qwen3 trained from scratch with routing as part of optimisation. The wrapped baseline's routing weights are content-independent and reproduce the schedule's analytic prediction. The trained AttnRes checkpoint instead exhibits three localised routing motifs: an embedding-source pathway through early-layer MLP, a current-state pathway through early-layer attention and MLP, and an older-history pathway through late-layer attention. Beyond this stratification, we find a sharp dissociation between average routing mass and causal importance: in both sublayers, the largest mass slice is not the largest causal contribution, and one source family carries appreciable mass with no detectable causal role under intervention. Architectural exposure of routing is therefore necessary but not sufficient for mechanistic interpretation: structured depth routing emerges only when routing has been part of training, and even then, descriptive routing summaries should be treated as candidate hypotheses to be tested by causal interventions, not as evidence of mechanism in their own right.

light_analysis.overview: 探究Block Attention Residuals中路由的可解释性，发现结构化解码仅当路由参与训练时出现，且平均路由质量与因果重要性脱节。
light_analysis.motivation: Block Attention Residuals通过可学习softmax替代固定残差，使跨层路由信息在前向传播中直接可见，成为机械可解释性的潜在目标。但信息流的直接暴露是否足以实现可解释性尚未明确。现有方法通常间接推断信息流，而路由的直接观测可能产生误导性结论。因此，本文通过因果干预实验，检验路由暴露是否真的能揭示机制。
light_analysis.method: 对两个同等规模（0.6B）的Block AttnRes检查点进行相同的路由消融干预：一个是通过确定性近期偏差调度包装的Qwen3基线（路由权重内容无关，复制调度预测），另一个是从头训练的Block AttnRes Qwen3（路由作为优化的一部分）。通过因果探针分析路由权重的结构模式及其与因果重要性的关系。
light_analysis.result: 训练的AttnRes检查点表现出三种局部化路由模式：嵌入源路径（早期层MLP）、当前状态路径（早期层注意力和MLP）、旧历史路径（后期层注意力）。但平均路由质量与因果重要性存在显著分离：最大质量切片并非最大因果贡献，且一个源家族携带可观质量但在干预下无因果作用。表明路由暴露机械可解释性不充分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构化深度路由仅在路由参与训练时出现，且描述性路由摘要应视为待由因果干预检验的候选假设，而非机制证据。该工作强调了架构暴露对于可解释性的必要性但不充分性，为机械可解释性研究提供了方法论指导，并建议未来工作应结合因果干预验证路由的因果作用。

title: Iterative Visual Thinking: Teaching Vision-Language Models Spatial Self-Correction through Visual Feedback
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong singleshot spatial grounding, yet lack any mechanism to observe and correct their own predictions. We find that naively prompting a VLM to iterate over rendered visualizations of its predictions causes catastrophic failure: Acc@0.5 on referring expression comprehension collapses from 79.6% to 48.7% (a 31 percentage point drop), revealing a fundamental gap between grounding capability and self-correction ability. We propose Iterative Visual Thinking (IVT), a closed-loop framework in which the model predicts a bounding box, observes the prediction rendered on the image, and iteratively refines through visual feedback. A two-phase training recipe closes the self-correction gap: first, we exploit the base model's own predictions as realistic errors and prompt a teacher VLM to generate corrective reasoning traces, yielding supervised data without human annotation; second, we apply Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a simple IoU reward to stabilize multi-step refinement. On a mixed benchmark spanning RefCOCOg, Ref-Adv, and Ref-L4 (505 test samples), SFT warm-up with IVT surpasses the single-shot base model on every metric: Acc@0.5 rises to 82.0% (+2.4pp), Acc@0.7 to 74.1% (+3.2pp), and Acc@0.9 to 48.3% (+2.8pp). GRPO further reduces per-step IoU degradation by 5x, stabilizing the refinement trajectory. All training uses only 2,400 samples on a single GPU, demonstrating that spatial self-correction is a learnable capability that can be instilled at modest scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出迭代视觉思维框架，通过视觉反馈闭环实现视觉语言模型的空间自校正，仅用2400样本单GPU训练即显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在单次空间定位上表现强劲，但缺乏自我观察和纠正预测的机制。直接循环提示模型会导致性能崩溃（Acc@0.5下降31%），揭示基础定位与自校正能力之间的根本差距，亟需建立闭环框架来弥补这一缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 提出IVT闭环框架：模型预测边界框，观察在图像上的渲染结果，通过视觉反馈迭代优化。两阶段训练：第一阶段利用基础模型自身的预测作为真实错误，用教师VLM生成校正推理轨迹，无需人工标注；第二阶段应用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 和IoU奖励来稳定多步细化。训练仅需2400样本和单GPU，数据来自RefCOCOg、Ref-Adv和Ref-L4混合基准。
light_analysis.result: 在505个测试样本上，IVT（SFT预热）全面超越单次基础模型：Acc@0.5达82.0%（+2.4pp），Acc@0.7达74.1%（+3.2pp），Acc@0.9达48.3%（+2.8pp）。GRPO进一步将每步IoU退化减少5倍，稳定细化轨迹。所有训练仅用2400样本和单GPU。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明空间自校正是一种可学习能力，可通过适度规模的数据和计算资源灌输给模型。该方法无需人工标注，通过视觉反馈实现闭环修正，显著提升视觉语言模型在参考表达理解等任务上的性能。未来工作可扩展至更细粒度的空间推理或复杂视觉任务。

title: TerraBench: Can Agents Reason Over Heterogeneous Earth-System Data?
abstract: Climate and environmental decision-making increasingly requires reasoning across heterogeneous inputs, including gridded physical data, satellite imagery, geospatial context, and simulator outputs. Weather and climate foundation models can forecast well, but do not reason interactively in language, while large language models (LLMs) reason in language but cannot operate directly on high-dimensional Earth-system data. As a result, real scientific workflows in Earth-science remain underserved. We introduce TerraBench, a benchmark for grounded Earth-science reasoning, built on TerraAgent, a ReAct-style executable framework that interleaves reasoning, tool calls, and observations to couple LLM planning with scientific tools for environmental retrieval, geospatial processing, simulation, and artifact-backed computation. TerraBench unifies analysis of Earth observation imagery, gridded data, GIS reasoning and simulation in a single executable interface, whereas prior benchmarks isolate these capabilities into narrow individual tasks. It is also the first in this space to pair process-level tool-use metrics with tolerance-aware numeric scoring. The benchmark comprises 403 extensive agentic tasks across three tracks (Fundamentals, Simulator-Grounded, and Document-Grounded Verification) and eight application domains with 24,500 verified execution steps. These results indicate that reliable Earth-science agents must go beyond tool access to coordinate heterogeneous workflows, parameterize tools precisely, and preserve artifact provenance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TerraBench基准和TerraAgent框架，将LLM与科学工具结合，实现异构地球系统数据的交互推理，首次引入过程级工具使用度量和容忍感知评分。
light_analysis.motivation: 气候环境决策需要推理异构数据（如网格数据、卫星图像等），但现有天气/气候基础模型缺乏语言交互能力，LLM无法直接处理高维地球数据，导致真实科学工作流未被充分支持。为解决这一空白，需要统一基准评估和促进异构数据协同推理的智能代理。
light_analysis.method: 提出TerraAgent框架，基于ReAct风格，将LLM规划与科学工具（环境检索、地理空间处理、模拟等）交织，实现推理与工具调用。构建TerraBench基准，包含403个任务（三个轨道、八领域）和24,500个执行步骤，首次引入过程级工具使用度量和容忍度感知数值评分，统一评估图像、网格、GIS和模拟数据推理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体性能指标，但强调TerraBench基准包含403个代理任务和24,500个执行步骤，覆盖三个轨道和八个领域。结果揭示可靠地球科学代理需超越工具访问，协调异构工作流、精确参数化工具并保留物证来源。该基准为评估提供了过程级度量，对比之前孤立任务更具综合性和挑战性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TerraBench和TerraAgent统一了异构地球数据推理的评估与实现，填补了科学工作流服务空白。结论指出可靠代理需协调工具、精确参数化和来源保留，为未来地球科学AI代理研究提供了基准和方向。潜在局限包括基准规模及对特定领域覆盖的深度，未来可扩展更多任务和工具。

title: HyPE: Category-Aware Hypergraph Encoding with Persistent Edge Embeddings for Persona-Grounded Dialogue
abstract: Persona-grounded dialogue systems aim to produce responses consistent with a speaker's persona, yet existing methods treat personas as a flat set of sentences and fail to model the high-order relations among persona attributes-e.g., that several persona sentences share a topical category. We propose HyPE (Hypergraph Persona Encoder), a framework that (i) analyzes each persona-bearing text as a (Core, Expression, Sentiment, Category) quadruple, and (ii) organizes persona elements into a hypergraph whose hyperedges are induced by shared category labels. An HyperGCN hypergraph neural network propagates this structure into a persona summary vector and a soft-memory bank that condition the response generator.
