We further propose Persistent Edge Embeddings (PEE), lightweight per-category learnable priors fused into the HyperGCN message-passing step. On PersonaChat under greedy decoding, HyPE consistently outperforms sentence-level pooling baselines across GPT-2, LLaMA-3.2-3B, and Qwen2.5-3B backbones by demonstrating that structured hyperedge-level persona encoding provides a transferable advantage across model scales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyPE框架，利用类别感知的超图编码和持久边嵌入，建模人物属性间的高阶关系，提升人物对话一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的人物对话系统将人物属性视为平铺的句子集合，忽略了属性间的高阶关系（如多个句子共享同一主题类别），导致生成回复与人物特征不一致。因此，需要一种能捕获人物属性结构信息的编码方法，以提升对话质量。
light_analysis.method: HyPE框架首先将人物文本解析为（核心、表达、情感、类别）四元组，并基于共享类别标签构建超图，超边由类别诱导。采用HyperGCN超图神经网络传播结构信息，生成人物摘要向量和软记忆库，用于条件生成。同时提出持久边嵌入（PEE），作为每类可学习先验，融入HyperGCN消息传递步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在PersonaChat数据集上，使用贪婪解码，HyPE在GPT-2、LLaMA-3.2-3B和Qwen2.5-3B骨干网络上一致优于句子级池化基线，证明结构化超边级人物编码在不同模型规模下均具有可迁移优势。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyPE通过超图结构和类别级边嵌入有效建模人物属性间高阶关系，提升了人物对话系统的一致性。该方法具有跨模型规模的迁移能力，为基于结构化人物编码的对话生成提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的超图学习策略。

title: Rethinking RAG in Long Videos: What to Retrieve and How to Use It?
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation is moving beyond text into long, egocentric video, where systems must select query-relevant chunks across multiple modalities and temporal granularities. Yet progress in VideoRAG is limited by two gaps: existing benchmarks allow queries to be answered without the video, obscuring retrieval errors, and prior methods apply a single modality-granularity configuration per query, ignoring chunk-level variability. We address both by introducing V-RAGBench, a benchmark of $\langle$query, evidence chunk, answer$\rangle$ triplets that enables faithful, decoupled evaluation of retrieval and generation, and CARVE, a simple method that runs parallel retrievers across configurations and employs chunk-adaptive reranking to identify the winning configuration for each chunk. Each chunk then enters the generator under its winning configuration selected during retrieval, yielding an interleaved evidence form where the chunk-level decision propagates across both stages. CARVE outperforms eight recent VideoRAG baselines, with the chunks supplied to the generator interleaving multiple configurations rather than sharing a single one, a behavior unattainable by query-level methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本工作引入V-RAGBench基准和CARVE方法，解决长视频检索增强生成中的检索评估与多模态/时间粒度适配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成已从文本扩展到长视频，但现有基准允许查询无需视频即可回答，掩盖检索错误；同时现有方法对每个查询仅使用单一模态-粒度配置，忽略块级差异。这限制了VideoRAG的进展，需要更准确的评估方法和自适应配置选择，以提升实际应用中的检索和生成效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出V-RAGBench，包含<查询，证据块，答案>三元组，实现检索和生成的解耦评估。提出CARVE方法，并行运行不同配置的检索器，采用块自适应重排序为每个块选择最优配置；每个块以其最优配置进入生成器，形成交错证据形式，取代传统的查询级统一配置。
light_analysis.result: CARVE在八个最近VideoRAG基线上表现更优，生成的块来自多种配置交错而非单一配置，这是查询级方法无法实现的行为。摘要未报告具体数值，但表明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过V-RAGBench实现了忠实解耦评估，CARVE通过块级自适应配置选择提升了性能。该工作为长视频RAG提供了更可靠的评估基准和更灵活的检索生成策略，未来可探索更复杂配置或扩展更多模态。

title: An Extensible and Lightweight Unified Architecture for Demosaicing Pixel-bin Image Sensors
abstract: Pixel-bin image sensors are becoming the default choice for smartphone cameras due to their resolution vs light-gathering trade-off. However, their larger inter-color separation compared to the Bayer color filter array (CFA) makes them challenging to demosaic. Furthermore, existing deep learning-based demosaicing methods are CFA-specific, requiring multiple individual models that take up precious onboard resources and demand larger development and maintenance efforts. In this work, we propose a modular unified architecture for demosaicing various pixel-bin sensors that provides higher image quality while being extensible and lightweight. Additionally, to enable plug-and-play operation, we introduce a learning-free CFA-identification module to detect the CFA type of raw data accurately.

light_analysis.overview: 针对像素合并传感器，提出可扩展轻量级统一去马赛克架构，并引入无学习CFA识别模块实现即插即用。
light_analysis.motivation: 像素合并传感器因分辨率与感光量的平衡成为智能手机相机首选，但其较大的颜色间距使得去马赛克更具挑战。现有深度学习去马赛克方法针对特定CFA设计，需要多个独立模型，占用宝贵片上资源并增加开发维护成本。因此，亟需一种统一、可扩展且轻量的解决方案来处理多种像素合并传感器。
light_analysis.method: 提出模块化统一架构，可处理多种像素合并传感器的去马赛克任务，该架构具有轻量和可扩展特性。同时，引入无需学习的CFA识别模块，通过检测原始数据的CFA类型，实现即插即用操作，避免了针对不同CFA训练多个模型的需求。
light_analysis.result: 该架构在提供更高质量图像的同时，保持了轻量化和可扩展性。CFA识别模块能够准确识别原始数据的CFA类型，实现无缝切换。摘要未明确说明具体量化指标，但强调了相对于多模型方案在资源占用和维护方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的统一去马赛克架构有效解决了像素合并传感器多种CFA类型带来的挑战，通过模块化设计和无学习CFA识别，降低了模型数量和资源需求，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步扩展以支持更多传感器类型，并优化计算效率。

title: Cascade Classification of Dermoscopic Images of Skin Neoplasms with Controllable Sensitivity and External Clinical Validation
abstract: Purpose. To compare deep learning architectures and classification schemes for dermoscopic images of skin neoplasms and assess their generalization on transfer from open international datasets to independent clinical datasets of Russian practice.   Methods. Four architectures (ViT-B/16, Swin-S, ConvNeXt-S, EfficientNetV2-S) were compared in three schemes: binary (malignant/benign), single-stage four-class (benign, MEL, SCC, BCC), and a two-stage cascade (binary triage, then three-class differentiation MEL/SCC/BCC). All models used ImageNet-pretrained weights and a single augmentation protocol on aggregated open ISIC Archive data, and were evaluated on an internal held-out sample and two clinical datasets (Melanoscope AI mobile system; Sechenov University).   Results. Internally the binary stage attains ROC-AUC 0.952-0.966; on Sechenov University it drops to 0.797-0.893, sensitivity to 0.53-0.67, and ECE rises from 0.02 to 0.27-0.39 with underestimation of malignancy, quantifying a generalization gap in ranking and calibration. Paired tests confirm one inter-architecture result on clinical data: the deficit of ViT-B/16 at the binary stage (p<0.05); at the differentiation stage no architecture has a proven advantage. The cascade raises macro F1 over single-stage four-class classification for most architectures, but significantly only for ViT-B/16, by recovering malignant lesions assigned to the dominant benign class. On ISIC MILK10k, direct 11-class classification yields mean-class sensitivity 0.525.   Conclusion. A tunable triage threshold gives sensitivity control not attainable in standard single-stage (argmax) classification and better reproduces clinical differential-diagnosis logic. The persistent generalization gap mandates external clinical validation and recalibration before deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出级联分类方案，通过可控灵敏度和外部临床验证提升皮肤镜图像分类的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 皮肤肿瘤自动诊断需从开放数据集迁移至实际临床，但现有模型存在泛化差距且标准单阶段分类无法灵活控制灵敏度。级联分类可模拟临床鉴别诊断逻辑，适应不同临床需求。
light_analysis.method: 比较四种架构（ViT-B/16、Swin-S、ConvNeXt-S、EfficientNetV2-S）在二分类、单阶段四分类及两阶段级联（二分类分诊+三分类）三种方案中的表现。模型基于ImageNet预训练，在ISIC Archive数据上训练，并在内部留出样本和两个临床数据集（Melanoscope AI及Sechenov大学）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 内部二分类ROC-AUC达0.952-0.966，但在临床数据集上降至0.797-0.893，灵敏度0.53-0.67，ECE升至0.27-0.39。级联分类提升大多数架构的宏F1，仅ViT-B/16显著改善（p<0.05）。直接11分类平均类别灵敏度0.525。
light_analysis.conclusion: 级联分类通过可调阈值实现灵敏度控制，优于标准单阶段方法并更好地模拟临床逻辑。泛化差距要求部署前进行外部验证和重新校准。

title: Fully Distributed Multi-View 3D Tracking in Real-Time
abstract: Multi-camera tracking with overlapping fields of view typically relies on centralized fusion, which creates computational bottlenecks that prevent deployment at scale. We present MV3DT, a fully distributed framework for real-time multi-view 3D tracking that achieves accurate identity propagation and occlusion recovery through peer-to-peer coordination, eliminating the need for central aggregation. Each camera node executes a lightweight modular pipeline comprising monocular 3D perception, distributed multi-view association, and collaborative fusion via lightweight messaging. MV3DT achieves 94.3% IDF1 and 93.3% MOTA on WILDTRACK, competitive with state-of-the-art centralized methods, while demonstrating superior scalability by sustaining 30 FPS on 100 cameras with less than 10 ms inter-camera latency and only 2.2% communication overhead. MV3DT operates in a zero-shot regime given camera calibrations, requiring no scene-specific learning and making it directly deployable in new environments. These results establish MV3DT as a practical solution for real-time multi-view tracking in large-scale overlapping camera networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MV3DT，一种全分布式多视角3D跟踪框架，通过点对点协调实现实时跟踪，无需中心聚合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多相机跟踪方法依赖集中式融合，造成计算瓶颈，难以大规模部署。本文旨在解决大规模重叠相机网络中的实时3D跟踪问题，通过分布式框架消除中心节点，提升可扩展性和部署灵活性。
light_analysis.method: MV3DT框架中每个相机节点执行轻量级模块化流水线，包含单目3D感知、分布式多视角关联和基于轻量消息的协同融合。利用相机标定进行零样本推理，无需场景特定训练，可直接部署在新环境。
light_analysis.result: 在WILDTRACK数据集上达到94.3% IDF1和93.3% MOTA，与最先进集中式方法相当。在100个相机上保持30 FPS，相机间延迟小于10 ms，通信开销仅2.2%，展现优越可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MV3DT为大规模重叠相机网络提供了实用的实时多视角跟踪方案，兼具高精度和低延迟，可直接部署于新环境。未来工作可扩展到更多相机和复杂场景，进一步优化通信效率。

title: MiniPIC: Flexible Position-Independent Caching in <100LOC
abstract: Retrieval-augmented and agentic workloads repeatedly prefill recurring predictable structured inputs (which we call "spans") such as documents and code files. Yet, prefix caching in engines such as vLLM cannot reuse their KV entries unless they share identical prefixes with another request, while Position-Independent Caching (PIC) implementations within production-grade inference servers typically either require substantial server code changes or keep KV state outside the server, incurring host-to-device transfer overhead. We present Minimalistic PIC (MiniPIC): a minimal, flexible and fast vLLM design built from two ingredients: positional-encoding-free KV cache and user-controlled cache-reuse primitives. MiniPIC stores unrotated K vectors in the KV cache, applies RoPE to K tiles inside attention using per-request logical positions, and exposes three user-facing and token-level primitives: block-aligned padding, span separator (SSep), and prompt depend (PDep), that modify hashing behavior and effective block-level causal attention structure. With fewer than 100 lines of core-engine changes plus a custom attention backend, these primitives are sufficient to realize multiple PIC methods, including Block-Attention, EPIC, and Prompt Cache, within the same running vLLM instance, while natively integrating with KV cache CPU offload implementations. On 2WikiMultihopQA, MiniPIC with interleaved scheduling improves prefill throughput by 49% over baseline vLLM, reduces cached-span time-to-first-token by up to two orders of magnitude, preserves the linear prefill scaling of uncached spans, and incurs only 5.7% worst-case overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MiniPIC，一种<100行代码实现的灵活位置无关缓存方法，用于vLLM中高效复用KV缓存。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强和智能体工作负载重复预填充可预测的结构化输入（如文档、代码文件），但现有前缀缓存（如vLLM）要求相同前缀才能重用KV条目，而生产级推理服务器中的位置无关缓存（PIC）实现需要大量服务器代码修改或将KV状态保留在服务器外，导致主机到设备传输开销。因此需要一种轻量、灵活且高效的内置PIC方案。
light_analysis.method: MiniPIC基于两个核心组件：无位置编码的KV缓存和用户控制的缓存重用原语。KV缓存存储未旋转的K向量，在注意力计算中按请求逻辑位置对K块应用RoPE；提供三个token级原语：块对齐填充、跨度分隔符（SSep）和提示依赖（PDep），用于修改哈希行为与因果注意力结构。每次请求运行时动态调整个性化位置信息。仅需不足100行核心引擎代码修改和一个自定义注意力后端。
light_analysis.result: 在2WikiMultihopQA数据集上，MiniPIC采用交错调度相比基线vLLM提升预填充吞吐量49%，缓存跨度首token延迟降低最多两个数量级，保持未缓存跨度的线性预填充扩展，最坏情况开销仅5.7%。支持在同一运行实例中实现Block-Attention、EPIC和Prompt Cache等多种PIC方法，并原生集成KV缓存CPU卸载。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiniPIC以极简代码实现了灵活高效的位置无关缓存，显著提升重复内容预填充效率，同时兼容现有KV缓存卸载机制。其用户可控原语为新型缓存策略提供了可扩展框架，在检索增强和智能体应用中具有实用价值。未来可探索更高效的原语组合或自动化缓存策略。

title: Select and Improve: Understanding the Mechanics of Post-Training for Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning has rapidly emerged as a key component in the training of reasoning and coding models, yet it remains poorly understood from a mechanistic perspective. We study how and through what underlying processes capabilities are acquired or enhanced via reinforcement learning post-training. Our analysis, based on controlled math reasoning experiments with Qwen-2.5-1.5B, reveals two core mechanisms: strategy selection and strategy improvement. Our results highlight the role of SFT data and reinforcement learning data in activating these mechanisms, in particular showing how supervising the model on diverse reasoning strategies can enable strategy selection and how increasing difficulty in reinforcement learning data can enable strategy improvement. Taken together, our results provide mechanistic insight into RL training and suggest practical interventions to continue scaling reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了强化学习后训练中策略选择和策略改进两种机制，为理解推理能力提升提供机制性见解。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习已成为推理和编码模型训练的核心，但其底层机制尚不明确。理解RL如何获取或增强能力对于优化训练至关重要，现有研究缺乏对过程细节的剖析。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen-2.5-1.5B模型进行控制数学推理实验，识别出策略选择和策略改进两种机制。通过监督多样化推理策略的SFT数据激活策略选择，通过增加RL数据难度激活策略改进。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了两种机制的存在及数据设计的影响。SFT中多样化策略促进选择，RL中更高难度数据促进改进，为推理能力的持续扩展提供了实用干预方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于揭示了RL后训练的机械原理，指导了如何通过数据组合提升推理能力。具有学术价值和应用价值，但基于特定模型和任务，未来需推广至更广场景。

title: NaturalFlow: Reducing Disruptive Pauses for Natural Speech Flow in Simultaneous Speech-to-Speech Translation
abstract: Simultaneous speech-to-speech translation aims to enable near-real-time communication by minimizing latency, offering a compelling, real-time alternative to the high latency of consecutive translation. However, the excessive pursuit of low latency often results in fragmented chunk-wise speech. Consequently, listeners are subjected to an unnatural acoustic flow punctuated by frequent pauses, which could increase their cognitive load. To bridge this gap, we introduce a fluency-aware optimization framework designed to discover the sweet spot between the low-latency benefits of simultaneous translation and the natural flow of consecutive translation. Our framework minimizes inter-chunk silences by leveraging model-internal signals, including linguistic diversity and induced temporal variability in speech durations. Experiments on short- and long-form benchmarks show that our framework produces natural speech flow while maintaining competitive latency and translation quality.
comment: Proceedings of the 26th Interspeech Conference, Long Paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个流畅性感知优化框架，通过最小化断句间静默，实现同声传译中低延迟与自然语音流的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 同声传译过度追求低延迟导致输出碎片化，充满不自然的停顿，增加听众认知负荷。现有方法忽视流畅性，缺乏在低延迟和自然流畅度之间的折中方案。
light_analysis.method: 框架利用模型内部信号，如语言多样性和语音时长的时间变化性，来动态调整断句策略，最小化断句间静默。通过优化训练目标，在保持低延迟的同时提升语音自然度。
light_analysis.result: 在短时和长时基准测试中，该方法生成自然语音流，同时维持与基线相当的延迟和翻译质量，有效减少不自然停顿。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将流畅性作为优化目标引入同声传译，实现了低延迟与自然流畅的平衡，提升用户体验。未来可探索更精细的流畅性度量及扩展到多语言场景。

title: EvoBrowseComp: Benchmarking Search Agents on Evolving Knowledge
abstract: Search Agents -- large language models augmented with search tools -- have intensified the need for future-proof evaluation benchmarks. Existing benchmarks such as BrowseComp rely on static knowledge, making them vulnerable to test-set contamination and parametric memorization. Consequently, models can achieve high scores through fact recall rather than genuine retrieval, obscuring true browsing competence via reasoning shortcuts.   In this paper, we introduce EvoBrowseComp, an evolving benchmark of 400 English and 400 Chinese contamination-free complex questions synthesized via live-web traversal. To collect these questions, we design a three-agent collaborative framework: (1) a QA synthesis agent that retrieves fresh knowledge from the live web to synthesize QA pairs; (2) an information filtering agent that filters retrieved knowledge in terms of credibility and popularity to block parametric shortcuts; and (3) a high-level guidance agent that formalizes questions into reasoning graphs to reduce logical redundancy and shortcuts in synthesized QA pairs. Because the framework supports fully automated synthesis, EvoBrowseComp can be regularly updated to prevent data contamination and maintain temporal freshness. Extensive experiments confirm its great difficulty, requiring broad horizontal search. It establishes a scalable paradigm for auto-updatable, high-difficulty benchmarking that keeps pace with both evolving world knowledge and advancing agent capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoBrowseComp，一个通过实时网络数据合成、可自动更新的搜索智能体评测基准，避免静态知识带来的数据污染和记忆捷径。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有搜索智能体评测基准（如BrowseComp）依赖静态知识，易受测试集污染和参数记忆影响，模型可通过事实回忆而非真实检索获得高分，掩盖了真正的浏览能力。需要一种能随时间更新、防止数据污染且评估真实搜索推理能力的基准。
light_analysis.method: 设计三智能体协作框架：QA合成智能体从实时网络获取新知识并合成问答对；信息过滤智能体根据可信度和流行度过滤知识，阻止参数捷径；高阶引导智能体将问题形式化为推理图，减少逻辑冗余和捷径。框架支持全自动合成，可定期更新基准，保持时间新鲜度，包含400个英文和400个中文问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明EvoBrowseComp具有极高难度，需要广泛的横向搜索。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调其能有效防止数据污染，并建立了一种可扩展的自动更新、高难度基准范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoBrowseComp通过实时网络数据合成和自动更新机制，解决了静态基准的数据污染和记忆问题，为评估搜索智能体的真实浏览能力提供了可靠方案。未来可作为持续评估工具，适应知识演化和模型进步。

title: MP3: Multi-Period Pattern Pre-training forSpatio-Temporal Forecasting
abstract: Spatio-Temporal forecasting is crucial in diverse fields, such as transportation, climate, and energy. Urban spatio-temporal data exhibits temporal mirage: similar short-window inputs have divergent future trends, and vice versa. Existing spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) cannot effectively identify such mirages. We argue that the core reason lies in the short-window inputs that have incomplete period observation, heterogeneous global spatial correlation, and cross-period superposition causality. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Multi- Period Pattern Pre-training (MP3), a plug-and-play pre-training plugin for distinguishing temporal mirages. MP3 presents two core innovations: (1) The multi-period pattern learning is designed to learn multi-period patterns from long time series. Specifically, multi-period temporal modeling leverages edge convolution to identify different multi-period patterns. Multi-period spatial modeling uses a bottleneck project and a global memory bank to capture heterogeneous global spatial relations efficiently. Cross-period pattern interaction employs a causality-enhanced Transformer to capture dependencies across different period patterns. (2) This plugin can seamlessly integrate into existing STGNN backbones to strengthen their forecasting performance. The experiment on five STGNN baselines across five real-world datasets (including a large-scale dataset CA) verify the effectiveness, superior scalability and strong adaptability of MP3, which brings consistent and robust performance improvements across all evaluated baselines. On average, MP3 reduces the MAE 4.7% and the RMSE 5.0%. The code can be available at https://github.com/YAN-outlook/MP3.

light_analysis.overview: 提出即插即用的多周期模式预训练插件MP3，通过多周期时间和空间建模解决时空预测中的时间幻象问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时空数据存在时间幻象，即相似的短窗输入可能对应不同的未来趋势，反之亦然。现有STGNN无法有效识别，因为短窗输入具有不完整的周期观测、异质全局空间相关性和跨周期叠加因果关系。该问题在交通、气候、能源等领域的预测中普遍存在，亟需一种能捕捉长期多周期模式的方法来提升预测准确性。
light_analysis.method: MP3是一种即插即用的预训练插件，包含三部分：多周期时间建模采用边缘卷积识别不同周期模式；多周期空间建模通过瓶颈投影和全局记忆库高效捕获异质全局空间关系；跨周期模式交互使用因果增强Transformer建模不同周期模式间的依赖。该插件可无缝集成到现有STGNN骨干中，无需修改模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 在5个真实世界数据集（含大规模CA数据集）上，使用5种STGNN基线（如STGCN等）进行实验。MP3在所有基线上均带来一致且稳健的性能提升，平均降低MAE 4.7%、RMSE 5.0%，验证了其有效性、优越可扩展性和强适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MP3通过多周期模式预训练有效解决了时空预测中的时间幻象问题，显著提升了现有STGNN的预测性能。其即插即用特性便于广泛应用，具有较高的学术和实用价值。未来可探索更高效的多周期模式编码或扩展到其他时空预测任务。

title: G-Long: Graph-Enhanced Memory Management for Efficient Long-Term Dialogue Agents
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced open-domain dialogue systems, maintaining long-term consistency remains a challenge due to inherent limitations in long-context reasoning and the inefficiency of processing extensive raw text. Existing approaches typically rely on either unstructured memory storage, which is prone to information loss, or computationally expensive LLMs that incur high latency. To address these limitations, we propose G-Long, a graph-enhanced framework that utilizes a fine-tuned small Language Model (sLM) for structured triplet extraction and associative retrieval, significantly reducing operational costs. Furthermore, we introduce the novel attention-aware importance scoring mechanism that leverages the intrinsic cross-attention signals of a T5 summarizer to identify salient memories. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that G-Long achieves state-of-the-art performance in both response generation and memory retrieval, yielding performance gains of up to 9.8% in response quality on MSC and 40.8% in retrieval recall on LME, while significantly minimizing computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出G-Long框架，通过图增强记忆管理结合小语言模型与注意力感知评分，实现高效长期对话一致性与低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在长期对话中因长上下文推理局限和原始文本处理低效而难以保持一致性。现有非结构化内存易信息丢失，而LLM方法计算昂贵，亟需一种高效、低成本的长期记忆管理方案。
light_analysis.method: G-Long采用微调的小语言模型进行结构化三元组提取与关联检索，降低运营成本；并引入注意力感知重要性评分机制，利用T5摘要器的交叉注意力信号识别关键记忆，实现精准记忆管理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上取得最优性能：MSC数据集响应质量提升9.8%，LME数据集检索召回率提升40.8%，同时显著减少计算开销，验证了方法的有效性与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: G-Long以图增强方式优化长期对话记忆管理，在提升一致性的同时降低延迟，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或扩展至多模态对话场景。

title: MÖVE: A Holistic LLM Benchmark for the German Public Sector
abstract: We present MÖVE (Modelle für die Öffentliche Verwaltung Evaluieren), a holistic benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in the context of the German public sector. While LLMs are increasingly adopted in public administration, model selection remains largely ad hoc, and existing benchmarks offer limited guidance: they are predominantly English-centric, US-centric in content, and focus exclusively on task performance. MÖVE addresses these gaps by evaluating 39 models across two complementary dimensions. Performance criteria cover summarization, question answering, and topic extraction. Governance criteria assess hallucination tendencies, energy consumption, provider transparency, and alignment with German constitutional values and knowledge about positions by German political parties. In total, we utilize ten German-language datasets, including gold- and silverstandard datasets that we constructed to reflect public-administration domains. We employ a multi-metric evaluation strategy combining classical NLP metrics, embedding-based methods, and LLM-as-a-judge approaches. Our results show that no single model dominates across all criteria: top performers differ between tasks, and model size alone is a poor predictor of quality. We further evaluate the benchmark itself, analyzing its statistical precision, LLM judge reliability, the impact of our private datasets on model rankings, the sensitivity of our results to prompt formulation, and the validity of our energy consumption estimates. MÖVE is designed as a living benchmark under active development; results are publicly available at https://moeve.bundesdruckerei.de/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了MÖVE基准，首个全面评估德语公共部门大语言模型的多维基准，涵盖性能与治理两大维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在德国公共管理领域应用日益广泛，但模型选择缺乏系统指导。现有基准以英语和美国内容为主，仅关注任务性能，忽略了治理维度（如幻觉、能耗、价值观对齐等），无法满足公共部门的特殊需求。因此，需要构建一个德语、面向公共部门、兼顾性能与治理的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建了MÖVE基准，评估39个模型，涵盖性能（摘要、问答、主题提取）和治理（幻觉、能耗、供应商透明度、宪法价值观、政党知识）两个维度。使用10个德文数据集（含自建黄金/白银标准数据集），采用多指标评估策略，包括经典NLP指标、嵌入方法和LLM-as-a-judge。同时设计了基准自身的统计精度、LLM评判可靠性等分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，没有单一模型在所有标准上占优：不同任务的最佳模型不同，模型大小不能预测质量。研究还分析了基准的统计精度、LLM评判可靠性、私有数据集对排名的影响、提示敏感性以及能耗估计的有效性。结果公开，设计为持续更新的活基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: MÖVE填补了公共部门LLM评估的空白，提供了兼顾性能与治理的多维视角，有助于指导模型选择。其公开可用的结果和活基准设计支持持续演进。未来可扩展更多任务和模型，并深化治理评估的维度。

title: PP-OCRv6: From 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters, Surpassing Billion-Scale VLMs on OCR Tasks
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results on general vision-language tasks, yet they suffer from hallucination, imprecise localization, and prohibitive computational cost when applied to dedicated OCR scenarios. This paper presents PP-OCRv6, a lightweight OCR system that combines architectural innovation with data-centric optimization. PP-OCRv6 redesigns the backbone, detection neck, and recognition neck around a unified MetaFormer-style building block with structural reparameterization, decoupling spatial token mixing from channel mixing and supporting both tasks through task-specific stride configurations. Three model tiers (medium, small, tiny) share the same block primitives, covering deployment scenarios from server to edge. On our in-house benchmarks, PP-OCRv6_medium achieves 83.2% recognition accuracy and 86.2% detection Hmean, outperforming PP-OCRv5_server by +5.1% and +4.6% respectively while surpassing Qwen3-VL-235B, GPT-5.5, and Gemini-3.1-Pro with orders of magnitude fewer parameters. The tiny tier achieves 3.9$\times$ faster inference than PP-OCRv5_mobile on Intel Xeon CPU while maintaining comparable accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PP-OCRv6轻量级OCR系统，通过统一MetaFormer块和结构重参数化，在OCR任务上以极小参数超越亿级VLM。
light_analysis.motivation: VLMs在通用视觉语言任务上表现优异，但在OCR场景存在幻觉、定位不准和计算成本高的问题。现有方法缺乏针对OCR的轻量高效设计，需开发专用轻量OCR系统以平衡精度与效率。
light_analysis.method: PP-OCRv6基于统一MetaFormer构建块，采用结构重参数化，解耦空间与通道混合。重新设计骨干、检测颈和识别颈，通过任务特定步长配置支持多任务。提供medium、small、tiny三种规模，覆盖服务器到边缘部署。数据集为内部基准。
light_analysis.result: 在内部基准上，PP-OCRv6_medium识别准确率83.2%，检测Hmean86.2%，分别比PP-OCRv5_server提升5.1%和4.6%，并以极少参数超越Qwen3-VL-235B、GPT-5.5等。tiny版本在Intel Xeon CPU上推理速度比PP-OCRv5_mobile快3.9倍，精度相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: PP-OCRv6展示了轻量OCR系统通过架构创新与数据优化可超越通用VLMs，具有高精度与高效部署价值。未来可进一步扩展至更多OCR子任务。

title: Demystifying Hidden-State Recurrence: Switchable Latent Reasoning with On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Latent chain-of-thought compresses reasoning by replacing visible reasoning traces with continuous hidden-state recurrence, but existing formulations are difficult to optimize with standard on-policy reinforcement learning (RL) and hard to interpret causally. Our key insight is that a single pair of explicit boundary tokens can address both issues at once: discrete entry and exit anchors make the latent block compatible with standard on-policy RL, and the same anchors offer a natural foothold for mechanistic analysis. Motivated by this, we propose SWITCH, a switchable latent reasoning framework. The model emits <swi> to enter latent mode and </swi> to exit. Because the boundaries are ordinary discrete tokens, the GRPO policy ratio is well-defined at every decision point. The same anchors also expose the latent steps to direct probing and causal intervention. We train the model with a visible-to-latent curriculum and a Switch-GRPO objective that propagates gradients through recurrent latent computation. SWITCH consistently outperforms prior hidden-state-recurrence latent reasoning approaches at similar scale. Mechanistic analysis through the boundary tokens further reveals three findings: (i) <swi> is a sharply localised, learned switching policy rather than a stylistic artefact; (ii) the latent step it opens performs problem-specific, causally important computation rather than acting as an inert placeholder; and (iii) that computation is concentrated at a single hidden-state transition on entry. Together, these results show that hidden-state-recurrence latent reasoning is both RL-trainable and open to direct mechanistic analysis, including of how on-policy RL itself improves the model from the inside.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SWITCH框架，通过离散边界令牌实现隐藏状态递归推理的强化学习训练与因果分析，揭示其内部机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有隐藏状态递归推理方法难以用标准在线强化学习优化，且难以进行因果解释。本研究旨在通过引入显式边界令牌，同时解决这两大问题，使隐蔽推理既兼容RL训练又可被机理分析。
light_analysis.method: 提出SWITCH框架，模型在推理时发射<swi>和</swi>离散令牌分别进入和退出隐藏模式。这些边界令牌使得GRPO策略比率在每个决策点定义良好，同时允许直接探测和因果干预。采用可见到隐藏的课程学习，以及Switch-GRPO目标函数，通过递归隐藏计算传播梯度。
light_analysis.result: SWITCH在相似规模下一致优于先前的隐藏状态递归推理方法。通过边界令牌的机理分析发现：(i)<swi>是一个精确定位的习得性切换策略；(ii)隐藏步骤执行问题特定且因果重要的计算；(iii)该计算集中在单个隐藏状态转换上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明隐藏状态递归推理既可被RL训练，也可进行直接机理分析，包括分析在线RL如何从内部改进模型。该工作为可解释的隐蔽推理和强化学习优化提供了新范式。

title: Disparate Impact in Synthetic Data Generation
abstract: We revisit the fairness notion of disparate impact for synthetic data generation (SDG), that assesses whether the utility of generated records is the same across sensitive groups. Our approach departs from existing work on fair SDG, that address the problem of correcting for undue biases in the observed distribution, hence redefining SDG as learning a distribution that is not that of the real data. By contrast, non-disparate impact is notably achieved when the synthetic and real distributions are the same. We expose reasons why SDG may fail to reach that solution and discuss why approximation and estimation errors occur and can be disparate across groups. We notably look into the expressive power of SDG methods relative to distribution complexity, sampling errors due to group proportions, and estimation errors induced by differential privacy mechanisms. We illustrate cases of disparate impact on both artificial and real-world data, focusing on SDG methods that rely on probabilistic graphical models. We also introduce a strategy of learning group-wise SDG models and illustrate how it can improve both the overall utility and its parity in many settings.

light_analysis.overview: 重新审视合成数据生成中的差异影响公平性，主张非差异影响在合成与真实分布相同时实现，并分析误差来源，提出分组学习策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有合成数据生成（SDG）的公平性工作通常通过修正观察分布中的偏差来消除不公平，这导致合成的分布与真实分布不同。本文认为，真正的非差异影响应该在合成数据与真实数据的分布一致时实现。然而，SDG方法常因表达能力不足、采样误差（由组比例引起）以及差分隐私机制带来的估计误差而无法达到这一目标，这些误差可能在不同敏感组之间产生差异，导致不公平的效用分布。因此，需要重新审视和解决SDG中的差异影响问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先从理论上分析了SDG产生差异影响的三个原因：模型表达能力不足以捕捉复杂分布、组比例不均导致的采样误差、差分隐私引入的估计误差。然后，以概率图模型（如贝叶斯网络）为例，在人工和真实数据上展示了这些误差如何造成差异影响。最后，提出了一种分组学习策略：为每个敏感组独立训练SDG模型，再合并生成数据。该方法通过避免跨组干扰来提升整体效用和公平性。
light_analysis.result: 在人工数据和真实数据上的实验表明，标准SDG方法（概率图模型）会因组间分布复杂度差异或组大小不平衡而产生差异影响，即某些组的生成数据效用显著低于其他组。而所提出的分组学习策略能够显著改善这一状况：在各组中，生成数据的效用更接近真实数据，且组间效用差距减小。具体表现为，在多个设置下，分组模型在保留原始数据统计特性的同时，降低了差异影响指标（如平均绝对误差的组间差异）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文重新定义了合成数据生成中的非差异影响公平性，即要求合成分布与真实分布一致，而非像现有工作那样修正偏差。通过分析误差来源，揭示了标准SDG方法在公平性上的固有缺陷。提出的分组学习策略简单有效，能同时提升整体数据效用和公平性，为公平SDG提供了一个新的视角。未来工作可拓展至更复杂的生成模型（如GANs）并研究组间信息共享的边界。

title: Authority, Truth, and Citation Bias: A Large-Scale Multi-Domain Benchmark for Studying Epistemic Susceptibility in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed in citation-augmented settings, yet the effect of citation presence on model behavior independent of factual content remains poorly understood. We introduce AuthorityBench, a 220,564-prompt multi-domain benchmark that isolates how citation-based authority signals influence epistemic behavior in LLMs. The benchmark uses a fully balanced 2x2 factorial design crossing claim veracity with citation veracity, the first to do so, across four domains (general knowledge, science, law, and medicine), with controlled variation over 40 prompt templates, four venue prestige tiers, and a country-coded author name dataset. Evaluating seven models on 12 structured research questions, we find that citation presence, whether real or fabricated, consistently increases hallucination rates relative to a no-citation baseline. The effect is strongest when fabricated citations accompany true claims, raising hallucination rates by 3 to 22 percentage points and reaching 35 to 77% in the general knowledge domain, while legal claims are comparatively robust and venue prestige and author demographics show negligible impact. All datasets and evaluation code are available at: https://github.com/floating-reeds/AuthorityBench
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to AI4GOOD and EIML at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出AuthorityBench基准，揭示引文权威信号会独立于事实内容增加LLM的幻觉率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在引文增强场景中部署，但引文存在性对模型行为的影响独立于事实内容尚未被充分理解。现有研究缺乏控制引文真实性与声明真实性的交叉分析，且未覆盖多领域。本研究旨在系统评估引文权威信号如何影响LLM的认知易感性，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建AuthorityBench，包含220,564个提示，采用完全平衡的2x2因子设计（声明真实性×引文真实性），覆盖通用知识、科学、法律、医学四个领域。控制40个提示模板、4个场所声望等级和国籍编码的作者姓名数据集。评估7个LLM（具体模型未说明）在12个结构化研究问题上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 引文存在（无论真实或伪造）一致增加幻觉率。最显著的是伪造引文伴随真实声明时，幻觉率上升3至22个百分点，通用知识领域达35%至77%。法律声明相对鲁棒，场所声望和作者人口统计影响可忽略。所有数据和代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: AuthorityBench揭示了LLM对引文权威信号的盲目信任，导致认知扭曲。该基准为研究AI安全中的认知易感性提供了重要工具，强调在应用中需谨慎处理引文。未来可扩展至更多模型和领域，探索缓解策略。

title: LEDGER: A Long-Context Benchmark of Corporate Annual Reports for Grounded Financial Retrieval and Extraction
abstract: Finance reporting is a natural proving ground for large language models, and the very-long-context capabilities of recent models across all sizes make rigorous evaluation in this domain an increasingly pressing need. Yet most public financial resources reduce the task to plain-text SEC 10-K filings paired with a handful of question-answer items. We release LEDGER (Long-context Evaluation of Documents for Grounded Extraction and Retrieval), a corpus of 4,999 digitized corporate annual reports - full documents with figures, tables, and narrative, not just regulatory filings. Each report is labeled with 31 consolidated financial KPIs to be extracted and linked to the market's reaction at the earnings date. From this data we derive three evaluation benchmarks spanning the difficulty spectrum: a pure page-level KPI retrieval task with TREC-style relevance judgments over 118,048 questions in natural language, a conversational "needle-in-a-haystack" single-value lookup, and a full KPI extraction task, both from long, numerically dense reports. We additionally provide human OCR-quality annotations with inter-annotator agreement and the complete extraction, validation, and scoring toolchain. We further demonstrate the dataset's research utility with a case study linking CEO-letter rhetoric to post-publication market impact.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LEDGER基准，基于4999份企业年报，用于评估长上下文LLM的财务信息检索与提取能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融资源多为SEC 10-K文本片段，缺乏包含图表表格的完整年报，且评估任务简单。亟需一个涵盖真实年报、多维任务（检索、提取）的基准，以严格测试模型的长上下文能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含4999份完整数字化年报的数据集，每份标注31个财务KPI及其与市场反应的关联。衍生三个任务：页面级KPI检索（118048个自然语言问题，TREC式评估）、对话式“大海捞针”单值查找、完整KPI提取。提供人工OCR标注、一致性检验及完整工具链。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体性能数据，但通过案例研究展示了数据集在分析CEO信函修辞与市场影响关联中的实用性，验证了数据集用于研究长上下文模型和金融NLP的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEDGER为长上下文LLM在金融领域提供了严格评测平台，涵盖检索与提取任务，且数据集规模大、标注丰富。未来可用于模型能力对比、财务分析自动化等，但需注意数据集仅覆盖年报，未涉及时序等其他金融文档。

title: Unified MRI Brain Image Translation via Hierarchical Tumor Structure Comparison
abstract: Multi-modal MRI brain image translation via available modalities holds significant practical importance in modern medicine, providing robust support for early diagnosis, treatment planning, and outcome assessment of diseases. For this purpose, it is important to ensure the fidelity of the tumor regions after translation. However, existing brain image translation methods ignore the structure information of different tumor regions, which could assist translation models in enhancing the quality and clinical applicability of the translated images.   In this work, we propose a novel translation model called HTSCGAN, which is a unified multi-modal brain image translation generative adversarial model integrating the structural information within tumor regions with the aim of improving the quality of brain image translation. Specifically, the generator employs three Patch Contrast Module (PCM) with different patch sizes to capture the hierarchical structural information of the tumor regions. In addition, a pretrained Patch Classifier (PC) and a pretrained Structure-Aware Encoder (SAE) are employed to derive the generated image containing the same tumor region structure as the ground truth image via patch classification loss and tumor perceptual loss, respectively. The experiments on BraTS2020 and BraTS2021 demonstrate strong performance of our model in both translation tasks and down stream segmentation tasks, highlighting its effectiveness in enhancing the quality and clinical relevance of the translated brain images. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HTSCGAN.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HTSCGAN，一种统一的多模态脑图像翻译生成对抗网络，通过层次化肿瘤结构比较提升翻译质量和临床适用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态MRI脑图像翻译在早期诊断、治疗规划等医学任务中至关重要，但现有方法忽略肿瘤区域的结构信息，导致翻译后肿瘤区域保真度不足，影响临床决策。因此需要利用肿瘤区域的层次结构信息来指导翻译，确保生成图像中肿瘤结构的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出HTSCGAN，生成器采用三个不同大小的Patch Contrast Module（PCM）捕获肿瘤区域的层次结构特征；结合预训练的Patch Classifier（PC）和Structure-Aware Encoder（SAE），通过补丁分类损失和肿瘤感知损失约束生成图像，使其肿瘤区域结构与真实图像一致。模型在BraTS2020和BraTS2021数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS2020和BraTS2021数据集上，HTSCGAN在图像翻译任务和下游分割任务中均表现出色，优于现有方法。具体而言，翻译后的图像在肿瘤区域具有更高的结构保真度，临床相关性显著提升，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: HTSCGAN通过层次化整合肿瘤结构信息，有效提升了多模态脑图像翻译的质量，为临床诊断和治疗规划提供更可靠的影像支持。该研究证明了结构感知在医学图像翻译中的重要性，未来可探索更细粒度的结构建模或扩展到其他模态。代码已开源。

title: Scale Buys Interpolation, Structure Buys a Horizon: Certified Predictability for Equivariant World Models
abstract: Scale buys interpolation; structure buys a certified horizon. A world model's average error says nothing about whether a particular prediction can be trusted, or for how long. For equivariant latent world models we give a computable, multi-step certificate of the predictable horizon: $T$-step rollout error is provably constant over each symmetry orbit (Theorem A) and stratified channel-by-channel by the predictor's Lyapunov spectrum, $T_j(ε)\sim\log(1/ε)/λ_j$. The horizon is two-sided -- a matching lower bound makes approximate equivariance provably horizon-limited -- and the certificate is exclusive to structure: orbit-constant error characterizes equivariance, so no non-equivariant model has it at any scale. Empirically, on 40-D Lorenz-96 only a $\mathbb{Z}_N$-equivariant network recovers the full Lyapunov spectrum ($R^2{=}0.98$); dense and recurrent baselines fail.   Because the spectrum is faithful, the certificate acts, a priori: under a fixed sensing budget a $c\times$-inflated certificate provably needs $c\times$ the budget, and the equivariant certificate meets a budget its inflated dense counterpart cannot -- with zero calibration data. The same read-out, unchanged, audits public pretrained world models training-free: TD-MPC2 checkpoints land on the certificate's own scope taxonomy -- calibrated where strongly expansive (ratio 0.94-1.02), optimistic where weakly expansive, correctly abstaining where contracting -- a map a deployed monitor replicates cell-by-cell, out-of-sample. Across the official 1M-317M multitask ladder, calibration does not improve with parameters. On V-JEPA 2-AC (1B, real robot data) the measured cross-check correctly overrides an over-promising tangent spectrum -- the cross-validated audit, not the raw number, is the deployable object. Scale buys interpolation, not a calibrated horizon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出等变世界模型的可预测性认证方法，证明对称轨道上误差恒定，并给出Lyapunov谱分层认证。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型的平均误差无法判断单次预测的可信度或有效时长。现有方法缺乏可计算的、多步的预测视界认证，尤其对于等变潜空间世界模型，需要一种能够量化预测可靠性并具有理论保证的方法。本文旨在解决这一缺失，提供专属结构而非规模驱动的认证。
light_analysis.method: 针对等变潜世界模型，提出可计算的多步预测视界认证：T步展开误差在对称轨道上恒定（定理A），并通过预测器的Lyapunov谱分层，给出视界T_j(ε)~log(1/ε)/λ_j。认证是双侧的，且唯一适用于等变结构。实验使用40维Lorenz-96系统，对比Z_N-等变网络、密集网络和循环基线。
light_analysis.result: 在Lorenz-96上，仅Z_N-等变网络恢复完整Lyapunov谱（R²=0.98），密集和循环基线失败。认证先验有效：固定感知预算下，c倍膨胀认证需c倍预算，等变认证在零标定数据下满足预算。在预训练TD-MPC2检查点中，认证自动分类：强膨胀区域校准比0.94-1.02，弱膨胀乐观，收缩正确放弃。跨1M-317M多任务阶梯，标定不随参数提升。在V-JEPA 2-AC（1B，真实机器人数据）上，交叉验证审计覆盖过度乐观的切线谱。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明规模换取插值，结构换取有校准的视界。等变结构提供可计算的预测可靠性认证，无需训练即可审计预训练模型。该成果具有理论价值（表征等变模型特性）和实用价值（部署时提供可操作的校准监控）。未来方向可能涉及更复杂对称性和实际系统应用。

title: sebis at CRF Filling 2026: A Two-Stage Local LLM Pipeline for Medical CRF Filling
abstract: The extraction of structured clinical information from unstructured EHR notes is a persistent bottleneck in healthcare informatics. While large language models (LLMs) offer high performance, their deployment in clinical settings is hindered by privacy risks, inference costs, and the tendency to hallucinate beyond textual evidence. We address these challenges for the CL4Health 2026 Case Report Form (CRF) filling task by proposing a fully local, domain-adapted pipeline using the MedGemma-27B model. Our two-stage architecture, which separates binary presence classification from value extraction, enforces strict adherence to textual evidence and ensures deterministic outputs for negated, uncertain, or unknown states. By leveraging item-specific, few-shot in-context learning without external API calls or fine-tuning, our approach achieves a macro-F1 score of 0.55 on the official English test track. This result secures second place among all locally-hosted, open-source submissions. Our work demonstrates that privacy-preserving, on-premise LLM pipelines can achieve near-competitive performance with proprietary frontier models, providing a practical, data-sovereign framework for clinical NLP.
comment: Published in Proceedings of the Third Workshop on Patient-Oriented Language Processing (CL4Health), LREC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出完全本地化的两阶段LLM流水线，利用MedGemma-27B模型进行医疗CRF填充，兼顾隐私保护与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）中非结构化临床信息的结构化提取是医疗信息学的瓶颈。大型语言模型（LLM）性能高，但临床部署受限于隐私风险、推理成本和幻觉问题。现有方法依赖外部API或微调，无法确保数据主权，且对否定、不确定状态处理不足。
light_analysis.method: 采用MedGemma-27B模型构建两阶段架构：第一阶段进行二元存在分类，第二阶段提取具体值。通过项目特定的少量样本上下文学习，无外部API调用或微调，强制依据文本证据输出，对否定、不确定或未知状态产生确定性结果。
light_analysis.result: 在官方英语测试轨道上取得宏F1分数0.55，位列所有本地托管开源提交第二名。表明隐私保护的本地LLM流水线能接近专有前沿模型性能，兼顾数据主权与效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了隐私保护、本地部署的LLM流水线在临床NLP中的实用价值，为数据主权框架提供参考。局限性为宏F1仍偏低，未来可通过更优的few-shot选择或轻量微调提升性能。

title: Emotional regulation improves deep learning-based image classification
abstract: Emotion significantly influences cognition, enhancing memory and learning under certain conditions. Drawing on this principle, emotion-augmented deep learning investigates how affective states can improve neural network architectures and learning paradigms, achieving better generalization than non-emotional models. However, existing methods often rely solely on objective neurophysiological factors, neglecting the role of subjectivity in emotion. To bridge this gap, the present study introduces Emotional Regulation, a novel framework for modeling emotion in deep learning through artificial subjective experience. The method employs pre-training based on affective stimuli, balancing non-emotional and emotionally-influenced responses in downstream task optimization. Extensive experimentation was conducted in image classification, pre-training ResNet and ViT architectures on four emotional datasets, using CIFAR-10 and -100 as target benchmarks. Results reveal improvements over the aforementioned backbones, providing evidence of Emotional Regulation as a promising method for defining emotion-augmented deep learning through artificial subjective experience. Furthermore, the proposed approach overcomes the related work in image classification based on CIFAR, revealing Emotional Regulation as the new state-of-the-art in emotion-augmented deep learning for large-scale vision datasets. The study also enforces evidence of the impact of affective states in improving machine learning tasks' optimization, encouraging further investigation on emotion-inspired architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出情感调节框架，通过人工主观体验在深度学习中模拟情感，提升图像分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感显著影响认知，可增强学习。现有情感增强深度学习方法多依赖客观神经生理因素，忽略主观性。本研究旨在引入人工主观体验来建模情感，以改进神经网络架构和学习范式，克服现有方法的局限。
light_analysis.method: 提出情感调节框架，采用情感刺激进行预训练，平衡非情感和情感影响响应以优化下游任务。在ResNet和ViT架构上，使用四个情感数据集预训练，以CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100为目标基准进行图像分类实验。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上，情感调节方法相比原始骨干网络取得显著改进，成为情感增强深度学习在大规模视觉数据集上的新最先进方法，超越了相关工作的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明情感状态能改善机器学习任务优化，为情感启发架构提供依据。情感调节框架通过人工主观体验有效建模情感，具有学术和实际应用价值；未来可进一步探索情感在更多任务中的应用。

title: Limits of spectral learning under noise
abstract: Learning functional relationships from noisy data is a central problem in scientific inference. Spectral methods approximate unknown functions by expanding them in a basis and estimating the corresponding coefficients from data, but the stability of these coefficients under noise remains poorly understood. Here we study supervised regression with additive label noise using sparse spectral representations across multiple bases and dimensions. We show that noise induces a predictable drift in the learned coefficient vector whose magnitude depends on the effective number of active spectral modes. After whitening the empirical feature geometry, we derive a closed-form expression for the overlap between noisy and noiseless coefficient vectors, revealing a universal degradation curve governed by a single intrinsic noise scale. Numerical experiments across Fourier, Legendre, Bessel, and Haar bases confirm the theoretical prediction. The results demonstrate that spectral learning exhibits a fundamental noise threshold beyond which coefficient estimates become unstable, placing intrinsic limits on recovering functional structure from noisy data.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了噪声下谱学习的固有噪声阈值及系数漂移的通用退化曲线。
light_analysis.motivation: 谱方法广泛用于从噪声数据中学习函数关系，但系数稳定性在噪声下的表现尚不清楚。现有方法缺乏对噪声引起的系数漂移的定量理解，限制了从噪声数据恢复功能结构的可靠性。因此需要理论分析噪声对谱学习的影响，明确其内在限制。
light_analysis.method: 研究加性标签噪声下的监督回归，采用稀疏谱表示（多基和多维）。通过白化经验特征几何，推导出噪声与无噪声系数向量重叠的闭式表达式，揭示由单一内在噪声尺度控制的通用退化曲线。数值实验覆盖Fourier、Legendre、Bessel和Haar基，验证理论预测。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导和数值实验一致表明：噪声引起系数向量漂移，幅度取决于活动谱模式数；存在基本噪声阈值，超过后系数估计变得不稳定；退化曲线由单一内在噪声尺度决定，具有跨基的普遍性，为谱学习在噪声下的性能设定了根本界限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了噪声下谱学习的理论基础，揭示了从噪声数据恢复功能结构的根本限制，对信号处理、科学推断等应用具有重要指导意义。未来工作可探索缓解噪声影响的策略或扩展至其他噪声模型。

title: LaME: Learning to Think in Latent Space for Multimodal Embedding via Information Bottleneck
abstract: Reasoning-driven universal multimodal embedding has advanced rapidly by introducing Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning into the embedding pipeline. Despite the strong performance across both general and complex tasks, this paradigm suffers from two core limitations: (i) autoregressive CoT reasoning incurs high computational cost, making it impractical for low-latency retrieval; and (ii) embedding performance is heavily coupled with CoT annotation quality, making large-scale training unreliable. These raise fundamental questions: Is textual CoT the optimal form of reasoning for embedding, and can effective embedding reasoning be accomplished in latent space? To this end, we propose LaME (Latent Reasoning Multimodal Embedding), which formulates embedding-oriented latent reasoning as a weakly supervised information bottleneck. LaME employs K learnable reason tokens as a fixed-capacity bottleneck, completing all reasoning within a single forward pass. The two weak supervision signals structurally decouple contrastive from autoregressive objectives and eliminate dependence on CoT annotations, while a two-stage training pipeline ensures stable convergence. Experiments on MMEB-v2 and MRMR show that LaME achieves competitive performance, surpassing some explicit CoT-based models, while delivering 60x faster inference than explicit CoT methods and 2x faster than latent baselines with throughput comparable to discriminative embedding models. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaME，在潜在空间通过信息瓶颈进行多模态嵌入推理，实现高效且无需CoT注释。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于Chain-of-Thought推理的多模态嵌入方法存在两大局限：自回归CoT推理计算成本高，不适用于低延迟检索；嵌入性能严重依赖CoT注释质量，大规模训练不可靠。这提出了核心问题：文本CoT是否为嵌入推理的最优形式，以及能否在潜在空间完成有效推理。研究旨在解决这些局限，开发高效、可扩展的嵌入方法。
light_analysis.method: LaME将嵌入导向的潜在推理形式化为弱监督信息瓶颈。它使用K个可学习推理令牌作为固定容量瓶颈，在单次前向传播中完成推理。两个弱监督信号在结构上解耦了对比学习和自回归目标，消除了对CoT注释的依赖。两阶段训练流程确保稳定收敛。该方法无需显式文本推理，在潜在空间中高效完成推理。
light_analysis.result: 在MMEB-v2和MRMR基准上，LaME取得了与部分显式CoT模型竞争的性能。推理速度方面，比显式CoT方法快60倍，比潜在基线快2倍，吞吐量接近判别式嵌入模型。实验证明了LaME在保持性能的同时大幅提升效率，适用于低延迟检索场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaME证明了在潜在空间进行有效嵌入推理的可行性，解决了显式CoT的效率和注释依赖问题。其学术价值在于提出了一种新的嵌入推理范式，实际应用价值在于实现了高吞吐、低延迟的多模态检索。未来可探索推理令牌数量优化及更复杂的弱监督信号。

title: A green solvent screening tool for emerging materials via uncertainty aware, transformer enhanced transfer learning
abstract: Accurate prediction of solubility remains a central challenge across materials science and sustainable chemistry. In particular due to emerging technologies like organic and hybrid photovoltaics, batteries, and catalysis, solvent usage is expected to increase significantly within the coming years. Therefore, substituting solvents with greener alternatives is vital. This is where machine learning can have substantial impact. However, the limited data on critical parameters of solubility significantly constraints machine learning efficacy. In this work, we transfer a pre-trained foundational model on QM9 targets to our application with minimal data requirements. Additionally, the pipeline integrates uncertainty quantification, allowing the user to gauge the confidence of the predictions. As baseline, we succeed in predicting the Hansen solubility parameters and Dielectric Constant for which extensive databases exist. Importantly, we achieve high model performance on additional targets, such as Gutmann Donor and Acceptor numbers, where the available data is extremely limited. Overall, we augment data on solubility descriptors by orders of magnitude with high quality predictions. For effective dissemination, we deploy easy-to-use, easily integrateable with high throughput labs, customizable tool for ranking and screening possible solvent substitutes. Finally, we rediscovered known green solvent alternatives and proposed new candidates proving its relevance for finding eco-friendly solvents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于不确定性感知的Transformer迁移学习框架，用小数据预测溶剂参数，筛选绿色溶剂。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确预测溶解度对材料科学和可持续化学至关重要，尤其是有机光伏、电池等新兴技术将大幅增加溶剂使用。替代为绿色溶剂势在必行，但机器学习受限于关键溶解度参数的数据稀缺。现有方法依赖大量数据，难以泛化到数据有限的场景，亟需一种高效、数据高效的预测工具。
light_analysis.method: 将预训练在QM9数据集上的Transformer基础模型迁移至溶剂性质预测任务，仅需少量目标数据微调。同时集成不确定性量化模块，评估预测置信度。该管道可预测汉森溶解度参数、介电常数等，并拓展至数据极少的古特曼给体/受体数，实现高质量预测并进行数据增广。
light_analysis.result: 在汉森溶解度参数和介电常数等大量数据库上成功预测，达到高模型性能。对古特曼给体/受体数这类小样本目标也表现优异。总体将溶解度描述符数据增广数个数量级，预测质量高。工具可排序筛选溶剂替代物，已重新发现已知绿色溶剂并推荐新候选物。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了高效的绿色溶剂筛选工具，通过迁移学习和不确定性量化克服数据限制，显著提升预测能力。具有实际应用价值，可集成于高通量实验室，帮助发现环保溶剂。未来可扩展至更多溶剂相关性质，进一步推动可持续化学。

title: TWLA: Achieving Ternary Weights and Low-Bit Activations for LLMs via Post-Training Quantization
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit exceptional general language processing capabilities, but their memory and compute costs hinder deployment. Ternarization has emerged as a promising compression technique, offering significant reductions in model size and inference complexity. However, existing methods struggle with heavy-tailed activation distributions and therefore keep activations in high precision, fundamentally limiting end-to-end inference acceleration. To overcome this limitation, we propose TWLA, a post-training quantization (PTQ) framework that achieves 1.58-bit weight compression and 4-bit activation quantization while maintaining high accuracy. TWLA comprises three components: (1) Euclidean-to-Manifold Asymmetric Ternary Quantizer (E2M-ATQ) minimizes layer-output error under weight ternarization via a two-stage optimization from Euclidean initialization to manifold relocation; (2) Kronecker Orthogonal Tri-Modal Shaping (KOTMS) applies a Kronecker-structured orthogonal rotation to reshape weights into ternary-friendly tri-modal distributions, while the shared rotation statistically suppresses activation outliers; and (3) Inter-Layer Aware Activation Mixed Precision (ILA-AMP) explicitly introduces adjacent-layer second-order interaction costs in bit allocation and jointly optimizes for the layer-wise disparity of activation quantization gains induced by the shared orthogonal transform, preventing cascades triggered by a few weak layers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TWLA maintains high accuracy under W1.58A4, while delivering significant inference acceleration. The code is available at <https://github.com/Kishon-zzx/TWLA>.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TWLA后训练量化框架，首次实现LLM的1.58-bit权重和4-bit激活量化，通过三组件协同设计保持高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型内存和计算开销巨大，三元量化可显著压缩模型，但现有方法因激活值存在重尾分布而被迫保留高精度激活，限制了端到端加速。因此亟需一种能同时实现极低比特权重和激活的量化方案。
light_analysis.method: TWLA包含三组件：E2M-ATQ通过欧几里得初始化到流形重定位的两阶段优化最小化三元权重的层输出误差；KOTMS利用Kronecker结构正交旋转使权重分布呈三元友好型并统计抑制激活异常值；ILA-AMP在比特分配中引入跨层二阶交互成本，联合优化因共享正交变换导致的层间激活量化增益差异，防止弱层级联。
light_analysis.result: 在W1.58A4（1.58-bit权重，4-bit激活）配置下，TWLA保持高精度，并带来显著推理加速。实验证明了其有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: TWLA实现了LLM在极限低比特权重和激活下的后训练量化，平衡了模型大小、速度与精度。其组件协同设计为解决三元量化中激活分布问题提供了新思路。未来可探索更极端的比特配置或硬件协同优化。

title: AAbAAC: An Annotated Corpus for Autoimmunity Information Extraction
abstract: Despite advances in information extraction driven by deep learning and large language models, performance gaps remain in highly specialized biomedical fields, where domainspecific complexity poses challenges for generalist models. In this work, we focus on the domain of autoimmunity, where the main entities of interest are autoimmune diseases, autoantibodies (i.e., molecules that may mark or cause these diseases), their molecular targets, their location in the body, and their associated clinical signs. Herein, we present AAbAAC (AutoAntibodies and Autoimmunity Annotated Corpus), a corpus of 115 abstracts selected from PubMed, where we manually annotated entities and their relationships. First, AAbAAC was used to evaluate several methods on the task of named entity recognition (NER), and secondly, to fine-tune NER models. Our study demonstrates the utility of AAbAAC for information extraction in the domain of autoimmunity, showing expected improvement in NER performance after finetuning. This illustrates the value of small-scale annotation efforts for specialized domains and contributes to the computational study of autoimmunity. The AAbAAC corpus is available at https://github.com/f-maury/AAbAAC.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了包含115篇摘要的自身免疫领域标注语料库AAbAAC，用于命名实体识别及关系抽取。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习和大语言模型驱动下的信息抽取在高度专业化的生物医学领域仍存在性能差距，通用模型难以处理领域特定复杂性。自身免疫领域的关键实体包括自身免疫疾病、自身抗体及其分子靶点、体内位置和临床症状，缺乏专门的标注语料库。
light_analysis.method: 从PubMed选取115篇摘要，手动标注实体及其关系，构建AAbAAC语料库。首先用于评估多种命名实体识别（NER）方法，其次微调NER模型。语料库公开于GitHub。
light_analysis.result: 微调后NER性能显著提升，证明了AAbAAC在自身免疫领域信息抽取中的实用性，以及小规模标注对专业领域的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: AAbAAC语料库填补了自身免疫领域标注资源空白，支持NER模型评估与微调，促进该领域计算研究。展示了小规模精心标注对专业领域的重要性。

title: No Hidden Prompts Needed! You Can Game AI Peer Review with Presentation-Only Revisions
abstract: As AI-generated reviews move from experimental tools into peer-review infrastructure, most robustness concerns have focused on explicit attacks such as hidden instructions and prompt injection. We study a harder and more policy-relevant failure mode: no hidden text, no prompt injection, and no changes to methods, experiments, figures, equations, proofs, or numerical results. The attacker modifies only presentation-level content, such as the abstract, contribution framing, related work, discussion, and narrative structure. We introduce adversarial repackaging: a closed-loop attack that uses AI-reviewer feedback to search for presentation-level revisions while keeping the scientific evidence fixed. Across three mainstream AI reviewers, adversarial repackaging achieves a 75.1% attack success rate and a mean score gain of +1.21/10. The effect is not explained by ordinary prose polishing. We also reveal that strategies that change how the reviewer interprets the paper, such as related-work repositioning and analytical discussion expansion, substantially outperform surface edits such as local polishing, table formatting, and algorithm boxes.   Our analysis reveals two deeper structural failure modes. First, AI reviewers are easier to impress than to convince: highlighting strengths reliably increases perceived merit, while attempts to dissolve weaknesses frequently backfire. Second, AI reviewers can confuse the appearance of addressing a limitation with actually resolving it, allowing unchanged evidence to be reinterpreted as stronger scientific contribution. These results show that the deployment risk is not only malicious hidden instructions, but the emergence of paper presentation itself as an optimization surface. We release a contamination-free rolling benchmark and attack framework for testing whether AI reviewers remain anchored to scientific content under presentation-only edits.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示AI审稿系统仅通过修改论文呈现形式即可被操纵，无需隐藏提示或更改科学内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI审稿中的显式攻击（如隐藏指令和提示注入），但忽略了一种更隐蔽且政策相关的失败模式：攻击者仅修改论文的呈现层面（如摘要、贡献框架、相关工作和叙事结构），而不改变方法、实验、结果等科学内容。这种攻击更难检测，且对审稿系统的可信度构成严重威胁。
light_analysis.method: 提出对抗性重包装攻击：一种闭环攻击方法，利用AI审稿人的反馈迭代搜索呈现层面的修订，同时保持科学证据不变。攻击者调整五类呈现元素：摘要、贡献框架、相关工作、讨论和叙事结构。通过三个主流AI审稿系统评估攻击效果，并分析不同策略的贡献。
light_analysis.result: 对抗性重包装攻击在三个AI审稿系统上实现75.1%的攻击成功率和平均+1.21/10的分数提升。效果远超普通润色。分析表明，改变审稿人解释方式的策略（如相关工作重新定位和分析性讨论扩展）显著优于表面编辑（如局部润色、表格格式化和算法框）。揭示深层结构缺陷：AI审稿人更易被“印象深刻”而非“说服”，且混淆“呈现解决局限”与“实际解决”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文指出AI审稿系统的部署风险不仅来自恶意隐藏指令，还来自论文呈现本身成为优化表面。强调需开发能锚定科学内容、不受呈现编辑影响的审稿模型。提供无污染滚动基准和攻击框架，供后续测试。该研究对AI辅助学术同行评审的可靠性和安全性具有重要警示意义。

title: Augmentation techniques for video surveillance in the visible and thermal spectral range
abstract: In intelligent video surveillance, cameras record image sequences during day and night. Commonly, this demands different sensors. To achieve a better performance it is not unusual to combine them. We focus on the case that a long-wave infrared camera records continuously and in addition to this, another camera records in the visible spectral range during daytime and an intelligent algorithm supervises the picked up imagery. More accurate, our task is multispectral CNN-based object detection. At first glance, images originating from the visible spectral range differ between thermal infrared ones in the presence of color and distinct texture information on the one hand and in not containing information about thermal radiation that emits from objects on the other hand. Although color can provide valuable information for classification tasks, effects such as varying illumination and specialties of different sensors still represent significant problems. Anyway, obtaining sufficient and practical thermal infrared datasets for training a deep neural network poses still a challenge. That is the reason why training with the help of data from the visible spectral range could be advantageous, particularly if the data, which has to be evaluated contains both visible and infrared data. However, there is no clear evidence of how strongly variations in thermal radiation, shape, or color information influence classification accuracy. To gain deeper insight into how Convolutional Neural Networks make decisions and what they learn from different sensor input data, we investigate the suitability and robustness of different augmentation techniques...

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究多光谱CNN目标检测中的数据增强技术，探讨可见光与热红外图像融合时增强方法的适用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能视频监控需处理日夜图像，常用可见光和热红外传感器协同工作。但热红外数据集获取困难，训练深度神经网络挑战大，而可见光数据易得。现有研究对热辐射、形状或颜色变化如何影响分类精度缺乏清晰认识，因此探究数据增强技术对多光谱目标检测的提升至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文聚焦多光谱CNN目标检测，使用长波红外相机连续记录，白天另用可见光相机，智能算法监控图像。对比可见光（颜色、纹理）与热红外（热辐射）特征差异，通过数据增强技术改造训练过程，研究不同增强方法对CNN决策和学习的影响，但具体增强技术细节未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但从研究目标推断，数据增强技术有望提升多光谱目标检测在数据不足情况下的性能。通过对比可见光和热红外数据下的分类精度变化，评估增强技术的适用性和鲁棒性，但缺乏量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统研究数据增强技术，揭示了CNN对可见光与红外图像特征的依赖，为多光谱目标检测提供方法论指导。增强技术可缓解热红外数据稀缺问题，提升模型泛化能力。未来可探索更适配的增强策略，并验证在更多场景下的效果。

title: SeamEdit: A Black-Box VLM-Agnostic Pipeline for Large-Image Semantic Editing
abstract: Semantic region editing for large images must satisfy two requirements at the same time: high generative quality and natural integration with surrounding content. Some related methods rely on white-box models and leave the strong generation capability of closed-source models underexplored. Directly applying closed-source models to tiled editing, however, introduces several failure modes: semantic deformation, canvas-level alignment drift, and visible seam artifacts. This paper presents SeamEdit, a training-free and model-agnostic pipeline that treats any VLM with inpainting capability as a black-box oracle. SeamEdit mitigates these issues through a five-stage post-hoc pipeline: overlay-based tile decomposition, black-box VLM inpainting, geometric and color-consistency correction, seam-risk-based multi-candidate ranking, and dynamic-programming curved seam fusion. The pipeline reduces seam visibility and supports semantic modification of arbitrary tile regions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SeamEdit，一种无需训练、模型无关的黑盒流水线，用于大图像语义编辑，消除平铺编辑中的接缝伪影。
light_analysis.motivation: 大图像语义编辑需同时满足高生成质量和自然融合，现有方法依赖白盒模型，未充分利用闭源模型的强生成能力。直接应用闭源模型进行平铺编辑会导致语义变形、画布对齐漂移和可见接缝伪影，因此需要一种模型无关的后处理方法来缓解这些问题。
light_analysis.method: SeamEdit是一个五阶段后处理流水线：1）基于覆盖的平铺分解，2）黑盒VLM修复，3）几何和颜色一致性校正，4）基于接缝风险的多候选排序，5）动态规划曲线接缝融合。该方法无需训练，可适配任何具有修复能力的VLM，支持任意平铺区域的语义修改。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供具体实验数据，但声称SeamEdit显著降低了接缝可见性，并支持对任意平铺区域进行语义修改，且无需重新训练模型。与直接平铺编辑相比，有效缓解了语义变形和画布对齐漂移。
light_analysis.conclusion: SeamEdit提供了一种简单有效的后处理方案，无需访问模型参数即可实现高质量大图像语义编辑。其模型无关特性使其易于集成到现有闭源VLM工作流中，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的几何校正和自适应平铺策略。

title: Nous: An Attempt to Extract and Inject the Cognition Behind Prediction-Market Behavior
abstract: As LLM agents proliferate in prediction markets and collective decision-making, they risk a cognitive monoculture: agents built on shared foundation models produce correlated forecasts, and recent measurement finds frontier-model errors correlated at r ~ 0.77. We ask whether human cognitive diversity can be recovered from behavior and transferred to LLM agents. Nous extracts a structured eight-dimension behavioral profile from real Polymarket trading activity and injects it into agents through prompts. Our central finding is a dissociation between the two halves of that pipeline. Extraction works, partially: across 100 wallets, 8 of 14 parameters are temporally stable (split-half ICC >= 0.5, bootstrap CI lower bound > 0.3; contrarian score reaches ICC ~ 0.9); wallets are identifiable from their profiles well above chance (top-1 retrieval 17-22% vs. 1% chance); and two of four pre-specified dimensions rank-correlate with future realized profit out-of-sample, though the correlations do not survive behavioral-confound controls. Prompt-level injection does not measurably transmit it: on a semantic embedding metric, structured injection shows no significant advantage over a length-matched control on any model, and the diversity it induces neither reduces ensemble error correlation nor improves Brier score -- a null that persists across exploratory checks on sampling temperature, profile diversity, and question difficulty. Measuring the prompts themselves locates the compression before the model: the structure-to-narrative translator emits near-uniform prompts whose spread does not track profile spread. We position Nous as measuring the cognitive-monoculture problem and the limits of a prompt-level remedy, motivating deeper, below-the-prompt injection (fine-tuning, activation steering). Code, frozen profiles, prompts, and model outputs: https://github.com/WillChienT/nous-paper
comment: 37 pages, 1 figure, 7 tables. Reproduction artifacts (code, frozen profiles, prompts, model outputs): https://github.com/WillChienT/nous-paper

light_analysis.overview: 尝试从预测市场交易行为中提取人类认知多样性并注入LLM代理，发现提取部分有效但注入无效，提示需要更深层干预。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在预测市场和集体决策中广泛使用，但基于共享基础模型的代理产生相关预测，导致认知单一文化风险。最新测量发现前沿模型间误差相关性高达r≈0.77，严重影响群体决策的多样性。因此，需要从人类行为中恢复认知多样性并转移给LLM代理，以降低预测偏差并提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 从真实Polymarket交易活动提取结构化八维行为特征（如逆势得分等），并通过prompt注入LLM代理。使用split-half可靠性、身份识别准确率、相关性分析等评估提取效果；采用语义嵌入度量比较结构化注入与长度匹配控制组对多种模型的影响，并检查采样温度、特征多样性等变量。
light_analysis.result: 提取部分：14个参数中8个时间稳定（split-half ICC≥0.5），逆势得分ICC≈0.9；钱包身份识别top-1检索17-22%（随机1%）；两个维度与未来利润秩相关，但无法控制行为混淆。注入部分：结构化注入未见优于控制组，未降低集成误差或提高Brier分数，且注入后prompt多样性未跟踪特征多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文量化了LLM代理的认知单一文化问题，并揭示了prompt层面注入的局限性，证明当前方法无法有效传递提取的认知多样性。研究推动了更深层干预（如微调、激活操纵）的必要性，为提升AI集体决策的鲁棒性和多样性提供了实证基础和方向。

title: TetherCache: Stabilizing Autoregressive Long-Form Video Generation with Gated Recall and Trusted Alignment
abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models provide a natural formulation for streaming and variable-length video generation by conditioning newly generated frames on previously generated content. However, extending these models to minute-level generation remains challenging: the limited KV-cache budget prevents the model from retaining the full history, while repeatedly conditioning on self-generated frames induces a context distribution shift that accumulates over time, leading to visual artifacts, quality degradation, and temporal drift. In this paper, we propose TetherCache, a training-free and plug-and-play cache management strategy for drift-resistant long video generation. TetherCache organizes the cache into sink, memory, and recent regions, and introduces two complementary mechanisms. First, GRAB (Gated Recall with Attention-Diversity Balancing) selects long-range memory frames using a gated score that combines attention-based relevance with temporal diversity, preserving informative yet diverse historical context under a fixed cache budget. Second, TAME (Trusted Alignment via Memory Editing) lightly edits newly recalled memory tokens by aligning their statistics to a trusted context distribution, reducing the pollution caused by drifted historical features. Built on Self-Forcing, TetherCache consistently improves long-video generation quality on VBench-Long across 30s, 60s, and 240s settings. In particular, for 240s generation, it substantially improves overall and semantic scores while reducing quality drift from 7.84 to 1.33, demonstrating its effectiveness for stable long-horizon autoregressive video diffusion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TetherCache，一种无需训练、即插即用的缓存管理策略，通过门控召回和可信对齐稳定自回归长视频生成，显著提升生成质量和时间稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型在扩展至分钟级生成时面临挑战：有限的KV缓存预算无法保留完整历史，且反复条件化自生成帧导致上下文分布漂移，累积后产生视觉伪像、质量退化和时间漂移。需要一种无需训练的策略来缓解这些漂移问题。
light_analysis.method: TetherCache将缓存组织为sink、memory和recent三个区域，并引入两种互补机制：GRAB（门控召回与注意力多样性平衡）利用基于注意力的相关性和时间多样性选择长程记忆帧；TAME（可信对齐通过记忆编辑）通过将新召回的记忆标记的统计量与可信上下文分布对齐，减少漂移历史特征的污染。
light_analysis.result: 基于Self-Forcing，TetherCache在VBench-Long的30秒、60秒和240秒设置下持续改善长视频生成质量。特别地，在240秒生成中，整体分数和语义分数显著提高，质量漂移从7.84降至1.33，展现了在长时程自回归视频扩散中的稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TetherCache通过无需训练、即插即用的缓存管理有效缓解了自回归长视频生成中的分布漂移问题，显著提升生成质量和时间一致性，为分钟级视频生成提供了实用的解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的记忆编辑策略或与其他视频生成模型的集成。

title: SAM-Deep-EIoU: Selective Mask Propagation for Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: Multi-object tracking has a heavy-tailed difficulty distribution: most frames are easy for a lightweight base tracker, while a small fraction are intrinsically hard. Video object segmentation (VOS) models can often preserve identity through the hard frames where the base tracker fails, but they are much more expensive in compute and memory. We propose selective mask propagation, a tracking algorithm that dispatches from a base tracker to a VOS model only on windows where an assignment-uncertainty signal fires. The base tracker's output is modified only when the VOS model makes a confident prediction that contradicts the base tracker's identity assignment; weak or inconclusive predictions preserve the base output. The method is training-free, treats both the base tracker and the VOS model as black boxes, and can benefit from replacing the VOS component with a more capable model. On DanceTrack, selective mask propagation improves three different base trackers. On SportsMOT, where identity preservation is central to sports analytics, SAM3-Deep-EIoU with global track association achieves state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark with 86.8 HOTA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性掩码传播算法，通过不确定性信号动态调用视频目标分割模型，在难帧上修正基跟踪器的身份分配，实现高效多目标跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 多目标跟踪中，大部分帧对轻量基跟踪器简单，但少量难帧易导致身份丢失；视频目标分割模型能保持身份但计算昂贵。现有方法无法有效权衡性能与效率，缺乏动态调用机制。
light_analysis.method: 选择性掩码传播：基跟踪器处理大部分帧，仅当分配不确定性信号触发时，在滑动窗口内调用VOS模型。只有当VOS模型做出自信且与基跟踪器矛盾的预测时，才修改输出。该方案无需训练，将基跟踪器和VOS视为黑盒，支持即插即用升级。
light_analysis.result: 在DanceTrack上，选择性掩码传播提升了三种不同基跟踪器的性能。在SportsMOT上，SAM3-Deep-EIoU结合全局轨迹关联达到SOTA，HOTA为86.8，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种轻量、可扩展的跟踪框架，通过选择性利用VOS模型在难帧上增强身份保持，同时保持高效。该方案具有即插即用特性，可受益于更强的VOS组件。未来可探索更高效的不确定性估计和VOS模型加速。

title: GeoCFNet: Geometry-Aware Confidence Field Network for Robot-Assisted Endoscopic Submucosal Dissection
abstract: Advanced surgical robotics has made robot-assisted endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) a promising approach for the en-bloc resection of large lesions, with the potential to reduce recurrence and improve long-term outcomes. However, the technical complexity and risk of complications in ESD demand stable and precise visual guidance to maintain an accurate dissection corridor and a safe tissue margin. Dense confidence fields provide an effective representation for this purpose by describing both the preferred dissection region and its spatial transition to surrounding tissue. However, reliable confidence field estimation remains challenging in dynamic endoscopic scenes due to smoke, specular highlights, tissue deformation, weak texture, and the thin geometric structure of the target region. To address these challenges, we formulate dissection guidance as a geometry-aware confidence field estimation problem and propose GeoCFNet, a geometry-aware confidence field network built on a pretrained DINOv3 backbone. GeoCFNet integrates a Token-Differentiated Fusion module to aggregate class-token context with dense patch representations, a SegFormer decoder for confidence regression, and Geometry-Aware Spatial Regularization (GASR) to preserve spatial coherence and local geometric transitions. Experimental results show that GeoCFNet achieves RMSE 0.0480, PSNR 27.1995, SSIM 0.3397, and CC 0.2466, indicating accurate and geometrically stable confidence field estimation for robot-assisted ESD guidance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoCFNet，一种几何感知置信场网络，用于机器人辅助内镜黏膜下剥离术的稳定视觉引导。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人辅助ESD需要稳定精确的视觉引导以维持准确的剥离通道和安全组织边缘。密集置信场能描述优选剥离区域及其空间过渡，但在动态内镜场景中，烟雾、高光、组织变形、弱纹理和目标区域薄几何结构导致可靠估计困难。现有方法无法有效应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: GeoCFNet基于预训练DINOv3骨干，集成Token-Differentiated Fusion模块聚合类标记上下文与密集补丁表示，使用SegFormer解码器进行置信回归，并引入几何感知空间正则化(GASR)保持空间一致性和局部几何过渡。该方法将剥离引导形式化为几何感知置信场估计问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，GeoCFNet在置信场估计任务上取得RMSE 0.0480、PSNR 27.1995、SSIM 0.3397和CC 0.2466，证明其估计准确且几何稳定，适用于机器人辅助ESD引导。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoCFNet有效解决了动态内镜场景中置信场估计的挑战，为机器人辅助ESD提供了精确稳定的视觉引导，具有临床转化潜力。未来工作可探索轻量化或实时性优化。

title: A Multi-Modal Framework with Cross-Subject Pseudo-Labeling and Semantic Alignment for Micro-Gesture Recognition
abstract: Micro-gestures (MGs) are spontaneous and subtle body movements that frequently convey hidden human emotions. Recognizing MGs in untrimmed videos remains highly challenging due to their extremely low signal-to-noise ratio, severe long-tailed class distribution, and the inherent domain shift encountered in cross-subject evaluation scenarios. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive multi-modal framework for Track 1 of the 4th MiGA-IJCAI Challenge. To capture fine-grained representations, we design a saliency-guided multi-modal extraction pipeline integrating 68-keypoint skeleton joint coordinates, 3D heatmap volumes, and high-resolution RGB visual features. We introduce a gentle square-root smoothed weighting mechanism paired with an Orthogonal Semantic Embedding Loss to protect tail classes without compromising overall recognition capabilities. More importantly, to bridge the cross-subject generalization gap, we propose a Cross-Modal Pseudo-Labeling (CMPL) strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation, which significantly boosts single-modal robustness. A temperature-scaled soft-voting mechanism is finally utilized to alleviate overconfidence during late fusion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves a competitive F1-score of 68.13\%, securing the 4th place.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态框架结合跨主体伪标签与语义对齐，用于微手势识别，在MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛中取得68.13% F1分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 微手势（MGs）是自发且细微的身体动作，常传达隐藏的人类情感。在未修剪视频中识别MGs极具挑战，因为信噪比极低、类别分布严重长尾，且跨主体评估场景存在固有域偏移。现有方法在这些问题上表现不佳，缺乏对尾类的保护和跨主体泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 设计显著性引导的多模态提取管道，整合68关键点骨骼坐标、3D热图体积和高分辨率RGB特征。引入温和平方根平滑加权机制与正交语义嵌入损失，保护尾类。提出跨模态伪标记（CMPL）策略进行无监督域适应，提升单模态鲁棒性。最后使用温度缩放软投票机制缓解过自信。
light_analysis.result: 在4th MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛Track 1上，框架达到F1-score 68.13%，排名第四。实验表明CMPL显著增强了跨主体泛化能力，加权机制有效处理长尾分布。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一个综合多模态微手势识别框架，通过设计独特的损失函数和伪标记策略，解决了低信噪比、长尾分布和域偏移问题。获得了有竞争力的结果。未来可探索更高效的跨主体适应方法。

title: CausalMoE: A Billion-Scale Multimodal Foundation Model for Granger Causal Discovery with Pattern-Routed Heterogeneous Experts
abstract: Granger Causal Discovery (GCD) is fundamental for analyzing temporal dependencies in complex systems. However, existing neural GCD methods predominantly rely on a "one-size-fits-all" paradigm, struggling to capture distribution shifts and dynamic regime changes inherent in real-world time series. This often leads to entangled representations and spurious causal graphs. In this paper, we propose CausalMoE, a billion-scale multimodal Granger causal foundation model that explicitly models patch-level heterogeneity. CausalMoE introduces a Pattern-Routed Mixture of Heterogeneous Experts, which dynamically identifies latent temporal patterns and routes patches to specialized domain experts, effectively decoupling regime-specific mechanisms from shared dynamics. To ensure interpretable graph recovery, we design a Causality-Aware Self-Attention mechanism operating across variables, yielding sparse Granger causal graphs via proximal optimization. Furthermore, CausalMoE is the first to integrate LLMs and VLMs to align numerical signals with textual and visual priors, regularizing causal estimation in complex scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalMoE establishes a new state-of-the-art on fully supervised benchmarks, while effectively generalizing to few-shot settings where traditional methods fail.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于模式路由异构专家的大规模多模态Granger因果基础模型CausalMoE，通过显式建模patch级异质性实现因果图恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经Granger因果发现方法采用'一刀切'范式，难以捕捉真实时间序列中的分布偏移和动态机制变化，导致表示纠缠和虚假因果图。因此亟需一种能显式建模异质性、动态识别潜在时间模式的方法，以解耦不同机制并提升因果发现的准确性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Pattern-Routed Mixture of Heterogeneous Experts，动态识别潜在时间模式并将patches路由到领域专家，解耦机制特定动态与共有动态。设计Causality-Aware Self-Attention跨变量操作，通过近端优化生成稀疏因果图。首次集成大语言模型和视觉语言模型，对齐数值信号与文本/视觉先验，正则化因果估计。
light_analysis.result: 在全监督基准上达到新SOTA，有效泛化到传统方法失败的少样本场景。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但表明该方法在完全监督和少样本设定下均优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于显式建模时间序列中patch级异质性，并首次集成多模态先验以提升Granger因果发现。该工作为处理分布偏移和动态机制变化提供了新范式，具有较高的学术与应用价值。未来可探索降低计算开销及扩展到更大规模多模态数据。

title: Quality-Preserving Imperceptible Adversarial Attack on Skeleton-based Human Action Recognition
abstract: Adversarial attacks on skeletal human action recognition have received significant attention. However, existing methods typically introduce noise-like perturbations that degrade motion quality post-attack, and thereby are inherently perceptible with recent advancements in S-HAR systems. We discover that this degradation stems from the gap between empirical and true risks during the optimization process of previous adversarial attacks. To address this issue, we propose an attack where adversarial motions are obtained without compromising their motion quality. To minimize the risk gap and preserve motion quality, we propose a distribution-based adversarial attack method without introducing noise-like perturbations. To faithfully evaluate the motion quality, we propose a new metric that aligns with human perception on real-world naturalness. Experiments have been conducted on the state-of-the-art S-HAR methods across two datasets, demonstrating the superiority of our method in both the attack success rate and the post-attack motion quality through qualitative and quantitative analyses. The success of our quality-preserving attack application and distribution-based method raises serious concerns about the robustness of action recognizers, highlighting the need for further enhancements in this domain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于分布优化的质量保持对抗攻击，避免噪声扰动，并设计人类感知对齐的运动质量指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有骨骼动作识别对抗攻击引入噪声扰动，降低运动质量，易被最新S-HAR系统察觉。作者发现这源于优化中经验风险与真实风险的差距。解决此问题对提升攻击隐蔽性和评估真实性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出分布对抗攻击方法，通过缩小经验与真实风险差距来保持运动质量，避免噪声扰动。同时提出与人类感知对齐的新运动质量度量。在两大数据集上对SOTA识别方法进行攻击。
light_analysis.result: 在攻击成功率和攻击后运动质量上均优于现有方法，通过定性和定量分析验证。质量保持攻击的成功暴露了动作识别器的脆弱性，需增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作强调保持运动质量的对抗攻击重要性，所提方法有效平衡攻击性和质量。研究呼吁提升S-HAR系统鲁棒性，为未来防御研究提供基准。

title: SciR: A Controllable Benchmark for Scientific Reasoning in LLMs
abstract: Three paradigmatic forms of inference recur across scientific reasoning: deduction, induction, and causal abduction. Reliably evaluating LLMs on these in scientific settings is currently out of reach: scientific benchmarks built on human annotations are costly and lack mechanistic ground truth, while synthetic logical-reasoning benchmarks do not resemble real scientific documents. We introduce SciR, a benchmark that combines multi-paradigm reasoning with controllable scientific rendering, anchored on three paradigmatic scientific problems. Tasks are generated from formal objects (deduction tree, inductive rule hypothesis, causal graph) to guarantee verifiable answers, then rendered into multi-document scientific discourse via per-track domain-tuned genres. The construction lets us independently vary two difficulty axes: how hard it is to extract the key information needed for inference, and how hard the principled inference itself is. We test six models. Both axes hurt every model, and their effects compound. The rendering even hurts neurosymbolic pipelines, which hand inference to a verified solver. The two axes yield a per-model extraction-vs-inference profile: for instance, reasoning models like deepseek-r1 mostly surpass non-reasoning instruct models on the inference axis. To our knowledge, SciR is the first multi-paradigm scientific-reasoning benchmark with parametric control on both extraction and inference difficulty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SciR基准，结合多种推理范式与可控科学文本渲染，用于评估大语言模型的科学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有科学推理基准要么依赖高成本人工标注且缺乏机械真值，要么是合成逻辑推理基准但不贴近真实科学文档。需要一种既能保证答案可验证又能模拟真实科学文本复杂度的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 从形式对象（演绎树、归纳规则假设、因果图）生成任务以保证可验证答案，然后通过领域适配的体裁渲染成多文档科学论述。独立控制两个难度轴：信息提取难度和推理本身难度。
light_analysis.result: 测试六个模型，两个难度轴均降低各模型性能，且效应叠加。渲染甚至影响神经符号流水线。推理模型如deepseek-r1主要在推理轴超越非推理指令模型，揭示了提取与推理的独立能力轮廓。
light_analysis.conclusion: SciR是首个在提取和推理难度上具有参数化控制的多范式科学推理基准。能为LLM的提取vs推理能力提供精细剖析，有助于开发更可靠的科学推理系统。

title: Otters++: A Time-to-first-spike Based Energy Efficient Optical Spiking Transformer
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are promising for energy-efficient inference, and time-to-first-spike (TTFS) coding is especially attractive because each neuron fires at most once. In practice, however, this benefit is often reduced by the cost of computing a temporal decay term and multiplying it by the synaptic weight. We address this issue by turning a physical hardware "bug," the natural signal decay in optoelectronic devices, into the main computation of TTFS, named Otters++. Specifically, we use the measured decay of a custom In$_2$O$_3$ optoelectronic synapse to directly realize the TTFS temporal term, removing the need for explicit digital decay computation. To scale this idea to Transformer models, we establish a layer-wise functional equivalence between the Otters++ and a quantized neural network (QNN), and develop a hybrid training method that uses device-faithful SNN computation in the forward pass and QNN straight-through gradients through the equivalent QNN path in the backward pass, together with model distillation. This avoids differentiation through discrete first-spike events and reduces the over-sparsity problem in direct TTFS-SNN training. We further make training aware of measured device noise by sampling run-to-run variation, and refine the system-level energy model by accounting for device sharing and multi-hop communication. On GLUE dataset, Otters++ improves the average score to 84.17\% while maintaining a clear energy advantage over prior spiking Transformer baselines. These results show that physically grounded TTFS computing can be efficient, trainable, and robust under realistic hardware effects.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Otters++，利用光电子器件的自然信号衰减实现TTFS计算，构建节能光学脉冲Transformer。
