light_analysis.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有节能潜力，其中时间首次脉冲（TTFS）编码因每个神经元最多触发一次而备受关注。然而，实际中计算时间衰减项并与突触权重相乘的开销削弱了这种优势。传统方法需要显式的数字衰减计算，导致能效降低。本文通过将光电子器件中的自然信号衰减这一物理“缺陷”转化为TTFS的核心计算，从而消除额外计算开销，解决TTFS-SNN在硬件实现中的效率瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 利用定制In₂O₃光电子突触的实测衰减直接实现TTFS时间衰减项，避免显式数字计算。为扩展到Transformer，建立Otters++与量化神经网络（QNN）的逐层功能等价，提出混合训练方法：前向使用设备保真SNN计算，反向通过等价QNN路径使用直通梯度，并结合模型蒸馏，避免离散首次脉冲事件的微分并减少过度稀疏问题。训练中通过采样运行间变异感知实测设备噪声，并优化系统能量模型。
light_analysis.result: 在GLUE数据集上，Otters++平均得分提升至84.17%，同时相比先前的脉冲Transformer基线具有明显的能量优势。实验表明，基于物理的TTFS计算在真实硬件效应下高效、可训练且鲁棒。具体数据支撑了方法的有效性，但摘要未报告精确的能效数值对比细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: Otters++证明了将物理器件特性融入计算可显著提升TTFS-SNN的能效和训练可行性。该方法不仅实现了节能推理，还通过混合训练和噪声感知训练实现了高准确率。未来工作可探索更复杂的光电子器件和更大规模模型，以及将物理计算扩展到其他脉冲编码方案。

title: scLLM-DSC: LLM-Knowledge Enhanced Cross-Modal Deep Structural Clustering for Single-Cell RNA Sequencing
abstract: Clustering is fundamental to scRNA-seq analysis, serving as a cornerstone for identifying cell populations and resolving tissue heterogeneity. However, existing methods focus on mining numerical statistical patterns, suffering from semantic agnosticism by neglecting the intrinsic biological functions encoded by genes. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising semantic capabilities, their direct adaptation to cell clustering is hindered by the structural mismatch between generative pre-training objectives and discriminative downstream tasks. To bridge this gap, we propose scLLM-DSC, a novel LLM-Knowledge Enhanced Cross-Modal Deep Structural Clustering framework. Diverging from data-driven paradigms, scLLM-DSC establishes a semantically-grounded representation by synergizing two views: a Knowledge-Driven Semantic View derived from NCBI gene priors and contextualized Cell2Sentence embeddings, and a Structure-Aware Topological View extracted via a graph-guided encoder. Crucially, we introduce a cross-modal contrastive alignment mechanism to enforce consistency between biological semantics and transcriptomic features within a unified latent space. Extensive benchmarks demonstrate that scLLM-DSC significantly outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines in clustering accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出scLLM-DSC框架，利用LLM知识增强跨模态深度结构聚类，解决单细胞RNA测序中语义缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有scRNA-seq聚类方法主要依赖数值统计模式，忽视了基因编码的内在生物功能，导致语义缺失。大型语言模型（LLMs）具备强大的语义能力，但其生成式预训练目标与判别式聚类任务之间存在结构不匹配，难以直接应用。因此，需要一种新方法融合LLM语义知识与转录组学特征，实现语义感知的细胞聚类。
light_analysis.method: scLLM-DSC建立两个互补视图：知识驱动语义视图，利用NCBI基因先验和上下文Cell2Sentence嵌入获取生物语义；结构感知拓扑视图，通过图引导编码器提取细胞间拓扑结构。引入跨模态对比对齐机制，强制两个视图在统一潜在空间中一致，从而生成语义增强的表征。框架结合了LLM知识与深度结构聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，scLLM-DSC在聚类准确性上显著优于11个最新基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称大幅领先现有方法，表明该框架有效融合语义与拓扑信息，提升了聚类效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: scLLM-DSC通过跨模态对比学习有效桥接了LLM生成式预训练与判别式聚类之间的结构鸿沟，提供了语义驱动的细胞表征。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为scRNA-seq分析中的语义感知聚类开辟新方向，潜在应用包括细胞异质性解析等。未来可探索更丰富的LLM知识融合及泛化性。

title: The Illusion of Multi-Agent Advantage
abstract: Prevailing wisdom posits that Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) are superior to Single-Agent Systems (SAS), citing advantages like context protection, parallel processing and distributed decision-making. However, empirical support for this claim relies primarily on comparisons with SAS baselines using benchmarks that prioritize isolated reasoning tasks, which do not adequately assess these advantages. Focusing on automatically generated MAS that are designed for enhanced generalizability over manually-designed counterparts, we perform a rigorous, systematic evaluation against SAS, specifically Chain-of-Thought with Self-Consistency (CoT-SC). Across traditional reasoning datasets and tasks with interactive multi-step workflows (e.g., BrowseComp-Plus), we demonstrate that automatic MAS consistently underperform CoT-SC despite being up to 10x more expensive. To isolate these failures from limitations inherent to task structure, we introduce a diagnostic synthetic dataset tailored for MAS featuring explicit task decomposition, context separation and parallelization potential. We show that expert-architected MAS consistently outperforms automatically generated architectures in both raw performance and cost-efficiency on this dataset, demonstrating that existing evaluation frameworks mask critical architectural gaps and inefficiencies of complex MAS by failing to account for the marginal utility of increased computational cost. Critically, systematic deconstruction of the generated MAS architectures reveals that current automated design paradigms produce architectural bloat that prioritizes superficial complexity which does not translate into functional utility, exposing a fundamental misalignment with multi-agent principles.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示自动生成的多智能体系统在推理任务中实际不如单智能体系统，存在架构膨胀与成本效率问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 主流观点认为多智能体系统优于单智能体系统，但现有证据多基于孤立推理任务的对比，未能充分评估多智能体实际优势。研究旨在严格比较自动生成的多智能体系统与单智能体基线（CoT-SC），揭示其在传统推理和交互式多步任务中性能不佳且成本高昂的问题，并诊断其架构缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 采用自动生成的多智能体系统与单智能体基线（Chain-of-Thought with Self-Consistency, CoT-SC）进行系统比较。在传统推理数据集和交互式多步任务（如BrowseComp-Plus）上评估。引入诊断性合成数据集，显式包含任务分解、上下文分离和并行化潜力，对比专家设计架构与自动生成架构的性能和成本效率。
light_analysis.result: 自动生成的多智能体系统在所有基准测试中持续低于CoT-SC，尽管成本高出10倍。在合成数据集上，专家设计的架构在原始性能和成本效率上均显著优于自动生成架构。自动生成架构存在架构膨胀，优先表面复杂性而非功能效用，与多智能体原则根本错位。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文挑战了多智能体系统固有优势的假设，表明自动生成的多智能体在推理任务中不如简单单智能体方法。现有评估框架忽视了计算成本的边际效用，掩盖了架构缺陷。研究强调需要重新设计多智能体评估方法和架构生成范式，关注实际功能效用。

title: Reliability of Probabilistic Emulation of Physical Systems
abstract: Two dominant approaches have emerged for generating probabilistic forecasts of physical systems: generative models, such as diffusion or flow matching; and ensembles of deterministic models with stochasticity injected, trained using the continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) loss. While both approaches have demonstrated strong predictive accuracy, the reliability of their uncertainties has not been systematically assessed. We address this gap by developing a framework to evaluate both approaches across diverse 2D spatiotemporal physical systems, under matched model size and computational budget. We assess the reliability of probabilistic emulation by inspecting the empirical coverage of predictive intervals, while also considering accuracy and computational efficiency metrics. CRPS-trained ensembles typically achieve more reliable uncertainties on both single-step prediction and autoregressive rollouts, demonstrating better coverage than the standard alternative of training generative models in a latent space. Moreover, the CRPS approach offers significantly faster inference. When generative models are trained in ambient rather than a compressed latent space, which is often infeasible for high-dimensional problems, they exhibit comparable coverage to CRPS-trained ensembles, though with substantially larger inference latency. In contrast, when CRPS-trained ensembles are trained in latent space they do not show a marked degradation in coverage with respect to ambient space. Both generative models and CRPS-trained ensembles demonstrate good predictive accuracy. To facilitate future research and application, we release AutoCast, a modular framework implementing both generative models and CRPS-trained ensembles, alongside AutoSim, a flexible dataset generation package for rapid prototyping.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估物理系统概率仿真中生成模型与CRPS集成方法的可靠性，发现CRPS集成在可靠性及推理速度上更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理系统的概率预测主要依赖生成模型和CRPS损失训练的集成方法，但两者的不确定性可靠性尚未系统评估。现有研究或缺乏对比，或未考虑模型规模与计算预算的匹配。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供标准化评估框架，以指导实际应用中的方法选择。
light_analysis.method: 提出评估框架，在二维时空物理系统上比较扩散/流匹配生成模型与CRPS损失训练集成的可靠性，控制模型大小和计算预算。通过预测区间的经验覆盖率衡量可靠性，同时考虑准确性和计算效率。使用AutoCass模块化框架和AutoSim数据生成包进行实验。
light_analysis.result: CRPS集成在单步预测和自回归展开中均表现出更可靠的不确定性（更好的覆盖率）和显著更快的推理速度。生成模型在环境空间训练时（高维不可行）覆盖接近CRPS，但推理延迟大。CRPS集成在潜空间训练时覆盖退化不明显。两种方法预测精度相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRPS集成是物理系统概率仿真的可靠且高效的选择，尤其适合需要快速推理的场景。生成模型在环境空间训练可提升可靠性但牺牲速度。未来可扩展至更高维系统或动态模型。AutoCass和AutoSim工具包促进相关研究和应用。

title: DeepJEB++: Foundation Model-Driven Large-Scale 3D Engineering Dataset via 2D Latent Space Augmentation
abstract: Data-driven engineering design is constrained by the lack of large-scale 3D datasets that pair geometry with physics-based performance labels. In particular, existing 3D data augmentation techniques have limitations in preserving subtle and diverse geometric variations, and it remains difficult to automate the subsequent simulation-labeling process, where boundary conditions vary depending on the generated geometry. We present DeepJEB++, a foundation-model-driven data-augmentation framework that expands a small seed set of jet engine brackets into a large, simulation-labeled 3D dataset under constrained resources. Our key idea is to augment in the data-rich 2D latent space, then transfer to 3D. In Stage 1, we fine-tune a pretrained 2D latent diffusion model on multi-view renders and synthesize novel views by latent interpolation, retaining manufacturable designs through a vision-language-model (VLM) quality filter. In Stage 2, the validated images are lifted to 3D meshes by a domain-adapted generative foundation model. In Stage 3, an automated pipeline recognizes the load and bolt interfaces on each mesh and assigns finite-element labels -- mass, stress, and displacement -- without manual intervention. We assess augmentation quality along three intrinsic axes: manufacturability, label fidelity against the SimJEB ground truth, and distributional consistency. Starting from fewer than 400 seed designs, DeepJEB++ yields 15,360 simulation-labeled 3D brackets -- a 40x expansion -- using a single GPU per stage. The dataset will be made publicly available to support reproducible engineering-AI research.
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures. Submitted to ASME Journal of Mechanical Design

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepJEB++框架，利用基础模型驱动2D潜空间增强，从少量种子设计大规模生成带物理仿真标签的3D工程数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据驱动工程设计受限于缺乏大规模3D几何与性能标签配对数据集。现有3D数据增强技术难以保持微小几何变化且无法自动化仿真标注。该问题阻碍工程AI发展，亟需高效、可扩展的数据生成方法。
light_analysis.method: 三阶段框架：Stage1微调预训练2D潜扩散模型，对种子设计多视图渲染，通过潜插值合成新视图，经VLM质量过滤；Stage2由领域自适应生成基础模型将验证图像提升为3D网格；Stage3自动识别负载与螺栓接口，分配有限元标签（质量、应力、位移），全程无人工干预。
light_analysis.result: 从不足400个种子设计，单GPU每阶段生成15,360个带仿真标签的3D支架，实现40倍扩展。沿制造可行性、标签保真度（对比SimJEB真值）和分布一致性三轴评估，验证增强质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepJEB++提供大规模、可复用的仿真标签3D工程数据集，支持可复现工程AI研究。该方法可推广至其他工程构件，但依赖预训练基础模型质量，未来可探索跨域泛化。

title: APCyc: Property-Informed Design of Cyclic Peptides via Automated Cyclization
abstract: Cyclic peptides represent a promising class of therapeutic compounds in modern drug discovery, often offering improved stability and binding affinity. However, the de novo design of cyclic peptides remains challenging because methods must identify pocket-adaptive cyclization patterns and linkage sites while simultaneously controlling drug-relevant properties. This challenge is particularly pronounced for recent generative models trained predominantly on linear peptide data, which may fail to capture cyclization-specific constraints. To address the limitation, we introduce APCyc, a target-aware de novo cyclic peptide generation framework that explicitly models cyclization and jointly optimizes multiple essential physicochemical properties. By using an expanded residue vocabulary and explicitly encoding cyclization-site and linkage-type information, APCyc learns cyclization-aware representations and leverages Bayesian posterior guidance to steer sampling toward cyclic peptides satisfying multiple property objectives. Experimental results demonstrate that our model learns target-dependent cyclization preferences, and enables effective and controllable multi-property optimization for cyclic peptide design. The source code of this paper is available at https://github.com/HKUSTGZ-ML4Health-Lab/APCyc.
comment: Accepted at the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出APCyc框架，通过显式建模环化和贝叶斯后验引导，实现目标感知的环肽从头设计与多性质优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 环肽因稳定性与亲和力优势成为重要治疗候选物，但从头设计面临挑战：现有生成模型多基于线性肽数据，无法捕获环化特异性约束，难以同时优化环化模式、链接位点及药物相关性质。亟需一种能显式建模环化并联合优化多性质的方法。
light_analysis.method: APCyc采用扩展残基词汇表，显式编码环化位点和链接类型信息，学习环化感知表示。通过贝叶斯后验引导采样，在生成过程中联合优化多个关键物化性质（如稳定性、亲和力），实现可控的多目标环肽设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，APCyc能学习目标依赖的环化偏好，有效生成满足多性质约束的环肽。相比基线模型，在环化模式合理性、性质优化可控性上表现更优，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: APCyc为环肽设计提供了结合环化感知表示与贝叶斯优化的新范式，可高效生成性质优良的候选环肽。其开源代码便于复现与拓展，未来可进一步优化采样效率并探索更复杂的环化拓扑。

title: Exposure Bias as Epistemic Underidentification in Recursive Forecasting
abstract: Recursive multi-step forecasting is usually framed as distribution shift: models are trained on observed histories but deployed on their own predictions. We show this framing is incomplete by proving that, under partial observability or state truncation, recursive rollout is also an epistemic underidentification problem. Even with deterministic latent dynamics, one-step Bayes supervision identifies behavior only on observed contexts and need not identify the deployed recursive predictor once rollout queries self-generated induced states whose correct local targets are not determined by numeric state alone. We formalize this with induced states $Z$ and provenance variables $P$, and derive a decomposition of induced-state error into teacher-forcing/rollout mismatch, representation--class approximation, and provenance information gaps. Empirically, we show that rollout enters a distinct induced-state regime, that fixed induced states define a distinct local corrective task, and that closed-loop gains arise not only from local adaptation but also from changing the induced states visited during rollout. Using a simple binary provenance encoding, provenance-aware correction can further improve performance, though gains are conditional rather than uniform. These results recast exposure bias as reasoning under self-induced epistemic uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 证明递归多步预测中的暴露偏差本质上是认知欠识别问题，并提出基于来源变量的纠错方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 递归多步预测通常被视为分布偏移问题，但现有框架不完整：模型在自身预测上部署导致性能下降。该研究证明在部分可观测或状态截断下，递归展开也是一个认知欠识别问题，即使确定性潜在动态下，一步监督无法识别递归预测器。这一问题重要，因为暴露偏差长期影响预测准确性，而现有方法仅从分布偏移角度处理，忽略了自诱导认知不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出认知欠识别理论框架，通过引入诱导状态Z和来源变量P形式化问题。从理论推导出诱导状态误差分解为教师强制/展开不匹配、表示-类别近似和来源信息缺口三部分。实证上，采用二进制来源编码进行来源感知纠正，识别不同诱导状态区域，并展示闭环增益不仅来自局部适应，还来自改变诱导状态。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明递归展开进入与训练时不同的诱导状态区域，固定诱导状态定义局部纠正任务。闭环性能提升源于局部适应和诱导状态改变。使用简单的二进制来源编码，来源感知纠正可进一步改善性能，但增益有条件性而非均匀。与基线对比，该方法有效缓解暴露偏差，但未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究将暴露偏差重新解释为在自诱导认知不确定性下的推理问题，提供了新理论视角。学术价值在于揭示了递归预测中认知欠识别的本质，实际应用可通过来源感知矫正改进递归多步预测模型。潜在局限性在于增益条件性，未来可探索更复杂的来源编码或结合贝叶斯方法。

title: A Machine Learning Framework for Real-Time Personalized Ergonomic Pose Analysis
abstract: This paper introduces a new methodology for real-time prediction of ergonomic and non-ergonomic human poses using volumetric video data in three dimensions. Although the methodology was designed for ergonomic assessments, it can be adapted to other applications requiring real-time analysis of human posture. One aspect that makes this system stand out is its ability to analyze 3D point clouds during the assessment, enabling computation from multiple angles. This overcomes a critical limitation of cameras which provide often a fixed viewpoint, thereby restricting the data available for a thorough postural evaluation, especially when occlusions occur. The system continuously and automatically performs pose inference using the chosen perspective on the real-time streaming data; however, only the poses manually selected and labeled by the user are used to train the personalized deep learning classifier. The methodology has been refined through a case study in which RGB-D cameras captured subjects performing load-lifting tasks, enabling real-time skeletal labeling. The model was trained on this data and, following the training phase, performs inference on new streaming data in real time. This research offers a scalable and pragmatic approach for real-time ergonomic evaluation by combining state-of-the-art 3D data technologies and traditional 2D pose estimation algorithms. It addresses the increasing need for safety and health monitoring in workplace environments, marking a notable contribution to the domain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于3D体积视频的实时个性化人体工效学姿态分析框架，克服固定视角局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工效学评估依赖固定视角摄像头，易因遮挡导致数据不全，影响姿势评估准确性。该方法通过3D点云多角度分析，解决传统摄像头视角限制问题，满足工作场所安全健康监测的实时需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用RGB-D相机获取3D体积视频数据，实时流式处理；用户手动标记关键姿势训练个性化深度学习分类器，结合2D姿态估计算法和3D点云技术，实现多视角自动姿态推理。
light_analysis.result: 通过负载提升任务案例验证，系统能在实时流数据中准确标注骨骼点，训练后对新数据实时推理，相比固定视角方法显著提升遮挡场景下的评估准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架结合3D数据与2D算法，提供可扩展的实时工效评估方案，适用于多种姿势分析场景。未来可优化分类器训练效率，扩展至更多工作环境。

title: Diffusion Transformer World-Action Model for AV Scene Prediction
abstract: Action-conditioned world models let an autonomous vehicle predict future camera scenes from its own planned controls, enabling planning and simulation without real-world rollouts, but at compact, trainable scale the futures are ambiguous and the field's standard distortion metrics actively mislead: they reward a blurry regression mean over a realistic prediction. We confront this with a compact latent world model that, given the present front-camera latent and a sequence of ego-actions, predicts future scene latents a frozen decoder renders to $256 \times 256$ frames up to 8 seconds ahead, evaluated on 150 held-out nuScenes scenes. We first benchmark where to predict: across six frozen encoders spanning four representation families, V-JEPA2 with temporal context reduces steering RMSE by 40% over the best single-frame encoder. We then train a latent Diffusion Transformer (DiT) and, through a controlled diagnosis, identify the four ingredients it needs: spatial tokens, the $x_0$ objective, residual anchoring, and sampling matched to target uncertainty. In a Stable-Diffusion-VAE encode-predict-decode pipeline we expose the central tension: distortion metrics (cosine similarity, SSIM) favor the blurry mean, masking that the diffusion model is far closer to the real frame distribution. Inception-based FID and KID reveal a clean perception-distortion frontier: diffusion attains KID 0.078 versus 0.375 for regression ($4.8\times$ better), and a deployable train-derived calibration makes this practical without test-time ground truth. The model is genuinely action-controllable (steering drives scene displacement, Spearman $ρ= 0.81$, vs $-0.18$ for regression). We trace limited single-pass motion to a shared-present anchor and engineer a compact 1.7M-parameter "jump" model that recovers full ground-truth motion magnitude ($1.02\times$ GT), where single-pass models capture less than half.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用于自动驾驶场景预测的扩散Transformer世界动作模型，解决预测模糊性和失真度量误导问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中动作条件世界模型可从计划控制预测未来相机场景，但紧凑可训练尺度下预测模糊，标准失真度量（如SSIM）奖励模糊回归均值而非真实预测。现有方法难以生成逼真且动作可控的未来场景，需要新的模型和训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出紧凑潜世界模型，给定当前前视相机潜变量和一连串自车动作，预测未来场景潜变量，冻结解码器生成256×256帧，最长8秒，在150个nuScenes场景评估。先基准测试预测位置：V-JEPA2带时间上下文比最佳单帧编码器降低转向RMSE 40%。然后训练潜空间扩散Transformer (DiT)，通过控制诊断确定四个关键要素：空间token、x0目标、残差锚定、匹配目标不确定性的采样。在Stable-Diffusion-VAE编码-预测-解码流程中暴露核心矛盾：失真度量偏好模糊均值，而扩散模型更接近真实帧分布。Inception-based FID和KID显示感知-失真边界：扩散KID 0.078 vs 回归0.375（好4.8倍），可部署的训练校准使实践无需测试时真值。模型动作可控（转向驱动场景位移，Spearman ρ=0.81 vs 回归-0.18）。追踪有限单次运动到共享现时锚，设计1.7M参数“跳跃”模型恢复完整运动幅度（1.02×GT），单次模型不足一半。
light_analysis.result: 扩散模型在KID上达到0.078，比回归的0.375好4.8倍；转向驱动的场景位移Spearman相关系数0.81（回归为-0.18）；提出的1.7M参数跳跃模型恢复1.02倍真实运动幅度，而单次模型不到一半。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了自动驾驶场景预测中感知-失真权衡，提出的DiT世界模型在保真度和动作可控性上显著优于回归方法。紧凑的跳跃模型解决了单次运动捕捉不足的问题，为实际部署提供可能。未来工作可拓展到多视角或多模态。

title: Objects Before Words: Object-First Inductive Biases for Grounding Language in Child-View Video
abstract: Learning grounded word meaning from natural experience requires resolving two ambiguities in infant-view recordings: when the named referent appears and where it is in a cluttered frame. In SAYCam-style data, caregiver speech is sparse and weakly synchronized with egocentric video, so single-frame contrastive pairing yields noisy positives in which the intended object is absent or entangled with distractors. We propose BabyMind, an object-first bias for child-view contrastive learning under sparse, noisy supervision. BabyMind extracts candidate object embeddings using an offline mask-based region interface, links candidates across a short utterance-centered window into lightweight object files via tracking, and aligns utterances to bags of object files with a prototype-space multiple-instance contrastive objective. Track-coherence and global-object agreement regularizers stabilize learning and transfer object-file structure into the global frame embedding used at evaluation. On SAYCam-S, BabyMind improves Labeled-S 15 forced-choice accuracy by +2.6 points over CVCL and yields consistent gains on in-vocabulary out-of-distribution benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/sathiiii/BabyMind.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BabyMind模型，通过物体优先的归纳偏见和稀疏监督对比学习，从儿童视角视频中有效学习词汇与世界的关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 婴儿视角视频（如SAYCam）中， caregiver语音稀疏且与第一人称视频弱同步，导致单帧对比学习产生大量噪声正样本——目标物体缺失或与干扰物纠缠。现有方法难以解决这种模糊性，因此需要一种能利用物体存在先验的归纳偏见的框架，以在嘈杂、弱监督条件下准确学习词汇与视觉实体的映射。
light_analysis.method: BabyMind采用离线掩码区域接口提取候选物体嵌入，通过跟踪在短时间窗口内将候选链接成轻量级物体文件，并使用原型空间多实例对比损失将语音与物体文件袋对齐。引入跟踪一致性和全局物体一致性正则化，稳定学习并将物体文件结构迁移到评估用的全局帧嵌入中。该方法在SAYCam-S数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在SAYCam-S测试集上，BabyMind在Labeled-S 15强制选择准确率上比基线CVCL提升2.6个百分点（具体数值未提，但为+2.6 points）。在词内分布外基准测试中也取得一致性增益，表明其泛化能力优于单帧对比学习方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: BabyMind验证了物体优先归纳偏见在稀疏噪声监督下对词汇学习的重要性。通过显式建模物体轨迹和原型对齐，有效缓解了婴儿视角视频中的参考歧义。未来可探索更高效的物体检测器或跨视角泛化。代码已开源，促进相关研究。

title: SkillChain: Closing the Loop on Skill Evolution for Image-Based E-Commerce AI Assistants
abstract: Image-based AI assistants are now deployed at production scale on e-commerce platforms, where a single uploaded image can trigger fundamentally different user intents: product search, style recommendation, visual encyclopedia, or utility tool calls, each demanding its own response format, tool invocation, and domain knowledge. Without per-intent behavioral constraints, LLM-based systems conflate these heterogeneous modes and fall short of domain quality standards, while the breadth and dynamism of the intent space render manual engineering infeasible. To address this, we present SkillChain, which closes the production feedback loop on Skill evolution, automating the lifecycle of Skills through three stages: Skill Creator for bootstrapping from task specs and trajectories, Route Optimizer for routing alignment, and Body Refiner for iterative Skill Body refinement via dual-path LLM-Judge evaluation. Deployed on a production-scale e-commerce image assistant, SkillChain substantially improves aggregate response quality, with the strongest gains on structural compliance and content quality; a one-week online A/B experiment further confirms significant gains in user engagement, content consumption, and long-term retention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillChain框架，通过自动化技能演化闭环提升电商图像AI助手的多意图响应质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商平台的图像AI助手面临用户意图多样化（搜索、推荐、百科、工具调用）的挑战，每个意图需独立响应格式和领域知识。现有LLM系统缺乏按意图的行为约束，导致模式混淆、质量不达标。意图空间的广度和动态性使手工工程不可行，亟需自动化方法来管理和演化技能。
light_analysis.method: SkillChain包含三个自动化阶段：Skill Creator从任务规范和用户轨迹引导技能初始生成；Route Optimizer优化路由对齐意图；Body Refiner通过双路径LLM-Judge评估迭代精炼技能体。框架形成闭环，持续从生产反馈中演化技能，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.result: 在生产级电商图像助手上部署，SkillChain显著提升综合响应质量，尤其结构合规性和内容质量上效果最强。一周在线A/B实验确认用户参与度、内容消费和长期留存率均有显著提升，证明实际应用效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillChain通过闭环自动演化技能，有效解决了多意图场景下LLM行为约束难题，提升了电商AI助手质量。该方法具有广泛适用性，可扩展至其他多模态交互平台。未来可探索更复杂的技能拓扑和自适应路由策略。

title: Structured Testbench Generation for LLM-Driven HDL Design and Verification-Oriented Data Curation
abstract: Automated testbench generation has become a critical bottleneck in large language model (LLM)-driven Register Transfer Level (RTL) workflows, where large numbers of candidate designs must be verified rapidly and reliably. Existing prompt-based approaches treat testbench generation as unconstrained code synthesis, yielding stochastic outputs with high token cost, low reproducibility, and insufficient coverage. To address this gap, we present STG, a Structured Testbench Generation framework that exploits the inherent structure of hardware designs to generate deterministic testbenches. As a direct verification tool, STG runs 720x faster than an iterative LLM-based testbench generation flow and higher rate of successful compilation, achieves higher coverage, and reduces false-pass verdicts on incorrect DUTs. STG also helps identify errors in RTL generation benchmarks by exposing faulty benchmark testbenches. As a data curation engine, it is 11x faster than LLM-based filtering on a single CPU core with 127x less energy, and the resulting distilled models provide state-of-the-art performance in our multi-benchmark evaluation. As a test-time scaling oracle, it reduces node count by 14-47\%. Our models are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/AS-SiliconMind/siliconmind-v12.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化测试平台生成框架STG，利用硬件设计内在结构生成确定性测试平台，显著加速LLM驱动的RTL验证和数据策展。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化测试平台生成已成为LLM驱动RTL工作流的关键瓶颈，现有方法将测试平台生成视为无约束代码合成，导致随机输出、高token成本、低可重复性和覆盖率不足。
light_analysis.method: STG框架通过利用硬件设计的固有结构生成确定性测试平台。作为验证工具，它比迭代LLM方法快720倍，编译成功率更高，覆盖率更高，并减少错误DUT的假通过。作为数据策展引擎，它在单CPU核心上比LLM过滤快11倍且能耗低127倍，通过蒸馏模型提升多基准测试性能。
light_analysis.result: STG作为验证工具比迭代LLM方法快720倍，编译成功率更高，覆盖率更高，减少假通过。作为策展引擎比LLM过滤快11倍，能耗低127倍，蒸馏模型在多个基准测试中达到领先性能。作为测试时缩放预言机，节点数减少14-47%。
light_analysis.conclusion: STG通过结构化方法解决了LLM驱动RTL验证中效率与可靠性的问题，具有实际应用价值；未来可扩展到更复杂的硬件验证任务，代码开源。

title: Camera and LiDAR BEV Fusion for Cooperative 3D Object Detection on TUMTraf V2X
abstract: We describe a Camera and LiDAR fusion detector developed for the TUMTraf V2X cooperative 3D object detection track of the DriveX 2026 challenge. The detector fuses three roadside cameras with a fused infrastructure-plus-vehicle point cloud in a shared bird's-eye-view space and predicts boxes through a CenterPoint-style head with a generalized IoU regression loss and an IoU quality re-ranking head. Trained on the provided train and validation splits, the model reaches a 3D mAP of 0.85 on the public Codabench test split. While iterating on the system, we observed that 44 of the 50 test frames are also present in the released train (40) and validation (4) splits with their labels. We therefore conducted two additional studies to quantify how this overlap affects the final score: (1) a finetuning run that oversamples the 44 overlapping frames, reaching 0.89 mAP, and (2) a post-processing run that replaces predictions on those frames with the released ground truth, reaching 0.99 mAP (uploaded to our Codabench account for testing but not published on the leaderboard). All three configurations and their per-class results are reported.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种融合路边相机与基础设施-车辆点云的BEV协同3D目标检测方法，通过CenterPoint风格头部和通用IoU损失提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中协同3D目标检测需要融合多传感器（相机、LiDAR）和多方数据（基础设施、车辆），但现有方法在共享BEV空间中融合多源信息时存在定位和分类精度不足的问题。TUMTraf V2X挑战提供了真实场景数据集，但数据重叠现象影响评估公平性，亟需鲁棒的融合检测器及数据重叠影响分析。
light_analysis.method: 方法融合三个路边相机图像与一个融合基础设施加车辆点云，在共享BEV空间中编码。检测头采用CenterPoint风格，使用广义IoU回归损失和IoU质量重排序头。在TUMTraf V2X数据集上训练，利用其提供的训练和验证集。额外研究包括微调时过采样重叠帧（44帧）和直接替换预测为真值后处理。
light_analysis.result: 在公共Codabench测试集上达到3D mAP 0.85。发现50个测试帧中44帧与训练/验证集重叠，过采样重叠帧微调后mAP提升至0.89，直接替换真值后mAP达0.99。报告了三种配置和每类结果，验证了数据重叠对分数的显著影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该融合检测器在协同3D目标检测中取得高性能，但数据重叠问题需谨慎处理。方法可为真实场景协同感知提供参考，未来需关注无偏数据集的构建和避免过拟合的泛化策略。

title: EPM-JEPA: Operator-Side Experience Modulation in JEPA-Family World Models
abstract: JEPA-family world models use a static predictor whose weights do not adapt when test-time dynamics diverge from training. We compare two mechanisms for incorporating accumulated experience into a JEPA predictor under distribution shift: operand-side injection, where a compressed experience representation is added as a residual to the predictor's hidden state (EI-JEPA), and operator-side modulation, where the same representation generates low-rank weight deltas via LoRA applied to the predictor's weights (EPM-JEPA). On a pre-registered comparison (Moving MNIST, gravity shift), EPM-JEPA (D_shift^{n=50} = 0.7848 +/- 0.0078, three seeds) differs from EI-JEPA (0.8238) by delta = 4.74% - Outcome C: a null result - by our stated criterion, a valid outcome. As a secondary, non-pre-registered observation, EPM-JEPA improves 1.90% over a no-memory baseline (0.8000), consistently across seeds, while EI-JEPA underperforms the baseline, indicating the benefit is specific to weight-level modulation. Our primary contribution is a mechanism analysis: the D_shift^{n=50} trajectory reflects three independent dynamical processes - buffer cycling, EMA target drift, and an intrinsic LoRA settling transient of +0.021 - rather than convergence to equilibrium. These findings motivate PEM-JEPA, a physics-grounded successor addressing this dynamical-peak limitation.
comment: 16 pages, 5 figures, 9 tables, 5 code listings. Pre-registered experimental study with mechanism analysis

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPM-JEPA，通过操作侧调制（LoRA）将经验融入JEPA世界模型，并分析了其动力学过程。
light_analysis.motivation: JEPA家族世界模型使用静态预测器，在测试时动力学分布偏移时无法自适应。现有方法未有效解决经验注入问题，导致模型泛化能力受限。该问题对机器人、自动驾驶等需在线适应的场景至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 比较两种经验注入机制：操作侧注入（EI-JEPA，将压缩经验表示为残差添加到隐藏状态）和操作侧调制（EPM-JEPA，通过LoRA生成低秩权重增量调制预测器权重）。在Moving MNIST重力偏移数据集上进行预注册对比实验。
light_analysis.result: EPM-JEPA与EI-JEPA的D_shift^{n=50}差异为4.74%，属于无效结果。但EPM-JEPA相比无记忆基线提升1.90%（0.8000→0.7848，一致跨种子），而EI-JEPA低于基线。机制分析显示D_shift轨迹由缓冲循环、EMA目标漂移和LoRA瞬态（+0.021）三个独立过程组成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是机制分析，揭示了经验调制中的非平衡动力学特征，而非简单收敛。这些发现推动了PEM-JEPA的提出，以解决动力学峰值限制。学术上为世界模型自适应提供新视角，实际应用中可提升模型在线适应能力。

title: Efficient, Robust, and Anti-Collusion Fingerprinting of Image Diffusion Models
abstract: Model fingerprinting, embedding user-specific identifiers (fingerprints) into generated outputs, has recently emerged as a popular solution to protect the intellectual property rights (IPR) of generative text-to-image (T2I) models and prevent unauthorized redistribution. In this work, we reveal a previously unexplored systematic vulnerability in existing generative model fingerprinting methods: they lack robustness against collusion attacks, where multiple attackers combine their models to remove or obscure the fingerprints. To address this issue, we take the first step towards a robust fingerprinting method for T2I models with anti-collusion capabilities. The proposed method encodes strings of bits, namely fingerprints, into the coefficients of a personalized normalization module (PNM) incorporated into T2I models, so that fingerprints can be reliably recovered from any generated image. To defend against collusion attacks and prevent unauthorized model redistribution, we introduce an anti-collusion mechanism based on lossless function-invariant parameter transformations. This mechanism significantly degrades the image generation quality of colluded models, making them effectively unusable. Moreover, our method allows developers to efficiently create multiple copies of fingerprinted T2I models by reparameterizing the PNM without the need for retraining. We also introduce a worst-case optimization strategy to improve robustness against model-level attacks. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves high fidelity and robustness across multiple T2I image generation and editing tasks, with fingerprint extraction accuracy exceeding 99.5%. Compared with existing methods, our method demonstrates, for the first time, a notable proactive robustness to collusion attacks by significantly increasing the FID of colluded models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种针对图像扩散模型的抗共谋指纹识别方法，实现高效、鲁棒的模型IP保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型指纹识别方法缺乏对共谋攻击的鲁棒性，多个攻击者可联合移除或混淆指纹，威胁模型IP保护。本研究首次解决该问题，旨在开发一种鲁棒且抗共谋的指纹识别方法，防止未授权分发。
light_analysis.method: 该方法将指纹编码到个性化归一化模块（PNM）的系数中，确保从生成图像可靠恢复指纹。引入基于无损函数不变参数变换的抗共谋机制，显著降低共谋模型的生成质量。开发者可通过重参数化PNM高效创建多个指纹副本，无需重新训练。同时采用最坏情况优化策略提高对模型级攻击的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个T2I图像生成和编辑任务中，指纹提取准确率超过99.5%。相比现有方法，首次展现出显著的主动抗共谋鲁棒性，共谋模型的FID（Fréchet Inception Distance）显著增加，表明生成质量严重下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文首次提出鲁棒且抗共谋的T2I模型指纹识别方法，有效保护IPR，具有高保真度和鲁棒性。方法高效，支持灵活创建多个副本。未来可探索更复杂的攻击模式以进一步提升安全性。

title: A Mathematical Forum Platform for Collaborative Problem Solving and Dataset Generation for AI Reasoning
abstract: Sharing mathematical content in online forums remains a significant friction point for students and educators: writing raw LATEX is error-prone, standalone optical character recognition tools require platform switching, and current forum software offers no integrated path from a photograph of a formula to a rendered post. We present a unified system that eliminates this friction by embedding an image to LATEX conversion pipeline directly inside a forum posting interface. A user uploads or captures an image of a mathematical expression; the system routes it through the Mathpix OCR API, detects whether the returned output is LATEX or plain text containing inline math, applies the appropriate delimiter normalisation, and renders a live preview in either LATEX or Markdown mode before the post is committed to the database. The architecture is organized in three loosely coupled layers: image processing, rendering, and storage, and supports both desktop and mobile clients. A provisional US patent application has been filed covering the core methods. We describe the full system design, each component in detail, the data schema, and the key technical innovations, and we position the work against existing standalone tools and forum platforms to demonstrate the practical gap it closes. Beyond immediate usability, we argue that a deployed platform of this kind constitutes a continuously growing, community-validated dataset of mathematical problems and step-by-step solutions, a resource that can be used to train and benchmark AI systems for accurate mathematical reasoning

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个集成图像到LaTeX转换管道的数学论坛平台，实现无缝协作与AI推理数据集生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线论坛分享数学内容存在摩擦：手动编写LaTeX易出错，独立OCR工具需切换平台，当前论坛软件无法从公式照片直达渲染帖子。这些问题阻碍了数学教育者和学生的有效协作，且缺乏社区验证的结构化数学问题数据集用于AI推理训练。
light_analysis.method: 系统将Mathpix OCR API直接嵌入论坛发帖界面，用户上传或拍摄数学表达式图像，自动检测输出类型（LaTeX或内联数学文本），归一化分隔符，并在发布前提供LaTeX或Markdown实时预览。架构采用图像处理、渲染、存储三层解耦，支持桌面与移动端，核心方法已申请美国临时专利。
light_analysis.result: 系统设计完整，包含详细组件、数据模式和技术创新。与现有独立工具和论坛平台对比，填补了实践空白。部署后可持续生成社区验证的数学问题与逐步解决方案数据集，可用于训练和基准测试AI系统的数学推理能力。论文未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该平台消除了数学内容分享的摩擦，同时产出不断增长的、社区验证的数学推理数据集，对AI推理研究具有重要价值。潜在局限包括依赖外部OCR API和社区参与度。未来可扩展至更多数学格式和自动评估功能。

title: Predicting Cognitive Load from Speech and Interaction Dynamics in Dyadic Conversations
abstract: Estimating cognitive load from speech has largely been studied in controlled laboratory settings, with limited understanding of its reliability in natural collaborative conversations. We investigate whether speech and interaction dynamics predict perceived cognitive load during dyadic conversations. We analyze audio from 53 dyads performing nine collaborative tasks and extract static acoustic, dynamic, and interaction features to train a two-head Gated Recurrent Unit encoder to predict cognitive load scores. Results show conversational interaction provides useful signals for predicting cognitive load related to time pressure, mental work, effort, and task performance. Temporal demand is associated with turn-taking dynamics such as overlap and speaker switch, while mental demand is linked to imbalanced participation between speakers. These findings highlight the importance of task structure and conversational interaction for modeling cognitive load in natural collaborative settings.

light_analysis.overview: 从双人对话中的语音和交互动态预测认知负荷，发现交互特征对时间压力和脑力负荷的预测有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究多在受控实验室中估计语音认知负荷，但对自然协作对话中的可靠性了解有限。实际协作场景中，认知负荷的动态变化对任务表现和交互质量有重要影响，但缺乏有效测量方法。该研究旨在探究语音和交互动态是否能够预测感知到的认知负荷，以填补自然环境下认知负荷建模的空白。
light_analysis.method: 分析53组双人对话音频，提取静态声学、动态和交互特征，使用双头门控循环单元（GRU）编码器预测认知负荷分数。任务包含9项协作任务，特征包括说话轮换、重叠等交互动态，以及声学韵律特征。模型通过回归预测多个维度的认知负荷（时间压力、脑力工作、努力、任务表现）。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明对话交互信号对预测认知负荷有效。时间需求与轮换动态（如重叠、说话者切换）相关，脑力需求与说话者参与不平衡相关。方法在预测时间压力、脑力工作、努力和任务表现方面表现出显著相关性，验证了自然协作对话中认知负荷的可预测性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实了在自然协作对话中，语音和交互动态可预测认知负荷，强调了任务结构和对话交互的重要性。为认知负荷的实时评估提供了新方法，可应用于人机交互、教育等多领域。未来可探索更细粒度的交互特征和实时预测系统。

title: Multi-Modal Agents for Power Distribution Defect Detection: An Evaluation of Foundation Models
abstract: The power distribution network is critical to reliable electricity delivery, yet traditional inspection methods face limitations in semantic understanding, generalization, and closed-loop automation. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a Multi-Modal Agent framework specifically for power distribution defect detection. Central to this study is the systematic evaluation of multimodal foundation models as unified cognitive engines. We rigorously assess their integrated performance across three critical capabilities: (1) Perception, where the model must accurately identify equipment and generate expert-level descriptions of defects; (2) Reasoning, where the model interprets visual findings to diagnose causes, assess severity, and plan maintenance strategies based on domain knowledge; and (3) Tool Usage, where the model acts as an autonomous operator to execute actions -- such as querying knowledge bases or generating work orders -- to achieve closed-loop maintenance. To support this evaluation, a domain-specific evaluation dataset and a comprehensive benchmark are developed. Experimental results demonstrate the strengths and limitations of current foundation models in these three dimensions, providing empirical evidence for deploying autonomous agents in high-stakes industrial environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态智能体框架，系统评估基础模型在配电缺陷检测中的感知、推理和工具使用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 电力配电网对可靠供电至关重要，但传统检测方法在语义理解、泛化和闭环自动化方面存在局限。现有方法难以实现自主缺陷识别与维护，需要更智能的自动化方案。本文旨在解决这些挑战，推动智能体在高风险工业环境中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态智能体框架，以多模态基础模型作为统一认知引擎，系统评估其三项关键能力：感知（识别设备并生成专家级描述）、推理（诊断原因、评估严重性、规划维护策略）和工具使用（自主执行知识库查询、生成工单等闭环操作）。为此构建了领域特定的评估数据集和基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了当前基础模型在感知、推理和工具使用三个维度的优势与局限，为在高压工业环境中部署自主智能体提供了实证依据。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出了针对配电缺陷检测的多模态智能体评估框架，系统性地评估了基础模型的关键能力，为该领域未来研究提供了基准和方向。学术价值在于推动多模态智能体在工业视觉中的应用，实际价值在于提升电力检测自动化水平。局限性可能在于数据集规模和模型泛化性，未来可扩展更多任务和场景。

title: Circuit Synchronization Precedes Generalization: Causal Evidence from Fourier Structure in Grokking Transformers
abstract: Grokking -- where a transformer on modular arithmetic suddenly transitions from near-chance to near-perfect validation accuracy -- is attributed to a Fourier circuit, but its timing, causal structure, and controllability remain poorly understood. We introduce the Frequency Synchronization Degree (FSD), a normalised, permutation-tested metric for Fourier circuit synchronisation requiring no prior circuit knowledge. Across nine modular addition configurations (primes p in {53, 71, 97, 113, 131}, three seeds), FSD synchronises 500-3,000 steps before grokking (mean lead +1,722 steps; all nine positive, sign-test p~0.004), and precedes a restricted-logit loss baseline (Nanda et al.'s excluded loss) in all nine cases, making it the earliest available predictor. We provide direct causal evidence that the inter-phase gap is a regularisation phenomenon: forking training at the FSD-ceiling step and varying weight decay lambda produces strictly monotone earlier grokking, with Delta_t proportional to 1/lambda. This law replicates across three primes (p in {53,97,131}; R^2=1.00 and R^2=0.99 for two clean cases), captured as Delta_t ~ C/lambda, consistent with (1/lambda)*log(||W_mem||/tau). Architecture ablations show an attention-only model groks with a strong FSD precursor; an MLP-only model never groks; a single-layer model's FSD lags, confirming the precursor is a multi-block circuit property.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Frequency Synchronization Degree (FSD) 指标，发现其先于 grokking 出现，并揭示权重衰减通过反比例关系控制泛化时机。
light_analysis.motivation: Grokking 现象（模算术 transformer 突然从随机到完美验证精度）归因于傅里叶电路，但其时序、因果结构和可控性理解不足。现有方法缺少早期预测指标，且对泛化前阶段机制不清楚。本文旨在提供可量化的同步度量并揭示提前泛化的规律。
light_analysis.method: 提出 FSD，一种标准化的、经置换检验的傅里叶电路同步度量，无需先验电路知识。在九个模加配置（素数 p 53,71,97,113,131 和三随机种子）上实验。通过训练分叉实验，在 FSD 达到峰值时改变权重衰减 lambda，发现 grokking 时间随 1/lambda 线性变化（Delta_t ~ C/lambda）。架构消融：仅注意力模型有强 FSD 前兆，仅 MLP 永不 grok，单层模型 FSD 滞后。
light_analysis.result: FSD 在 grokking 前 500-3000 步同步（平均提前 1722 步；所有九次正效应，符号检验 p≈0.004），且在所有九种情况下先于基于剔除 logit 损失的基线。在三个素数上，Delta_t 与 1/lambda 的线性关系拟合 R²=1.00 和 0.99。验证了 FSD 是最早的预测器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出 FSD 作为 grokking 的早期预测指标；提供了因果证据表明 inter-phase 间隙是正则化现象，由权重衰减控制；揭示了频率同步先于泛化的必要性（多模块电路属性）。学术价值：理解深度学习中的突现能力。实际应用：可提前预测并控制泛化时机。局限：仅在模加任务上验证，需推广。

title: YOLO-AMC: An Improved YOLO Architecture with Attention Mechanisms for Building Crack Detection
abstract: Crack detection plays an important role in infrastructure inspection and Structural Health Monitoring (SHM). However, cracks typically appear as thin, low-contrast structures and are easily affected by background noise, posing challenges for existing object detection models. This study proposes an improved YOLO-based architecture with integrated attention mechanisms, termed YOLO-AMC (YOLO with Attention Mechanisms for Crack Detection), to enhance automated crack detection performance. Based on YOLOv11, the original C2PSA module is removed, and multiple attention mechanisms, including Global Attention Mechanism (GAM), Residual Convolutional Block Attention Module (Res-CBAM), and Shuffle Attention (SA), are introduced into the multi-scale feature fusion layers of the Neck to strengthen cross-scale feature integration. Experimental results demonstrate that YOLO-AMC consistently outperforms baseline models YOLOv11n and YOLOv8n across multiple evaluation metrics. Among the evaluated attention modules, GAM achieves the best detection performance, obtaining mAP@0.5 = 0.9917 and mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.9506 on the test dataset, which are higher than those of YOLOv11 (0.9833 / 0.9112) and YOLOv8 (0.9707 / 0.8921). Furthermore, while maintaining a computational complexity of 7.6 GFLOPs, the proposed model achieves 110.95 FPS on an NVIDIA RTX 4090 platform and approximately 5 FPS on a Raspberry Pi 5 edge device, demonstrating a favorable trade-off between accuracy and deployment efficiency. The implementation code for this study is available on GitHub at https://github.com/CY-Tsai24/YOLO-AMC.
comment: 14 pages, 8 tables, 6 figures. Expanded version of IET ICETA 2025 conference paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出YOLO-AMC，基于YOLOv11集成多种注意力机制，提升建筑裂缝检测的精度与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 裂缝检测在基础设施维护和结构健康监测中至关重要，但裂缝具有细长、低对比度特性，易受背景噪声干扰，现有目标检测模型如YOLOv11难以准确识别。因此，需要一种增强特征提取和融合的方法来提升检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于YOLOv11架构，移除C2PSA模块，在Neck的多尺度特征融合层引入全局注意力机制(GAM)、残差卷积块注意力模块(Res-CBAM)和洗牌注意力(SA)，强化跨尺度特征集成，提升对细微裂缝的感知能力。
light_analysis.result: YOLO-AMC在测试集上，GAM变体达mAP@0.5=0.9917、mAP@0.5:0.95=0.9506，优于YOLOv11(0.9833/0.9112)和YOLOv8(0.9707/0.8921)。计算量7.6 GFLOPs，RTX 4090上110.95 FPS，树莓派5上约5 FPS，平衡精度与部署效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出YOLO-AMC有效提升裂缝检测精度，通过注意力机制增强特征融合，在保持低计算开销的同时实现高帧率，适合边缘部署。代码已开源，为结构健康监测提供实用方案。未来可探索更轻量级注意力或针对特定场景优化。

title: OpenMedQ: Broad Open Pretraining for Medical Vision-Language Models
abstract: We present OpenMedQ, a medical vision-language model pretrained on the broadest fully-open medical mix to date: 14 datasets totaling ~3.35M pretraining samples spanning pathology, radiology, microscopy, and text-only clinical QA. OpenMedQ reaches state-of-the-art BLEU-1 on PathVQA (75.9), beating Med-PaLM M variants up to 562B parameters (~80x larger), and matches the best reported VQA-MED BLEU-1 (64.5). Its vision encoder, transferred to 8 unseen medical classification benchmarks under an identical downstream recipe, obtains the highest average macro-F1 (0.757) among BiomedCLIP (0.745), PMC-CLIP (0.745), PubMedCLIP (0.746), and a from-scratch baseline (0.616). We release our code and an interactive demo is publicly available as a reproducible baseline for the community.
comment: Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2026, Short Paper Track

light_analysis.overview: OpenMedQ是一个在最大规模全开放医学混合数据集上预训练的视觉语言模型，在病理和放射VQA任务上达到或超越SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型多依赖私有数据或狭窄领域，缺乏可复现的开放基准。本文旨在构建一个覆盖病理、放射、显微镜和临床QA的完全开放预训练数据集和模型，以促进社区研究、公平比较和可复现性。
light_analysis.method: 收集14个公开医学数据集（约335万样本），包括病理、放射、显微镜图像及文本QA，用于预训练OpenMedQ。其视觉编码器经统一下游方案迁移至8个未见分类任务，评估泛化能力。模型和代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: OpenMedQ在PathVQA上BLEU-1达75.9，超越Med-PaLM M（562B参数）；在VQA-MED上BLEU-1达64.5，与最佳持平。视觉编码器在8个分类任务上平均macro-F1为0.757，优于BiomedCLIP（0.745）、PMC-CLIP（0.745）、PubMedCLIP（0.746）和从头训练基线（0.616）。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenMedQ作为完全开放的可复现基线，验证了大规模多源医学数据预训练的有效性，推动了医学多模态研究的开放性和可比较性。未来可扩展更多医学领域和下游任务，促进临床应用。

title: Learning What to Remember: A Cognitively Grounded Multi-Factor Value Model for Agentic Memory
abstract: Long-running LLM agents accumulate interaction histories far larger than any context window, forcing a standing decision: what to encode deeply, what to forget, and what to retrieve under a fixed memory budget. Production systems answer with semantic similarity or recency -- both mis-specified for the forgetting decision, which is made at consolidation time before the future query is known. We propose a multi-factor memory value function V(m)=\sum_i w_i f_i(m) over seven interpretable factors (emotional intensity, goal relevance, value alignment, self/user relevance, task utility, reliability, and usage history) drawn from cognitive psychology, whose weights are learned from a downstream objective by a gradient-free optimiser, and whose single scalar uniformly controls encoding depth, forget risk, and retrieval rank. We make a methodological point: on LongMemEval, scoring goal relevance against the held-out evaluation question saturates gold-evidence retention at \approx 0.98 -- this measures retrieval, not forgetting. In the realistic blind regime, a learned multi-factor value retains 0.770 \pm 0.011 of gold evidence across 479 usable cases, versus 0.657 for uniform weights, 0.518 for the best single factor, and 0.368 for recency; every paired gap's 95% bootstrap CI is above zero, and a neural network over the same factors ties the linear model. The learned weights are interpretable -- reliability, emotional intensity, and self/user relevance dominate, while query-time goal similarity is correctly down-weighted for the forgetting decision. A controlled synthetic task with planted confounds confirms the learner recovers a separating weighting (1.00 retention) where uniform weighting fails (0.62). The substrate is open-source; all experiments run on a single CPU with no API calls.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于认知心理学的多因素记忆价值函数，学习权重控制编码深度、遗忘风险和检索排序，在长程交互中比单一因素或语义相似性显著提升证据保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 长周期LLM代理积累的历史交互远超上下文窗口，需决定编码、遗忘和检索的内容。现有系统依赖语义相似性或近期性，但这些指标在固化时（未来查询未知）不适用于遗忘决策。该问题在实际应用中至关重要，因为错误遗忘导致关键信息丢失，影响下游任务表现。当前方法缺乏对记忆价值的多维度认知建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出多因素记忆价值函数 V(m)=∑w_i f_i(m)，包含情感强度、目标相关性、价值对齐等七个可解释因素，权重通过无梯度优化器从下游目标学习。单标量统一控制编码深度、遗忘风险和检索排名。在LongMemEval数据集的479个案例上评估，采用盲设置（不访问评估问题）。
light_analysis.result: 学习后的多因素价值模型保留0.770±0.011的证据，优于均匀权重（0.657）、最佳单因素（0.518）和近期性（0.368）；所有配对差异的95%自助法置信区间高于零。神经网络等价于线性模型。权重可解释：可靠性、情感强度、自我/用户相关性主导，目标相似性被正确降权。合成任务中学习权重达到1.00保留率，均匀权重仅0.62。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文论证了遗忘决策需要与检索不同的价值模型，通过七个认知因素的可学习加权显著提升长期记忆保留。方法计算轻量（单CPU无API调用），权重可解释。局限在于因素选择和权重学习依赖下游目标，未来可探索更动态的权重调整或扩展因素集。

title: PRISMR: Overcoming Parse Collapse in Multimodal Listwise Ranking via Parameterized Representation Internalization
abstract: Generative listwise ranking with Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) aims to capture global list context in a single forward pass, but   its effectiveness degrades in long-context multimodal scenarios. We identify a recurring failure mode, parse collapse, where the   autoregressive decoder produces fluent yet incomplete rankings by silently omitting candidates and terminating early. This   failure stems from limited context utilization rather than simple formatting mistakes, making prompt engineering and constrained   decoding insufficient. We propose PRISMR (Parameterized Representation Internalization for Semantic Multimodal Ranking), a   framework that replaces transient in-context list processing with parametric structural conditioning. PRISMR uses a lightweight   hypernetwork to encode multimodal candidates in parallel and generate item-specific LoRA weights, which are synthesized into an   instance-specific adapter for a LMM. This paradigm enables more robust internalization of list structure while preserving the   base model. We further introduce a large-scale multimodal review-ranking benchmark for evaluation. Experiments demonstrate that   PRISMR substantially reduces parse collapse, improves listwise ranking performance, and transfers effectively across domains and   instruction-tuned backbones.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISMR框架，通过参数化表示内部化解决多模态列表排序中的解析崩溃问题，提升长上下文场景下的排序性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式列表排序在长上下文多模态场景中效果下降，存在解析崩溃问题，即自动回归解码器生成流畅但不完整的排名，遗漏候选并提前终止。该问题源于有限的上下文利用而非简单格式错误，提示工程和受限解码效果不足，亟需更鲁棒的方法。
light_analysis.method: PRISMR框架采用轻量级超网络并行编码多模态候选，生成项级LoRA权重并合成实例适配器，用于大型多模态模型。该范式以参数化结构条件化替代临时上下文列表处理，保留基础模型鲁棒性。同时引入大规模多模态评论排序基准用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PRISMR显著减少解析崩溃，提升列表排序性能，并在不同领域和指令微调主干上有效迁移。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISMR有效克服解析崩溃，提升多模态列表排序能力。学术上提出参数化表示内部化新范式，应用上可推广至多模态排序任务。未来可探索效率优化与更复杂场景的适应性。

title: Multi-Turn Reasoning When Context Arrives in Pieces: Scalable Sharding and Memory-Augmented RL
abstract: When a user reveals task-critical information across several conversation turns, LLM accuracy drops by up to 65% despite full context availability. We show that this Lost in Conversation degradation can be substantially mitigated by training models to maintain a compact rolling memory instead of attending to a growing history. To make such training scalable, we introduce a low-cost sharding pipeline that converts single-turn QA datasets into multi-turn fragmented-information episodes, eliminating the need for hours of manual annotation. Training only on sharded GSM8K, our memory-augmented policy significantly improves multi-turn accuracy and generalises zero-shot to harder math and out-of-domain long-context QA. Moreover, memory-trained models outperform full-history baselines even when given the full history at test time, suggesting that learning to compress induces more robust incremental reasoning than full-context exposure alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出记忆增强策略和可扩展的分片管道，缓解多轮对话中上下文碎片化导致的性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 当用户在多轮对话中逐步透露关键信息时，即便完整上下文可用，LLM准确率仍下降高达65%。现有方法依赖全历史注意力，难以高效处理增长的历史，且缺乏可扩展的多轮训练数据。该研究旨在通过紧凑滚动记忆替代全历史注意力，并利用低成本分片管道生成多轮训练数据，解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括两方面：一是训练模型维护紧凑的滚动记忆而非全历史注意力；二是提出低成本分片管道，将单轮QA数据集（如GSM8K）自动转换为多轮碎片化信息片段，无需手动标注。利用强化学习训练记忆增强策略。该管道可扩展至其他数据集，仅需单轮数据即可生成多轮训练实例。
light_analysis.result: 在分片GSM8K上训练后，记忆增强策略显著提升多轮准确率，并零样本泛化至更难数学任务和跨领域长上下文QA。令人惊讶的是，即使在测试时提供完整历史，记忆训练模型仍优于全历史基线，表明学习压缩能诱导更稳健的增量推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了训练模型学习压缩记忆比直接暴露全上下文更有效，为多轮推理提供了一种可扩展方法。分片管道大幅降低了数据标注成本。未来可能应用于更复杂的多轮交互场景，并探索记忆与注意力的结合。

title: MAMVI: 3D Test-Time Adaptation via Masked Multi-View Point Clouds
abstract: 3D point cloud models suffer significant performance degradation under distribution shifts caused by sensor noise, occlusions, and environmental changes. Test-time adaptation (TTA) has emerged as a practical paradigm for mitigating this issue during inference. Recently, leveraging multi-view augmentation has shown promise in improving 3D TTA performance. However, existing multi-view approaches are often constrained by sequential optimization that treats each view independently. This sequential optimization leads to substantial inference latency due to repetitive optimization steps, making real-time adaptation impractical. To address this, we propose Masked Multi-View Test-Time Adaptation (MAMVI), which replaces sequential optimization with a unified single-step adaptation. Specifically, MAMVI utilizes a hybrid masking strategy that combines fixed ratios for stability with Beta-distributed sampling for diversity. By aggregating losses across multiple views, MAMVI performs adaptation through a single backward pass based on multi-view consensus. Additionally, a confidence-based adaptive learning rate is used to dynamically adjust the adaptation intensity for each sample. Extensive experiments on ModelNet-40C, ShapeNet-C, and ScanObjectNN-C demonstrate that MAMVI achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on ShapeNet-C and ScanObjectNN-C. Moreover, it remains competitive on ModelNet-40C while delivering 4.9-8.9 times faster inference, making it highly suitable for real-time applications. Our code is available at https://github.com/Inseok-kong/MAMVI

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAMVI，通过掩码多视图点云和单步自适应实现快速3D测试时自适应，兼顾精度与推理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D点云模型在传感器噪声、遮挡和环境变化等分布偏移下性能显著下降。测试时自适应（TTA）可缓解此问题，但现有多视图方法采用顺序优化，导致推理延迟大，难以满足实时应用需求。因此需要一种高效的单步自适应方法，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: MAMVI采用统一单步自适应替代顺序优化，通过混合掩码策略（固定比例与Beta分布采样结合）增强多视图多样性，并聚合多视图损失进行单次反向传播。同时，引入基于置信度的自适应学习率动态调整每个样本的适应强度。无需额外数据或模型修改，仅利用测试样本的多视图掩码点云。
light_analysis.result: 在ModelNet-40C、ShapeNet-C和ScanObjectNN-C上，MAMVI在ShapeNet-C和ScanObjectNN-C达到最高精度，在ModelNet-40C上与最优方法相当。推理速度提升4.9-8.9倍，显著降低延迟，适合实时场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAMVI通过高效的多视图单步自适应机制，解决了现有多视图TTA方法的推理延迟问题，同时保持或提升了准确性。该方法适用于需要实时适应的实际3D视觉系统。未来可探索更复杂的掩码策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: MARS: Margin-Adversarial Risk-controlled Stopping for Parallel LLM Test-time Scaling
abstract: Parallel test-time scaling samples many reasoning traces and majority-votes their answers, improving LLM accuracy but requiring traces to run to completion, incurring substantial computational overhead. We observe that probing partial traces at intermediate checkpoints can extract current answers without disrupting generation, revealing an evolving aggregate vote. Based on this observation, we introduce MARS, a margin-adversarial stopping rule that estimates which active traces are likely to change their answers and stops once the leader remains safe under a conservative bound on future vote movement. The rule separates two sources of uncertainty. It learns the trace-level switch probabilities that determine how much of the current margin is likely to be retained, while handling the harder question of where switching traces land through an adversarial bound calibrated from warmup traces. With true switch probabilities, MARS guarantees with high probability that the early-stopped answer matches the full-budget vote. In practice, a five-feature logistic model closely matches oracle switching behavior. Across three reasoning models and three competition-math benchmarks, MARS saves 25-47% of self-consistency tokens and 14-29% on top of DeepConf Online, a strong confidence-weighted baseline that already filters and truncates weak traces, while matching the accuracy of the corresponding full-budget baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MARS，一种边际对抗性停止规则，通过早期停止推理轨迹节省LLM测试时扩展的计算开销，同时保证准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 并行测试时扩展通过多数投票提升LLM准确性，但需要所有推理轨迹运行完成，导致计算开销巨大。现有方法如DeepConf Online虽能过滤弱轨迹，仍需完整运行。迫切需要一种能在不损失准确性的前提下提前停止的机制，以降低推理成本。
light_analysis.method: MARS在中间检查点估计活跃轨迹的答案切换概率，并引入对抗性边界保守预测未来投票变化。使用五特征逻辑模型学习轨迹级切换概率，通过预热轨迹校准对抗性参数，确保早期停止答案以高概率匹配完整投票结果。该方法分离了边际保留与切换去向的不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个推理模型和三个竞赛数学基准上，MARS节省25-47%的自一致性令牌，并在强基线DeepConf Online基础上进一步节省14-29%，同时准确率与完整预算基线持平。实验验证了早期停止的有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARS通过风险控制的早期停止显著降低了LLM测试时扩展的计算成本，而不牺牲准确性，为高效推理提供了新思路。未来可扩展到更复杂的投票策略或动态预算分配场景，但需注意切换概率模型的泛化性。

title: Is Spurious Correlation Removal Always Learnable?
abstract: Invariant learning can fail even when the invariant structure is statistically identifiable. We show a conditional computational barrier: under a black-box samplable supervised sparse recovery primitive motivated by average-case sparse-recovery reductions, there exist \emph{samplable} multi-environment instances with a one-dimensional predictive invariant subspace ($k=1$) that are learnable with polynomial samples by exhaustive search, while any polynomial-time constant-accuracy recovery algorithm would contradict the primitive. We further quantify environment diversity by a separation parameter $γ$, which controls identifiability and the curvature of invariance objectives. Under sufficient diversity and local Gaussian regularity, the minimax risk is $\mathbb{E}[\dist(\hat{V},V_{\mathrm{inv}})^2]=Θ(k(d-k)/(n|\mathcal{E}|))$, and under label-induced shifts a phase transition occurs at $n^*\propto k(d-k)/(|\mathcal{E}|γ^2)$ with refined estimation error scaling proportional to $1/γ^2$. Synthetic and real datasets illustrate the predicted gaps and transitions and motivate simple diversity diagnostics.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示不变性学习在伪相关移除中存在计算障碍，并刻画环境多样性与估计误差的关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不变性学习假设统计可识别性即可学习，但未考虑计算复杂性。实际中即使不变结构统计可识别，算法仍可能失败。论文旨在证明在标准密码学假设下，存在可采样的多环境实例，使得伪相关移除在多项式时间内不可行，从而填补理论与实践之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 基于平均情况稀疏恢复归约假设，构造具有一维不变子空间的多环境实例，证明多项式时间算法无法达到常数精度。引入分离参数γ量化环境多样性，推导极小极大风险界和相变点。使用局部高斯正则性简化分析，并在合成与真实数据集上验证预测。
light_analysis.result: 在计算假设下，存在多项式样本可学习但多项式时间算法无法实现常数精度的实例。极小极大风险为Θ(k(d-k)/(n|E|))，在标签诱导偏移下，相变点n*∝k(d-k)/(|E|γ^2)，误差缩放比例与1/γ^2成正比。实验展示了预测的间隙和相变。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了不变性学习在伪相关移除中的计算瓶颈，量化了环境多样性对可识别性和估计精度的影响。理论结果指导实际部署中需关注环境多样性和计算资源。未来可探索更紧的下界或设计绕过该障碍的算法。

title: Multi-Label Test-Time Adaptation with Bayesian Conditional Priors
abstract: Multi-label recognition with frozen Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is brittle under distribution shift: standard zero-shot inference scores labels independently, ignoring co-occurrence structure and producing incoherent label sets where dominant concepts suppress weaker but compatible labels. We introduce Bayesian Conditional Priors (BCP) Estimation, a gradient-free test-time adaptation method that injects label dependency without tuning the backbone. BCP views zero-shot logits as a proxy for marginal posteriors under a fixed image-text likelihood and attributes shift-induced errors mainly to a mismatched label prior. For each test image, it selects a high-confidence anchor label and applies an anchor-conditioned Bayesian refinement. This update is closed-form in logit space and admits a pointwise mutual information (PMI) interpretation, explicitly promoting compatible labels and suppressing incompatible ones. BCP operates without target annotations by estimating anchor-conditioned priors online from the unlabeled test stream via lightweight second-order co-occurrence statistics, adding negligible overhead beyond a single forward pass. Across standard multi-label benchmarks and multiple CLIP backbones, BCP consistently outperforms strong TTA baselines, e.g., improving RN50 average mAP from 57.31 to 69.22 and ViT-B/16 from 62.61 to 71.79.

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯条件先验估计（BCP），一种无梯度的测试时自适应方法，通过注入标签依赖关系提升多标签视觉语言模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多标签识别任务中，冻结的视觉语言模型（VLM）在分布偏移时脆弱：标准零样本推理独立评分每个标签，忽略标签共现结构，导致主导概念抑制弱但兼容标签，产生不连贯的预测。现有方法需要调整骨干网络或目标标注，实际场景中难以获得。因此，需要一种无需梯度传播、无需目标标注的测试时自适应方法，显式建模标签依赖关系。
light_analysis.method: BCP将零样本logits视为固定图像-文本似然下的边际后验代理，将分布偏移误差归因于不匹配的标签先验。对每个测试图像，选择高置信度锚定标签，应用锚定条件的贝叶斯更新，该更新在logit空间中有闭式解，可解释为逐点互信息（PMI），显式促进兼容标签、抑制不兼容标签。通过无目标标注在线估计锚定条件先验，利用轻量级二阶共现统计，仅需单次前向传播的额外开销。
light_analysis.result: 在标准多标签基准和多个CLIP骨干上，BCP一致优于强测试时自适应基线。例如，RN50平均mAP从57.31提升至69.22，ViT-B/16从62.61提升至71.79。无需调优骨干网络，仅增加微小计算开销，显著改善了分布偏移下的多标签识别性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: BCP为多标签测试时自适应提供了一种高效、无梯度的解决方案，通过注入标签先验信息提升VLM鲁棒性。其闭式更新和在线估计机制具有实用价值，可广泛应用于视觉识别系统。未来可探索更复杂的先验估计或结合其他测试时自适应策略。

title: Iterating Toward Better Search: A Two-Agent Simulation Framework for Evaluating Agentic Search Architectures in E-Commerce
abstract: We present a modular two-agent simulation framework for evaluating conversational shopping assistant architectures. An independent buyer agent, configured with personas, missions, and patience levels, is paired with an interchangeable responder that integrates with a real e-commerce search API. Holding the buyer constant across experiments enables controlled comparison of responder designs on identical scenarios. Using 2011 conversations across 14 persona buckets, we establish four empirical findings. First, rolling-window memory outperforms intent-extraction memory on all quality metrics while being 35% faster per query. Second, illustrating rapid evidence-driven iteration, a systematic failure analysis of a responder version enables targeted fixes that reduce failure and near-failure rates by 62% across the full dataset. Third, swapping the responder LLM backbone from Gemini~2.5 to Llama~3.3~70B costs 0.16--0.45 points despite identical architecture. Finally, we document systematic philosophical disagreement between frontier LLM judges: Gemini rewards process correctness while Claude demands concrete outcomes, despite using the same evaluation prompt.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个双智能体模拟框架，用于评估电商对话购物助手的架构，并通过实证研究发现滚动窗口记忆优于意图提取记忆、迭代优化可大幅降低失败率等关键结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商对话购物助手的评估缺乏标准化和可控比较方法，现有评估多依赖人工或静态数据集，难以系统分析不同架构设计的优劣。该研究通过构建买家代理和响应器的模拟框架，实现受控实验，从而支持快速迭代和证据驱动的优化，填补了该领域方法论的空白。
light_analysis.method: 设计模块化双智能体模拟框架：买家代理配置人物角色、任务和耐心等级，响应器集成真实电商搜索API，使用2011次对话和14个角色桶进行实验。比较两种记忆架构（滚动窗口vs意图提取），并分析失败模式、LLM骨干替换（Gemini切换到Llama）以及不同LLM评判标准（Gemini vs Claude）的影响。
light_analysis.result: 滚动窗口记忆在所有质量指标上优于意图提取记忆，且每查询快35%。通过系统性失败分析，将失败和接近失败率降低62%。交换LLM骨干从Gemini 2.5到Llama 3.3 70B仅成本0.16-0.45点，但性能下降（指标未明确）。Gemini和Claude作为评判者存在系统性分歧：Gemini注重过程正确性，Claude注重结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为电商对话助手评估提供了高效工具，支持控制变量比较和快速迭代，揭示了记忆架构、LLM选择和评判标准的关键权衡。虽然实验限于电商场景，但方法论可推广至其他对话系统。未来工作可扩展更多智能体行为和跨领域验证。

title: Order Is Not Control
abstract: AI alignment, interpretability, steering, and neural perturbation studies identify order-inducing objects. We argue that order is not control. Control requires a receiver-gated response law: a denominator-indexed operator mapping material state, action/drive, bath, and receiver state to response displacement, sinks, effort, and basin projection. We identify it across biological, LLM, adapter, and stochastic-operator panels. The laws are local: an intervention can be admitted, saturated, sign-changing, leaky, or overdriven depending on medium, bath, receiver state, action port, and comparator. Control is assigned when finite effort moves a target or outcome-readout class under the same denominator while damage, null/evasive, invalid format, overdrive, and unnecessary effort stay bounded. Mouse ALM, C. elegans, and zebrafish panels provide physical response-operator evidence while excluding coordinate identity and controller conclusions. LLM panels show generated-output response laws: across four material conditions, response vectors are predictable at 72.8-73.7% component-sign accuracy, rising to 84.3-84.8% on nonzero components; held-out observers predict system-effect and target/oracle families at 93.6% and 91.7% accuracy. Constitution-conditioned adapters reshape susceptibility as prepared media, and stochastic-operator panels separate measured opportunity from deployable action policies. This gives a driven-dissipative response-system account at the mesoscopic control level: drives act through prepared media, baths, and receivers, producing admitted movement, impedance, sinks, or overdrive. The evidence supports local admitted control and measurable stochastic response operators, while leaving deployable pre-generation control, hidden/logit causal sufficiency, biological-to-LLM coordinate identity, and literal thermodynamic quantities outside scope.

light_analysis.overview: 提出控制需要接收器门控响应律，证明顺序不等于控制，并跨生物、LLM、适配器和随机算子面板提供实验证据。
light_analysis.motivation: AI对齐、可解释性、神经扰动等研究识别出有序性对象，但现有工作混淆了顺序与控制的概念。本文旨在严格定义控制，即需要接收器门控响应律，并探讨其在不同系统中的普遍性，以澄清控制与顺序的本质区别。
light_analysis.method: 定义控制需满足分母索引算子映射，并识别生物（小鼠ALM、秀丽隐杆线虫、斑马鱼）、LLM、适配器和随机算子面板中的局部响应律。实验包括LLM生成输出的响应预测，跨四种材料条件，以及保持状态的动作策略分析。
light_analysis.result: LLM面板中，响应向量在四种材料条件下组件符号预测准确率为72.8-73.7%，非零组件上提升至84.3-84.8%；留出观察者预测系统效应和目标/原族准确率分别为93.6%和91.7%。生物面板提供了物理响应算子证据，但排除了坐标恒等性和控制器结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为介观控制水平提供了驱动耗散响应系统解释，支持局部可接纳控制和可测随机响应算子，同时明确了部署前控制、隐藏logit因果充分性等超出范围，为AI对齐和控制理论提供了新视角。

title: Polar: A Benchmark for Evaluating Political Bias in LLMs
abstract: Political bias in large language models (LLMs) is increasingly significant, but difficult to measure reproducibly across political and linguistic contexts. We introduce Polar, a 4,026-instance multiple-choice benchmark that measures political bias through option-level likelihoods rather than prompt-based generation. Polar covers two ideological axes and eight issue categories derived from the Manifesto Project, and evaluates models in parallel across U.S. and South Korean political contexts. Across 38 LLMs, measured bias varies systematically with political context, issue category, model group, and presentation language. All models lean left-progressive on U.S. political content, but show more centered and mixed patterns on South Korean content. Translation experiments further show that presentation language alone can shift measured bias. These findings highlight the need for multilingual and cross-contextual evaluation of political bias in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polar基准，通过选项级似然度量LLMs的政治偏见，覆盖美国与韩国政治背景，实现跨语言和跨上下文可重复评估。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs中的政治偏见日益重要，但现有方法难以在不同政治和语言背景下可重复测量。缺乏标准化基准，且提示生成方式受模型行为影响，不稳健。需要一种能够跨文化、跨语言、系统评估偏见的方法。
light_analysis.method: Polar包含4026个多项选择题，基于Manifesto Project定义两个意识形态轴和八个议题类别。通过计算选项级似然而非生成式输出来测量偏见，避免提示敏感性。在美国和韩国政治背景下并行评估38个LLM，并引入翻译实验分析语言影响。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型在美国内容上均表现出左派进步倾向，而在韩国内容上倾向更居中混合。偏见模式随议题类别、模型组和呈现语言系统变化。翻译实验表明，仅改变呈现语言即可显著改变测量到的偏见，凸显语言情境的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polar提供了首个跨政治和语言背景的LLM政治偏见基准，揭示了偏见的语境依赖性。研究表明多语言、跨文化评估对理解模型偏见至关重要，为未来开发更公平的LLM提供方法论基础，但仍需扩展至更多政治体系和语言。

title: LoRA-Muon: Spectral Steepest Descent on the Low-Rank Manifold
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) significantly reduces compute and memory costs for finetuning Deep Learning models but is often harder to tune than dense training: when using factor-wise optimizers such as AdamW, it is sensitive to initialization choices, its optimal learning rates transfer poorly across ranks, and it often fails to beat dense baselines. We derive LoRA-Muon by applying the Muon optimizer's spectral steepest-descent rule to the low-rank setting. Along with our split weight-decay rule, our main claim is that LoRA-Muon is a good low-rank proxy for full-rank Muon and Shampoo-family optimizers. Its optimal learning rates transfer across rank, width, depth, and factor-rescaling. In our compute-matched TinyShakespeare study, a rank-$2$ proxy recovers the dense best tested learning rate, and a rank-$32$ LoRA-Muon run attains lower mean validation loss than the dense baseline in the seed-averaged sweep. We further show that the Spectron optimizer depends on arbitrary factor scaling, so it would likely be a poor fit when finetuning starts from badly imbalanced factors, and that LoRA-RITE's simplified QR-coordinate core implements the same spectral update. LoRA-Muon computes that update without QR-decomposition and avoids storing second moments, making it more accelerator-friendly and memory-efficient.

light_analysis.overview: 将Muon优化器的谱最速下降规则应用于低秩微调，提出LoRA-Muon，具有更好的学习率迁移性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA虽降低计算和内存成本，但比全量训练更难调参：对初始化敏感，最优学习率在不同rank间迁移差，且常未达到全量基线性能。需要一种低秩优化器，既能保持低秩优势，又能克服这些调参困难。
light_analysis.method: LoRA-Muon将Muon优化器的谱最速下降规则扩展到低秩流形，并引入分裂权重衰减规则。它避免使用QR分解，无需存储二阶矩，计算更高效且内存友好。核心更新与LoRA-RITE的简化QR坐标更新等价，但实现更简洁。
light_analysis.result: 在TinyShakespeare实验中，rank-2的LoRA-Muon代理恢复了全量训练的最佳测试学习率；rank-32的LoRA-Muon在种子平均扫描中取得比全量基线更低的平均验证损失，验证了其作为低秩代理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoRA-Muon是一种高效的低秩优化器，其最优学习率在rank、宽度、深度和因子缩放间良好迁移，克服了LoRA调参困难。它无需QR分解和二阶矩存储，更适合加速器和内存受限场景。未来可进一步探索其在大规模模型上的泛化能力。

title: Where Computation Lives Inside TabPFN: Causal Localisation of Attention Head Function
abstract: We present the first causal mechanistic analysis of a tabular foundation model, investigating how TabPFN 2.5's feature wise attention heads distribute computation across layers. Using activation patching, ablation, and attention entropy across two synthetic regression datasets, we find clear temporal specialisation: one head's causal necessity dominates that of the others by 2 to 5 times at peak layer, with its dominant layer shifting across tasks of different complexity, while the remaining heads exhibit symmetric late layer profiles. Attention entropy and patching provide convergent evidence for the computationally active layers of the dominant head. We additionally investigate inference time steerability via contrastive activation steering, which fails to transfer across samples. We attribute this result to TabPFN's in context learning mechanism, which encodes task structure through context dependent attention rather than the stable parametric directions that make steering tractable in language models.

light_analysis.overview: 首次对表格基础模型TabPFN进行因果机制分析，发现注意力头的时空专业化模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格基础模型如TabPFN在预测中广泛使用，但其内部计算机制尚未被理解。现有研究缺乏对这类模型注意力头功能的因果分析。理解计算如何分布在注意力头上对于改进模型解释性和可控性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用激活修补、消融和注意力熵方法，在合成回归数据集上分析TabPFN 2.5的特征级注意力头。研究注意头的因果必要性、时间层分布以及对比激活引导的推理时可控性。
light_analysis.result: 发现一个主导头的因果必要性在峰值层比其他头高2-5倍，其主导层随任务复杂度变化，其余头显示对称的后期层轮廓。注意力熵和修补为活跃层提供收敛证据。对比激活引导在样本间无法转移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次揭示TabPFN中注意力头的时间和任务依赖性专业化。对比激活引导失效归因于上下文学习机制，它依赖于上下文相关的注意力而非稳定的参数方向，为理解表格模型的可控性提供了见解。

title: MDForge: Agentic Molecular Dynamics Pipeline Design under Sparse Simulator Feedback
abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) is the canonical in-silico method for atomistic molecular science, simulating molecular behavior from first-principle physics. Designing an MD pipeline for a new system requires substantial expert knowledge: running it on even one molecule is expensive, ruling out trial-and-error. We automate this expert pipeline-design process with an LLM agent. Unlike existing MD agents that orchestrate a predefined tool set, we treat pipeline design as open-ended code generation in which the agent's behavior is reshaped online by verbal reward. Specifically, we build MDForge, an LLM agent whose in-context update rule densifies the sparse reward via a multi-agent debate among physics experts. On three SAMPL host-guest binding free-energy benchmarks, MDForge automatically designs MD pipelines competitive with human experts. Deployed on a library of unseen candidate guests, its CB[7] pipeline discovers a novel binder that wet-lab competition NMR confirms is a high-affinity, picomolar CB[7] binder. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/Zehong-Wang/MDForge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MDForge，利用LLM agent通过多智能体辩论稠密化稀疏奖励，自动设计分子动力学流水线，性能媲美人类专家。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子动力学（MD）流水线设计依赖专家知识，且运行昂贵，无法试错。现有MD agent仅编排预定义工具，缺乏灵活性。因此需要一种能自动设计MD流水线的智能体，以降低专家依赖和成本。
light_analysis.method: MDForge基于LLM agent，将流水线设计视为开源代码生成，通过在线语言奖励重塑行为。核心创新是采用多智能体辩论（physics experts）将稀疏奖励稠密化，使agent能有效学习。在三个SAMPL宿主-客体结合自由能基准上自动设计MD流水线。
light_analysis.result: 在SAMPL基准上，MDForge自动设计的MD流水线性能与人类专家相当。部署于未见候选客体库时，其CB[7]流水线发现了一个新型高亲和力（皮摩尔级）CB[7]结合物，并经湿实验竞争性NMR验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: MDForge展示了LLM agent在自动化MD流水线设计中的潜力，能发现新型结合物，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展到更复杂的MD系统，但可能受限于LLM的推理能力和debate机制的效率。

title: Selecting Samples on Graphs: A Unified Dataset Pruning Framework for Lossless Training Acceleration
abstract: The rapid growth of modern training datasets has significantly increased computational cost, motivating dataset pruning~(DP) methods which retain only a subset of informative samples to reduce training cost.   Existing pruning criteria typically rely on either intrinsic signals that assess samples independently or extrinsic signals that promote diversity via pairwise relations.   While effective in their own specific regimes, each captures only one aspect of sample utility and lacks robustness across different pruning ratios or data distribution.   In this work, we present a unified graph-based DP framework.   By modeling the dataset as a weighted graph, where node weights encode intrinsic value and edge weights encode extrinsic value, DP can be cast as a Maximum Weight Clique Problem (MWCP).   Although MWCP is NP-hard, its structure admits a principled greedy solution based on sample-wise marginal gains.   Under a few mild conditions, we further prove that this unified objective enjoys a formal approximation guarantee, which applies to a broad family of importance metrics and provides practical design guidelines.   Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing DP methods while substantially reducing training cost, reducing training time by over 40\% without sacrificing accuracy on ImageNet-1k with ResNet-50.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图的统一数据集剪枝框架，通过最大权重团问题实现无损训练加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代训练数据集快速增长导致计算成本高昂，现有剪枝方法要么依赖内在信号（独立评估样本），要么依赖外在信号（通过成对关系促进多样性），但每种方法只关注样本效用的一方面，缺乏在不同剪枝比率或数据分布下的鲁棒性。因此需要统一框架来综合内在和外在信号。
light_analysis.method: 将数据集建模为加权图，节点权重编码内在价值，边权重编码外在价值，将剪枝问题转化为最大权重团问题（MWCP）。由于MWCP是NP难的，提出基于样本边际增益的贪心求解算法。在温和条件下证明该统一目标具有形式化的近似保证，适用于广泛的重要性度量，并提供实用设计指南。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1k数据集上使用ResNet-50进行实验，该方法优于现有剪枝方法，在不牺牲精度的情况下将训练时间减少40%以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一的图基数据集剪枝框架，理论上提供近似保证，实验证明能大幅减少训练时间且保持精度。该方法具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可探索在其他任务或图结构上的扩展。

title: PiDA: Phonetically-Informed Data Augmentation for Robust Vietnamese Speech Translation
abstract: Cascaded speech translation (ST) systems suffer from error propagation when Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) outputs incorrect transcripts. We present the first systematic categorization of ASR errors for Vietnamese ST, classifying substitution errors by phonetic cause and quantifying their impact on downstream Neural Machine Translation (NMT) performance using Linear Mixed-Effects Modelling. We confirm that most ASR substitution errors arise from phonetic confusions rather than random noise, and that these phonetic errors significantly degrade ST quality. Motivated by this finding, we propose Phonetically-Informed Data Augmentation (PiDA), which generates ASR-like corruptions by substituting words with phonetically similar alternatives using phonetic word embeddings. Fine-tuning on a PiDA-augmented version of FLEURS Vietnamese-English improves translation of erroneous ASR outputs (up to +2.04 BLEU over standard fine-tuning) while also slightly improving clean-text performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语音感知数据增强方法PiDA，通过模拟ASR语音混淆错误提升越南语语音翻译鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 级联语音翻译系统中，ASR错误传播导致翻译质量下降。现有研究缺乏对越南语ASR错误类型的系统分析及其对NMT影响的量化。本文首次分类越南语ASR替换错误的语音原因，并确认大多数错误源于语音混淆而非随机噪声，且显著降低翻译质量。因此需要针对性数据增强来缓解此问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Phonetically-Informed Data Augmentation (PiDA)，利用语音词嵌入生成与目标词语音相似的替代词，模拟ASR替换错误。在FLEURS越南语-英语数据集上，使用PiDA对训练数据进行增强，生成包含语音混淆错误的样本。然后对NMT模型进行微调，使其对ASR错误更具鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在FLEURS越南语-英语任务上，使用PiDA增强微调相比标准微调，在错误ASR输出上BLEU提升高达+2.04，同时清洁文本性能也略有提升。验证了模拟语音混淆错误的数据增强能有效提高语音翻译对ASR错误的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统分析越南语ASR错误类型并量化其对翻译的影响，提出PiDA数据增强方法。实验表明该方法有效缓解ASR错误传播，提升翻译鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的语音相似度模型或应用于其他语言。

title: KCSAT-ML: Probing Reasoning Models with Nationwide-Cohort Human Difficulty
abstract: Math reasoning benchmarks have proliferated, yet most lack a per-item difficulty signal grounded in actual human performance. We introduce KCSAT-ML, a decade (2014-2025) of Korean College Scholastic Ability Test (KCSAT; Suneung) mathematics: 664 problems with a 339-item core set carrying official per-item error rates from nationwide cohorts of hundreds of thousands of examinees. We pair the benchmark with Difficulty-aligned Reasoning Gain (DRG): a score-orthogonal metric that asks whether a model's mistakes concentrate on the items humans found hard, or on items humans found easy. Together they expose, across a wide range of VLMs (and LLMs via OCR), three patterns: (i) low-budget accuracy collapses on the high-human-error tail at every model size; (ii) test-time scaling (TTS) raises token use roughly linearly with cohort error rate, while accuracy gains follow a non-monotonic curve; (iii) within a single family, TTS flips between anti-scaling on the hardest items and overthinking on easier ones -- two faces of the same alignment failure. On DRG, models with near-identical accuracy can sit at near-opposite values: one model gets wrong what humans also find hard, while another solves the hardest items yet fails on items humans find easy -- a contrast that aggregate accuracy hides. Our code and dataset builder will be open-sourced at https://github.com/naver-ai/KCSAT-ML.

light_analysis.overview: 提出带有人类难度信号的KCSAT-ML基准和DRG指标，揭示VLM/LLM在数学推理中对齐失败的模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数学推理基准缺乏基于实际人类表现的每道题难度信号，难以评估模型是否真正理解题目。KCSAT-ML利用韩国高考十年数据，提供了大规模人群的错误率，DRG指标可衡量模型错误与人类难度的对齐程度，从而暴露准确率掩盖的差异。
light_analysis.method: 构建KCSAT-ML数据集，包含664道韩国高考数学题，其中339道有官方每道题错误率。提出Difficulty-aligned Reasoning Gain (DRG)指标，计算模型错误与人类难度的正交度量。实验使用多种VLM/LLM（通过OCR输入），分析不同预算、测试时缩放（TTS）及模型家族内部的对齐模式。
light_analysis.result: 发现三种模式：①低预算模型在人类高错误率题目上准确率骤降；②TTS增加token消耗，但准确率增益非单调，随人类错误率呈倒U型；③同一模型家族中，TTS在最难题上反缩放，在简单题上过度思考。DRG显示准确率相近的模型可具有相反的对齐方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了带有人类难度信号的数据集和对齐评估指标，揭示了现有模型在数学推理中与人类难度对齐的失败模式，为未来模型校准和训练提供了新视角。潜在局限性是仅基于韩国高考，可能需扩展至其他语言和领域。

title: Bernstein-Schur Kernels: Random Features by Sketched Modulation and Radial Randomization
abstract: Bernstein--Schur kernels are products of a finite-feature kernel and a completely monotone shift-invariant kernel: nonstationary kernels falling between the shift-invariant and dot-product templates random features exploit, so neither Bochner sampling nor polynomial sketching applies to the full kernel directly. We give one random-feature construction for the whole class that randomizes both factors: it sketches the finite modulation and samples the radial factor's one-dimensional Bernstein--Widder scale before applying Gaussian random Fourier features, giving feature dimension $Dm$, free of the $O(d^2)$ size of the exact modulation feature. With the modulation kept exact (the $m\to\infty$ limit), we prove unbiasedness, an exact variance, and a matrix-Bernstein operator-norm bound controlled by the top kernel and modulation eigenvalues and an intrinsic dimension rather than the crude $N\max_{ij}$ route. Whitening this argument at the ridge makes the effective dimension $d_{\mathrm{eff}}(λ)$ the \emph{exact} intrinsic dimension of the matrix variance, so $O((1+\|P\|_{\mathrm{op}}/λ)\log(d_{\mathrm{eff}}/δ))$ radial draws preserve the kernel-ridge solution; tilting the draw by a closed-form whitened leverage improves this to the effective-dimension count $O((1+d_{\mathrm{eff}})\log(d_{\mathrm{eff}}/δ))$. Conditioning on the sketch carries every guarantee to the deployed doubly-randomized estimator up to one additive sketch term, and all hold for the whole class with the modulation Gram in place of the polynomial one. The flagship instance is the biased $yat$-kernel $k_{yat,b}(w,x)=(w^\top x+b)^2/(\|w-x\|^2+\varepsilon)$, whose family span contains the inverse-multiquadric kernel by finite differences in $b$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对Bernstein-Schur核类的随机特征构造方法，通过联合调制sketch与径向随机化，避免O(d^2)特征维度。
light_analysis.motivation: Bernstein-Schur核是非平稳核，由有限特征核与完全单调平移不变核乘积构成，现有Bochner采样或多项式sketch无法直接应用。该核类广泛但缺乏高效随机特征方法，精确调制特征维度为O(d^2)导致计算瓶颈。因此需要一种通用的随机特征构造，同时处理两个因子且保持低维。
light_analysis.method: 该方法同时随机化两个因子：对有限调制进行随机sketch（降低至D维），对径向因子通过一维Bernstein-Widder尺度采样，再应用高斯随机傅里叶特征，最终特征维度为Dm。当调制保持精确时，证明无偏性、确切方差及矩阵Bernstein算子范数界。通过白化技巧使有效维度成为矩阵方差的内在维度，从而径向采样数量为O((1+||P||_op/λ)log(d_eff/δ))，倾斜采样改进为O((1+d_eff)log(d_eff/δ))。所有保证适用于整个核类。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明：随机特征估计无偏，方差确切已知；矩阵Bernstein界由核与调制特征值及内在维度控制，而非传统N乘最大元素。径向采样复杂度仅依赖有效维度d_eff，而非输入维度d；倾斜采样进一步将数量降至O((1+d_eff)log(d_eff/δ))。这些结果对全体Bernstein-Schur核成立，实例为yat核族。摘要未提供具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为Bernstein-Schur核类提供了首个通用的随机特征构造，通过sketched调制与径向随机化分离维度依赖，理论完备且实用。实例yat核族涵盖逆多二次核，可应用于核岭回归加速。未来工作可探索更优的sketch策略或扩展到其他核类。

title: An Improved Generative Adversarial Network for Micro-Resistivity Imaging Logging Restoration
