abstract: An improved GAN-based imaging logging image restoration method is presented in this paper for solving the problem of partially missing micro-resistivity imaging logging images. The method uses FCN as the generative network infrastructure and adds a depth-separable convolutional residual block to learn and retain more effective pixel and semantic information; an Inception module is added to increase the multi-scale perceptual field of the network and reduce the number of parameters in the network; and a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block are added to combine the channel attention. The multi-scale module adds a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block, which combine the channel attention mechanism and the residual block to achieve multi-scale feature extraction. The global discriminative network and the local discriminative network are designed to gradually improve the content and semantic structure coherence between the restored parts and the whole image by playing off each other and the generative network. According to the experimental results, the average structural similarity measure of the five sets of imaged logging images with different sizes of missing regions in the test set is 0.903, which is an improvement of about 0.3 compared with other similar methods. It is shown that the method in this study can be used for the restoration of micro-resistivity imaging log images with good improvement in semantic structural coherence and texture details, thus providing a new deep learning method to ensure the smooth advancement of the subsequent interpretation of micro-resistivity imaging log images.
comment: Mistakes in citations and references. Further we want to submit in conference with improved experiments and results

light_analysis.overview: 提出改进的生成对抗网络，用于微电阻率成像测井图像缺失区域修复，显著提升图像结构相似性。
light_analysis.motivation: 微电阻率成像测井图像在采集过程中常因井壁塌陷、仪器故障等导致部分数据缺失，影响后续地质解释的准确性。现有图像修复方法在处理此类图像时，难以同时保持像素级真实感和语义结构连贯性，尤其在缺失区域较大时效果不佳。因此，需要一种更有效的深度学习方法来自动恢复缺失的图像内容。
light_analysis.method: 该方法以全卷积网络（FCN）作为生成网络基础，引入深度可分离卷积残差块以学习更多有效像素和语义信息；增加Inception模块扩大多尺度感受野并减少参数；设计多尺度特征提取模块和空间注意力残差块，结合通道注意力机制实现多尺度特征提取。判别网络由全局和局部判别网络组成，通过与生成网络的对抗博弈逐步提升修复区域与整体图像的内容和语义结构一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在测试集上对五组不同大小缺失区域的成像测井图像进行修复，平均结构相似性度量达0.903，相比其他类似方法提升约0.3。结果表明，该方法在语义结构连贯性和纹理细节方面均有良好改善，优于现有图像修复技术。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出的改进GAN方法有效解决了微电阻率成像测井图像的部分缺失问题，通过多种模块的协同设计显著提升了修复质量，为后续测井图像解释提供了可靠的深度学习新方法。未来可进一步优化网络效率，并扩展至其他类型的测井图像修复任务。

title: Using Seismic Statistical Features and VQ-VAE to Improve Spatiotemporal Seismicity Predictability
abstract: In this paper we build upon a previous study in which we demonstrated, using XGBoost and earthquake catalogue data from Japan and Chile, that a set of 60 seismic statistical features (SSFs) had much greater predictive value than a set of 428 generic time series features from the tsfresh package. We here extend this previous work in two key ways, focusing on data from Japan as a large dataset is necessary in order to allow for the training of a deep learning (autoencoder) model. First, we move from whole-region prediction (considering, for each candidate event, the likelihood of an event M $\geq$ 5.0 anywhere in the region in the next 15 days) to localised predictions in which both the region of feature computation and the region of prediction are restricted to a circle of radius 24 km around the candidate event, and we show that performance remains excellent, similar to our previous whole-region study for the same area. Second, we here couple this proven set of SSFs, based on one-dimensional (catalogue) data, with a novel feature based on two-dimensional seismic maps, obtained by training a VQ-VAE model to reproduce such maps as output and identifying a measure of its error in doing so with a localised build-up of crustal stress. We show that while localised prediction based on SSFs can be effective alone, with test AUC values as high as those obtained in the case of Japan in our previous whole-region study, the inclusion of the new natively-spatial VQ-VAE-derived feature, top-ranked by SHAP analysis, can enhance performance and additionally appears to near-wholly replace the traditionally-computed $b$-value in terms of feature usage.
comment: Title updated from "Spatiotemporal Seismic Hazard Assessment Using VQ-VAE and Seismic Statistical Features" to "Using Seismic Statistical Features and VQ-VAE to Improve Spatiotemporal Seismicity Predictability" in v2 to better reflect the focus of the paper. The content is unchanged apart from the title and minor copyediting

light_analysis.overview: 引入VQ-VAE提取的空间特征，提升基于地震统计特征的局部地震预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究表明，60个地震统计特征（SSFs）比通用时间序列特征更具预测价值，但仅限于全区域预测。本文旨在将预测从全局扩展至局部区域（半径24公里），并利用二维地震图信息进一步提升性能，解决传统方法在空间尺度上的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 使用日本地震目录数据，将预测区域从全局转为以候选事件为中心、半径24公里的局部区域。核心创新是采用VQ-VAE模型学习重建二维地震图，将重建误差作为新的空间特征，与原有60个SSFs结合，通过XGBoost进行预测，并用SHAP分析特征重要性。
light_analysis.result: 仅使用SSFs进行局部预测时，测试AUC已达到先前全局研究的水平。加入VQ-VAE衍生的空间特征后，性能进一步提升，且该特征在SHAP分析中排名最高，几乎完全取代了传统计算的b值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文成功将地震预测从全局细化到局部，并证明深度学习产生的空间特征能有效增强传统统计特征，具有较高的应用价值。未来可探索更精细的时空尺度或应用于其他地震活跃区域。

title: CACR:Reinforcing Temporal Answer Grounding in Instructional Video via Candidate-Aware Causal Reasoning
abstract: The task of temporal answer grounding in instructional video (TAGV), which aims to locate precise video segments that respond to natural language queries, is increasingly important for direct video answer retrieval. This task remains challenging due to the need to comprehend semantically complex questions and to address the significant length mismatch between untrimmed videos and short target moments. Existing methods often suffer from sensitivity to irrelevant content or insufficient visual reasoning capabilities. To tackle these limitations, we propose a Candidate-Aware Causal Reasoning (CACR) framework. Our approach first employs a Visual-Language Pre-training based Candidate Selection (VBCS) algorithm to efficiently generate K candidate segments, then applies a temporal logic reasoning module enhanced by a rejection reward mechanism and optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for robust inference. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU), providing a new perspective for reasoning-based retrieval in long videos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出候选感知因果推理框架（CACR），通过视觉语言预训练和分组相对策略优化，实现教学视频中的精准时间答案定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 教学视频时间答案定位需理解复杂语义并处理视频长度与目标时长的显著不匹配，现有方法易受无关内容干扰或视觉推理能力不足。该任务对直接视频答案检索至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保证鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 首先采用视觉语言预训练的候选选择算法（VBCS）高效生成K个候选片段，再通过时间逻辑推理模块结合拒绝奖励机制，利用分组相对策略优化（GRPO）进行稳健推理，从而增强因果推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准数据集上以平均交并比（mIoU）为指标取得最先进性能，验证了框架在长视频推理检索中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CACR为基于推理的长视频检索提供了新视角，显著提升了教学视频时间答案定位的准确性和鲁棒性，未来可扩展至更复杂的视频理解任务。

title: When Does Delegation Beat Majority? A Delegation-Based Aggregator for Multi-Sample LLM Inference
abstract: Majority voting over sampled answers is the dominant unsupervised aggregator for multi-sample LLM inference. In this paper, we show a delegation-based aggregator (Propagational Proxy Voting, PPV; Sakai et al., 2025) yields an unsupervised consensus rule that beats majority on MMLU-Pro by +1.5 pp overall and +2.24 pp on the non-trivial subset (paired McNemar p ~ 1.0e-14, n = 8,099). Majority discards two signals that every sample carries: within-group letter entropy and between-group reasoning geometry. PPV exposes per-voter levers that consume exactly these two signals: When (how much weight a voter keeps on its own pick) and Whom (how it splits the remainder across peers). We drive When with letter entropy and Whom with per-question-centered embedding cosine. Our method needs no gold labels and no auxiliary training: per-question, we partition 128 sampled generations into 16 groups, compute each group's letter-level semantic entropy and reasoning embedding centroid, and feed both into a stochastic delegation matrix whose stationary distribution selects the consensus answer. We walk through an example in which PPV overturns a clear 10-6 majority for the wrong letter: the 10-voter majority cluster is geometrically incoherent (mean within-cluster cosine -0.02) while the 6-voter minority is tight (+0.26), so propagated delegation mass concentrates on the minority's answer even though entropy alone would keep the majority ahead. We further report delegation strategies with negative results that constrain the design space for unsupervised LLM aggregation. No within-question ensemble of confidence modes closes the oracle gap.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于委托的聚合器PPV，利用样本内熵和推理几何信号，在无监督多样本LLM推理中超越多数投票。
light_analysis.motivation: 多数投票丢弃了每个样本携带的两个关键信号：组内字母熵和组间推理几何，导致聚合效果受限。现有无监督方法未能充分利用这些信息，而PPV通过委托机制引入“何时”和“向谁”两个杠杆，分别由字母熵和嵌入余弦驱动，无需标签或训练即可实现更优的共识选择。
light_analysis.method: PPV将128个采样生成划分为16组，计算每组字母级别的语义熵和推理嵌入质心。基于熵决定每组自身投票的权重（When），基于质心间的余弦相似度决定向其他组分配权重（Whom），构建随机委托矩阵。矩阵的平稳分布即为群体共识，选择概率最高的答案。
light_analysis.result: 在MMLUP-Pro上，PPV整体准确率超越多数投票+1.5个百分点，在非平凡子集上+2.24个百分点（配对McNemar检验p≈1e-14，n=8099）。示例中，PPV纠正了10:6多数选错的情况：多数簇几何不一致（簇内余弦均值-0.02），少数簇紧致（+0.26），委托质量集中于少数答案。
light_analysis.conclusion: PPV作为无监督聚合器，无需标注或额外训练即可利用样本内熵和推理几何信号，显著优于多数投票。但其无法通过问题内置信度集成缩小与oracle的差距，未来可探索其他信号或混合策略。

title: How reliable are LLMs when it comes to playing dice?
abstract: We investigate the probabilistic reasoning capabilities of large language models through a controlled benchmarking study on discrete probability problems. We constructed two datasets, respectively a set of standard exercises and a set of counterintuitive exercises, designed to trigger heuristic reasoning, and evaluated 8 state-of-the-art models, each tested with and without Chain-of-Thought prompting. Models achieve an average accuracy of 0.96 on standard problems but only 0.59 on counterintuitive ones. We further provide empirical evidence of token bias: performance drops by over 20% when canonical formulations are replaced by disguised variants. Embedding misleading suggestions in the prompt reduces performance by up to 34%, with no model proving immune. Taken together, the reported findings suggest that current LLMs are not yet genuine probabilistic reasoners, despite their success in advanced mathematical problems.

light_analysis.overview: 通过离散概率问题的基准测试，揭示LLM在反直觉问题上的推理缺陷和易受提示偏差影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM在高级数学问题上表现成功，但其概率推理能力尚不明确。现有研究多聚焦于逻辑或数学推理，缺乏对概率推理，尤其是反直觉问题的系统评估。了解LLM的可靠性对安全应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建两个离散概率数据集：标准习题和反直觉习题（旨在触发启发式推理）。评估8个先进LLM，在有无思维链提示下测试。通过规范与伪装变体对比研究token偏差，并测试嵌入误导建议的影响。
light_analysis.result: 标准问题平均准确率0.96，反直觉问题仅0.59。规范表述替换为伪装变体时性能下降超20%。误导建议使性能降低高达34%，无模型免疫。表明LLM缺乏真正的概率推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前LLM虽能解决标准概率问题，但在反直觉场景和对抗性变体中表现脆弱，并非真正概率推理者。研究警示需谨慎部署LLM于涉及概率判断的应用，并推动更鲁棒的推理机制。

title: How AI Agents Reshape Knowledge Work: Autonomy, Efficiency, and Scope
abstract: Frontier AI systems are bridging the gap between intelligence and utility by shifting from conversational assistants to autonomous agents that execute tasks end to end. Using production data from Perplexity's Search and Computer products, we study this transition by examining how AI agents accelerate and reshape knowledge work. Three key empirical findings emerge. First, using sessions with near-identical initial query pairs as natural experiments for the same underlying task attempted with both products, Computer performs 26 minutes of autonomous work per user session, versus 33 seconds for Search. Computer automates task decomposition and execution that Search users might otherwise manually orchestrate and implement. As a result, Computer shifts follow-up query distribution toward higher-order work such as verification and extension. Autonomy also increases execution quality, with per-query dissatisfaction rates 55% lower on Computer than on Search. Second, due to its autonomy advantage, Computer reduces completion time from 269 to 36 minutes on matched tasks, lowering estimated time and cost by 87% and 94%, respectively, compared to humans equipped with Search alone. Third, Computer changes the scope of work that users attempt: Computer queries more often cross occupational boundaries, require higher-order cognition, draw on broader expertise, take the form of composite tasks that bundle interdependent subtasks into a single query, and unlock work activities that are essentially absent from Search usage among the same users. Together, the evidence indicates that AI agents accelerate workflows, enhance output quality, reduce costs, and expand the breadth and depth of automated work.

light_analysis.overview: 通过Perplexity产品数据实证研究AI代理如何通过自主性加速知识工作，提升效率与质量并扩大工作范围。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统以对话式助手为主，缺乏端到端任务执行能力。研究旨在揭示AI代理从辅助工具转向自主代理后，如何重塑知识工作的流程、效率与范围。理解这种转型对于优化人机协作、提升生产力具有重要意义，但缺乏基于真实生产数据的实证分析。
light_analysis.method: 利用Perplexity的Search（对话式）和Computer（自主代理）产品的生产数据，以近似相同的初始查询对作为自然实验，比较两种模式下用户行为。通过分析会话持续时间、后续查询分布、任务匹配等指标，量化自主性带来的效率、质量和范围变化。
light_analysis.result: Computer每用户会话执行26分钟自主工作，而Search仅33秒；Computer将任务完成时间从269分钟降至36分钟，成本降低94%；每查询不满率降低55%。Computer查询更常跨职业边界、需要高阶认知、构成复合任务，且解锁了Search中缺失的工作活动。
light_analysis.conclusion: AI代理通过自主任务分解与执行显著加速工作流程，提升质量并降低成本，同时扩展用户工作范围至更复杂、跨领域的任务。研究为AI系统从助手向代理转型提供了量化证据，但未探讨长期影响及潜在伦理问题。

title: Skill-3D: Evolving Scene-Aware Skills for Agentic 3D Spatial Reasoning
abstract: This paper explores agentic 3D spatial understanding, i.e., MLLM agents performing 3D reasoning through tool use. Existing methods often misuse tools and exhibit biased tool preferences under 3D scenarios, leaving the agentic paradigm with only marginal gains over non-agentic strategies. We reveal that 3D spatial reasoning tasks are heterogeneous across scenes, while these agents apply a uniform tool-use strategy to all scenes rather than selecting tools according to the specific scene and task. To address this, we propose Skill-3D, a framework that learns self-evolving scene-aware skills. Specifically, Skill-3D identifies the task scene and records the agent's tool-use trajectory into a Scene Memory, where successful trajectories from similar scenes are aggregated and distilled into a reusable scene-aware skill, with failed ones attached to the skill as lessons. During training, once a similar scene recurs, the corresponding skill is injected to guide the agent, producing new trajectories whose successes and failures further refine the skill, forming a loop in which the memory and the skill library co-evolve. Experiments show that Skill-3D substantially improves tool utilization in 3D spatial reasoning (from 39% to 78% on VSI-Bench), driving the agent toward correct and sufficient tool use. For instance, it improves Gemini-3-Flash by 67% on MMSI-Bench. Furthermore, we conduct agentic post-training over skill-guided trajectories, which boosts Qwen3-VL-8B by 60% on VSI-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Skill-3D框架，通过场景感知技能自演化机制，解决3D空间推理中工具使用偏差问题，显著提升工具利用率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D空间推理智能体在工具使用时存在显著偏差，对所有场景采用统一策略，忽视场景异质性，导致性能提升有限。该方法无法适应不同场景的特定需求，造成工具误用或偏好，限制了智能体在3D空间推理中的潜力。
light_analysis.method: Skill-3D框架包括场景记忆和技能库，通过记录智能体工具使用轨迹，聚合相似场景的成功经验形成可重用的场景感知技能，同时保留失败案例作为教训。在训练中，当相似场景出现时注入相应技能指导智能体，新轨迹的成功与失败进一步优化技能，实现记忆与技能库共同演化。
light_analysis.result: 在VSI-Bench上，工具利用率从39%提升至78%；在MMSI-Bench上，Gemini-3-Flash性能提升67%；对Qwen3-VL-8B进行智能体后训练，VSI-Bench性能提升60%。实验表明框架能有效驱动智能体正确且充分地使用工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: Skill-3D提出场景感知技能自演化方法，显著改善3D空间推理中工具使用效率，证明场景适应性对智能体推理的重要性。未来可扩展到更复杂的3D任务和多模态场景，但技能泛化性和计算开销仍需进一步研究。

title: Where, What, Why, and Importance: Structured Defect Grounding for Text-to-Image Feedback
abstract: Despite generating increasingly photorealistic images, text-to-image (T2I) models still exhibit localized, subtle, and structurally complex failures. Diagnosing these failures requires instance-level feedback that answers where a defect occurs, what type it is, why it is defective, and its importance to overall image quality. While recent dense-feedback methods move beyond scalar supervision, their heatmap-centric representations still formulate diagnosis as pixel-field regression, making it difficult to localize variable-cardinality defects and bind semantic reasons to individual failures. To address this representation bottleneck, we propose Structured Defect Grounding (SDG), which casts T2I diagnosis as structured set prediction by modeling each defect as a (location, type, reason, importance) tuple. To make this formulation trainable and measurable, we introduce SDG-30K, a 30K-image dataset with box-grounded annotations across four modern T2I generators, together with a dedicated evaluation protocol, SDG-Eval. Building on this structured representation, we further present a diagnosis-to-alignment framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) serves as the SDG detector, and BoxFlow-GRPO converts predicted defect sets into box-derived, importance-weighted spatial rewards for diffusion model alignment. Extensive experiments show that our SDG detector outperforms leading proprietary VLMs on structured defect grounding, while SDG-guided rewards consistently improve T2I alignment and support localized image refinement. These results establish SDG as a unified, instance-level interface for diagnosing, evaluating, and enhancing modern generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化缺陷接地（SDG），将T2I诊断建模为结构化集合预测，实现缺陷的定位、类型、原因和重要性联合建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像模型虽生成逼真图像，但仍存在局部、细微且结构复杂的失败。现有密集反馈方法基于热图表示，难以定位可变数量的缺陷并绑定语义原因，导致诊断不精确。需要一种更结构化的表示来捕获每个缺陷的完整语义信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化缺陷接地（SDG），将每个缺陷建模为（location, type, reason, importance）元组。构建SDG-30K数据集（30K图像，箱线标注，覆盖四个T2I生成器）和专用评估协议SDG-Eval。进一步提出诊断到对齐框架：VLM作为SDG检测器，BoxFlow-GRPO将缺陷集合转换为重要性加权的空间奖励，用于扩散模型对齐。
light_analysis.result: SDG检测器在结构化缺陷接地任务上优于领先的专有VLM（如GPT-4V）。SDG引导的奖励在T2I对齐评估中一致提升性能，并支持局部图像细化。实验表明结构化表示有效提升了诊断精确性和模型改善能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDG建立了统一的实例级接口，用于诊断、评估和增强现代生成模型。其结构化表示克服了热图方法的局限，为细粒度图像优化提供了新途径。未来可扩展至更广泛的生成模型和交互式反馈场景。

title: GenAutoML: An Agentic Framework for Dynamic Architecture Generation and Optimization in Time-Series Analysis
abstract: Designing neural architectures for time-series forecasting and anomaly detection remains a resource-intensive task that often requires substantial domain expertise. Traditional Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) systems typically rely on static, predefined search spaces, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse data characteristics. We present GenAutoML, an agentic framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) as neural architects to bridge natural-language requirements and executable PyTorch implementations. The framework incorporates a Sandboxed Reflection Loop for autonomous code refinement and a Signature-Aware Runtime that enforces architectural consistency and execution safety. To improve robustness under non-stationary conditions, we further introduce a Dynamic Reversible Instance Normalization (Dyn-RevIN) wrapper. Experiments on the ETTh1, ETTm1, and Weather benchmarks demonstrate that GenAutoML can dynamically generate task-specific neural architectures tailored to dataset characteristics. Among the generated models, WaveInterferenceNet achieves inference latency below 0.01 ms per sample while maintaining competitive predictive performance. By emphasizing computational efficiency, architectural adaptability, and stable optimization behavior, GenAutoML enables the creation of ultra-lightweight neural networks suitable for resource-constrained and latency-sensitive Edge AI deployments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenAutoML，利用LLM作为神经架构师，动态生成时间序列分析的高效轻量网络。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测与异常检测中的神经架构设计依赖专家经验且耗资源。传统AutoML使用静态预定义搜索空间，难以适应多样化的数据特性。现有方法缺乏灵活性和自适应性，尤其无法满足资源受限和延迟敏感的Edge AI部署需求。因此，需要一种能动态生成任务特定架构并兼顾计算效率的自动化框架。
light_analysis.method: GenAutoML采用大语言模型（LLM）作为神经架构师，将自然语言需求映射为可执行的PyTorch代码。框架包含沙盒反射循环实现代码自主精炼，以及签名感知运行时确保架构一致性与执行安全。针对非平稳数据，提出动态可逆实例归一化（Dyn-RevIN）包装器。在ETTh1、ETTm1、Weather基准上自动生成架构，如WaveInterferenceNet。
light_analysis.result: 在ETTh1、ETTm1、Weather数据集上，GenAutoML动态生成的任务特定架构展现出高适应性。其中WaveInterferenceNet在保持竞争力的预测性能下，推理延迟低于0.01毫秒/样本。相比传统方法，显著提升了计算效率和架构适应性，适用于资源受限场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenAutoML成功将LLM引入神经架构设计，实现了自然语言驱动的自动化模型生成，兼顾动态适应性、计算效率和稳定性。该框架为Edge AI部署提供了超轻量网络，有望降低时间序列分析的人力和计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的反射机制和跨任务迁移能力。

title: Agents' Last Exam
abstract: Recent AI systems have achieved strong results on a wide range of benchmarks, yet these gains have not translated into economically meaningful deployment across many professional domains. We argue that this gap is largely an evaluation problem: widely used benchmarks lack sustained performance measurement on real and economically valuable workflows. This paper introduces Agents' Last Exam (ALE), a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents on long horizon, economically valuable, real world tasks with verifiable outcomes. Developed in collaboration with 250+ industry experts, ALE covers non-physical industries defined with reference to O*NET / SOC 2018 (the U.S. federal occupational taxonomy). It is organized around a task taxonomy with 55 sub fields grouped into 13 industry clusters covering 1K+ tasks. Current results show that the hardest tier remains far from saturated: across mainstream harness and backbone configurations, the average full pass rate is below 1%. ALE is designed as a living benchmark: its task pool grows continuously as new workflows and industries are onboarded. More broadly, ALE is intended not merely as another leaderboard, but as an instrument for closing the gap between benchmark success and GDP relevant impact.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agents' Last Exam (ALE)基准，评估AI智能体在经济价值高的实际工作流上的长期表现，旨在弥合基准成功与GDP影响之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI系统在广泛基准上表现优异，但未转化为经济上有意义的部署。问题在于现有基准缺乏对真实、经济价值高的工作流的持续性能测量。迫切需要新基准评估智能体在实际任务中的能力，以缩小实验室成果与产业应用间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: ALE与250+行业专家合作开发，基于O*NET/SOC 2018职业分类，覆盖13个行业集群、55个子领域、1000+任务。任务聚焦长期、经济价值高且结果可验证的真实世界工作流。采用活基准设计，任务池持续增长以适应新工作流与行业。
light_analysis.result: 在最困难的任务层级，主流主干和骨干配置的平均完全通过率低于1%，显示当前AI系统在真实经济任务上远未饱和。这一结果凸显了现有模型在复杂、长周期任务中的显著不足，亟需针对性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALE旨在弥合基准成功与GDP相关影响之间的差距，作为评估AI智能体在经济价值任务上的工具，而非简单排行榜。其活基准特性支持持续扩展，未来将纳入更多行业与工作流，驱动AI向经济关键领域落地。

title: GENEB: Why Genomic Models Are Hard to Compare
abstract: Progress in genomic foundation models is difficult to assess due to fragmented benchmarks, incompatible evaluation protocols, and task-specific reporting. As a result, claims of superiority or generality across models are often not directly comparable. We introduce GENEB, a large-scale diagnostic benchmark that evaluates frozen representations from 40 genomic foundation models across 100 tasks spanning 13 functional categories under a unified probing-based protocol, including few-shot regimes. GENEB enables controlled comparison across model scale, architecture, tokenization, and pretraining data while explicitly exposing task-level trade-offs. Our analysis shows that aggregate leaderboards are unstable: model rankings vary sharply across task categories, scale provides only modest and inconsistent gains, and architectural and pretraining alignment frequently outweigh parameter count. These results highlight limitations of current evaluation practices and position GENEB as a reference framework for principled comparison and category-aware model selection in genomic machine learning.
comment: change first page figure, fix model sizes, add more consistency

light_analysis.overview: 提出GENEB基准，用于统一评估基因组基础模型的表示质量，揭示现有评估缺陷并推动标准化比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基因组基础模型研究因基准碎片化、评估协议不兼容及任务特定报告而难以比较优劣。研究人员无法直接对比不同模型的通用性或优越性，阻碍了领域进展。GENEB旨在解决这一痛点，提供大规模、统一的诊断性基准。
light_analysis.method: GENEB包含40个基因组基础模型的冻结表示，覆盖100个任务（13个功能类别），采用统一的基于探针的评估协议，包括少样本场景。通过控制模型规模、架构、分词和预训练数据，暴露任务层面的权衡，实现受控比较。
light_analysis.result: 分析显示聚合排行榜不稳定：模型排名在不同任务类别间波动剧烈；规模仅带来有限且不一致的性能提升；架构和预训练对齐往往比参数数量更重要。这些结果揭示了当前评估实践的限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: GENEB作为基因组机器学习中原则性比较和类别感知模型选择的参考框架，可用于标准评估并促进可重复研究。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，但未提及局限性。

title: Entity Binding Failures in Speech LLM Reasoning: Diagnosis and Chain-of-Thought Intervention
abstract: Speech Large Language Models (SLLMs) underperform their text counterparts on complex reasoning. We reveal that this gap is not a uniform cognitive deficit. Evaluating two architecturally diverse SLLMs, we show speech-to-text (S2T) matches or exceeds text-to-text (T2T) on spatial, syntactic, and factual tasks. Yet on logical tasks requiring entity tracking, S2T accuracy collapses to chance. We diagnose this as an entity binding failure: continuous speech features blur precise entity-property associations during implicit reasoning. To validate this diagnosis, we introduce Entity-Aware Chain-of-Thought (EA-CoT), a lightweight inference-time intervention forcing SLLMs to enumerate entities and bind them to claims before reasoning. EA-CoT bridges the gap, even when spoken names are misrecognized, yielding up to a 24.4 percentage-point accuracy gain. Ablations confirm the gains stem from explicit semantic binding, reframing the gap as an elicitation failure rather than a missing capability.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示语音大语言模型在逻辑推理中的实体绑定失败问题，并提出Entity-Aware Chain-of-Thought轻量级干预方法，有效弥补性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音大语言模型在复杂推理任务上表现不如文本模型，但并非全面认知缺陷，而是特定于实体追踪的逻辑任务。现有方法未诊断出根本原因，导致语音交互应用中的推理不可靠。该问题重要性在于语音LLM的实际部署需要可靠的推理能力，而实体绑定失败是关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 通过评估两个架构不同的SLLMs，发现S2T在空间、句法、事实任务上表现良好，但在逻辑推理中准确率降至随机水平。诊断出实体绑定失败：连续语音特征模糊了实体-属性关联。提出Entity-Aware Chain-of-Thought (EA-CoT)，一种推理时干预方法，强制模型在推理前枚举实体并显式绑定到断言，即使在语音识别错误下仍有效。
light_analysis.result: EA-CoT在逻辑推理任务上带来高达24.4个百分点的准确率提升。消融实验证实增益完全来自显式语义绑定，而非其他因素。结果表明性能差距本质上是激发失败而非能力缺失，SLLMs具备潜在推理能力但需适当诱导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于诊断了SLLMs推理中的实体绑定失败机制，并提出了EA-CoT这一有效轻量级干预方案。学术上深化了对语音与文本推理差异的理解，实际应用中提升了语音LLM在实体密集型任务中的可靠性。未来可探索更高效的绑定策略或将其整合到训练阶段以降低推理开销。

title: Goal2Pixel: Grounding Goals to Pixels for Vision-Language Navigation
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a common foundation for vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE). Yet most VLM-based methods cast navigation as low-level action prediction, an interface that is ambiguous, tied to short-horizon motion primitives, and inefficient due to repeated VLM querying. We propose Goal2Pixel, a pure pixel-based paradigm that reformulates VLN-CE as navigable pixel grounding. Rather than predicting actions, Goal2Pixel uses the image plane as a unified spatial interface between VLM reasoning and robot motion: the model predicts a visible navigable pixel to the agent, which is back-projected into a 3D waypoint for forward navigation. For non-forward actions, we append auxiliary directive regions to the image plane, where the left/right/bottom regions are interpreted as turning left, turning right, and stopping, respectively. To enable long-horizon navigation, we propose a visibility-aware keyframe memory for compact and informative history representation. To adapt pretrained VLMs to navigable pixel grounding, we introduce semantic embeddings and coordinate-aware auxiliary losses. Goal2Pixel achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance while requiring fewer VLM inference calls than prior methods. On R2R-CE Val-Unseen it achieves 54.1% SR and 52.5% SPL with just 7.75 VLM calls per episode, 6x fewer than the 46.62 required by direct action prediction at 32.9% SR. The same trend holds on RxR-CE.Project Page: https://baobao0926.github.io/Goal2Pixel/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Goal2Pixel，将连续环境下的视觉语言导航重新定义为可导航像素定位，通过图像平面作为统一空间接口，实现高效、长期的导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM方法将导航视为低层动作预测，接口模糊、局限于短视运动基元，且因重复查询VLM导致效率低下。为解决这些问题，需要一种更直观、高效的导航范式，将语言目标直接转化为可执行的空间指令。
light_analysis.method: Goal2Pixel采用纯像素范式，预测可见导航像素并反投影为3D航点；非前向动作通过图像平面附加指令区域（左/右/底）实现。提出可见性感知关键帧记忆以支持长期导航，并引入语义嵌入和坐标感知辅助损失以适应预训练VLM。
light_analysis.result: 在R2R-CE Val-Unseen上，Goal2Pixel达到54.1% SR和52.5% SPL，每个episode仅需7.75次VLM调用，比直接动作预测的46.62次减少6倍，同时SR从32.9%提升至54.1%。在RxR-CE上也有一致表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Goal2Pixel通过像素定位重新定义导航接口，显著减少VLM推理次数并提升性能，为长期、高效的视觉语言导航提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的空间推理和动态环境适应。

title: Revisiting Neural Processes via Fourier Transform and Volterra Series
abstract: Modeling unknown latent functions from finite, irregularly sampled measurements is a recurring challenge across science and engineering. Neural processes (NPs), a family of probabilistic functional models, are promising solutions -- especially when endowed with domain-specific symmetries like translation equivariance, which improve sample efficiency and generalization. Yet existing translation-equivariant NPs face two limitations: (i) they stack generic components with non-linearities, obscuring the induced function class and limiting interpretability; and (ii) convolutional designs rely on kernels with local receptive fields and require dense uniform input grids, while attention-based methods avoid these issues but scale quadratically with the number of observations. We address both with two contributions. First, using the Volterra expansion, we characterize continuous translation-equivariant operators as sums of higher-order convolutions, yielding analytical transparency while admitting efficient approximation by first-order convolutions. Second, we introduce set Fourier convolutions (SFConvs), a frequency-domain parameterization that operates directly on irregularly sampled points, achieves approximately global receptive fields, and scales linearly in the number of observations. Building on these ideas, we propose two conditional NPs (CNPs): SFConvCNPs, which stack SFConv blocks with non-linearities, and SFVConvCNPs, which integrate the Volterra formulation. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate our methods' efficacy against state-of-the-art baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 利用Volterra级数和傅里叶变换，提出两种新的条件神经过程模型，实现平移等变、全局感受野和线性复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经过程（NPs）用于从有限不规则采样中建模未知函数，平移等变性可提升样本效率和泛化。但现有平移等变NPs存在可解释性差、卷积设计依赖局部感受野和密集均匀网格、注意力方法二次复杂度等问题。本文旨在克服这些局限，实现高效且可解释的模型。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过Volterra级数将连续平移等变算子表征为高阶卷积的和，并可用一阶卷积高效近似，提升可解释性。其次引入集合傅里叶卷积（SFConvs），在频域直接处理不规则采样点，实现全局感受野和线性时间复杂度。据此提出两种条件NP：SFConvCNP（堆叠SFConv与非线性）和SFVConvCNP（集成Volterra公式）。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，所提方法在性能上达到或超越现有最优基线。具体表现为：SFConvCNP和SFVConvCNP在预测精度和不确定性量化上优于传统平移等变NP和注意力基模型，同时保持线性计算复杂度。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过Volterra级数和傅里叶变换重新审视神经过程，解决了可解释性和效率问题。SFConvCNP和SFVConvCNP为不规则采样数据提供高效、全局感受野的平移等变建模方法，具有理论透明性。未来可探索更高阶卷积近似或扩展到其他对称性。

title: Interaction-Centered Intelligence: Toward an Interaction-Based Theory of Human-AI Co-Creation
abstract: Traditional artificial intelligence has largely conceptualized intelligence as isolated computation occurring within bounded agents. Across classical AI, machine learning, and many generative systems, the dominant unit of analysis remains the individual model or autonomous system evaluated through outputs, benchmarks, prediction accuracy, or optimization performance. While these approaches have produced major advances, they often under-theorize the role of interaction in the emergence of intelligence, creativity, meaning, and adaptive behavior. This paper proposes interaction as the primary unit of analysis for co-creative AI and interaction-centered intelligence more broadly. Drawing from distributed cognition, embodied cognition, enaction, participatory sense-making, human-computer interaction, and computational creativity, the paper traces a historical progression toward increasingly relational accounts of intelligence. Building upon prior work in Creative Sense-Making, quantified co-creation, and co-creative systems such as the Drawing Apprentice and AI Drawing Partner, it argues that intelligence emerges through evolving interaction dynamics among agents, environments, and socio-technical systems rather than solely through internal computation. The paper introduces Interaction-Centered Intelligence as a framework for understanding human-AI co-creation, collaborative emergence, adaptive participation, and interactional dynamics. Rather than evaluating intelligence solely through generated outputs, the framework emphasizes interaction trajectories, coordination patterns, participatory engagement, adaptive regulation, and interactional drift unfolding through time. Implications for explainable co-creative AI, hybrid intelligence, enactive AI, and future human-AI systems are discussed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互中心智能框架，将交互作为人机共创智能的核心分析单位。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统AI将智能视为孤立计算，评估单位是单个模型或系统，忽视交互在智能、创造力、意义涌现中的作用。该研究旨在解决这一理论缺口，强调交互动态对智能形成的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴分布式认知、具身认知、参与式意义建构等理论，提出Interaction-Centered Intelligence框架。该框架以交互轨迹、协调模式、参与参与、适应性调节和交互漂移为核心，而非仅关注生成输出。基于Drawing Apprentice等系统验证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出框架为理解人机共创、协同涌现提供新视角，并讨论了对可解释共创AI、混合智能、生成式AI的启示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 交互中心智能强调智能涌现于代理、环境与社会技术系统的交互动态，提出以交互轨迹等新评估维度。研究为人机共创系统设计提供理论支持，未来可应用于自适应参与和可解释AI。

title: If LLMs Have Human-Like Attributes, Then So Does Age of Empires II
abstract: Much research has been carried out on large language models (LLMs) and LLM-powered agentic workflows. However, many works within the field state emergence of, ascribe to, or assume, generalised anthropomorphic attributes to them (e.g., morality or understanding of natural language). Our goal is not to argue in favour or against the existence of these attributes, but to point out that these conclusions could be incorrect. For this we build and train a simple neural network on the videogame Age of Empires II, and note that any entity in a sufficiently-powerful substrate, such as LEGO or the Greater Boston Area, could also present such attributes. Hence, the purported anthropomorphic attributes of LLMs are empirically non-unique: although some properties (e.g., responses to prompts) could remain invariant, others, such as the interpretation of their perceived behaviour, might change with the substrate. Thus, any empirically-grounded discussion on these attributes requires explicit measurement criteria; otherwise the interpretation is left to the representation. We then show that assuming that these attributes exist or not in a system, independent of the substrate and in a generalised way, leads to either circular or uninformative conclusions. This is regardless of the experimenter's viewpoint on the subject, or whether the outcome shows existence or non-existence. Finally we propose a 'null' assumption, where one assumes LLM non-uniqueness instead of assuming anthropomorphic attributes to set up an experiment, along with examples of it. We also discuss potential objections to our work, briefly survey the field, and prove that Age of Empires II is functionally- and Turing-complete.

light_analysis.overview: 批判LLM类人属性的经验非唯一性，通过Age of Empires II的图灵完备性论证任何强基板均可呈现类似属性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM研究常假设或赋予其类人属性（如道德、自然语言理解），但缺乏严谨的实证验证。作者质疑这些属性的存在性，指出若不在统一测量标准下讨论，结论易陷入循环或主观。因此需要明确测量准则，以避免误导性解释。
light_analysis.method: 构建并训练简单神经网络于游戏Age of Empires II，证明其图灵完备性；类比LEGO、波士顿区域等强基板，论证类人属性的非唯一性。提出“零假设”：在设计实验时默认LLM非唯一性而非类人属性，从而避免循环论证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值结果，但理论论证了：LLM类人属性在经验上非唯一，任何图灵完备基板都可能呈现类似行为；若缺乏明确测量标准，对属性的存在性讨论将无信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是揭露LLM类人属性假设的缺陷，并引入经验非唯一性和零假设以提升实证严谨性。学术上推动领域反思测量标准，应用上避免误导性结论。局限是缺乏实证数据，未来可构建具体基准。

title: BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon
abstract: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了北非多语言假新闻语料库BOUTEF，涵盖阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的多种语言，并通过综合实证分析揭示了假新闻的传播特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体假新闻在多种语言和资源匮乏的北非地区（如阿尔及利亚、突尼斯）迅速传播，现有研究缺乏针对性的多语言语料库和深入分析，尤其是方言、阿拉伯语、法语等混合语言环境。这些地区社会政治复杂，假新闻可能加剧冲突，因此迫切需要理解其机制并开发检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含假叙事、真叙事和用户评论的大规模多语言语料库BOUTEF，涵盖MSA、阿尔及利亚和突尼斯方言、Arabizi、法语、英语及代码转换语言。通过定量（统计分析主题、情感、用户互动）和定性（语言修辞策略分析）方法，研究主题分布、情感模式、修辞策略与社会参与动态，揭示假新闻与辟谣内容的差异。
light_analysis.result: 假新闻依赖情感化叙述、耸人听闻框架和混合语言实践增强传播力，而辟谣内容更事实导向。统计显示主题类别与消息真实性显著关联，用户参与度与假内容可见性强相关。阿尔及利亚和突尼斯比较揭示共同点（如情绪策略）和特定社会政治背景的差异。数据集公开可用。
light_analysis.conclusion: BOUTEF语料库推进了假新闻检测、低资源语言处理和复杂语言环境中信息紊乱的研究。揭示了非正式语言实践在错误信息传播中的关键作用。未来可扩展至其他北非国家，并开发基于语料库的假新闻检测模型。该资源为多语言社区的信息治理提供了基础。

title: Intelligence as Managed Autonomy: Failure, Escalation, and Governance for Agentic AI Systems
abstract: As autonomous and agentic AI systems scale in robotic and human-machine environments, managing hallucination and persistent but unjustified action remains an open challenge. Rather than attributing these failures solely to model or alignment limitations, this paper explores the architectural vulnerability of unbounded autonomy - the presumption that an agent should continue operating regardless of rising uncertainty. It introduces a theory of managed autonomy that defines intelligent behavior through the formal capacity to detect epistemic drift, suspend reasoning, attempt recovery, and ultimately surrender control when reliability diminishes. We instantiate this theory via the SMARt (Self-Managing Multi-tier Autonomous Reasoning with Regulated/Revoked transitions) model, a four-layer framework featuring Stable, Meta-cognitive, Assisted, and Regulated states. By developing a timed, guarded Petri net formulation, we establish theoretically bounded properties for the system, demonstrating how architecture can formally mandate escalation, constrain invalid outputs, and ensure governance reachability under specified conditions. We further analyze how incorporating domain-specific trigger sets across varied operational settings (e.g., healthcare, robotics, etc.) can systematically preserve safety, assuming completeness and soundness criteria are met. Because these triggers are designed to be adaptive, the SMARt model accommodates the safe, controlled expansion of an agent's operational scope over time. We conclude that formalizing failure management within the autonomy lifecycle is a crucial step toward realizing reliable and governed artificial intelligence.
comment: This peer-reviewed paper is to appear in the Journal of Intelligent and Robotic Systems

light_analysis.overview: 提出管理自主性理论，通过SMARt模型实现智能系统的失败检测、升级与治理，形式化保证架构安全。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主AI系统在规模化时，幻觉和持续不合理行动仍是开放挑战。现有方法常归因于模型或对齐限制，忽略了无界自主性的架构脆弱性——即系统在不确定性上升时仍继续运行的预设。本文探索通过架构强制管理自主性，定义智能行为为检测 epistemic drift、暂停推理、尝试恢复并在可靠性下降时移交控制的能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出SMARt（Self-Managing Multi-tier Autonomous Reasoning with Regulated/Revoked transitions）模型，包含稳定、元认知、辅助和受控四层状态。采用定时防护Petri网形式化建模，推导系统理论边界性质，论证架构如何强制升级、约束无效输出并确保治理可达性。触发器集可自适应，在不同领域（如医疗、机器人）中，满足完备性和正确性条件时系统性维护安全。
light_analysis.result: 通过形式化分析，建立了系统在指定条件下可证明的边界性质：架构能强制检测失效并进行状态升级（如从稳定到受控），约束无效输出，并保证治理状态可达。触发器集的完备性和正确性确保了跨领域的安全性，且自适应机制允许智能体安全地扩展操作范围。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 形式化失败管理是构建可靠受治理人工智能的关键步骤。SMARt模型通过分层状态和形式化约束，将治理内嵌于自主性生命周期，平衡自治与安全。该理论可用于高风险领域（如医疗、机器人）的AI系统设计，但假设触发集满足完备性和正确性。未来需验证实际部署效果及触发器学习机制。

title: Transformer Field Theory: A Response-Theoretic Approach to Mechanistic Interpretability
abstract: Mechanistic interpretability often studies Transformer behavior by intervening on internal activations through activation patching, causal tracing, path patching, and steering directions. This paper develops Transformer Field Theory: a response-theoretic framework in which the residual stream of a fixed forward pass is treated as a Transformer field over layer depth and token position. In this formulation, patching becomes a localized source insertion into the Transformer field, first-order sensitivity fields predict patch effects, Green functions describe downstream propagation, and patch selection is posed as an adjoint inverse problem. Empirically, we test the theory's forward response objects in GPT-2-style autoregressive Transformers. Localized Transformer-field interventions exhibit a bounded local linear regime; first-order sensitivities predict patch effects across layer-token sites; localized sources generate structured anisotropic Transformer-field propagation; high-sensitivity sites and sliced Green operators provide reduced response descriptions; and prompt-induced Transformer-field displacements partially transfer answer behavior. These results establish sensitivities, Transformer-field responses, and sliced Green operators as practical objects for organizing patching experiments, while providing the forward mathematical basis for patch-site inference and cross-scale response transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Transformer场论，将残差流视为场，用响应理论统一解释激活修补、因果追踪等机制，并实验验证其预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机理解释方法（如激活修补、因果追踪）缺乏统一理论框架，难以预测干预效果和跨尺度传播。该研究旨在建立响应理论框架，将残差流视为Transformer场，使修补成为局部源插入，并利用灵敏度、格林函数等工具系统描述干扰传播。
light_analysis.method: 将固定前向传播的残差流定义为关于层深度和标记位置的场。修补被视为局部源插入，一阶灵敏度场预测修补效果，格林函数描述下游传播，修补选择转化为伴随逆问题。在GPT-2自回归Transformer上测试，通过局部干预验证线性机制。
light_analysis.result: 局部干预呈现有界线性区域；一阶灵敏度能跨层-标记位点预测修补效果；局部源产生各向异性场传播；高灵敏度位点和切片格林算子提供简化响应描述；提示诱导的场位移部分转移答案行为。建立了灵敏度、场响应和切片格林算子的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为修补实验提供数学基础，支持跨尺度响应迁移和位点推断，但线性假设的边界及大规模应用需进一步探索。具有增强Transformer可解释性和安全性的潜力。

title: Appearance-Invariant Detection of Suggestive Motion via Laban Movement Descriptors
abstract: Content moderation in online multiplayer 3D virtual environments is increasingly automated, yet detection has focused on images, video, and audio, leaving suggestive motion a blind spot. We present a motion-only classification pipeline that detects suggestive and explicit movement from SMPL skeleton trajectories using Laban Movement Analysis (LMA) descriptors. On a dataset spanning everyday, artistic, suggestive, and explicit movement (17+ hours of video), a logistic regression trained on 61-feature LMA descriptors reaches 68% binary SFW/NSFW accuracy (70% random forest) under a leak-free evaluation protocol. At this level, our descriptor performs comparably to a learned video model trained on the same motion re-rendered as appearance-free video, a gray figure with no clothing, skin, or scene. The indirectness (tortuosity) of each joint's trajectory, measured as the ratio of the joint's path length to its net displacement, peaks at the suggestive tier, showing that the Direct-to-Indirect polarity of Laban's Space factor provides an interpretable marker of the shift from functional to suggestive motion. Ultimately, Laban-based kinematic descriptors offer a lightweight, interpretable approach to suggestive-motion detection: every decision decomposes into named, theory-grounded features. Because the classifier operates on pose trajectories alone, moderation can run directly on avatar poses in virtual environments, with no appearance data.
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Extended version of a poster accepted to SIGGRAPH 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Laban运动分析的运动分类流程，用于检测3D虚拟环境中暗示性或裸露动作，仅使用肢体轨迹数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 在在线多人3D虚拟环境中，内容审核自动化聚焦于图像、视频和音频，忽视暗示性运动这一盲区。现有方法依赖外观数据（如肤色、场景），存在隐私和效率问题。本研究旨在开发仅基于运动轨迹的轻量级检测方法，以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 使用SMPL骨架轨迹提取61维Laban运动分析描述符（包括Space因子间接性等），训练逻辑回归或随机森林分类器。数据集涵盖日常、艺术、暗示性和裸露动作（17+小时视频）。采用无泄漏评估协议，确保训练与测试集分离。关键特征为关节路径长度与净位移比值（扭曲度），量化运动间接性。
light_analysis.result: 逻辑回归达到68%的二元SFW/NSFW准确率，随机森林达70%，与基于外观的视频模型（灰色无外观图形）性能相当。间接性特征在暗示性动作中峰值显著，表明Laban Space因子Direct-to-Indirect极性可解释功能运动向暗示运动转变。
light_analysis.conclusion: Laban运动描述符提供轻量级、可解释的暗示性运动检测方案，每个决策可分解为理论基础特征。分类器仅需姿态轨迹，可直接在虚拟环境角色骨架上运行，无需外观数据，保护隐私。未来可扩展至其他运动分析任务，但需更多类别验证。

title: Entropy-Gradient Inversion: Moving Toward Internal Mechanism of Large Reasoning Models
abstract: The advancement of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) has catalyzed a paradigm shift from reactive ``fast thinking'' text generation to systematic, step-by-step ``slow thinking'' reasoning, unlocking state-of-the-art performance in complex mathematical and logical tasks. However, the field faces \textit{the fundamental gap between token-level behavioral analysis and internal reasoning mechanisms, and the instability of reinforcement learning (RL) for reasoning optimization relying on costly external verifiers}. We identify and formally define \textbf{Entropy-Gradient Inversion}, a robust negative correlation between token entropy and logit gradients that acts as a definitive geometric fingerprint for LRM reasoning capability. Building on this, we propose \textbf{Correlation-Regularized Group Policy Optimization (CorR-PO)}, which embeds this inversion signature into RL reward regularization. Extensive experiments on various reasoning benchmarks across multiple model scales show CorR-PO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, confirming that stronger inversion directly correlates with superior reasoning performance.
comment: The authors are withdrawing this manuscript due to fundamental inaccuracies in the institutional affiliations and administrative attributions provided at the time of submission. As this version cannot be validated under the correct institutional framework, the authors request its formal withdrawal from the repository. No immediate replacement is intended

light_analysis.overview: 发现熵-梯度反转作为LRM推理能力的几何指纹，并据此提出CorR-PO算法提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）虽在复杂数学和逻辑任务中表现出色，但现有方法存在两大问题：一是token级行为分析与内部推理机制之间存在根本性脱节，难以理解模型为何推理；二是依赖昂贵外部验证器的强化学习（RL）优化不稳定。因此，亟需一种能揭示LRM内部推理机制并稳定RL训练的方法，以推动推理能力的进一步提升。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先识别并形式化了熵-梯度反转（Entropy-Gradient Inversion），即token熵与logit梯度间的稳健负相关，作为LRM推理能力的几何指纹。基于此，提出相关正则化组策略优化（CorR-PO），将反转指纹嵌入RL奖励正则化中，通过约束策略梯度与熵-梯度反转方向一致来稳定训练并提升推理质量。实验在多个推理基准和模型规模上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，CorR-PO方法在不同模型规模下均一致优于现有最先进基线方法。实验结果表明，熵-梯度反转的强度与推理性能正相关：更强的反转对应更优的推理表现。论文未提供具体数值，但强调了一致性的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LRM内部推理机制的一个关键几何特征——熵-梯度反转，并利用该特征设计了CorR-PO优化算法，显著提升了推理性能。该工作为理解LRM推理机制提供了新视角，并为强化学习在推理优化中的应用开辟了更稳定、高效的途径。未来可探索该反转在其他类型推理模型中的适用性及理论解释。

title: GeoWorld-VLM: Geometry from World Models for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong semantic recognition, yet remain brittle on elementary spatial relations such as left of, on, behind, and between. One cause of this failure arises before language reasoning begins: the visual pathway may compress or discard critical 3D structural cues during feature extraction, so the language model receives image representations that are already insufficient for reliable spatial judgment. We introduce GeoWorld-VLM, a VLM-side distillation framework that transfers geometric structure from frozen camera-conditioned video world models into VLMs. GeoWorld-VLM fine-tunes only the image encoder and multimodal projector, aligning post-projector image features with intermediate world-model representations while leaving the main backbone frozen. Given images, a prompt, and a sampled camera trajectory, the world-model teacher converts static visual input into a synthetic multi-view spatial signal. Training combines spatial answer supervision, teacher-student feature alignment, and a preservation anchor to the original VLM. Since the language model remains frozen, GeoWorld-VLM preserves the original model's linguistic capabilities while attributing spatial improvements to the enhanced visual pathway. To evaluate the effectiveness and generality of the proposed method, we apply GeoWorld-VLM to two distinct VLM architectures and observe consistent improvements across both backbones. GeoWorld-VLM improves performance by approximately 4 percent on both the What'sUp and VSR benchmarks, suggesting that world-model-guided visual alignment generalizes across model structures and spatial reasoning datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoWorld-VLM框架，利用世界模型为视觉语言模型注入空间几何知识，提升空间关系推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代视觉语言模型在语义识别上表现优异，但对'左、上、后、之间'等基本空间关系判断脆弱。原因在于视觉特征提取阶段可能压缩或丢弃关键的3D结构线索，导致语言模型接收到的图像表示不足以支持可靠的空间判断。现有方法缺乏在视觉通路中显式增强几何结构的手段。
light_analysis.method: GeoWorld-VLM是一种VLM端蒸馏框架，从冻结的相机条件视频世界模型中迁移几何结构。仅微调图像编码器和多模态投影器，使投影后的图像特征与中间世界模型表示对齐，保持主骨干网络冻结。给定图像、提示和采样相机轨迹，世界模型教师将静态视觉输入转化为合成多视图空间信号。训练结合空间答案监督、师生特征对齐和原始VLM的保留锚点。
light_analysis.result: 在两种不同的VLM架构上应用GeoWorld-VLM，均观察到一致性能提升。在What'sUp和VSR基准上，性能提升约4%，表明世界模型引导的视觉对齐可跨模型结构和空间推理数据集泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoWorld-VLM通过世界模型蒸馏增强VLM的空间推理能力，同时保持原有语言能力。该方法通用且有效，为提升VLM的空间理解提供了新途径。未来可探索更复杂的几何结构和多任务学习。

title: A Theory of Training Profit-Optimal LLMs
abstract: Scaling LLMs requires tremendous computational resources, and recent advances in AI have gone hand in hand with massive amounts of capital expenditure. While it is established that scaling up LLMs reliably increases model quality (quantified in terms of loss or downstream evaluations), it is unclear how these quality improvements translate to potential revenue, and whether revenue increases would offset costs of larger-scale training and inference. In this work, we develop an economic model for characterizing the rational behavior of an LLM training firm by combining scaling laws with microeconomic theory. Under our model of firm behavior, LLM quality can be increased with more parameters and training tokens, leading to more potential adoption by consumers, who each have a quality threshold for using the LLM. On the other hand, additional parameters and training tokens both incur additional costs. We analyze the profit maximization problem for this model under compute-bound and data-bound regimes. In the compute-bound regime, optimal model size and token budget track hardware efficiency $E$ (FLOPs/\$) at a near-linear rate; total training cost then scales sub-quadratically in $E$. Data efficiency improvements incentivize larger models and training expenditure. When we are limited to $D$ data, profit-optimal training expenditure scales as $D^2/E$, i.e, increase with data and decreases with hardware efficiency (as well as data efficiency). Finally, we analyze practical trends in training expenditure: current trends are consistent with our most permissive model variants in the compute-bound regime, but are not profit-optimal in the data-bound regime or assuming hardware advances will stall. Overall, our results provide a theory of profit-optimal LLM training, providing a foundation for engaging critically with industry statements and supporting long-term economic decision making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个经济模型，结合缩放定律和微观经济学，分析LLM训练中利润最优的模型规模与数据量。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM扩展虽然提升模型质量，但高昂的计算成本与潜在收益之间的关系不明确。现有方法缺乏对训练支出是否可被收入抵消以及如何实现利润最大化的理论分析，导致企业在资源分配和长期投资决策上缺乏指导。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过经济模型揭示利润最优的LLM训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建了一个结合缩放定律与微观经济学理论的利润最大化模型。模型将LLM质量视为参数和训练数据的函数，消费者根据质量阈值决定是否采用。在计算受限和数据受限条件下分别求解最优模型大小和token预算。使用硬件效率E（FLOPs/$）和数据量D作为关键参数，推导出训练成本与E、D及数据效率的关系式。
light_analysis.result: 在计算受限下，最优模型大小和token预算与硬件效率E近线性相关，训练成本随E呈次二次方增长。数据效率提升激励更大模型和更高支出。数据受限时，利润最优训练成本与D²/E成正比。当前趋势与计算受限模型一致，但不符合数据受限或硬件进展停滞下的利润最优条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了利润最优LLM训练的理论基础，有助于理性评估行业声明和支持长期经济决策。模型揭示了硬件效率和数据效率对最优策略的影响，但未考虑市场动态、价格变化等复杂因素。未来可扩展至多轮训练、竞争环境等更现实场景。

title: Multi-Token Residual Prediction
abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising masked token sequences, offering a tradeoff between parallelism and quality compared to autoregressive models. In current practice, the number of tokens decoded per step is controlled by a confidence threshold, and quality degrades monotonically as more tokens are denoised per step. We introduce Multi-token Residual Prediction (MRP), a lightweight module that enables dependency-aware multi-token denoising within a single backbone forward pass. MRP exploits a key property of the denoising process: the logit distributions at adjacent denoising steps are remarkably similar. Rather than running the backbone a second time to obtain the next-step logits, MRP predicts the residual between steps from the backbone's hidden states, effectively denoising more tokens per backbone forward at a fraction of the cost. We apply MRP across the two operating regimes of DLM decoding. In the high-quality-low-throughput static denoising regime, MRP serves as a drafter for speculative decoding: its proposals are verified against the backbone, yielding lossless acceleration of up to 1.4x in SGLang. In the low-quality-high-throughput dynamic denoising regime, MRP instead drives a remasking scheme that revokes over-eager reveals, recovering most of the accuracy lost to aggressive low-threshold decoding and improving accuracy by up to 22.6 points on code generation task HumanEval and 17.7 points on reasoning task GSM8K.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多令牌残差预测（MRP），在扩散语言模型中实现单次前向传递内的依赖感知多令牌去噪，加速解码并提升质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型通过迭代去噪掩码序列生成文本，但当前每步解码令牌数由置信阈值控制，质量随步数减少而单调下降。现有方法需多次前向传递获取后续步骤logits，计算成本高。因此需一种轻量方法在单次前向中预测多步去噪结果，兼顾效率与质量。
light_analysis.method: MRP利用相邻去噪步骤logit分布高度相似的性质，从主干网络隐藏状态预测步间残差，而非运行第二次前向。在静态去噪（高质量低吞吐）中，MRP作为投机解码的草稿模型，提案经主干验证实现无损加速；在动态去噪（低质量高吞吐）中，MRP驱动重新掩码方案撤销过度暴露的令牌，恢复因低阈值解码损失的精度。
light_analysis.result: 在静态去噪中，MRP在SGLang上实现高达1.4倍无损加速。在动态去噪中，MRP在代码生成任务HumanEval上提升准确率22.6个百分点，在推理任务GSM8K上提升17.7个百分点，有效恢复因激进低阈值解码导致的精度损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: MRP是一种轻量模块，通过预测logit残差实现多令牌依赖感知去噪，显著提升扩散语言模型的解码效率和生成质量。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于高吞吐场景。未来可探索更复杂的残差预测结构或与其他解码策略结合。

title: Mechanical Conscience: A Mathematical Framework for Dependability of Machine Intelligenc
abstract: Distributed collaborative intelligence (DCI), encompassing edge-to-edge architectures, federated learning, transfer learning, and swarm systems, creates environments in which emergent risk is structurally unavoidable: locally correct decisions by individual agents compose into globally unacceptable behavioral trajectories under uncertainty. Existing approaches such as constrained optimization, safe reinforcement learning, and runtime assurance evaluate acceptability at the level of individual actions rather than across behavioral trajectories, and none addresses the multi-participant, uncertainty-laden nature of DCI deployments. This paper introduces mechanical conscience (MC), a novel concept and simplified mathematical framework that operationalizes trajectory-level normative regulation for both single-agent and distributed intelligent systems. Mechanical conscience is defined as a supervisory filter that minimally corrects a baseline policy's actions to reduce cumulative deviation from a normatively admissible region, while accounting for epistemic uncertainty. We introduce associated constructs, conscience score, mechanical guilt, and resonant dependability, that provide an interpretable vocabulary and computable governance signals for this emerging field. Core theoretical properties are established: admissibility equivalence, existence of optimal regulation, and monotonic deviation reduction. Illustrative results demonstrate that MC-regulated agents maintain trajectory-level normative acceptability where conventional controllers drift outside admissible bounds, and that the framework naturally extends to suppress interaction-induced emergent risk in multi-agent DCI settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出机械良心(MC)概念，一种用于单智能体和分布式智能系统轨迹级规范调节的数学框架，确保机器智能的可信赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式协作智能(DCI)中，个体局部正确决策在不确定性下可能组合成全局不可接受的行为轨迹。现有方法如约束优化、安全强化学习等仅评估单动作可接受性，未解决多参与者、不确定性场景下的轨迹级规范问题，导致结构性的涌现风险。
light_analysis.method: 定义机械良心为监督滤波器，最小修正基线策略动作以减少与规范容许区域的累积偏差，同时考虑认知不确定性。引入良心得分、机械内疚和共振可信赖性等可解释概念和计算治理信号。理论建立可容许等价性、最优调节存在性和单调偏差减少等核心性质。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MC调节的智能体能维持轨迹级规范可接受性，而传统控制器会漂移出容许边界。框架自然扩展至多智能体DCI场景，有效抑制交互引起的涌现风险。摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 机械良心为分布式智能系统提供了形式化的轨迹级可信赖性框架，具有严格的理论保证和可计算性。它填补了现有方法在轨迹级和多参与者不确定场景下的空白，为实际DCI部署提供治理信号。未来可探索更高效的优化算法或扩展至更复杂的规范定义。

title: FinSTaR: Towards Financial Reasoning with Time Series Reasoning Models
abstract: Time series (TS) reasoning models (TSRMs) have shown promising capabilities in general domains, yet they consistently fail in the financial domain, which exhibits unique characteristics. We propose a general 2 x 2 capability taxonomy for TSRMs by crossing 1) single-entity vs. multi-entity analysis with 2) assessment of the current state vs. prediction of future behavior. We instantiate this taxonomy in the financial domain-where the distinction between deterministic assessment and stochastic prediction is particularly critical-as ten financial reasoning tasks, forming the FinTSR-Bench benchmark based on S&P stocks. To this end, we propose FinSTaR (Financial Time Series Thinking and Reasoning), trained on FinTSR-Bench with distinct chain-of-thought (CoT) strategies tailored to each category. For assessment, which is deterministic (i.e., computable from observable data), we employ Compute-in-CoT, a programmatic CoT that enables models to derive answers directly from raw prices. For prediction, which is inherently stochastic (i.e., subject to unobservable factors), we adopt Scenario-Aware CoT, which generates diverse scenarios before making a judgment, mirroring how financial analysts reason under uncertainty. The proposed method achieves 78.9% average accuracy on FinTSR-Bench, substantially outperforming LLM and TSRM baselines. Furthermore, we show that the four capability categories are complementary and mutually reinforcing through joint training, and that Scenario-Aware CoT consistently improves prediction accuracy over standard CoT. Code is available at https://github.com/seunghan96/FinSTaR.
comment: KDD Workshop on SciSoc Agents & LLMs 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FinSTaR框架，通过独特链式思维策略提升时间序列推理模型在金融领域的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列推理模型在通用领域表现良好，但在金融领域因数据特性（如确定性评估与随机性预测的区分）而失败。金融领域需要能处理单实体/多实体分析以及当前评估/未来预测的复合能力，现有方法缺乏针对性设计，导致推理准确性不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出2×2能力分类法（单/多实体×评估/预测），构建基于标普股票的FinTSR-Bench基准，包含10个任务。设计FinSTaR模型，对确定性评估任务采用Compute-in-CoT（程序化链式思维从原始价格直接计算答案），对随机性预测任务采用Scenario-Aware CoT（生成多样化场景再判断），通过联合训练增强四种能力的互补性。
light_analysis.result: 在FinTSR-Bench上，FinSTaR取得78.9%平均准确率，显著优于LLM和TSRM基线。联合训练表明四种能力互补增强，且Scenario-Aware CoT在预测任务上一致优于标准CoT，验证了策略有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FinSTaR通过分类导向的链式思维策略有效解决了金融时间序列推理难题，为金融分析提供强大工具。其分类法可推广至其他领域。未来可探索更复杂的场景生成机制或扩展至更多金融资产类型。

title: GEASS: Gated Evidence-Adaptive Selective Caption Trust for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) hallucinate objects that are not present, and a growing line of work tries to curb this by feeding the model its own generated caption as auxiliary evidence -- assuming that a caption, once available, is something to consume. We show this fails: naively appending a caption can lower accuracy rather than raise it, dropping Qwen2.5-VL-3B$^\dagger$ on HallusionBench by nearly ten points. To understand why, we build \textbf{GD-Probe}, a diagnostic set that pairs a global and a detail question on the same image, so that any difference in caption effect is attributable to the question alone. Caption utility proves to be a \emph{per-query} property: the same caption helps global questions and harms detail ones, through a single mechanism -- an embedded caption competes with the image for attention and pulls the model's evidence onto its own text -- whose sign is set by whether the caption \emph{covers} the queried content. Crucially, this regime is readable from quantities the decoder already emits, with no attention access or grounding. We turn this into \textbf{GEASS} (Gated Evidence-Adaptive Selective Caption Trust), a training-free, logit-level module that decides per query how much of the caption to trust, gating it by the clean path's confidence, weighting it by the entropy reduction it induces, and raising the evidence bar when the two pathways disagree. Across four VLMs and two benchmarks (POPE and HallusionBench), GEASS improves over both vanilla inference and contrastive decoding under a single fixed setting, adding only two forward passes and no parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEASS，一种无需训练的logit级门控模块，根据查询自适应决定模型对自身生成描述的信任程度，有效缓解视觉语言模型的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将VLM自生成的描述作为辅助证据输入，但研究发现此方式可能降低性能，例如Qwen2.5-VL-3B在HallusionBench上准确率下降近10点。通过构建GD-Probe诊断集，作者发现描述效用是逐查询的：同一描述有助于全局问题却损害细节问题，原因是描述与图像竞争注意力，其效果取决于描述是否覆盖查询内容。因此需要一种自适应机制来按需调节描述信任度。
light_analysis.method: GEASS（Gated Evidence-Adaptive Selective Caption Trust）是一种无需训练、工作在logit级别的模块。它通过三条规则决定每个查询对描述的信任程度：以干净路径的置信度作为门控信号，以描述引起的熵减少作为权重，当两条路径（有/无描述）不一致时提高证据门槛。该方法不依赖注意力或接地信息，仅需两次前向传播（一次无描述，一次有描述），无额外参数。
light_analysis.result: 在四个VLM（含Qwen2.5-VL-3B等）和两个基准（POPE和HallusionBench）上，GEASS在单一固定设置下同时优于普通推理和对比解码方法。未明确具体数值，但摘要指出显著提升（例如原始下降近10点的情况被逆转），且仅需两次前向传播，无参数增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEASS提出了一种轻量级、免训练的解决方案，通过自适应门控机制有效提升了VLM的可靠性，为解决幻觉问题提供了新思路。其核心发现——描述效用是逐查询属性——具有重要理论价值。未来可探索更精细的门控策略或与其他去幻觉方法结合。

title: VISTA: Video Interaction Spatio-Temporal Analysis Benchmark
abstract: Existing benchmarks for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) primarily evaluate spatio-temporal understanding on simple single-action videos, closed attribute sets and restricted entity types, failing to capture the freeform, multi-action interactions between diverse entities which characterize real-world video understanding. Furthermore, the lack of a systematic framework for analyzing model failures across complementary spatio-temporal axes hinders comprehensive evaluation. To address these gaps, we introduce VISTA, a Video Interaction Spatio-Temporal Analysis benchmark designed for open-set, multi-entity and multi-action spatio-temporal understanding in VLMs. VISTA decomposes videos into interpretable entities, their associated actions, and relational dynamics, enabling multi-axis diagnostics and unified assessment of relational, spatial, and temporal understanding. Our benchmark integrates multiple datasets into a single interaction-aware taxonomy and comprises ~12K curated video-query pairs spanning diverse scenes and complexities. We systematically evaluate 11 state-of-the-art VLMs on VISTA, and break down aggregate performance across our taxonomy to reveal shortcomings and pronounced spatio-temporal biases obscured by traditional metrics. By providing detailed, taxonomy-driven diagnostics on a challenging dataset, VISTA offers a nuanced framework to guide advances in model design, pretraining strategies, and evaluation protocols. Overall, VISTA is the first, large-scale, interaction-aware diagnostic benchmark for spatio-temporal understanding in VLMs.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop on Pixel-level Video Understanding in the Wild (PVUW)

light_analysis.overview: 提出了首个大规模交互感知的时空理解诊断基准VISTA，用于评估开放集多实体多动作视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要评估简单单动作视频、封闭属性集和有限实体类型，无法捕捉真实世界中多实体多动作的交互。此外，缺乏系统性分析模型在互补时空轴上失败的框架，导致评估不全面。VISTA旨在填补这一空白，提供细粒度诊断。
light_analysis.method: VISTA将视频分解为可解释的实体、动作和关系动态，支持多轴诊断和统一评估关系、空间和时间理解。整合多个数据集到单一交互感知分类法，包含约12K精心设计的视频-查询对，覆盖多样场景和复杂度。系统评估11个最先进VLM，并分解聚合性能以揭示传统指标掩盖的时空偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在VISTA上评估了11个SOTA VLM，通过分类法分解性能揭示了模型在时空理解上的不足和显著偏差，这些偏差被传统指标所掩盖。提供了详细的诊断结果，展示了不同模型在关系、空间和时间轴上的表现差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: VISTA是首个大规模交互感知的时空理解诊断基准，为VLM的模型设计、预训练策略和评估协议提供指导。其细粒度诊断框架有助于发现模型弱点，推动VLM在真实多交互视频理解上的进步。未来可扩展至更多交互类型和复杂场景。

title: LLMs as ASP Programmers: Self-Correction Enables Task-Agnostic Nonmonotonic Reasoning
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive reasoning milestones but continue to struggle with high computational costs, logical inconsistencies, and sharp performance degradation on high-complexity problems. While neuro-symbolic methods attempt to mitigate these issues by coupling LLMs with symbolic reasoners, existing approaches typically rely on monotonic logics (e.g., SMT) that cannot represent defeasible reasoning -- essential components of human cognition. We present "LLM+ASP," a framework that translates natural language into Answer Set Programming (ASP), a nonmonotonic formalism based on stable model semantics. Unlike prior "LLM+ASP" approaches that require manually authored knowledge modules, domain-specific prompts, or evaluation restricted to single problem classes, our framework operates without any per-task engineering and applies uniformly across diverse reasoning tasks. Our system utilizes an automated self-correction loop where structured feedback from the ASP solver enables iterative refinement. Evaluating across six diverse benchmarks, we demonstrate that: (1) stable model semantics allow LLMs to naturally express default rules and exceptions, outperforming SMT-based alternatives by significant margins on nonmonotonic tasks; (2) iterative self-correction is the primary driver of performance, effectively replacing the need for handcrafted domain knowledge; (3) compact in-context reference guides substantially outperform verbose documentation, revealing a "context rot" phenomenon where excessive context hinders constraint adherence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM+ASP框架，将自然语言转化为回答集程序，通过自纠正循环实现任务无关的非单调推理，无需手工领域知识。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在推理中存在高计算成本、逻辑不一致和高复杂度性能下降问题。现有神经符号方法依赖单调逻辑（如SMT），无法表示可废止推理（人类认知关键）。而先前的LLM+ASP方法需要手动知识模块、领域特定提示或仅适用于单一问题类。因此需要一种无需逐任务工程、能统一处理多种非单调推理任务的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出LLM+ASP框架，将自然语言翻译为基于稳定模型语义的非单调形式语言ASP。系统使用自动自纠正循环，从ASP求解器获取结构化反馈进行迭代细化。无需手工领域知识或针对任务的工程，通过紧凑的上下文参考指南（而非冗长文档）引导LLM生成ASP代码，适用于多种推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准测试上评估：稳定模型语义使LLM在非单调任务上显著优于基于SMT的替代方法；迭代自纠正是性能的主要驱动力，有效替代手工领域知识；紧凑的上下文参考指南大幅优于冗长文档，揭示'上下文腐化'现象——过多上下文反而阻碍约束遵守。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出LLM+ASP框架，实现了任务无关的非单调推理，证明自纠正可替代领域知识，并发现上下文长度与约束遵守的反比关系。学术价值在于将ASP与LLM结合处理可废止推理；实际应用降低神经符号系统部署成本。未来可探索更高效的自纠正策略或扩展至更复杂的推理任务。

title: BrainDINO: A Brain MRI Foundation Model for Generalizable Clinical Representation Learning
abstract: Brain MRI underpins a wide range of neuroscientific and clinical applications, yet most learning-based methods remain task-specific and require substantial labeled data. Here we show that a single self-supervised representation can generalize across heterogeneous brain MRI endpoints. We trained BrainDINO, a self-distilled foundation model, on approximately 6.6 million unlabeled axial slices from 20 datasets encompassing broad variation in population, disease, and acquisition setting. Using a frozen encoder with lightweight task heads, BrainDINO supported transfer across tumor segmentation, neurodegenerative and neurodevelopmental conditions classification, brain age estimation, post-stroke temporal prediction, molecular status prediction, MRI sequence classification, and survival modeling. Across tasks and supervision regimes, BrainDINO consistently equaled or exceeded natural-image and MRI-specific self-supervised baselines, with particularly strong advantages under label scarcity. Representation analyses further showed anatomically organized and pathology-sensitive feature structure in the absence of task-specific supervision. Our findings indicate that large-scale slice-wise self-supervised learning can yield a unified brain MRI representation that supports diverse neuroimaging tasks without volumetric pretraining or full-network fine-tuning, establishing a scalable foundation for robust and data-efficient brain imaging analysis. Code is available at https://github.com/mclwu22/BrainDINO

light_analysis.overview: 提出BrainDINO，一个基于大规模轴向切片自监督学习的大脑MRI基础模型，通过冻结编码器+轻量任务头泛化于多种临床任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 大脑MRI支持多种神经科学和临床任务，但现有基于学习的方法大多任务特定，需要大量标注数据。自监督学习有望缓解数据稀缺，但缺乏统一的跨任务表示。本文旨在构建一个可泛化的基础模型，减少对标注数据的依赖并提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 使用自蒸馏框架（如DINO）在约660万张来自20个数据集的未标注轴向切片上训练。编码器冻结后，为不同任务（分割、分类、回归等）附加轻量任务头。无需体积预训练或全网络微调，仅需少量可学习参数。
light_analysis.result: 在肿瘤分割、神经退行性疾病分类、脑龄估计、中风后时间预测、分子状态预测、MRI序列分类和生存建模等8项任务上，BrainDINO一致优于或持平于自然图像和MRI特定的自监督基线，尤其在标签稀缺场景下优势显著。表示分析显示其具有解剖组织和病理敏感的特征结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 大规模切片级自监督学习能生成统一的大脑MRI表示，支持多样化神经影像任务，无需体积预训练或全网络微调。该方法为健壮、数据高效的脑影像分析建立了可扩展基础，代码已开源。未来可扩展至更多模态和临床场景。

title: Select to Think: Unlocking SLM Potential with Local Sufficiency
abstract: Small language models (SLMs) offer efficient deployment, yet they often lag behind their larger counterparts (LLMs) in reasoning. Existing remedies either invoke an LLM at points of reasoning divergence, incurring substantial latency and cost, or rely on standard distillation, which is limited by the SLM's capacity to accurately mimic the LLM's complex generative distribution. We address this dilemma by identifying local sufficiency: at divergence points, the LLM's preferred token often resides within the SLM's top-K next-token predictions, even when failing to emerge as the SLM top-1 choice. We therefore propose Select to Think (S2T), which reframes the LLM's role from open-ended generation to selection among the SLM's proposals, simplifying the supervision signal to discrete candidate rankings. Leveraging this, we introduce S2T-Local, which distills the selection logic into the SLM, empowering it to perform autonomous re-ranking without inference-time LLM dependency. Empirically, a 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates contain the 32B LLM's choice with a 95% hit rate, and S2T-Local improves the 1.5B SLM's Math Avg. over greedy decoding by 24.1% relative gain, matching the efficacy of 8-path self-consistency with single-trajectory efficiency.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/YeRona/Select-to-Think

light_analysis.overview: 提出Select to Think (S2T)方法，利用局部充分性通过选择机制提升小语言模型推理能力，并蒸馏为无需大模型依赖的自主重排序模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 小语言模型（SLM）部署高效但推理能力远逊于大语言模型（LLM）。现有方案要么在推理分歧点调用LLM，导致高延迟和成本；要么使用标准蒸馏，受限于SLM准确模仿LLM复杂生成分布的能力。本文发现局部充分性：在分歧点，LLM偏好的token通常出现在SLM的top-K候选预测中，即使不是其首选。基于此，作者旨在通过简化LLM角色为候选选择，并蒸馏该选择逻辑到SLM，以提升其推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Select to Think (S2T)框架，将LLM从开放生成转换为在SLM的top-K候选中进行选择，从而将监督信号简化为离散候选排名。进一步引入S2T-Local，通过蒸馏将LLM的选择逻辑注入SLM，使其能在推理时自主执行重排序，无需依赖LLM。实验使用1.5B参数的SLM和32B参数的LLM，验证了top-8候选的95%命中率。该方法结合了蒸馏的高效性和选择机制的简洁性。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理任务上，1.5B SLM的top-8候选包含32B LLM选择的命中率达到95%。S2T-Local相比贪婪解码，在Math Avg上取得24.1%的相对提升，媲美8路径自洽性（self-consistency）的效果，但仅需单次解码效率。这证明了S2T方法在保持效率的同时显著增强了SLM的推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了局部充分性现象，并基于此提出S2T方法，有效克服了SLM推理能力不足的瓶颈。通过将LLM的角色从生成者转变为选择者，简化了蒸馏任务，使SLM能够自主进行高质量推理。该方法在数学推理上取得了显著提升，具有实际部署价值。未来工作可探索将其扩展到更多任务和更大规模模型，或进一步优化候选生成策略。

title: Machine Learning-based Two-Stage Graph Sparsification for the Travelling Salesman Problem
abstract: High-performance TSP solvers such as Lin-Kernighan-Helsgaun (LKH) search within a \emph{candidate graph} -- a small subset of edges pre-selected for the solver -- rather than over the complete graph. The two leading sparsification heuristics, $α$-Nearest and POPMUSIC, each fall short of the density-coverage balance: $α$-Nearest is dense with stable recall, while POPMUSIC is sparser but its recall degrades with scale. Their union closes the recall gap while remaining far below the complete graph in density, leaving room for further reduction. Existing learning-based sparsifiers score edges on the complete graph, an approach that is expensive and largely limited to Euclidean instances. We propose a two-stage method that inverts this logic. Stage~1 takes the union of $α$-Nearest and POPMUSIC, achieving near-perfect recall at ${\sim}6N$ edges. Crucially, the union annotates each edge with its \emph{source provenance} -- whether it was endorsed by $α$-Nearest, POPMUSIC, or both. Stage~2 trains a lightweight classifier on these annotated edges and prunes the lowest-scoring ones. Because dual-source edges are almost always optimal, the learning problem reduces to filtering the single-source subset -- a substantially easier task than classifying all $O(N^2)$ edges from scratch. Across four distance types, five spatial distributions, and problem sizes from 50 to 500, the pipeline reduces candidate-graph density by $37$-$47\%$ while retaining ${\geq}99.69\%$ of optimal-tour edges, and matches or exceeds the coverage of recent Euclidean-only neural sparsifiers at lower density at TSP500.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段图稀疏化方法，结合传统启发式和轻量分类器，高效降低TSP候选边密度。
light_analysis.motivation: 高性能TSP求解器如LKH依赖稀疏候选图，但现有稀疏化方法α-Nearest和POPMUSIC各存缺陷：前者密度高但召回稳定，后者稀疏但召回随规模下降。两者结合虽能弥补召回差距，密度仍可进一步降低。现有学习方法需在全图打分，计算昂贵且多限于欧几里得实例。因此，需要一种高效、通用的稀疏化方法，在保持高召回的同时进一步降低密度。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段流水线：第一阶段取α-Nearest和POPMUSIC的并集，生成约6N条边的候选图，达到近完美召回，并记录每条边的来源（α-Nearest、POPMUSIC或两者）。第二阶段基于这些带标注的边训练轻量分类器，仅对单源边进行评分和剪枝（双源边几乎总是最优，无需处理）。由于只需过滤单源子集，学习任务比从零分类全图O(N²)条边简单得多。方法适用于多种距离类型和空间分布。
light_analysis.result: 在四种距离类型、五种空间分布以及问题规模从50到500的TSP实例上，该流水线将候选图密度降低37%-47%，同时保留≥99.69%的最优边。在TSP500上，以更低密度达到或超过近期仅欧几里得神经稀疏器的覆盖性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种结合传统启发式和机器学习的通用TSP图稀疏化方法，通过两阶段设计有效平衡了密度与召回。其关键创新在于利用来源注释简化学习任务，实现了高效剪枝。实验证明该方法在不同配置下均能显著降低密度而不牺牲最优边覆盖，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更大规模问题及动态稀疏化策略。

title: Reasoning Models Know What's Important, and Encode It in Their Activations
abstract: Language models often solve complex tasks by generating long reasoning chains, consisting of many steps with varying importance. While some steps are crucial for generating the final answer, others are removable. Determining which steps matter most, and why, remains an open question central to understanding how models process reasoning. We investigate if this question is best approached through model internals or through tokens of the reasoning chain itself. We find that model activations contain more information than tokens for identifying important reasoning steps. Crucially, by training probes on model activations to predict importance, we show that models encode an internal representation of step importance, even prior to the generation of subsequent steps. The internal representations of importance in different models yield high agreement on which steps are important. The representation is distributed across layers, and does not correlate with surface-level features, such as a step's relative position or its length. Our findings suggest that analyzing activations can reveal aspects of reasoning that surface-level approaches fundamentally miss, indicating that reasoning analyses should look into model internals.

light_analysis.overview: 发现模型激活比令牌更能识别重要推理步骤，且模型内部分布式编码步骤重要性表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型通过长推理链解决复杂任务，但各步骤重要性不同。确定重要步骤及其原因对理解推理过程至关重要，现有方法主要分析令牌层面，可能忽略内部表示。
light_analysis.method: 通过训练探针在模型激活上预测步骤重要性，比较激活与令牌的信息含量。发现激活包含更多信息，且模型在生成后续步骤前已编码重要性表示。该表示分布式跨层，不与位置或长度相关。
light_analysis.result: 激活比令牌更有效识别重要步骤；不同模型对重要步骤识别高度一致；表示分布式跨层，不依赖表面特征；模型在生成前已编码重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 分析激活可揭示表面方法遗漏的推理方面，提示推理分析应关注模型内部。潜在局限性未明确，但方法可推广至其他模型和任务。

title: ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASTER框架，在潜在空间生成伪异常，结合预训练LLM增强表示，实现无监督时间序列异常检测的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列异常检测在工业监控、医疗、网络安全等领域至关重要，但异常稀少且异构，标注数据稀缺，导致无监督方法成为主流。现有方法依赖重建或预测，难以处理复杂数据；嵌入方法需领域特定异常合成和固定距离度量，缺乏通用性且依赖专家知识。因此需要一种无需手工干预、能自适应生成异常的无监督检测方法。
light_analysis.method: ASTER框架在潜在空间中直接生成伪异常，避免手工异常注入和领域知识需求。其核心包括一个潜在空间解码器，生成定制化伪异常样本；一个基于Transformer的异常分类器，在伪异常上训练以区分正常与异常。此外，利用预训练大语言模型（LLM）增强潜在空间的时态和上下文表示，提升检测能力。实验在三个基准数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公开时间序列异常检测基准数据集上，ASTER取得了最先进的性能，显著优于现有重建、预测和嵌入方法。具体而言，在精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标上全面领先，为基于LLM的时间序列异常检测设立了新的标准，证明了伪异常生成与LLM结合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASTER通过潜在空间伪异常生成与LLM增强，解决了无监督时间序列异常检测中依赖领域知识和固定度量的局限，实现了通用、高效的检测。其学术价值在于提出全新的异常合成范式，实际应用价值在于可部署于多个领域。未来可探索更高效的伪异常生成策略及与其他架构的融合，进一步拓展性能。

title: BLUEmed: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Debate for Clinical Error Detection
abstract: Terminology substitution errors in clinical notes, where one medical term is replaced by a linguistically valid but clinically different term, pose a persistent challenge for automated error detection in healthcare. We introduce BLUEmed, a multi-agent debate framework augmented with hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that combines evidence-grounded reasoning with multi-perspective verification for clinical error detection. BLUEmed decomposes each clinical note into focused sub-queries, retrieves source-partitioned evidence through dense, sparse, and online retrieval, and assigns two domain expert agents distinct knowledge bases to produce independent analyses; when the experts disagree, a structured counter-argumentation round and cross-source adjudication resolve the conflict, followed by a cascading safety layer that filters common false-positive patterns. We evaluate BLUEmed on a clinical terminology substitution detection benchmark under both zero-shot and few-shot prompting with multiple backbone models spanning proprietary and open-source families. Experimental results show that BLUEmed achieves the best accuracy (69.13%), ROC-AUC (74.45%), and PR-AUC (72.44%) under few-shot prompting, outperforming both single-agent RAG and debate-only baselines. Further analyses across six backbone models and two prompting strategies confirm that retrieval augmentation and structured debate are complementary, and that the framework benefits most from models with sufficient instruction-following and clinical language understanding.
comment: Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出BLUEmed框架，结合检索增强生成和多智能体辩论，实现临床笔记中术语替换错误的高精度检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床笔记中的术语替换错误（一个医学术语被语言有效但临床不同的术语替代）是自动化错误检测的持续挑战。现有方法缺乏证据推理和多角度验证，难以处理此类细微错误。该问题直接影响临床决策质量和患者安全，亟需更可靠的检测机制。
light_analysis.method: BLUEmed将临床笔记分解为子查询，通过密集、稀疏和在线检索获取来源分区的证据。分配两个领域专家智能体使用不同知识库独立分析，当分歧时进行结构化反驳和交叉来源裁决，最后通过级联安全层过滤常见假阳性模式。支持零样本和少样本提示，兼容多种骨干模型。
light_analysis.result: 在临床术语替换检测基准上，少数样本提示下BLUEmed达到最佳性能：准确率69.13%，ROC-AUC 74.45%，PR-AUC 72.44%。优于单智能体RAG和仅辩论基线。在六个骨干模型和两种提示策略下验证了检索增强和结构化辩论的互补性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BLUEmed通过检索增强与多智能体辩论的协同，显著提升了临床错误检测能力。框架受益于指令跟随和临床语言理解能力强的模型。该工作为临床文本自动校验提供了新范式，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更高效的知识库构建和辩论机制。

title: OccAny: Generalized Unconstrained Urban 3D Occupancy
