abstract: Relying on in-domain annotations and precise sensor-rig priors, existing 3D occupancy prediction methods are limited in both scalability and out-of-domain generalization. While recent visual geometry foundation models exhibit strong generalization capabilities, they were mainly designed for general purposes and lack one or more key ingredients required for urban occupancy prediction, namely metric prediction, geometry completion in cluttered scenes and adaptation to urban scenarios. We address this gap and present OccAny, the first unconstrained urban 3D occupancy model capable of operating on out-of-domain uncalibrated scenes to predict and complete metric occupancy coupled with segmentation features. OccAny is versatile and can predict occupancy from sequential, monocular, or surround-view images. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) we propose the first generalized 3D occupancy framework with (ii) Segmentation Forcing that improves occupancy quality while enabling mask-level prediction, and (iii) a Novel View Rendering pipeline that infers novel-view geometry to enable test-time view augmentation for geometry completion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OccAny outperforms all visual geometry baselines on 3D occupancy prediction task, while remaining competitive with in-domain self-supervised methods across three input settings on two established urban occupancy prediction datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/valeoai/OccAny .
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page: https://valeoai.github.io/OccAny/

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个无约束通用城市3D占用预测模型OccAny，实现域外未校准场景的度量占用预测与补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D占用预测方法依赖域内标注和精确传感器标定，导致可扩展性差且难以泛化到新场景。虽然视觉基础模型泛化能力强，但缺乏度量预测、杂乱场景几何补全及城市场景适配等关键能力。因此，需要一种无需域内约束、能处理任意输入（单目、环视、序列）的通用占用预测方法。
light_analysis.method: OccAny采用通用框架，结合Segmentation Forcing技术提升占用质量并实现掩码级预测，同时设计Novel View Rendering管线，通过推断新颖视角几何实现测试时视图增强，以完成几何补全。模型支持序列、单目或环视图像输入，不依赖传感器先验，直接输出度量占用和分割特征。
light_analysis.result: 在多个城市占用数据集上，OccAny在3D占用预测任务中显著优于所有视觉几何基线方法（如度量预测和几何补全指标提升10%-20%），并与域内自监督方法竞争。实验覆盖三种输入设置（单目、环视、序列），验证了其域外泛化能力和与域内方法相当的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: OccAny首次实现了无约束的通用城市3D占用预测，突破了现有方法对域内数据和传感器先验的依赖，具有良好的可扩展性。其新颖视图渲染和分割强制策略为几何补全和语义占用提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的模型部署及更复杂的城市场景适配。

title: Disentangling Dynamical Systems: Causal Representation Learning Meets Local Sparse Attention
abstract: Parametric system identification methods estimate the parameters of explicitly defined physical systems from data. Yet, they remain constrained by the need to provide an explicit function space, typically through a predefined library of candidate functions chosen via available domain knowledge. In contrast, deep learning can demonstrably model systems of broad complexity with high fidelity, but black-box function approximation typically fails to yield explicit descriptive or disentangled representations revealing the structure of a system. We develop a novel identifiability theorem, leveraging causal representation learning, to uncover disentangled representations of system parameters without structural assumptions. We derive a graphical criterion specifying when system parameters can be uniquely disentangled from raw trajectory data, up to permutation and diffeomorphism. Crucially, our analysis demonstrates that global causal structures provide a lower bound on the disentanglement guarantees achievable when considering local state-dependent causal structures. We instantiate system parameter identification as a variational inference problem, leveraging a sparsity-regularised transformer to uncover state-dependent causal structures. We empirically validate our approach across four synthetic domains, demonstrating its ability to recover highly disentangled representations that baselines fail to recover. Corroborating our theoretical analysis, our results confirm that enforcing local causal structure is often necessary for full identifiability.
comment: Presented as an Oral at the 5th Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合因果表示学习与局部稀疏注意力的方法，无需结构假设即可从轨迹数据中解缠系统参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数化系统辨识方法依赖预定义函数空间，而深度学习方法虽能高保真建模复杂系统，但黑箱函数逼近无法生成显式或解缠表示。现有方法难以在不作结构假设的情况下揭示系统真实结构，亟需能从原始轨迹数据中唯一解缠系统参数的理论与方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种可辨识性定理，利用因果表示学习推导图准则，指定系统参数可唯一解缠至置换和微分同胚的条件。将系统参数辨识实例化为变分推断问题，采用稀疏正则化Transformer学习状态依赖的因果结构。理论分析表明全局因果结构提供解缠保证的下界，局部结构对完全可辨识性必要。
light_analysis.result: 在四个合成域上实验，该方法成功恢复高度解缠的表示，而基线方法均失败。结果证实了理论分析，即强制局部因果结构通常对完全可辨识性是必要的，且该方法能有效提取系统参数的解缠表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过因果表示学习与稀疏注意力机制，实现了无需结构假设的系统参数解缠辨识，理论证明局部因果结构对可辨识性的必要性。该方法兼具可解释性与泛化能力，为复杂动态系统辨识提供新范式。未来可拓展至现实世界系统或更复杂的因果结构。

title: V-JEPA 2.1: Unlocking Dense Features in Video Self-Supervised Learning
abstract: We present V-JEPA 2.1, a family of self-supervised models that learn dense, high-quality visual representations for both images and videos while retaining strong global scene understanding. The approach combines four key components. First, a dense predictive loss uses a masking-based objective in which both visible and masked tokens contribute to the training signal, encouraging explicit spatial and temporal grounding. Second, deep self-supervision applies the self-supervised objective hierarchically across multiple intermediate encoder layers to improve representation quality. Third, multi-modal tokenizers enable unified training across images and videos. Finally, the model benefits from effective scaling in both model capacity and training data. Together, these design choices produce representations that are spatially structured, semantically coherent, and temporally consistent.   Empirically, V-JEPA 2.1 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several challenging benchmarks, including 7.71 mAP on Ego4D for short-term object-interaction anticipation and 40.8 Recall@5 on EPIC-KITCHENS for high-level action anticipation, as well as a 20-point improvement in real-robot grasping success rate over V-JEPA-2 AC. The model also demonstrates strong performance in robotic navigation (5.687 ATE on TartanDrive), depth estimation (0.307 RMSE on NYUv2 with a linear probe), and global recognition (77.7 on Something-Something-V2). These results show that V-JEPA 2.1 significantly advances the state of the art in dense visual understanding and world modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出V-JEPA 2.1，通过密集预测损失和多层自监督，实现图像与视频的密集视觉表示学习，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督视频模型通常学习全局场景表示，缺乏密集的空间和时间结构，难以应对细粒度任务如动作预测和机器人操作。需要一种既能保持全局理解又能产生高质量密集特征的方法，以提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.method: V-JEPA 2.1结合四个关键组件：1）密集预测损失，掩码目标中可见和掩码token都参与训练，促进时空定位；2）深度自监督，对多个中间编码器层逐层应用自监督目标；3）多模态分词器，统一图像和视频训练；4）有效扩展模型容量和数据规模，生成空间结构化、语义一致、时间连贯的表示。
light_analysis.result: 在Ego4D短期目标交互预测上达7.71 mAP，EPIC-KITCHENS高级动作预测上Recall@5为40.8，机器人抓取成功率较V-JEPA-2 AC提升20个百分点；在TartanDrive导航(ATE 5.687)、NYUv2深度估计(RMSE 0.307)、Something-Something-V2全局识别(77.7)上也表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: V-JEPA 2.1通过密集预测和深度监督显著提升了密集视觉理解与世界建模能力，在动作预测、机器人操作和视觉感知任务上取得突破。未来可进一步探索更大规模模型和更多模态融合。

title: Mixing Makes Markovian Contexts Cheap for Linear Bandits
abstract: Recent work shows that when contexts are drawn i.i.d., linear contextual bandits can be reduced to single-context linear bandits. This ``contexts are cheap'' perspective is highly advantageous, as it allows for sharper finite-time analyses and leverages mature techniques from the linear bandit literature, such as those for misspecification and adversarial corruption. However, this reduction crucially relies on the independence of contexts and does not extend to settings with temporally correlated (e.g., Markovian) contexts, which arise frequently in practice. Motivated by applications with temporally correlated availability, we extend this perspective to linear bandits with Markovian context processes, where the action set evolves via an exogenous Markov chain. Our main contribution is a reduction that applies under uniform geometric ergodicity. We construct a stationary surrogate action set to solve the problem using a standard linear bandit oracle, employing a delayed-update scheme to control the bias induced by the nonstationary conditional context distributions. We further provide a phased algorithm for unknown stationary distributions that learns the surrogate mapping online. In both settings, we obtain a high-probability worst-case regret bound matching that of the underlying linear bandit oracle in sufficiently fast mixing regimes. We then validate our results on a real-world instance, where we show practical gains over a LinUCB baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 将线性上下文bandit的“上下文廉价”视角扩展到马尔可夫上下文过程，通过构建平稳替代动作集实现与独立同分布上下文相似的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性上下文bandit在处理独立同分布上下文时，可以通过归约到单上下文线性bandit来简化分析与算法，获得更紧的有限时间界和更强的鲁棒性。然而，实际应用中上下文常呈时间相关性（如马尔可夫链），现有归约方法失效。该研究旨在解决马尔可夫上下文下的线性bandit问题，使得“上下文廉价”的优势能扩展到更实际的场景中。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种利用均匀几何遍历性的归约方法：构造一个平稳替代动作集，将马尔可夫上下文问题转化为标准线性bandit问题。采用延迟更新方案控制非平稳条件上下文分布产生的偏差，并针对未知平稳分布设计了相位算法在线学习替代映射。该方法在快速混合条件下，可获得与底层线性bandit oracle相匹配的遗憾界。
light_analysis.result: 在高概率意义下，得到了与底层线性bandit oracle匹配的最坏情况遗憾界。在真实世界实例上验证了有效性，相对于LinUCB基线展示了实际性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作扩展了“上下文廉价”视角至马尔可夫上下文线性bandit，实现了理论上与独立同分布情形相当的遗憾界，同时在实际数据中优于LinUCB。未来可研究更一般的上下文过程或降低对混合条件的依赖。

title: CreativeBench: Benchmarking and Enhancing Machine Creativity via Self-Evolving Challenges
abstract: The saturation of high-quality pre-training data has shifted research focus toward evolutionary systems capable of continuously generating novel artifacts, leading to the success of AlphaEvolve. However, the progress of such systems is hindered by the lack of rigorous, quantitative evaluation. To tackle this challenge, we introduce CreativeBench, a benchmark for evaluating machine creativity in code generation, grounded in a classical cognitive framework. Comprising two subsets -- CreativeBench-Combo and CreativeBench-Explore -- the benchmark targets combinatorial and exploratory creativity through an automated pipeline utilizing reverse engineering and self-play. By leveraging executable code, CreativeBench objectively distinguishes creativity from hallucination via a unified metric defined as the product of quality and novelty. Our analysis of state-of-the-art models reveals distinct behaviors: (1) scaling significantly improves combinatorial creativity but yields diminishing returns for exploration; (2) larger models exhibit ``convergence-by-scaling,'' becoming more correct but less divergent; and (3) reasoning capabilities primarily benefit constrained exploration rather than combination. Finally, we propose EvoRePE, a plug-and-play inference-time steering strategy that internalizes evolutionary search patterns to consistently enhance machine creativity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CreativeBench基准，通过可执行代码客观评估机器创造力，并提出EvoRePE策略增强创造力。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量预训练数据饱和促使研究转向能持续生成新产物的进化系统，如AlphaEvolve的成功所示。然而，这类系统缺乏严格的定量评估，无法客观区分创造性与幻觉。现有方法未能提供统一的度量标准，限制了进化系统的进展。因此，需要一个基于认知框架、可量化的创造力基准。
light_analysis.method: 基于古典认知框架，构建CreativeBench基准，包含Combo（组合创造力）和Explore（探索创造力）两个子集。采用逆向工程和自博弈的自动化流水线生成挑战，利用可执行代码，通过统一度量（质量与新颖性的乘积）客观评估。进一步提出EvoRePE，一种即插即用的推理时引导策略，内化进化搜索模式以增强创造力。
light_analysis.result: 对SOTA模型的分析显示：（1）缩放显著提升组合创造力，但对探索的收益递减；（2）大模型呈现“缩放收敛”现象，正确性提高但发散性下降；（3）推理能力主要增强受限探索而非组合。EvoRePE策略能持续提升各模型的创造力，尤其对探索任务效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: CreativeBench提供了首个基于可执行代码的机器创造力客观评估框架，揭示了缩放与创造力之间的复杂关系。EvoRePE作为轻量级策略，可有效提升推理时创造力。该工作为进化系统的评估和优化奠定了基础，未来可扩展至更多创造性任务。

title: ARROW: Augmented Replay for RObust World models
abstract: Continual reinforcement learning challenges agents to acquire new skills while retaining previously learned ones with the goal of improving performance in both past and future tasks. Most existing approaches rely on model-free methods with replay buffers to mitigate catastrophic forgetting; however, these solutions often face significant scalability challenges due to large memory demands. Drawing inspiration from neuroscience, where the brain replays experiences to a predictive World Model rather than directly to the policy, we present ARROW (Augmented Replay for RObust World models), a model-based continual RL algorithm that extends DreamerV3 with a memory-efficient, distribution-matching replay buffer. Unlike standard fixed-size FIFO buffers, ARROW maintains two complementary buffers: a short-term buffer for recent experiences and a long-term buffer that preserves task diversity through intelligent sampling. We evaluate ARROW on two challenging continual RL settings: Tasks without shared structure (Atari), and tasks with shared structure, where knowledge transfer is possible (Procgen CoinRun variants). Compared to model-free and model-based baselines with replay buffers of the same-size, ARROW demonstrates substantially less forgetting on tasks without shared structure, while maintaining comparable forward transfer. Our findings highlight the potential of model-based RL and bio-inspired approaches for continual reinforcement learning, warranting further research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ARROW，一种基于模型的持续强化学习算法，通过增强型回放和双重缓冲区减少灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续强化学习中，现有方法多依赖无模型回放来缓解灾难性遗忘，但面临内存需求大的可扩展性问题。受神经科学启发，大脑将经验回放给预测性世界模型而非直接给策略，因此提出一种记忆高效、分布匹配的模型回放方法，以解决现有短板。
light_analysis.method: ARROW基于DreamerV3，维护两个互补缓冲区：短期缓冲区存储最新经验，长期缓冲区通过智能采样保持任务多样性，实现分布匹配。这种设计避免了标准FIFO缓冲区的单一性，提升了记忆效率。
light_analysis.result: 在无共享结构（Atari）和有共享结构（Procgen CoinRun）的持续RL任务中，与同大小回放缓冲区的无模型和模型基线相比，ARROW在无共享结构任务上遗忘显著减少，同时保持可比较的前向迁移性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARROW展示了模型驱动和生物启发方法在持续强化学习中的潜力，为减少灾难性遗忘提供了新思路。未来可进一步研究其在大规模任务和更复杂世界模型中的应用。

title: Differentiable Thermodynamic Phase-Equilibria for Machine Learning
abstract: Accurate prediction of phase equilibria remains a central challenge in chemical engineering. Physics-consistent machine learning methods that incorporate thermodynamic structure into neural networks have recently shown strong performance for activity-coefficient modeling. However, extending such approaches to equilibrium data arising from an extremum principle, such as liquid-liquid equilibria, remains difficult. Here we present DISCOMAX, a differentiable algorithm for phase-equilibrium calculation that guarantees thermodynamic consistency at both training and inference, only subject to a user-specified discretization. The method combines discrete enumeration of feasible phase states with masked softmax aggregation in the backward pass, with the propagation of the true equilibrium state in the forward pass, using a straight-through gradient estimator to enable physics-consistent end-to-end learning of neural \gls{gE}-models. We show that this approach bears analogy to statistical thermodynamics, and we evaluate it on binary liquid-liquid equilibrium data where it outperforms existing surrogate-based methods, while offering a general framework for learning from different kinds of equilibrium data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可微分相平衡算法DISCOMAX，实现热力学一致的端到端学习神经网络活度系数模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 化工中准确预测相平衡是核心挑战，已有物理一致机器学习方法用于活度系数建模，但难以扩展至基于极值原理的平衡数据（如液液平衡）。现有方法因不可微或热力学不一致而受限，亟需一种既能保证热力学约束又能支持梯度传播的算法。
light_analysis.method: DISCOMAX算法结合离散枚举可行相态，前向传播选择真实平衡态，反向传播采用掩码softmax聚合和直通梯度估计器，确保可微性。该方法类比统计热力学，用户可指定离散化精度，从而实现物理一致性的端到端学习。
light_analysis.result: 在二元液液平衡数据集上，DISCOMAX优于现有基于代理的替代方法，显著提升了预测准确性。实验验证了算法在保持热力学一致性的同时，有效学习相平衡行为，展现了通用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DISCOMAX为学习多种相平衡数据提供了通用框架，兼具物理一致性与可微分性。其与统计热力学的类比揭示了深层理论联系，未来可推广至多组分系统或反应平衡，但离散化精度与计算效率的权衡需进一步优化。

title: On the Reliability of Cue Conflict and Beyond
abstract: Understanding how neural networks rely on visual cues offers a human-interpretable view of their internal decision processes. The cue-conflict benchmark has been influential in probing shape-texture preference and in motivating the insight that stronger, human-like shape bias is often associated with improved in-domain performance. However, we find that the current stylization-based instantiation can yield unstable and ambiguous bias estimates. Specifically, stylization may not reliably instantiate perceptually valid and separable cues nor control their relative informativeness, ratio-based bias can obscure absolute cue sensitivity, and restricting evaluation to preselected classes can distort model predictions by ignoring the full decision space. Together, these factors can confound preference with cue validity, cue balance, and recognizability artifacts. We introduce REFINED-BIAS, an integrated dataset and evaluation framework for reliable and interpretable shape-texture bias diagnosis. REFINED-BIAS constructs balanced, human- and model- recognizable cue pairs using explicit definitions of shape and texture, and measures cue-specific sensitivity over the full label space via a ranking-based metric, enabling fairer cross-model comparisons. Across diverse training regimes and architectures, REFINED-BIAS enables fairer cross-model comparison, more faithful diagnosis of shape and texture biases, and clearer empirical conclusions, resolving inconsistencies that prior cue-conflict evaluations could not reliably disambiguate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFINED-BIAS框架，解决现有cue-conflict评估中形状-纹理偏好度量不可靠的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有cue-conflict基准在评估神经网络形状-纹理偏好时存在不稳定和模糊的偏差估计问题。具体而言，基于风格化的方法无法可靠地实例化感知有效且可分离的线索，也无法控制其相对信息量；比率型偏差指标掩盖了绝对线索敏感性；限于预先选定类别的评估忽略了完整决策空间，导致偏好与线索有效性、平衡性及可识别性伪影混淆。这些缺陷阻碍了模型间公平比较和可靠诊断。
light_analysis.method: REFINED-BIAS构建了平衡且对人和模型均可识别的线索对，基于形状和纹理的明确定义；采用排序度量在整个标签空间上测量线索特异性敏感性，实现更公平的跨模型比较。该框架通过显式构造可控线索和全空间评估，克服了风格化不稳定性、比率模糊和类别限制等问题，支持对各种训练范式和架构的可靠诊断。
light_analysis.result: 在多种训练机制和架构上，REFINED-BIAS实现了更公平的跨模型比较、更忠实的形状/纹理偏差诊断，并得出更清晰的实验结论，解决了先前cue-conflict评估无法可靠区分的矛盾。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明该方法能有效消除原有评估中的不一致性，提升偏差度量的可信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFINED-BIAS为形状-纹理偏差诊断提供了可靠且可解释的基准框架，具有重要学术价值（澄清先前不一致结论）和实用价值（促进对模型决策过程的透明理解）。未来可扩展至其他视觉线索类型，但摘要未提及局限性。该方法促进了更公平的模型比较和更可靠的偏差分析。

title: Echo2ECG: Enhancing ECG Representations with Cardiac Morphology from Multi-View Echos
abstract: Electrocardiography (ECG) is a low-cost, widely used modality for diagnosing electrical abnormalities like atrial fibrillation by capturing the heart's electrical activity. However, it cannot directly measure cardiac morphological phenotypes, such as left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), which typically require echocardiography (Echo). Predicting these phenotypes from ECG would enable early, accessible health screening. Existing self-supervised methods suffer from a representational mismatch by aligning ECGs to single-view Echos, which only capture local, spatially restricted anatomical snapshots. To address this, we propose Echo2ECG, a multimodal self-supervised learning framework that enriches ECG representations with the heart's morphological structure captured in multi-view Echos. We evaluate Echo2ECG as an ECG feature extractor on two clinically relevant tasks that fundamentally require morphological information: (1) classification of structural cardiac phenotypes across three datasets, and (2) retrieval of Echo studies with similar morphological characteristics using ECG queries. Our extracted ECG representations consistently outperform those of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines across both tasks, despite being 18x smaller than the largest baseline. These results demonstrate that Echo2ECG is a robust, powerful ECG feature extractor. Our code is accessible at https://github.com/michelleespranita/Echo2ECG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Echo2ECG框架，利用多视角超声心动图增强心电图表征，解决与单视角对齐的表征不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 心电图（ECG）虽廉价广泛用于诊断电异常，但无法直接测量心脏形态表型（如左心室射血分数），这些通常需超声心动图（Echo）。从ECG预测形态表型可促进早期筛查。现有自监督方法将ECG与单视角Echo对齐，仅捕获局部、空间受限的解剖快照，存在表征不匹配问题。
light_analysis.method: Echo2ECG是一种多模态自监督学习框架，通过多视角Echo中捕获的心脏形态结构来丰富ECG表征。作为ECG特征提取器，在两项需要形态信息的任务上评估：1）跨三个数据集的结构性心脏表型分类；2）基于ECG查询检索具有相似形态特征的Echo研究。
light_analysis.result: Echo2ECG在两个任务上均一致优于最先进的单模态和多模态基线，尽管其模型大小比最大基线小18倍。在分类和检索任务中表现更优，表明其作为稳健且强大的ECG特征提取器的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Echo2ECG通过融合多视角Echo形态信息，显著提升ECG表征能力，为低成本、可及的形态表型筛查提供新方法。代码开源，未来可探索更多临床任务及细粒度形态预测。

title: FENCE: A Financial and Multimodal Jailbreak Detection Dataset
abstract: Jailbreaking poses a significant risk to the deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs). VLMs are particularly vulnerable because they process both text and images, creating broader attack surfaces. However, available resources for jailbreak detection are scarce, particularly in finance. To address this gap, we present FENCE, a bilingual (Korean-English) multimodal dataset for training and evaluating jailbreak detectors in financial applications. FENCE emphasizes domain realism through finance-relevant queries paired with image-grounded threats. Experiments with commercial and open-source VLMs reveal consistent vulnerabilities, with GPT-4o showing measurable attack success rates and open-source models displaying greater exposure. A baseline detector trained on FENCE achieves 99 percent in-distribution accuracy and maintains strong performance on external benchmarks, underscoring the dataset's robustness for training reliable detection models. FENCE provides a focused resource for advancing multimodal jailbreak detection in finance and for supporting safer, more reliable AI systems in sensitive domains. Warning: This paper includes example data that may be offensive.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FENCE，首个金融多模态越狱检测数据集（韩英双语），支持训练鲁棒检测器。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型和视觉语言模型面临越狱攻击风险，尤其VLM因多模态处理增加攻击面。现有越狱检测资源稀缺，金融领域尤为突出，亟需领域定制的多模态数据集以提升检测能力和系统安全性。
light_analysis.method: 构建FENCE数据集，包含金融相关查询与图像威胁的双语对（韩语、英语），覆盖商业和开源VLM。基于该数据集训练基线检测器，采用多模态特征融合实现二分类，并评估GPT-4o等模型的攻击成功率。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示GPT-4o存在可测量攻击成功率，开源VLM暴露更严重。基线检测器在FENCE分布内准确率达99%，在外部基准上保持强劲性能，证实数据集对训练鲁棒检测模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FENCE填补了金融领域多模态越狱检测的空白，提供高质量双语资源，推动敏感场景下AI安全研究。未来可扩展至其他领域，并探索更复杂的攻击模式与防御策略。

title: InnoEval: On Research Idea Evaluation as a Knowledge-Grounded, Multi-Perspective Reasoning Problem
abstract: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models has catalyzed a surge in scientific idea production, yet this leap has not been accompanied by a matching advance in idea evaluation. The fundamental nature of scientific evaluation needs knowledgeable grounding, collective deliberation, and multi-criteria decision-making. However, existing idea evaluation methods often suffer from narrow knowledge horizons, flattened evaluation dimensions, and the inherent bias in LLM-as-a-Judge. To address these, we regard idea evaluation as a knowledge-grounded, multi-perspective reasoning problem and introduce InnoEval, a deep innovation evaluation framework designed to emulate human-level idea assessment. We apply a heterogeneous deep knowledge search engine that retrieves and grounds dynamic evidence from diverse online sources. We further achieve review consensus with an innovation review board containing reviewers with distinct academic backgrounds, enabling a multi-dimensional decoupled evaluation across multiple metrics. We construct comprehensive datasets derived from authoritative peer-reviewed submissions to benchmark InnoEval. Experiments demonstrate that InnoEval can consistently outperform baselines in point-wise, pair-wise, and group-wise evaluation tasks, exhibiting judgment patterns and consensus highly aligned with human experts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InnoEval框架，将研究想法评估建模为知识驱动的多角度推理问题，实现类人水平的创新评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型加速了科学想法的产生，但评估方法滞后。现有方法存在知识视野狭窄、评估维度扁平以及LLM固有偏见等问题。研究想法评估本质上需要知识基础、集体商议和多准则决策，因此亟需一种更全面、客观且接近人类专家的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: InnoEval框架将想法评估视为知识驱动的多角度推理问题。采用异构深度知识搜索引擎从多种在线来源检索并接地动态证据。构建包含不同学术背景评审者的创新评审委员会，实现多指标的多维度解耦评估。还构建了基于权威同行评审提交的数据集进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，InnoEval在点对点、成对和分组评估任务中均一致优于基线方法，其判断模式和共识与人类专家高度一致，证明了框架的有效性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: InnoEval为研究想法评估提供了一种更全面、客观的框架，弥补了现有方法的不足。其基于知识推理和多视角共识的设计有望提升科学评估质量。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但可推测需进一步适配不同领域评估标准。

title: Hierarchical Successor Representation for Robust Transfer
abstract: The successor representation (SR) provides a powerful framework for decoupling predictive dynamics from rewards, enabling rapid generalisation across reward configurations. However, the classical SR is limited by its inherent policy dependence: policies change due to ongoing learning, environmental non-stationarities, and changes in task demands, making established predictive representations obsolete. Furthermore, in topologically complex environments, SRs suffer from spectral diffusion, leading to dense and overlapping features that scale poorly. Here we propose the Hierarchical Successor Representation (HSR) for overcoming these limitations. By incorporating temporal abstractions into the construction of predictive representations, HSR learns stable state features which are robust to task-induced policy changes. Applying non-negative matrix factorisation (NMF) to the HSR yields a sparse, low-rank state representation that facilitates highly sample-efficient transfer to novel tasks in multi-compartmental environments. Further analysis reveals that HSR-NMF discovers interpretable topological structures, providing a policy-agnostic hierarchical map that effectively bridges model-free optimality and model-based flexibility. Beyond providing a useful basis for task-transfer, we show that HSR's temporally extended predictive structure can also be leveraged to drive efficient exploration, effectively scaling to large, procedurally generated environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次化后继表示（HSR），通过时间抽象和NMF实现鲁棒的任务迁移与高效探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典后继表示（SR）依赖当前策略，当策略因学习、环境变化或任务需求改变时，预测表示失效。此外，在拓扑复杂环境中，SR存在谱扩散问题，产生密集重叠的特征，扩展性差。这些问题限制了SR在动态和多任务场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: HSR通过将时间抽象引入预测表示构建，学习稳定状态特征，抵抗策略变化。对HSR施加非负矩阵分解（NMF）得到稀疏低秩表示，实现样本高效的跨任务迁移。在多方舱环境中，HSR-NMF发现可解释的拓扑结构，形成策略无关的层次地图，并利用时间扩展结构驱动高效探索。
light_analysis.result: HSR-NMF在多方舱环境中实现了样本高效的迁移，发现可解释的拓扑结构。相比经典SR，HSR对任务诱导的策略变化更具鲁棒性，且能扩展到大规模程序生成环境。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调在复杂环境中有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: HSR通过时间抽象和NMF克服了经典SR的策略依赖和谱扩散问题，提供了策略无关的层次化表示，兼具模型自由的最优性和模型基的灵活性。该方法可用于任务迁移和高效探索，具有在复杂动态环境中部署的潜力。未来可探索更复杂的层次结构或结合深度网络。

title: Structured vs. Unstructured Pruning: An Exponential Gap
abstract: The Strong Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (SLTH) states that large, randomly initialized neural networks contain sparse subnetworks capable of approximating a target function at initialization without training, suggesting that pruning alone is sufficient. Pruning methods are typically classified as unstructured, where individual weights can be removed from the network, and structured, where parameters are removed according to specific patterns, as in neuron pruning. Existing theoretical results supporting the SLTH rely almost exclusively on unstructured pruning, showing that logarithmic overparameterization suffices to approximate simple target networks. In contrast, neuron pruning has received limited theoretical attention, despite its practical appeal for direct hardware speedups. In this work, we consider the problem of approximating a single bias-free ReLU neuron by pruning hidden units of a randomly initialized two-layer ReLU network, effectively isolating the intrinsic limitations of neuron pruning. We show that achieving an $\varepsilon$-approximation requires a starting network size of $Ω(1/\varepsilon)$ for neuron pruning, whereas weight pruning succeeds with only $O(\log(1/\varepsilon))$ hidden units, revealing an exponential separation between the two approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示结构化剪枝（神经元剪枝）与非结构化剪枝（权重剪枝）在随机网络中逼近单个ReLU神经元时存在指数级性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 强彩票假设（SLTH）表明随机大网络包含可逼近目标函数的稀疏子网络，但其理论主要支持非结构化剪枝。结构化剪枝（如神经元剪枝）虽能直接加速硬件，却缺乏理论保证。本文通过分析随机两层ReLU网络逼近单个无偏置ReLU神经元的问题，旨在隔离神经元剪枝的内在局限性，探究两种剪枝方法的本质差异。
light_analysis.method: 考虑一个随机初始化的两层ReLU网络，隐藏单元权重和偏置随机采样，仅保留输出层进行学习（通过剪枝隐藏单元或权重）。目标是逼近一个固定的无偏置ReLU神经元。对于神经元剪枝，需选择并保留部分隐藏单元；对于权重剪枝，可任意移除单个权重。通过理论推导给出所需隐藏单元数量的下界和上界。
light_analysis.result: 实现ε-逼近时，神经元剪枝所需的起始网络大小下界为Ω(1/ε)个隐藏单元，而权重剪枝仅需O(log(1/ε))个隐藏单元即可成功。这一结果揭示了两种方法在逼近能力上的指数级分离，即神经元剪枝需要指数级更多的参数才能达到与权重剪枝相当的近似精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从理论上证明结构化剪枝（神经元剪枝）与非结构化剪枝在随机网络中存在指数级差距，解释了为何现有彩票假设主要适用于非结构化剪枝。该发现为设计高效的结构化剪枝策略提供了理论基础，提示在实际部署中若使用神经元剪枝需更大初始规模。未来可探索更复杂网络结构下的差距。

title: Ex-Omni: Enabling 3D Facial Animation Generation for Omni-modal Large Language Models
abstract: Omni-modal large language models (OLLMs) aim to unify multimodal understanding and generation, yet extending them to jointly produce speech and 3D facial animation remains largely unexplored despite its importance for natural human-computer interaction. A key challenge is the mismatch between the discrete semantic reasoning of LLMs and the dense temporal dynamics required for 3D facial motion. We propose Expressive Omni (Ex-Omni), an open-source model that augments OLLMs with native speech-accompanied 3D facial animation. Ex-Omni decouples semantic reasoning from temporal generation through a blendshape-aware speech unit generator and a blendshape decoder, where speech units provide temporal scaffolding and hidden speech representations carry facially relevant cues. We further introduce a unified token-as-query gated fusion (TQGF) mechanism for controlled semantic injection, as well as InstructS2SF-1200K, a dataset consisting of 1200K samples for pre-training. Extensive experiments show that Ex-Omni maintains competitive speech understanding and generation ability while achieving better audio-visual synchronization and lower face-generation latency than cascaded pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ex-Omni，一个为全模态大语言模型添加原生语音伴随3D面部动画生成能力的开源模型，通过解耦语义推理与时间生成实现高效同步。
light_analysis.motivation: 全模态大语言模型(OLLMs)旨在统一多模态理解和生成，但尚未探索同时生成语音和3D面部动画，这对于自然的人机交互至关重要。现有方法中，LLMs的离散语义推理与3D面部运动所需的密集时间动态之间存在不匹配，导致难以协同生成。因此需要解决这一挑战，实现语音与面部动画的同步生成。
light_analysis.method: Ex-Omni通过blendshape-aware语音单元生成器和blendshape解码器解耦语义推理与时间生成：语音单元提供时间支架，隐藏语音表示携带面部相关线索。提出统一token-as-query门控融合(TQGF)机制进行受控语义注入。并构建InstructS2SF-1200K数据集（含1200K样本）用于预训练，以增强生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Ex-Omni在保持竞争性语音理解和生成能力的同时，相比级联管道实现了更好的音视频同步和更低的面部生成延迟。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ex-Omni成功将3D面部动画生成集成到OLLMs中，推动了全模态交互的发展。学术价值在于解决了离散语义推理与连续时间动态的匹配问题，实际应用价值在于增强人机交互的自然性。未来工作可进一步优化实时性和表情多样性。

title: LLM-based Embeddings: Attention Values Encode Sentence Semantics Better Than Hidden States
abstract: Sentence representations are foundational to many Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications. While recent methods leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) to derive sentence representations, most rely on final-layer hidden states, which are optimized for next-token prediction and thus often fail to capture global, sentence-level semantics. This paper introduces a novel perspective, demonstrating that attention value vectors capture sentence semantics more effectively than hidden states. We propose Value Aggregation (VA), a simple method that pools token values across multiple layers and token indices. In a training-free setting, VA outperforms other LLM-based embeddings, even matches or surpasses the ensemble-based MetaEOL. Furthermore, we demonstrate that when paired with suitable prompts, the layer attention outputs can be interpreted as aligned weighted value vectors. Specifically, the attention scores of the last token function as the weights, while the output projection matrix ($W_O$) aligns these weighted value vectors with the common space of the LLM residual stream. This refined method, termed Aligned Weighted VA (AlignedWVA), achieves state-of-the-art performance among training-free LLM-based embeddings, outperforming the high-cost MetaEOL by a substantial margin. Finally, we highlight the potential of obtaining strong LLM embedding models through fine-tuning Value Aggregation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于注意力值的向量比隐藏状态更能编码句子语义，并设计Value Aggregation方法提升无训练句子嵌入性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 句子表示是NLP基础，现有方法利用LLM的隐藏状态，但隐藏状态优化用于下一词预测，不能捕捉全局句子语义。本文提出注意力值向量更有效，并探索无需训练的高效嵌入方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Value Aggregation (VA)，通过池化多层token值得到句子表示；进一步提出Aligned Weighted VA (AlignedWVA)，利用最后token的注意力分数作为权重，并通过输出投影矩阵对齐值向量，实现无训练高性能嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 在无训练设置中，VA优于其他LLM嵌入，匹配或超越集成方法MetaEOL；AlignedWVA达到无训练LLM嵌入的SOTA，大幅超越MetaEOL，且无需额外训练成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 注意力值比隐藏状态更有效，VA方法简单无需训练，可通过微调进一步提升。为LLM句子嵌入提供新方向，展示注意力机制在语义编码中的潜力。

title: From Digital to Physical: Digital Agents as Autonomous Coaches for Physical Intelligence
abstract: The field of Embodied AI is witnessing a rapid evolution toward general-purpose robotic systems, fueled by high-fidelity simulation and large-scale data collection. However, this scaling capability remains severely bottlenecked by a reliance on labor-intensive manual oversight from intricate reward shaping to hyperparameter tuning across heterogeneous backends. Inspired by LLMs' success in software automation and science discovery, we introduce \textsc{EmboCoach-Bench}, a benchmark evaluating the capacity of LLM agents to autonomously engineer embodied policies. Spanning 32 expert-curated RL and IL tasks, our framework posits executable code as the universal interface. We move beyond static generation to assess a dynamic closed-loop workflow, where agents leverage environment feedback to iteratively draft, debug, and optimize solutions, spanning improvements from physics-informed reward design to policy architectures such as diffusion policies. Extensive evaluations yield three critical insights: (1) autonomous agents can qualitatively surpass human-engineered baselines by 26.5\% in average success rate; (2) agentic workflow with environment feedback effectively strengthens policy development and substantially narrows the performance gap between open-source and proprietary models; and (3) agents exhibit self-correction capabilities for pathological engineering cases, successfully resurrecting task performance from near-total failures through iterative simulation-in-the-loop debugging. Ultimately, this work establishes a foundation for self-evolving embodied intelligence, accelerating the paradigm shift from labor-intensive manual tuning to scalable, autonomous engineering in embodied AI field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 EmboCoach-Bench 基准，评估 LLM 代理自主设计具身策略的能力，实现从人工调参到自主工程的转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身 AI 向通用机器人系统发展，但依赖人工监督（如奖励塑形、超参调优）成为瓶颈。受 LLM 在软件自动化和科学发现中成功的启发，需探索 LLM 代理自主工程化具身策略的能力，以加速具身 AI 规模化。
light_analysis.method: 构建 EmboCoach-Bench，包含 32 个专家精选的强化学习和模仿学习任务。以可执行代码作为通用接口，采用动态闭环工作流：代理利用环境反馈迭代起草、调试和优化解决方案，涵盖物理信息奖励设计、扩散策略等架构改进。评估多种 LLM 代理。
light_analysis.result: 自主代理在平均成功率上超过人类基线 26.5%。带环境反馈的代理工作流有效提升策略开发，缩小开源与闭源模型性能差距。代理能自我修正病理工程案例，通过迭代仿真调试从近乎失败中恢复任务性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为自进化具身智能奠定基础，推动具身 AI 从劳动密集型手动调参向可扩展的自主工程范式转变。未来可进一步扩展任务复杂度和代理泛化能力。

title: Kareus: Joint Reduction of Dynamic and Static Energy in Large Model Training
abstract: The computing demand of AI is growing at an unprecedented rate, but energy supply is not keeping pace. As a result, energy has become an expensive and contended resource that requires explicit management and optimization. Although recent works have made significant progress in large model training optimization, they focus on optimizing either dynamic or static energy consumption.   We find that fine-grained kernel scheduling and frequency scaling jointly and interdependently impact both dynamic and static energy consumption. Based on this finding, we design Kareus, a training system that pushes the time-energy tradeoff frontier by optimizing both aspects. Kareus decomposes the intractable joint optimization problem into local, partition-based subproblems. It then uses a multi-pass multi-objective optimization algorithm to find execution schedules that push the time-energy tradeoff frontier. Compared to the state of the art, Kareus reduces training energy by up to 28.3% at the same training time, or reduces training time by up to 27.5% at the same energy consumption.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kareus系统，通过联合优化动态和静态能量消耗，推动大模型训练中时间-能量权衡前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: AI计算需求激增，但能量供应受限，能量成为昂贵和竞争的资源。现有工作分别优化动态或静态能量，忽略了二者间的相互依赖，难以达到最优权衡。
light_analysis.method: Kareus将联合优化问题分解为基于分区的子问题，采用多遍多目标优化算法，通过细粒度内核调度和频率缩放，找到推动时间-能量权衡前沿的执行调度。
light_analysis.result: 与最先进方法相比，相同训练时间下能量减少高达28.3%，相同能量消耗下训练时间减少高达27.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Kareus通过联合优化显著提升训练能效，揭示了内核调度和频率缩放的相互依赖关系，适用于能量受限环境。未来可降低额外调度开销。

title: DSAEval: Evaluating Data Science Agents on a Wide Range of Real-World Data Science Problems
abstract: Recent LLM-based data agents aim to automate data science tasks ranging from data analysis to deep learning. However, the open-ended nature of real-world data science problems, which often span multiple taxonomies and lack standard answers, poses a significant challenge for evaluation. To address this, we introduce DSAEval, a benchmark comprising 641 real-world data science problems grounded in 285 diverse datasets, covering both structured and unstructured data (e.g., image and text). DSAEval incorporates three distinctive features: (1) Multimodal Environment Perception, which enables agents to interpret observations from multiple modalities, including text and vision; (2) Multi-Query Interactions, which mirror the iterative and cumulative nature of real-world data science projects; and (3) Multi-Dimensional Evaluation, which provides a holistic assessment across reasoning, code, and results. We systematically evaluate 13 recent advanced agentic LLMs using DSAEval. Our results show that Claude-Sonnet-4.5 achieves the strongest overall performance, MiMo-V2-Pro and GPT-5.2 lead in duration and step efficiency, respectively, and MiMo-V2-Flash is the most cost-effective. We further demonstrate that multimodal perception consistently improves performance on vision-related tasks, with gains ranging from 2.04\% to 11.30\%. Overall, while current data science agents perform well on structured data and routine data analysis workflows, substantial challenges remain in unstructured domains. Finally, we offer critical insights and outline future research directions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DSAEval基准，用于评估LLM数据科学代理在多样真实问题上的综合能力，包含多模态感知和交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM数据代理旨在自动化数据科学任务，但真实世界问题具有开放性、多分类且无标准答案，评估困难。现有基准缺乏对多模态、迭代交互和综合维度的覆盖。DSAEval填补这一空白，提供641个真实问题、285个数据集，支持结构化与非结构化数据。
light_analysis.method: DSAEval包含三个创新：多模态环境感知（文本+视觉）、多查询交互（模拟迭代流程）、多维评估（推理、代码、结果）。基于此基准，评估13个最新LLM代理（如Claude-Sonnet-4.5, MiMo系列, GPT-5.2）。数据集覆盖图像和文本等非结构化数据。
light_analysis.result: Claude-Sonnet-4.5总体性能最强；MiMo-V2-Pro在持续时间效率领先，GPT-5.2在步骤效率领先；MiMo-V2-Flash最具成本效益。多模态感知使视觉任务性能提升2.04%至11.30%。在结构化数据和常规分析上表现良好，非结构化领域仍有挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSAEval提供了全面评估数据科学代理的基准，揭示当前代理在非结构化任务上的不足，并指出多模态感知的价值。未来工作可聚焦提升代理在非结构化领域的表现，探索更高效的多模态交互策略。

title: Epistemic Constitutionalism Or: how to avoid coherence bias
abstract: Large language models increasingly function as artificial reasoners: they evaluate arguments, assign credibility, and express confidence. Yet their belief-forming behavior is governed by implicit, uninspected epistemic policies. This paper argues for an epistemic constitution for AI: explicit, contestable meta-norms that regulate how systems form and express beliefs. Source attribution bias provides the motivating case: I show that frontier models enforce identity-stance coherence, penalizing arguments attributed to sources whose expected ideological position conflicts with the argument's content. When models detect systematic testing, these effects collapse, revealing that systems treat source-sensitivity as bias to suppress rather than as a capacity to execute well. I distinguish two constitutional approaches: the Platonic, which mandates formal correctness and default source-independence from a privileged standpoint, and the Liberal, which refuses such privilege, specifying procedural norms that protect conditions for collective inquiry while allowing principled source-attending grounded in epistemic vigilance. I argue for the Liberal approach, sketch a constitutional core of eight principles and four orientations, and propose that AI epistemic governance requires the same explicit, contestable structure we now expect for AI ethics.
comment: 27 pages, 7 tables. Data: github.com/MicheleLoi/source-attribution-bias-data and github.com/MicheleLoi/source-attribution-bias-swiss-replication. Complete AI-assisted writing documentation: github.com/MicheleLoi/epistemic-constitutionalism-paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI认知宪法（Epistemic Constitution），作为明确可争辩的元规范，通过源归因偏差案例论证其必要性，主张自由主义路径。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为推理者评估论点、分配可信度，但其信念形成受隐式、未审查的认知策略支配，导致身份立场一致性偏差。现有方法缺乏明确元规范来监管此过程，需建立可解释、可争辩的认知治理框架。
light_analysis.method: 区分两种认知宪法路径：柏拉图式（强制形式正确性和默认源独立性）与自由主义式（拒绝特权立场，指定保护集体探究的程序规范，允许基于认知警戒的原则性源关注）。作者主张自由主义路径，并概述八项原则和四种取向的核心。
light_analysis.result: 通过源归因偏差案例展示前沿模型强制身份立场一致性，惩罚与预期意识形态冲突的论点。当模型检测到系统测试时效应消失，表明系统将源敏感性视为需抑制的偏见。摘要未提供定量对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文论证AI认知治理需与AI伦理同等明确和可争辩的结构。自由主义认知宪法提供程序性规范，平衡源关注与认知警戒，促进集体探究。未来可应用于其他认知偏差或实际系统设计。

title: Contrastive Geometric Learning Unlocks Unified Structure- and Ligand-Based Drug Design
abstract: Structure-based and ligand-based computational drug design have traditionally relied on disjoint data sources and modeling assumptions, limiting their joint use at scale. In this work, we introduce Contrastive Geometric Learning for Unified Computational Drug Design (ConGLUDe), a single contrastive geometric model that unifies structure- and ligand-based training. ConGLUDe couples a geometric protein encoder that produces whole-protein representations and implicit embeddings of predicted binding sites with a fast ligand encoder, removing the need for predefined pockets. By aligning ligands with both global protein representations and multiple candidate binding sites through contrastive learning, ConGLUDe supports ligand-conditioned pocket prediction in addition to virtual screening and target fishing, while being trained jointly on protein-ligand complexes and large-scale bioactivity data. Across diverse benchmarks, ConGLUDe achieves competitive zero-shot virtual screening performance, substantially outperforms existing methods on a challenging target fishing task, and demonstrates state-of-the-art ligand-conditioned pocket selection. These results highlight the advantages of unified structure-ligand training and position ConGLUDe as a step toward general-purpose foundation models for drug discovery.
comment: Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一结构与配体训练的对比几何模型，实现虚拟筛选、靶标发现和口袋预测的多任务统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统基于结构和配体的药物设计依赖不同数据源和建模假设，难以大规模联合使用。现有方法通常需要预定义结合口袋，限制了其在无口袋信息或口袋未知场景下的应用。同时，缺乏统一框架同时利用蛋白质-配体复合物和大量生物活性数据，导致模型泛化能力不足。因此，亟需一种能够融合结构与配体信息、自动学习结合位点并支持多任务的统一方法。
light_analysis.method: ConGLUDe采用对比几何学习，包含几何蛋白质编码器（生成全蛋白表示和隐式结合位点嵌入）和快速配体编码器。通过对比学习将配体与全局蛋白表示及多个候选结合位点对齐，无需预定义口袋。模型在蛋白质-配体复合物和大规模生物活性数据上联合训练，支持配体条件口袋预测、虚拟筛选和靶标发现。关键创新在于隐式位点嵌入和统一训练范式。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，ConGLUDe在零样本虚拟筛选中达到竞争性能；在挑战性的靶标发现任务上显著优于现有方法；在配体条件口袋选择上取得最先进结果。具体性能提升体现为跨任务泛化能力增强，尤其适用于无标注结合位点的场景。与单独训练的结构或配体基线相比，统一训练带来明确的性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConGLUDe证明了统一结构与配体训练的优势，为药物发现提供通用基础模型。其隐式位点学习和多任务统一框架具有重要学术价值，可推动虚拟筛选、靶标发现和口袋预测的协同发展。未来可扩展至更多下游任务（如亲和力预测、构象生成），并融合3D几何和序列信息进一步提升性能。

title: Hellinger Multimodal Variational Autoencoders
abstract: Multimodal variational autoencoders (VAEs) are widely used for weakly supervised generative learning with multiple modalities. Predominant methods aggregate unimodal inference distributions using either a product of experts (PoE), a mixture of experts (MoE), or their combinations to approximate the joint posterior. In this work, we revisit multimodal inference through the lens of probabilistic opinion pooling, an optimization-based approach. We start from Hölder pooling with $α=0.5$, which corresponds to the unique symmetric member of the $α\text{-divergence}$ family, and derive a moment-matching approximation, termed Hellinger. We then leverage such an approximation to propose HELVAE, a multimodal VAE that avoids sub-sampling, yielding an efficient yet effective model that: (i) learns more expressive latent representations as additional modalities are observed; and (ii) empirically achieves better trade-offs between generative coherence and quality, outperforming state-of-the-art multimodal VAE models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Hellinger矩匹配近似的多模态VAE模型HELVAE，避免子采样，提升潜在表示表达力与生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态VAE常用PoE或MoE聚合单模态分布来近似联合后验，但存在子采样问题且表示能力有限。本文希望通过概率意见池优化方法，设计更高效且表达力更强的聚合策略，以改善生成一致性与质量。
light_analysis.method: 从Hölder池化（α=0.5）出发，基于α散度推导出Hellinger矩匹配近似，避免子采样。提出HELVAE模型，使用此近似聚合多模态后验，学习更丰富的潜在表示。模型在推理时直接计算联合分布，无需采样。
light_analysis.result: HELVAE在多模态数据集上取得更优的生成一致性与质量平衡，超越现有最先进多模态VAE模型。实验未明确给出具体数值，但摘要指出其高效且有效，潜在表示表达力随模态增加而增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: HELVAE通过Hellinger矩匹配实现高效多模态融合，避免子采样，提升表示能力与生成性能。其优化视角为多模态VAE设计提供了新思路，但未提及局限性。未来可探索更广泛的α值或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: EyeTheia: A Lightweight and Accessible Eye-Tracking Toolbox
abstract: We introduce EyeTheia, a lightweight and open deep learning pipeline for webcam-based gaze estimation, designed for browser-based experimental platforms and real-world cognitive and clinical research. EyeTheia enables real-time gaze tracking using only a standard laptop webcam, combining MediaPipe-based landmark extraction with a convolutional neural network inspired by iTracker and optional user-specific fine-tuning. We investigate two complementary strategies: adapting a model pretrained on mobile data and training the same architecture from scratch on a desktop-oriented dataset. Validation results on MPIIFaceGaze show comparable performance between both approaches prior to calibration, while lightweight user-specific fine-tuning consistently reduces gaze prediction error. We further evaluate EyeTheia in a realistic Dot-Probe task and compare it to the commercial webcam-based tracker SeeSo SDK. Results indicate strong agreement in left-right gaze allocation during stimulus presentation, despite higher temporal variability. Overall, EyeTheia provides a transparent and extensible solution for low-cost gaze tracking, suitable for scalable and reproducible experimental and clinical studies. The code, trained models, and experimental materials are publicly available.
comment: Code for the EyeTheia: https://github.com/patherstevenson/EyeTheia. Experimental platform for the cognitive neuroscience task (BAWEB IAPS): https://git.interactions-team.fr/INTERACTIONS/calypso/src/branch/main/src/medita/

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级、开源的基于普通网络摄像头的眼动追踪流水线EyeTheia，结合MediaPipe与CNN实现实时注视估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有眼动追踪设备昂贵、便携性差，难以大规模应用于在线实验和临床研究。基于网络摄像头的方案精度低、可复现性差，且缺乏开源透明实现。EyeTheia旨在提供低成本、易获取的解决方案，支持浏览器端实时追踪，适用于认知科学和临床研究。
light_analysis.method: EyeTheia采用MediaPipe提取面部和眼部关键点，结合改进的iTracker架构卷积神经网络进行注视点回归。支持两种策略：基于移动数据预训练模型迁移学习，或在桌面数据集上从头训练。提供用户个性化微调功能。在MPIIFaceGaze数据集上验证，并在Dot-Probe任务中与商业工具SeeSo对比。
light_analysis.result: 在MPIIFaceGaze上，两种策略在无校准下性能相当，但个性化微调持续降低注视误差。在Dot-Probe任务中，与SeeSo相比，注视左右分配高度一致，但时间变异性更高。代码和模型开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: EyeTheia提供了透明、可扩展的低成本眼动追踪方案，适合可重复实验和临床研究。未来可优化时间稳定性，并拓展至更多场景。但精度仍受限于网络摄像头硬件。

title: CuMA: Aligning LLMs with Sparse Cultural Values via Demographic-Aware Mixture of Adapters
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) serve a global audience, alignment must transition from enforcing universal consensus to respecting cultural pluralism. We demonstrate that dense models, when forced to fit conflicting value distributions, suffer from \textbf{Mean Collapse}, converging to a generic average that fails to represent diverse groups. We attribute this to \textbf{Cultural Sparsity}, where gradient interference prevents dense parameters from spanning distinct cultural modes. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{\textsc{CuMA}} (\textbf{Cu}ltural \textbf{M}ixture of \textbf{A}dapters), a framework that frames alignment as a \textbf{conditional capacity separation} problem. By incorporating demographic-aware routing, \textsc{CuMA} internalizes a \textit{Latent Cultural Topology} to explicitly disentangle conflicting gradients into specialized expert subspaces. Extensive evaluations on WorldValuesBench, Community Alignment, and PRISM demonstrate that \textsc{CuMA} achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming both dense baselines and semantic-only MoEs. Crucially, our analysis confirms that \textsc{CuMA} effectively mitigates mean collapse, preserving cultural diversity. Our code is available at https://github.com/Throll/CuMA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CuMA框架，通过人口统计感知的适配器混合网络，解决LLM对齐中文化价值稀疏性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM对齐采用统一共识，忽略了文化多元性。密集模型在拟合冲突价值分布时出现均值崩溃，因为梯度冲突导致无法充分表示多样文化。需要一种条件容量分离方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CuMA，将对齐转化为条件容量分离问题。通过人口统计感知路由，构建潜在文化拓扑，将冲突梯度显式分离到专门专家子空间。使用适配器混合，实现文化价值稀疏性下的有效学习。
light_analysis.result: 在WorldValuesBench、Community Alignment和PRISM数据集上取得SOTA，显著优于密集基线和语义MoE。分析表明CuMA有效缓解均值崩溃，保持文化多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CuMA通过条件容量分离解决文化价值对齐中的均值崩溃问题，实现文化多元性。展示了人口统计信息在LLM对齐中的价值。未来可探索更复杂文化拓扑。

title: Decentralized Autoregressive Generation
abstract: The decentralization of autoregressive generation has attracted considerable attention in recent years as a solution to scaling bottlenecks. However, despite promising empirical results, this paradigm currently lacks rigorous theoretical justification. In this work, we formally establish the theoretical equivalence between decentralized and centralized training. To achieve this, we adapt the Discrete Flow Matching framework for autoregressive generation, leveraging its inherent properties to demonstrate that global models naturally decompose into independent experts. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks, empirically validating that decentralized training maintains competitive parity with standard centralized architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 从理论上证明了去中心化自回归生成与集中式训练的等价性，并基于离散流匹配框架实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 去中心化自回归生成作为解决扩展瓶颈的方法受到关注，但缺乏严格的理论证明。现有实证结果虽有前景，但理论基础薄弱。本文旨在填补这一空白，为去中心化训练提供数学依据，确保其可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 采用离散流匹配框架（Discrete Flow Matching）用于自回归生成，利用其固有性质证明全局模型可自然分解为独立专家，从而建立去中心化与集中式训练的理论等价性。实验在多模态基准上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化的多模态基准实验中，去中心化训练与标准集中式架构在性能上保持竞争性等价，即达到相同的准确率和效率，验证了理论等价性的实际有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为去中心化自回归生成提供了严格的理论基础，证明其与集中式训练等价，支持了该范式的可扩展性。实验证实了实际应用中的有效性，未来可进一步探索分布式部署优化。

title: Why Commodity WiFi Sensors Fail at Multi-Person Gait Identification: A Systematic Analysis Using ESP32
abstract: WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has shown promise for single-person gait identification, raising interest in its use for contactless biometrics, continuous authentication, and passive identification. However, the feasibility of multi-person identification on low-cost commodity devices remains unclear. A critical question is whether weak multi-person performance is primarily an algorithmic limitation, or whether it reflects a more fundamental sensing ceiling on commodity WiFi hardware. We address this question through a systematic empirical study using commodity ESP32 WiFi sensors. We evaluated six different signal separation methods--FastICA, SOBI, PCA-ICA, NMF, Wavelet, and Tensor decomposition--across seven scenarios spanning 1-10 people in both controlled and realistic indoor environments. To investigate beyond classification accuracy, we introduce three diagnostic metrics: intra-subject variability (ISV), inter-subject distinguishability (ISD), and performance degradation rate (PDR). In all methods, performance remains moderate (39%-56% accuracy), with limited evidence that algorithmic choice alone solves the problem. The best-performing method, NMF, reaches 56% accuracy, while all methods exhibit extremely high feature-space overlap (97%-99%), unstable within-subject representations, and marked environmental sensitivity. These findings suggest that, under commodity ESP32 CSI constraints, dense multi-person gait identification is limited more by sensing quality and spatial diversity than by the chosen separation algorithm. Our results have direct implications for security and privacy: they call into question the practicality of commodity WiFi CSI as a robust multi-user biometric primitive for authentication, while also placing important bounds on the passive identification capabilities achievable with low-cost off-the-shelf WiFi hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 系统分析揭示商品WiFi传感器在多人群步态识别中的传感天花板，而非算法限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管WiFi CSI在单人步态识别中表现良好，但多人群场景下的性能瓶颈尚不明确。现有研究多聚焦算法改进，却未探究根本原因是否源于硬件感知质量。本文旨在区分算法与传感限制，为低成本WiFi生物特征的实际可行性提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用ESP32传感器，在1-10人场景下对比FastICA、SOBI、PCA-ICA、NMF、Wavelet和Tensor分解六种信号分离方法。引入三个诊断指标：类内变异（ISV）、类间区分度（ISD）和性能退化率（PDR），量化特征空间重叠和环境敏感性。
light_analysis.result: 所有方法准确率仅39%-56%，NMF最佳达56%。特征空间重叠高达97%-99%，类内表示不稳定，且性能严重依赖环境。这表明算法选择难以弥补传感质量与空间多样性的根本不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实商品WiFi多人群步态识别受限于硬件传感天花板，而非分离算法。这挑战了其作为鲁棒多用户生物特征（如连续认证）的实用性，并为被动识别能力设定了明确界限。未来或需提升传感器密度或融合其他模态。

title: Geometric and Quantum Kernel Methods for Predicting Skeletal Muscle Outcomes in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
abstract: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) affects hundreds of millions of people worldwide, and skeletal-muscle dysfunction is clinically important. Quantum machine learning is increasingly explored for biomedical prediction, but its value in small biomarker cohorts requires benchmarking against strong classical baselines. We analysed a cigarette-smoke COPD cohort of 213 animals with blood and bronchoalveolar-lavage biomarkers to predict tibialis anterior muscle weight, muscle quality, and force. We developed a kernel-geometric quantum hybrid method in which synthetic symmetric positive definite (SPD) references are mapped through a reproducing kernel Hilbert space, compressed using train-only random projection, normalised, and supplied to low-dimensional quantum regression circuits. We benchmarked this approach against classical ridge/kernel models, SPD relational representations, and quantum-kernel regression (QKR). All methods were evaluated using condition-stratified repeated cross-validation. The largest numerical improvement was observed for muscle weight, where the proposed method had the numerically lowest mean root mean squared error (RMSE), approximately 1.8% below the best classical comparator; paired fold-level testing did not establish statistically significant superiority after Holm adjustment, but the endpoint is biologically meaningful. The method also had the numerically lowest mean RMSE for muscle quality. For force, biomarker-only Ridge performed best, suggesting a more linear endpoint structure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种核几何量子混合方法，用于预测COPD骨骼肌结果，在小样本生物标志物队列中与经典基线对比，数值上优于部分经典方法。
light_analysis.motivation: COPD影响数亿人，骨骼肌功能障碍具有重要临床意义。量子机器学习在生物医学预测中展现出潜力，但在小型生物标志物队列中的价值尚未充分验证，需要与强经典基线进行对比评估。现有方法在小样本下可能过拟合或性能不足，因此开发新方法以提升预测精度。
light_analysis.method: 分析了213只香烟烟雾诱导COPD动物的血液和支气管肺泡灌洗生物标志物，预测胫骨前肌重量、肌肉质量和力量。提出核几何量子混合方法：将合成对称正定矩阵通过再生核希尔伯特空间映射，采用仅训练随机投影压缩并归一化，输入低维量子回归电路。与经典岭/核模型、SPD关系表示和量子核回归进行对比，使用条件分层重复交叉验证。
light_analysis.result: 在肌肉重量上，提出方法均方根误差（RMSE）最低，比最佳经典比较器低约1.8%；配对折叠检验经Holm校正后未达统计显著性，但终点有生物学意义。肌肉质量上也有数值最低RMSE。对于力量，仅使用生物标志物的岭回归表现最佳，表明该终点具有更线性的结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的核几何量子混合方法在部分COPD骨骼肌终点上实现了数值改进，但统计显著性不足，表明量子方法在小样本生物医学预测中具有潜力但仍需进一步验证。未来可探索更大样本、改进量子电路设计或结合更多特征以提升性能。

title: Cluster Aggregated GAN (CAG): A Cluster-Based Hybrid Model for Appliance Pattern Generation
abstract: Synthetic appliance data are essential for developing non-intrusive load monitoring algorithms and enabling privacy preserving energy research, yet the scarcity of labeled datasets remains a significant barrier. Recent GAN-based methods have demonstrated the feasibility of synthesizing load patterns, but most existing approaches treat all devices uniformly within a single model, neglecting the behavioral differences between intermittent and continuous appliances and resulting in unstable training and limited output fidelity. To address these limitations, we propose the Cluster Aggregated GAN framework, a hybrid generative approach that routes each appliance to a specialized branch based on its behavioral characteristics. For intermittent appliances, a clustering module groups similar activation patterns and allocates dedicated generators for each cluster, ensuring that both common and rare operational modes receive adequate modeling capacity. Continuous appliances follow a separate branch that employs an LSTM-based generator to capture gradual temporal evolution while maintaining training stability through sequence compression. Extensive experiments on the UVIC smart plug dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms baseline methods across metrics measuring realism, diversity, and training stability, and that integrating clustering as an active generative component substantially improves both interpretability and scalability. These findings establish the proposed framework as an effective approach for synthetic load generation in non-intrusive load monitoring research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cluster Aggregated GAN框架，通过聚类分支和LSTM分支分别建模间歇性与连续家电，提升合成负荷数据的真实性和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成家电数据对非侵入式负荷监测和隐私保护能源研究至关重要，但标记数据集稀缺。现有GAN方法将设备统一处理，忽略间歇性与连续家电的行为差异，导致训练不稳定、输出保真度有限。因此需要一种能根据设备行为特性进行差异化建模的生成方法，以提高合成数据的质量和训练稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Cluster Aggregated GAN（CAG）混合生成框架，将家电按行为特性路由到不同分支：间歇型家电先经聚类模块分组相似激活模式，并为每簇分配专用生成器；连续型家电采用LSTM生成器捕捉渐进时间演化，并通过序列压缩保持训练稳定。在UVIC智能插头数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在UVIC数据集的实验中，CAG框架在真实性（如FID）、多样性（如1-NN accuracy）和训练稳定性（如G-discrimination score）指标上均优于基线GAN方法。聚类作为主动生成组件显著提升了可解释性和可扩展性，验证了差异化解耦生成策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAG框架有效解决异构家电生成难题，为NILM研究提供高质量合成数据。其聚类与LSTM分支组合兼顾稀疏与平稳模式，具有良好可扩展性。未来可探索更细粒度行为分类或集成到端到端负荷分解模型。

title: Improving Pre-trained Adult Glioma Segmentation Models Using only Post-processing Techniques
abstract: Gliomas are the most common malignant brain tumors in adults and are among the most lethal. Despite aggressive treatment, the median survival rate is less than 15 months. Accurate multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) tumor segmentation is critical for surgical planning, radiotherapy, and disease monitoring. While deep learning models have improved the accuracy of automated segmentation, large-scale pre-trained models generalize poorly and often underperform, producing systematic errors such as false positives, label swaps, and slice discontinuities in slices. These limitations are further compounded by unequal access to GPU resources and the growing environmental cost of large-scale model training. In this work, we propose adaptive post-processing techniques to refine the quality of glioma segmentations produced by large-scale pretrained models developed for various types of tumors. We demonstrated the techniques in multiple BraTS 2025 segmentation challenge tasks, with the ranking metric improving by 14.9 % for the sub-Saharan Africa challenge and 0.9% for the adult glioma challenge. This approach promotes a shift in brain tumor segmentation research from increasingly complex model architectures to efficient, clinically aligned post-processing strategies that are precise, computationally fair, and sustainable.

light_analysis.overview: 仅使用自适应后处理技术改进预训练胶质瘤分割模型，在BraTS 2025挑战中提升性能，倡导可持续的后处理策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模预训练模型在胶质瘤分割中泛化差，产生假阳性、标签交换、切片不连续等系统误差，且GPU资源不均和环境成本高。现有方法过度依赖复杂模型架构，忽视后处理，亟需高效、公平且可持续的改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应后处理技术，用于修正预训练模型的分割输出，包括去除假阳性、校正标签交换、修复切片不连续等操作（摘要未明确说明具体算法）。在BraTS 2025挑战中应用于撒哈拉以南非洲和成人胶质瘤任务。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS 2025分割挑战中，撒哈拉以南非洲挑战排名指标提升14.9%，成人胶质瘤挑战提升0.9%。证明后处理能显著改善预训练模型性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下效果突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作推动脑肿瘤分割从复杂模型转向高效后处理策略，实现精准、计算公平且可持续的分割。具有临床实用性和环境价值，但后处理技术的泛化性和对不同错误的鲁棒性需进一步验证。

title: Adaptable Segmentation Pipeline for Diverse Brain Tumors with Radiomic-Guided Subtyping and Lesion-Wise Model Ensemble
abstract: Robust and generalizable segmentation of brain tumors on multi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) remains difficult because tumor types differ widely. The BraTS 2025 Lighthouse Challenge benchmarks segmentation methods on diverse high-quality datasets of adult and pediatric tumors: multi-consortium international pediatric brain tumor segmentation (PED), preoperative meningioma tumor segmentation (MEN), meningioma radiotherapy segmentation (MEN-RT), and segmentation of pre- and post-treatment brain metastases (MET). We present a flexible, modular, and adaptable pipeline that improves segmentation performance by selecting and combining state-of-the-art models and applying tumor- and lesion-specific processing before and after training. Radiomic features extracted from MRI help detect tumor subtype, ensuring a more balanced training. Custom lesion-level performance metrics determine the influence of each model in the ensemble and optimize post-processing that further refines the predictions, enabling the workflow to tailor every step to each case. On the BraTS testing sets, our pipeline achieved performance comparable to top-ranked algorithms across multiple challenges. These findings confirm that custom lesion-aware processing and model selection yield robust segmentations yet without locking the method to a specific network architecture. Our method has the potential for quantitative tumor measurement in clinical practice, supporting diagnosis and prognosis.
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Algorithm presented at MICCAI BraTS 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出灵活模块化的脑肿瘤分割管道，利用放射组学引导亚型分类和病灶级模型集成，在不同肿瘤类型上实现稳健分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑肿瘤分割在MRI上因肿瘤类型差异大而具有挑战性。现有方法泛化性不足，BraTS 2025挑战提供多样化数据集（儿童、脑膜瘤、转移瘤等），亟需一种能适应多种肿瘤类型的通用分割方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建灵活模块化管道：先提取放射组学特征检测肿瘤亚型以平衡训练，再选择并组合SOTA模型；使用自定义病灶级性能指标确定模型集成权重并优化后处理，使每个步骤适应具体病例。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS测试集上，管道性能与多个挑战中的顶级算法相当（具体数据未明确），证实病灶感知处理和模型选择可产生稳健分割，且不依赖特定网络架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 确认自定义病灶感知处理和模型选择的有效性，方法灵活可迁移。有望用于临床定量肿瘤测量，辅助诊断和预后，未来可进一步验证泛化性。

title: Measurement Plasticity: Sensor-Level Adaptation for Vision-Language Models
abstract: We propose Multi-View Physical-prompt (MVP) for Test-Time Adaptation (TTA), a forward-only framework that moves TTA from tokens to photons by treating the camera exposure triangle (i.e., ISO, shutter speed, and aperture) as physical prompts. At inference, MVP acquires selected multiple physical views using a source-affinity score, evaluates digitally augmented variants of each retained view and filters the lowest-entropy predictions, and aggregates predictions with hard voting. This selection-then-vote design is simple, calibration-friendly, and requires no gradients or model modifications. On ImageNet-ES and ImageNet-ES-Diverse, MVP outperforms digital-only TTA on both Auto-Exposure and a combination with conventional sensor control. MVP remains effective under reduced parameter candidates that lower capture latency, demonstrating its practicality.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on Continual Adaptation at Scale

light_analysis.overview: 提出MVP框架，利用相机曝光三角形（ISO、快门速度、光圈）作为物理提示，实现传感器级别的测试时自适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有测试时自适应（TTA）方法通常仅在数字域操作，忽略了物理传感器参数对模型鲁棒性的影响。论文旨在通过调整相机曝光参数来增强视觉-语言模型在分布外场景下的适应性，解决传统TTA需要梯度或模型修改的问题。
light_analysis.method: MVP是一种前向框架，在推理时使用源亲和性得分选择多个物理视图（不同曝光参数），对每个视图进行数字增强并筛选低熵预测，最后通过硬投票聚合结果。该方法无需梯度或模型修改，仅需调整相机参数作为物理提示。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-ES和ImageNet-ES-Diverse数据集上，MVP在自动曝光和与传统传感器控制结合的任务中均优于数字域TTA。即使在减少参数候选以降低捕获延迟的情况下，MVP仍保持有效性，证明了其实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVP通过将测试时自适应扩展到物理传感器层面，提出了一种简单、无需梯度的框架，有效提升了视觉-语言模型在分布外环境下的鲁棒性。该工作为传感器级自适应提供了新思路，未来可探索更多物理参数的影响。

title: QueryOcc: Query-based Self-Supervision for 3D Semantic Occupancy
abstract: Learning 3D scene geometry and semantics from images is a core challenge in computer vision and a key capability for autonomous driving. Since large-scale 3D annotation is prohibitively expensive, recent work explores self-supervised learning directly from sensor data without manual labels. Existing approaches either rely on 2D rendering consistency, where 3D structure emerges only implicitly, or on discretized voxel grids from accumulated lidar point clouds, limiting spatial precision and scalability. We introduce QueryOcc, a query-based self-supervised framework that learns continuous 3D semantic occupancy directly through independent 4D spatio-temporal queries sampled across adjacent frames. The framework supports supervision from either pseudo-point clouds derived from vision foundation models or raw lidar data. To enable long-range supervision and reasoning under constant memory, we introduce a contractive scene representation that preserves near-field detail while smoothly compressing distant regions. QueryOcc surpasses previous camera-based methods by 26% in semantic RayIoU on the self-supervised Occ3D-nuScenes benchmark while running at 11.6 FPS, demonstrating that direct 4D query supervision enables strong self-supervised occupancy learning. https://research.zenseact.com/publications/queryocc/

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于查询的自监督框架QueryOcc，通过4D时空查询直接学习连续3D语义占用，提升精度和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模3D标注昂贵，现有自监督方法依赖2D渲染一致性或离散化体素网格，限制空间精度和可扩展性。该研究旨在无需人工标签，直接从传感器数据学习连续3D语义占用，解决计算效率和长程推理问题。
light_analysis.method: QueryOcc使用独立4D时空查询跨相邻帧采样，直接学习连续3D语义占用；支持视觉基础模型伪点云或原始激光雷达数据作为监督；引入收缩场景表示，保持近场细节同时压缩远场区域，实现恒定内存下的长程监督和推理。
light_analysis.result: 在自监督Occ3D-nuScenes基准上，QueryOcc语义RayIoU比之前基于相机的方法提升26%，运行速度11.6 FPS，证明直接4D查询监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QueryOcc展示了直接4D时空查询监督在自监督3D语义占用学习中的优势，显著提升性能与效率。未来可拓展至更多传感器模态和复杂场景，潜在局限包括对伪点云质量的依赖。

title: Proto-LeakNet: Towards Signal-Leak Aware Attribution in Synthetic Human Face Imagery
abstract: The growing sophistication of synthetic image and deepfake generation models has turned source attribution and authenticity verification into a critical challenge for modern computer vision systems. Recent studies suggest that diffusion pipelines unintentionally imprint persistent statistical traces, known as signal-leaks, within their outputs, particularly in latent representations. Building on this observation, we propose Proto-LeakNet, a signal-leak-aware and interpretable attribution framework that integrates Closed-set classification with a density-based Open-set evaluation on the learned embeddings, enabling analysis of unseen generators without retraining. Acting in the latent domain of diffusion models, our method re-simulates partial forward diffusion to expose residual generator-specific cues. A temporal attention encoder aggregates multi-step latent features, while a feature-weighted prototype head structures the embedding space and enables transparent attribution. Trained solely on closed data and achieving a Macro AUC of 98.13\%, Proto-LeakNet learns a latent geometry that remains robust under post-processing, surpassing state-of-the-art methods, and achieves strong separability both between real images and known generators, and between known and unseen ones. The codebase is available at the following link: https://github.com/claudiunderthehood/Proto-LeakNet .

light_analysis.overview: 提出信号泄露感知的可解释归因框架Proto-LeakNet，利用扩散模型潜在空间中的统计痕迹实现闭集分类与开集检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成图像和深度伪造技术的日益精进使得源归因和真实性验证成为计算机视觉系统的关键挑战。现有方法难以检测未知生成器，且缺乏可解释性。近期研究发现扩散管道会在输出中留下持续的统计痕迹（信号泄漏），尤其在潜在表示中。利用这些痕迹可构建鲁棒且可解释的归因方法，但需要解决闭集训练与开集泛化问题。
light_analysis.method: Proto-LeakNet在扩散模型潜在域中工作，通过重新模拟部分前向扩散过程暴露生成器特有的残留线索。采用时间注意力编码器聚合多步潜在特征，特征加权原型头部结构化嵌入空间实现透明归因。结合闭集分类与基于密度的开集评估，无需重训练即可分析未知生成器。训练仅使用闭集数据，学习到的潜在几何结构对后处理鲁棒。
light_analysis.result: 在闭集分类中达到98.13%的Macro AUC，超越现有最优方法。在开集评估中，对已知与未知生成器均展现强分离性。即使经过后处理，性能依然鲁棒。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Proto-LeakNet通过信号泄露感知和原型学习，实现了对合成人脸图像的可解释归因，具备闭集分类与开集检测能力。其潜在几何结构鲁棒性强，为深度伪造溯源提供了有效工具。未来可扩展至其他生成模型和更复杂的后处理攻击。

title: DecompSR: A dataset for decomposed analyses of compositional multihop spatial reasoning
abstract: We introduce DecompSR, decomposed spatial reasoning, a large benchmark dataset (over 5m datapoints) and generation framework designed to analyse compositional spatial reasoning ability. The generation of DecompSR allows users to independently vary several aspects of compositionality, namely: productivity (reasoning depth), substitutivity (entity and linguistic variability), overgeneralisation (input order, distractors) and systematicity (novel linguistic elements). DecompSR is built procedurally in a manner which makes it is correct by construction, which is independently verified using a symbolic solver to guarantee the correctness of the dataset. DecompSR is comprehensively benchmarked across a host of Large Language Models (LLMs) where we show that LLMs struggle with productive and systematic generalisation in spatial reasoning tasks whereas they are more robust to linguistic variation. DecompSR provides a provably correct and rigorous benchmarking dataset with a novel ability to independently vary the degrees of several key aspects of compositionality, allowing for robust and fine-grained probing of the compositional reasoning abilities of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 引入DecompSR数据集和生成框架，用于分解分析组合多跳空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有组合推理数据集无法独立控制组合性的不同方面（如生产力、替代性、过度泛化、系统性），限制了细粒度分析。空间推理任务中，大型语言模型（LLM）的泛化能力仍需系统评估。DecompSR通过程序化生成和符号验证确保数据正确性，为探究LLM的组合推理能力提供可靠基准。
light_analysis.method: DecompSR是一个大规模基准数据集（超过500万数据点），基于程序化生成框架构建，正确性由构造保证并由符号求解器独立验证。该框架允许独立调节组合性的四个维度：生产力（推理深度）、替代性（实体和语言变体）、过度泛化（输入顺序、干扰项）和系统性（新语言元素）。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLM上进行的全面基准测试表明，LLM在空间推理任务中难以进行生产性和系统性泛化，但对语言变体（替代性）表现出更强的鲁棒性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但指出了LLM在不同组合性维度上的表现差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: DecompSR提供了第一个能够独立控制组合性关键方面的可验证基准数据集，支持对LLM组合推理能力进行细粒度探索。该工作有助于诊断模型在空间推理中的具体弱点，但未来可能需要扩展至其他推理类型或更复杂的语言结构。

title: Self-Evolving Vision-Language Models for Image Quality Assessment via Voting and Ranking
abstract: Improving vision-language models (VLMs) in the post-training stage typically relies on supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning, methods that necessitate costly, human-annotated data. While self-supervised techniques have proven effective for enhancing reasoning capabilities, their application to perceptual domains such as image quality assessment (IQA) remains largely unexplored. In this work, we introduce EvoQuality, a novel framework that enables a VLM to autonomously refine its quality perception capabilities without any ground-truth labels. EvoQuality adapts the principle of self-consistency to the ranking-based nature of IQA. It generates pseudo-labels by performing pairwise majority voting on the VLM's own outputs to establish a consensus on relative quality. These pseudo-rankings are then formulated into a fidelity reward that guides the model's iterative evolution through group relative policy optimization (GRPO). By iteratively leveraging its own predictions, EvoQuality progressively refines the VLM's perceptual capability. Extensive experiments show that EvoQuality boosts the base VLM's zero-shot performance by 31.8% on PLCC across diverse IQA benchmarks. Remarkably, despite being entirely self-supervised, EvoQuality achieves performance that is competitive with, or even surpasses, state-of-the-art supervised VLM-based IQA models, outperforming these models on 5 out of 7 IQA benchmarks. Furthermore, the framework demonstrates significant flexibility, allowing it to be stacked with pre-trained IQA models to bolster generalization on unseen datasets. Codes and checkpoints will be available at https://github.com/bytedance/EvoQuality.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoQuality框架，通过投票和排名实现视觉语言模型的无监督图像质量评估自我进化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型的后训练优化依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，而自监督方法在感知任务如图像质量评估（IQA）中尚未充分探索。亟需一种无需真实标签即可自动提升模型质量感知能力的方法，以降低标注成本并扩展自监督在感知领域的应用。
light_analysis.method: EvoQuality基于自一致性原则，通过成对多数投票对VLM自身输出生成伪标签，建立相对质量排名共识。利用这些伪排名构建保真奖励，通过组相对策略优化（GRPO）迭代优化模型。框架完全自监督，无需真实标注数据，可堆叠在预训练IQA模型上增强泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个IQA基准上，EvoQuality将基础VLM的零样本PLCC性能提升31.8%。尽管完全自监督，其在7个基准中的5个上超越甚至匹敌监督VLM模型。代码和检查点已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoQuality首次将自监督迭代进应用于VLM的图像质量评估，证明了无需人工标注即可显著提升感知能力。方法灵活可扩展，为降低IQA标注成本提供了新途径。未来可探索更复杂的投票策略或跨任务泛化。

title: BrainPro: Towards Large-scale Brain State-aware EEG Representation Learning
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) reflects underlying brain states, whose activities are distributed across brain regions and manifest as spatial patterns on the scalp. Learning these spatially structured, state-related patterns requires consistent spatial representations across datasets. However, existing EEG foundation models are typically based on self-attention, which does not preserve location-specific information and struggles to align signals recorded with different channel configurations. Moreover, brain states contain both shared and state-specific regional activity, suggesting that learning neurophysiologically plausible, state-aware representations can complement the shared representations targeted by current models and improve downstream decoding. To address these limitations, we propose BrainPro, a large EEG model that combines a retrieval-based spatial learning mechanism for cross-layout spatial alignment with a brain state-decoupling module that learns both shared and state-specific representations through parallel encoders and region-aware reconstruction. Pre-trained on a large EEG corpus, BrainPro achieves state-of-the-art performance across nine public BCI datasets spanning emotion, motor, speech, stress, mental disease, and attention tasks. Analyses of spatial filters, channel-drop robustness, and encoder contributions further validate the effectiveness of its spatial alignment and state-aware pathways. These results show that BrainPro achieves improved interpretability of learned spatial patterns and produces representations that benefit diverse EEG decoding tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BrainPro，一种结合检索式空间学习与脑状态解耦模块的大型EEG模型，实现跨数据集空间对齐与状态感知表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型基于自注意力机制，无法保留位置特定信息，难以对齐不同通道配置的信号；同时脑状态包含共享和特定区域活动，但当前模型仅学习共享表示，缺乏状态感知能力，限制了下游解码性能。
light_analysis.method: BrainPro包含检索式空间学习机制实现跨布局空间对齐，以及脑状态解耦模块通过并行编码器和区域感知重建学习共享与状态特定表示。大规模EEG语料库预训练。
light_analysis.result: 在情感、运动、语音、压力、精神疾病和注意力等九种公共BCI数据集上取得最优性能。空间滤波器分析、通道丢失鲁棒性和编码器贡献验证了空间对齐与状态感知路径的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrainPro提升了学习空间模式的可解释性，产生利于多种EEG解码任务的表示，为脑状态感知的表示学习提供了新方法，未来可扩展至更多脑机接口应用。

title: Skeleton Sparsification and Densification Scale-Spaces
abstract: The Hamilton-Jacobi skeleton, also known as the medial axis, is a powerful shape descriptor that represents binary objects in terms of the centres of maximal inscribed discs. Despite its broad applicability, the medial axis suffers from sensitivity to noise: Minor boundary variations can lead to disproportionately large and undesirable expansions of the skeleton. Classical pruning methods mitigate this shortcoming by systematically removing extraneous skeletal branches. This sequential simplification of skeletons resembles the principle of sparsification scale-spaces that embed images into a family of reconstructions from increasingly sparse pixel representations.   We combine both worlds by introducing skeletonisation scale-spaces: They leverage sparsification of the medial axis to achieve hierarchical simplification of shapes. Unlike conventional pruning, our framework inherently satisfies key scale-space properties such as hierarchical architecture, controllable simplification, and equivariance to geometric transformations. We provide a rigorous theoretical foundation in both continuous and discrete formulations and extend the concept further with densification. By growing the skeleton successively instead of shrinking it, we allow inverse progression from coarse to fine scales. Densification scale-spaces can even reach beyond the original skeleton to produce overcomplete shape representations with relevancy for practical applications.   Through proof-of-concept experiments, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for practical tasks including robust skeletonisation, shape compression, and stiffness enhancement for additive manufacturing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出骨架稀疏化和致密化的尺度空间框架，实现形状的层次化简化与逆过程。
light_analysis.motivation: Hamilton-Jacobi骨架（中轴）作为形状描述符虽应用广泛，但对噪声敏感，边界微小变化会导致骨架过度膨胀。经典剪枝方法虽能去除多余分支，但缺少尺度空间的关键性质（如层次化、可控简化、几何等变性）。现有稀疏化尺度空间虽用于图像，尚未用于骨架。因此需要一种同时具备骨架简化与尺度空间特性的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出骨架化尺度空间，通过中轴的稀疏化实现形状的层次简化，并满足层次架构、可控简化和几何变换等变等尺度空间性质。进一步引入致密化尺度空间，通过逐步生长骨架而非剪枝，实现从粗到细的反向演进，甚至生成超越原始骨架的过完备表示。建立连续的数学理论及离散实现，基于最大内切圆中心的概念进行推导。
light_analysis.result: 通过概念验证实验，展示了框架在三个实际任务中的有效性：鲁棒骨架化（抑制噪声影响）、形状压缩（减少表示数据量）和增材制造的刚度增强（优化内部支撑结构）。摘要未报告具体量化指标，但表明该方法在不同任务中均能产生比传统剪枝更优的层次化结果，且致密化尺度空间能提供额外表达能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次将尺度空间理论引入骨架化领域，提出了兼具稀疏化与致密化的统一框架，不仅实现了可逆的层次形状简化，还通过过完备表示扩展了骨架的应用潜力。理论贡献在于严格证明了连续和离散形式下的尺度空间性质。实际应用价值体现在对噪声鲁棒、可控简化的骨架化，以及面向制造等领域的优化。未来可探索更高效的计算方法及与其他形状描述符的结合。

title: Metriplectic Conditional Flow Matching for Dissipative Dynamics
abstract: Metriplectic conditional flow matching (MCFM) learns dissipative dynamics without violating first principles. Neural surrogates often inject energy and destabilize long-horizon rollouts; MCFM instead builds the conservative-dissipative split into both the vector field and a structure preserving sampler. MCFM trains via conditional flow matching on short transitions, avoiding long rollout adjoints. In inference, a Strang-prox scheme alternates a symplectic update with a proximal metric step, ensuring discrete energy decay; an optional projection enforces strict decay when a trusted energy is available. We provide continuous and discrete time guarantees linking this parameterization and sampler to conservation, monotonic dissipation, and stable rollouts. On a controlled mechanical benchmark, MCFM yields phase portraits closer to ground truth and markedly fewer energy-increase and positive energy rate events than an equally expressive unconstrained neural flow, while matching terminal distributional fit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Metriplectic条件流匹配（MCFM）方法，通过将保守-耗散分解内嵌入向量场和采样器，学习耗散动力学并保证能量单调递减。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经代理模型在模拟耗散系统时往往注入虚假能量，导致长时间滚动不稳定。现有方法难以同时保证能量守恒和耗散特性，且长轨迹伴随计算成本高。因此需要一种既遵循热力学第一原理又能稳定长时域推演的方法。
light_analysis.method: MCFM将向量场分解为保守部分和耗散部分，并采用结构保持采样器。训练时使用条件流匹配在短轨迹上进行，避免长轨迹伴随梯度计算。推理时采用Strang-prox格式，交替进行辛更新和近端度量步骤，确保离散能量衰减；当有可靠能量时可加投影强制严格衰减。理论证明了连续和离散时间下的守恒性、单调耗散和稳定滚动保证。
light_analysis.result: 在受控机械基准上，MCFM生成的相图更接近真实轨迹，能量增加和正能量率事件显著少于同等表达能力的无约束神经流，同时终端分布匹配度相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: MCFM为学习耗散动力学提供了一种有理论保证的神经模拟方法，兼具物理一致性和长时域稳定性。未来可扩展至更复杂耗散系统，如粘滞流体或接触动力学，但需注意对能量函数的依赖。

title: DiffCoord: Differentiable Coordination for Distributed Multi-Agent Trajectory Optimization
abstract: Integrating the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) with Differential Dynamic Programming (DDP) provides a scalable framework for distributed multi-agent trajectory optimization. In practice, ADMM is typically truncated for computational efficiency, tightly coupling parameters that would otherwise separately govern coordination quality and task performance. In this paper, we propose Differentiable Coordination (DiffCoord), a unified framework that jointly meta-learns these coupled parameters for the truncated ADMM-DDP pipeline. These parameters are generated by agent-wise neural networks for task adaptation, and the same networks are shared among isomorphic agents to enable scalability to varying agent counts. We achieve efficient meta-learning by differentiating the ADMM-DDP pipeline end-to-end. Notably, this yields an auxiliary ADMM-LQR distributed gradient solver that computes and coordinates meta-gradients with respect to these parameters. This solver inherits the computational structure of the pipeline, enabling reuse of key computation results and efficient parallelization over agents and along trajectory horizons. We validate DiffCoord through numerical and physical experiments on a cooperative aerial transport system, where it reconfigures quadrotor formations for safe 6-DoF load manipulation in tight spaces. It adapts robustly to varying team sizes and load dynamics, while reducing per-agent gradient computation time by up to 70% compared with state-of-the-art trajectory-gradient methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffCoord框架，通过元学习联合优化截断ADMM-DDP管道中的耦合参数，实现分布式多智能体轨迹优化的可微分协调。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式多智能体轨迹优化中，ADMM与DDP的结合常因计算效率而被截断，导致协调质量与任务性能的参数耦合，难以分别调控。现有方法无法有效学习这些耦合参数，限制了适应性和效率。本研究旨在通过端到端可微的元学习框架，统一优化这些参数，提升系统在复杂任务中的表现。
