light_analysis.method: DiffCoord框架使用智能体级神经网络生成ADMM-DDP管道的耦合参数，并通过端到端微分实现元学习。为计算元梯度，推导了辅助ADMM-LQR分布式梯度求解器，利用管道计算结构实现关键结果复用，支持沿轨迹和智能体的高效并行化。该方法可扩展到不同数量的同构智能体。
light_analysis.result: 在协作空中运输系统的数值与物理实验中，DiffCoord成功实现四旋翼编队重构以安全操控6自由度负载，适应不同团队规模和负载动力学。相比最先进的轨迹梯度方法，每个智能体的梯度计算时间减少高达70%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffCoord通过可微协调框架有效解耦了ADMM-DDP参数的学习，实现了分布式多智能体轨迹优化的高效元学习。实验验证了其在物理系统中的适应性和计算效率提升。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务场景和异构智能体扩展。

title: The Urysohn Machine: A Metric-Topological Model of Computation
abstract: We introduce the Urysohn Machine, an effective model of classification-oriented computation in which metric separation, frontier structure, and contraction are explicit parts of the computational state. Its basic object is a \emph{Urysohn Triple}: a support region, a target partition, and a separating classifier stored in a reusable Metric Library. The topological foundation is a constructive Urysohn Realization theorem for finite simplicial settings. It builds separators from dyadic ladders of nested polyhedral regions and equips their frontiers with a chain-level calculus: frontiers are cycles, and shells between levels have boundaries given by differences of frontiers. This construction yields two related complexity measures: decision-boundary width, the geometric measure of a single classifier's boundary, and Urysohn width, the total frontier mass represented by a library or realization. We prove an Amortized Separation Theorem showing that approximating a boundary of width to accuracy requires a number of simple basis triples proportional to boundary width and inversely proportional to resolution, under explicit boundary-footprint assumptions. We also introduce a contrastive separation operator whose graph-cut functional consistently estimates decision-boundary width from sampled metric data, while its Laplacian spectrum certifies class-component structure and conductance. Finally, we analyze the dynamic Urysohn ladder and prove four guarantees: separability under quotient collapse, stability of committed frontiers, bounded capacity under contraction, and scalability with quotient distance. Together, these results give a metric-topological account of classification complexity, amortized inference, and compositional reuse that preserves classical computability while exposing geometric structure hidden by purely symbolic descriptions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Urysohn Machine，一个基于度量-拓扑的分类计算模型，显式建模度量分离、边界结构和收缩，并证明摊销分离定理。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统分类计算模型多基于符号逻辑或统计学习，忽略几何和拓扑结构（如度量分离、边界宽度）。这些结构对于理解分类复杂度、重用和泛化至关重要。现有方法无法有效捕捉决策边界的几何特征，导致在复杂分类任务中缺乏可解释性和可组合性。该研究旨在建立一种计算模型，将度量拓扑性质作为计算状态的一部分，从而揭示隐藏的几何结构。
light_analysis.method: 提出Urysohn Machine，核心对象是Urysohn三元组（支持区域、目标划分、分离分类器）。基于构造性Urysohn实现定理，使用二元梯度的嵌套多面体区域构建分离器，并引入链级微积分（边界是循环，层级间壳的边界是边界差）。定义决策边界宽度和Urysohn宽度两种复杂度度量。证明摊销分离定理：逼近宽度为w的边界所需简单基三元组数量正比于w，反比于分辨率。设计对比分离算子，其图割泛函一致估计边界宽度，拉普拉斯谱认证类组件结构和电导。分析动态Urysohn梯度的四个保证：商塌陷下的可分离性、承诺边界的稳定性、收缩下的有界容量、商距离下的可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 论文主要贡献是理论证明和分析，未提供具体实验数据。摊销分离定理定量描述了边界逼近的资源需求；对比分离算子保证了估计一致性；动态Urysohn梯度证明了四个性能保证。这些结果表明该模型在分类复杂度、摊销推理和组合重用方面具有理论优势，同时保持经典可计算性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Urysohn Machine为分类复杂度提供了度量-拓扑解释，将边界宽度等几何量作为计算复杂度指标。其贡献包括：形式化分类的几何复杂度、证明摊销分离定理、提出可组合的对比分离算子。学术价值在于连接拓扑学与计算理论，实际应用潜力包括可解释分类、度量学习和小样本学习。未来工作可扩展到连续空间和高维数据，并验证在真实数据集上的表现。

title: Decoding the Multimodal Maze: A Systematic Review on the Adoption of Explainability in Multimodal Attention-based Models
abstract: Multimodal learning has witnessed remarkable advancements in recent years, particularly with the integration of attention-based models, leading to significant performance gains across a variety of tasks. Parallel to this progress, the demand for explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has spurred a growing body of research aimed at interpreting the complex decision-making processes of these models. This systematic literature review analyzes research published between January 2020 and early 2024 that focuses on the explainability of multimodal models. Framed within the broader goals of XAI, we examine the literature across multiple dimensions, including model architecture, modalities involved, explanation algorithms and evaluation methodologies. Our analysis reveals that most studies are concentrated on vision-language and language-only models, with attention-based techniques being the most commonly employed for explanation. However, these methods often fall short in capturing the full spectrum of interactions between modalities, a challenge further compounded by the architectural heterogeneity across domains. Importantly, we find that evaluation methods for XAI in multimodal settings are largely non-systematic, lacking consistency, robustness, and consideration for modality-specific cognitive and contextual factors. To address these gaps, we not only synthesize findings from the surveyed works but also incorporate a complementary analysis that integrates recent and emerging advances driving multimodal explainability. Based on these insights, we provide a comprehensive set of recommendations aimed at promoting rigorous, transparent, and standardized evaluation and reporting practices in multimodal XAI research. Our goal is to support future research in more interpretable, accountable, and responsible multimodal AI systems, with explainability at their core.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述多模态注意力模型的可解释性研究现状，揭示评估方法缺乏系统性和标准化，并提出改进建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习在注意力模型推动下取得显著进展，但模型决策过程复杂，可解释性需求日益增长。现有可解释性研究多集中在视觉-语言和语言模型上，注意力机制虽常用，却无法充分捕捉模态间交互；评估方法非系统化，缺乏一致性、鲁棒性及对模态特定认知因素的考虑。该综述旨在填补这些空白，推动多模态XAI的规范化发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文为系统文献综述，分析2020年1月至2024年初发表的关于多模态模型可解释性的研究。从模型架构、涉及模态、解释算法和评估方法四个维度审视文献，并整合近期新兴进展进行补充分析。基于此提出一套促进多模态XAI评估与报告标准化、透明化的建议。
light_analysis.result: 综述发现：大多数研究集中于视觉-语言和纯语言模型，注意力机制是最常用的解释方法，但难以全面捕获模态间交互；架构异质性加剧了这一挑战。评估方法普遍非系统化，缺乏对模态特定认知和上下文的考量。研究未提供具体性能数值，而是归纳了当前领域的不足与趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述系统梳理了多模态可解释性研究的现状与漏洞，强调亟需建立标准化评估框架。提供的建议有助于推动更可解释、负责任的多模态AI系统发展。未来工作应关注跨模态交互解释、评估一致性及认知因素的融入。

title: Authorship Attribution in Multilingual Machine-Generated Texts
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) have reached human-like fluency and coherence, distinguishing machine-generated text (MGT) from human-written content becomes increasingly difficult. While early efforts in MGT detection have focused on binary classification, the growing landscape and diversity of LLMs require a more fine-grained yet challenging authorship attribution (AA), i.e., being able to identify the precise generator (LLM or human) behind a text. However, AA remains nowadays confined to a monolingual setting, with English being the most investigated one, overlooking the multilingual nature and usage of modern LLMs. In this work, we introduce the problem of Multilingual Authorship Attribution, which involves attributing texts to human or multiple LLM generators across diverse languages. Focusing on 18 languages -- covering multiple families and writing scripts -- and 8 generators (7 LLMs and the human-authored class), we investigate the multilingual suitability of monolingual AA methods in terms of their cross-lingual transferability, and the impact of generators on attribution performance. Our results reveal that while certain monolingual AA methods can be adapted to multilingual settings, significant limitations and challenges remain, particularly in transferring across diverse language families, underscoring the complexity of multilingual AA and the need for more robust approaches to better match real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言机器生成文本的作者归属新任务，评估单语言方法的跨语言迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器生成文本检测局限于单语言（主要是英语），但现代LLM具有多语言特性，真实场景需要跨语言识别文本的具体生成器（人类或特定LLM）。该研究填补多语言作者归属的空白，探索跨语言迁移的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 定义多语言作者归属任务，覆盖18种语言（多种语系和书写系统）和8个生成器（7个LLM和人类）。采用现有单语言归属方法，评估其跨语言迁移性能，分析语言族和生成器对归属准确率的影响。
light_analysis.result: 部分单语言方法可迁移至多语言场景，但跨语言族迁移存在显著局限，性能下降明显。具体指标摘要未明确，但揭示了多语言AA的复杂性和当前方法的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多语言作者归属任务复杂，现有方法难以应对跨语言族挑战，需开发更鲁棒的模型。该工作为未来研究奠定基础，推动真实场景下的文本归属技术发展。

title: Modality-Aware Feature Matching in Visual and Vision-Language Applications: A Comprehensive Survey
abstract: Feature matching is a cornerstone task in computer vision, essential for applications such as image retrieval, stereo matching, 3D reconstruction, and SLAM. This survey comprehensively reviews modality-based feature matching, exploring traditional handcrafted methods and emphasizing contemporary deep learning approaches across various modalities, including RGB images, depth images, 3D point clouds, LiDAR scans, medical images, and vision-language interactions. Traditional methods, leveraging detectors like Harris corners and descriptors such as SIFT and ORB, demonstrate robustness under moderate intra-modality variations but struggle with significant modality gaps. Contemporary deep learning-based methods, exemplified by detector-free strategies like CNN-based SuperPoint and transformer-based LoFTR, substantially improve robustness and adaptability across modalities. We highlight modality-aware advancements, such as geometric and depth-specific descriptors for depth images, sparse and dense learning methods for 3D point clouds, attention-enhanced neural networks for LiDAR scans, and specialized solutions like the MIND descriptor for complex medical image matching. Cross-modal applications, particularly in medical image registration and vision-language tasks, underscore the evolution of feature matching to handle increasingly diverse data interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 全面综述基于模态的特征匹配方法，涵盖传统手工特征与深度学习技术，重点分析多模态和视觉-语言交互中的匹配策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 特征匹配是计算机视觉的基础任务，广泛应用于图像检索、三维重建等。现有方法在处理跨模态场景时存在显著性能下降，尤其是面对深度图像、点云等异构数据。传统方法如SIFT在模态变化下鲁棒性不足，亟需统一分析与总结模态感知的匹配技术进展。
light_analysis.method: 首先综述传统手工特征（如Harris角点、SIFT）及其局限性。重点分析深度学习方法，包括CNN（SuperPoint）和Transformer（LoFTR）的无检测器策略。针对不同模态提出专门方案：几何/深度描述符用于深度图像，稀疏/密集学习用于点云，注意力网络用于LiDAR，MIND描述符用于医学图像。同时涵盖跨模态匹配在医学图像配准和视觉语言任务中的应用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供定量结果，但指出深度学习方法在跨模态匹配中显著优于传统方法，如LoFTR等无检测器方法提升了鲁棒性。Transformer和注意力机制有效处理了LiDAR和点云的稀疏性及几何变换。医学图像匹配中MIND描述符展现了优越性能。视觉语言任务中跨模态匹配取得进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述系统分类了模态感知的特征匹配方法，从传统到深度学习，并涵盖多模态和跨模态应用。强调无检测器和端到端学习是未来趋势，同时指出大规模多模态数据集和统一框架的构建需求。为计算机视觉研究者提供技术路线图，推动智能系统在复杂场景下的匹配能力。

title: From Benchmarks to Skills: Low-Rank Factors for LLM Evaluation
abstract: Current evaluations of large language models (LLMs) rely heavily on a growing collection of benchmarks and on aggregate benchmark scores, yet it remains unclear what this comparison actually captures, and what these scores reveal about models' underlying capabilities. Here, we propose a new paradigm for LLM evaluation, by asking whether benchmark performance reflects many independent abilities, or rather relies on a small number of shared dimensions. To answer this, we apply Factor Analysis (FA) to a massive performance matrix of LLMs versus benchmarks \((60\times44)\) revealing an \emph{intrinsically low-rank} structure of that matrix. That is, a small number of latent factors captures most of the structure in the full task space. This low-rank geometry reveals substantial redundancy across existing tasks and explains why many benchmarks appear to be measuring overlapping abilities. We further show that these latent factors correspond to coherent, skill-like, dimensions of LLM behavior. Leveraging this latent skill-space, we deliver three practical tools for LLM evaluation and downstream users: (i)~identifying redundant tasks, (ii)~profiling new models using a small subset of tasks, and (iii)~selecting models aligned with desired skill profiles. Our method provides a solid alternative to the de-facto standard of a single aggregate score, and establishes an interpretable and practical framework for understanding and benchmarking LLM core capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于因子分析的低秩分解方法，揭示LLM基准测试的内在结构，并构建可解释的技能评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM评估依赖大量基准测试和聚合分数，但无法揭示模型真实能力维度。作者质疑基准性能是否反映独立能力，还是共享少数维度，从而解决评测冗余和不可解释性问题。
light_analysis.method: 对60个LLM在44个基准上的性能矩阵进行因子分析，发现其本质低秩结构，即少数潜在因子可解释大部分任务变异性。将这些因子解释为连贯的技能维度，并开发三个工具：冗余任务识别、基于少量任务的模型画像、按技能需求选模型。
light_analysis.result: 因子分析揭示性能矩阵为低秩（摘要未明确具体秩数），证明大量基准存在冗余。通过技能空间实现高效评估：仅需少量任务即可准确表征新模型性能，且技能画像可指导模型选择，优于单一聚合分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了替代传统聚合分数的可解释评估框架，证明LLM能力可分解为少量共享技能。该方法可用于降低评估成本、理解模型行为，并为用户提供技能对齐的选型方案。未来可扩展至更多模型和基准。

title: A Survey of Deep Learning for Geometry Problem Solving
abstract: Geometry problem solving, a crucial aspect of mathematical reasoning, is vital across various domains, including education, the assessment of AI's mathematical abilities, and multimodal capability evaluation. The recent surge in deep learning technologies, particularly the emergence of multimodal large language models, has significantly accelerated research in this area. This paper presents a survey of the applications of deep learning in geometry problem solving, including (i) a comprehensive summary of the relevant tasks in geometry problem solving; (ii) a thorough review of related deep learning methods; (iii) a detailed analysis of evaluation metrics and methods; and (iv) a critical discussion of state-of-the-art performance, existing challenges, and promising future directions. Our objective is to offer a comprehensive and practical reference of deep learning for geometry problem solving, thereby fostering further advancements in this field. We maintain a list of relevant papers: https://github.com/majianz/dl4gps.

light_analysis.overview: 综述深度学习在几何问题求解中的应用，涵盖任务、方法、评估和未来方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何问题求解是数学推理的关键，在教育和AI能力评估中具有重要价值。近年来多模态大语言模型的发展加速了该领域研究。但现有工作分散，缺乏系统性的综述来梳理任务定义、方法分类和评估标准，以促进后续研究。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用综述方法，系统梳理几何问题求解中的典型任务（如几何定理证明、几何图形理解等），分类总结深度学习方法（包括基于Transformer的模型、多模态融合技术等），并分析常用数据集（如GeoQA、Geometry3K）和评估指标。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述论文，无原始实验。但总结了当前最优方法在标准数据集上的性能表现，指出多模态大模型在几何问题求解中展现出潜力，但仍面临复杂几何推理、图形理解准确性等挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为几何问题求解的深度学习研究提供了全面的参考框架，帮助研究人员快速了解领域现状。分析指出未来需加强几何推理能力、提升多模态对齐效果。综述还开放了持续更新的参考文献列表。

title: Emergence of Hierarchical Emotion Organization in Large Language Models
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) increasingly power conversational agents, understanding how they model users' emotional states is critical for ethical deployment. Inspired by emotion wheels, i.e., a psychological framework that argues emotions organize hierarchically, we analyze probabilistic dependencies between emotional states in model outputs. We find that LLMs naturally form hierarchical emotion trees that align with human psychological models, and larger models develop more complex hierarchies. We also uncover systematic biases in emotion recognition across socioeconomic personas, with compounding misclassifications for intersectional, underrepresented groups. Human studies reveal striking parallels, suggesting that LLMs internalize aspects of social perception. Beyond highlighting emergent emotional reasoning in LLMs, our results hint at the potential of using cognitively-grounded theories for developing better model evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 发现大型语言模型自然形成与人类心理学一致的层级化情绪组织，并揭示情绪识别中的社会偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地驱动对话代理，理解它们如何建模用户情绪状态对于伦理部署至关重要。现有方法往往忽视情绪的内在组织，而心理学中的情绪轮理论认为情绪是层级化组织的。本研究旨在探究LLMs是否也表现出类似的情绪层级结构，并分析其对社会感知的潜在偏见。
light_analysis.method: 受情绪轮心理学框架启发，通过分析模型输出中情绪状态之间的概率依赖关系，建立情绪层级树。研究了不同规模模型（如GPT系列）的层级复杂度，并评估了跨社会经济人物角色的情绪识别准确性。结合人类研究进行对比验证，以揭示模型内化的社会感知模式。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现LLMs自然形成层级化情绪树，与人类心理模型高度一致，且更大模型构建出更复杂的层级结构。同时，模型在情绪识别中表现出系统性偏差，对交叉、未充分代表的社会群体存在复合误分类。人类研究呈现出惊人相似性，表明LLMs内化了某些社会感知方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究突出了LLMs中涌现的情绪推理能力，以及认知心理学理论在模型评估中的潜力。揭示了社会偏见在情绪建模中的表现，为开发更公平、可解释的对话AI提供了新视角。未来工作可进一步探索如何利用情绪层级改进模型训练和偏见缓解。

title: Reconstructing Template-Memorized Images from Natural Prompts
abstract: Recent advances in generative models, such as diffusion models, have raised concerns related to privacy, copyright infringement, and data stewardship. To better understand and control these risks, prior work has introduced techniques and attacks that reconstruct images, or parts of images, from training data. While these results demonstrate that training data can be recovered, existing methods often rely on high computational resources, partial access to the training set, or carefully engineered prompts.   In this work, we present a new attack that requires low resources, assumes little to no access to the training data, and identifies seemingly benign prompts that can lead to potentially risky image reconstruction. We further show that such reconstructions may occur unintentionally, even for users without specialized knowledge. For example, we observe that for one existing model, the prompt ``blue Unisex T-Shirt'' generates the face of a real individual. Moreover, by combining the identified vulnerabilities with real-world prompt data, we discover prompts that reproduce memorized visual elements.   Our approach builds on insights from prior work and leverages domain knowledge to expose a fundamental vulnerability arising from the use of scraped e-commerce data, where templated layouts and images are closely tied to pattern-like textual prompts.   The code for our attack is publicly available at https://github.com/TheSolY/lr-tmi.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种低资源、少数据访问的攻击方法，利用自然提示从扩散模型中重建训练数据中的模板记忆图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型（如扩散模型）引发隐私、版权和数据管理问题。现有图像重建攻击通常需要高计算资源、部分训练集访问或精心设计的提示，限制了实用性。本文旨在揭示一种更易实施、风险更低的攻击方式，以便更好地理解和控制这些风险。
light_analysis.method: 基于先前工作洞见，利用领域知识（如电商数据中模板布局与文本提示的紧密关联），识别看似良性的自然提示。通过分析真实提示数据，发现这些提示能触发模型输出训练数据中的记忆图像，而无需高计算资源或特定训练集访问。
light_analysis.result: 示例表明，对现有模型使用提示“blue Unisex T-Shirt”可生成真实人脸图像。通过结合发现的漏洞与真实提示数据，进一步识别出可重现模板记忆视觉元素的提示，证明攻击的有效性和低门槛。
light_analysis.conclusion: 暴露了使用爬取电商数据训练模型时固有的模板记忆漏洞，为隐私保护和版权合规提供新视角。代码已公开，便于后续研究。局限性在于仅针对特定数据类型，未来可扩展至其他领域。

title: Meta-Learning Transformers to Improve In-Context Generalization
abstract: In-context learning enables transformer models to generalize to new tasks based solely on input prompts, without any need for weight updates. However, existing training paradigms typically rely on large, unstructured datasets that are costly to store, difficult to evaluate for quality and balance, and pose privacy and ethical concerns due to the inclusion of sensitive information. Motivated by these limitations and risks, we propose an alternative training strategy where we leverage a collection of multiple, small-scale, and domain-specific datasets. We empirically demonstrate that the increased quality and diversity of such data improve the generalization abilities of in-context learners beyond their training domain, while achieving comparable performance with models trained on a single large-scale dataset. We investigate this paradigm by leveraging meta-learning to train an in-context learner on the Meta-Album collection under several settings. Firstly, we show the performance in a controlled environment, where the test domain is completely excluded from the training knowledge. Secondly, we explore the robustness of these models to forgetting in a continual scenario where the information is accessible for a limited time. Finally, we explore the more challenging unsupervised scenario. Our findings demonstrate that transformers still generalize for in-context prediction when trained on a curated dataset collection while offering advantages in modularity and replaceability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用多领域小数据集通过元学习训练Transformer，提升上下文泛化能力并保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有in-context learning训练依赖大型非结构化数据集，存在存储成本高、质量难评估、隐私伦理风险等问题。本文提出替代策略，使用多个小型、领域特定的高质量数据集，旨在提升泛化能力并降低风险。
light_analysis.method: 采用元学习框架，在Meta-Album多领域小数据集集合上训练Transformer模型作为in-context learner。实验设置包括：受控环境（测试域完全未知）、持续学习（有限时间访问信息）、无监督场景。关键创新在于利用数据集的多样性和质量提升泛化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在域外泛化任务上，使用多领域小数据集训练的模型与单一大规模数据集训练的模型性能相当。此外，模型在持续学习场景中表现出鲁棒性，并在无监督场景下仍能保持泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了模块化和可替换性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过元学习在多样化小数据集上训练Transformer进行上下文预测的有效性，为减少对大型数据集的依赖提供了可行路径。未来可探索更多领域组合及隐私保护机制，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: PlaceRep: Geospatial Place Representation Learning from Large-Scale Point-of-Interest Data
abstract: Learning effective representations of urban environments requires capturing spatial structure beyond fixed administrative boundaries. Existing geospatial representation learning approaches typically aggregate Points of Interest (POIs) into pre-defined administrative regions such as census units or ZIP code areas, assigning a single embedding to each region. However, POIs often form semantically meaningful groups that extend across, within, or beyond these boundaries, defining places that better reflect human activity and urban function. To address this limitation, we propose PlaceRep, a geospatial representation learning method that constructs place-level representations by clustering spatially and semantically related POIs. PlaceRep summarizes large-scale POI graphs from U.S. Foursquare data to produce general-purpose urban region embeddings while automatically identifying places across multiple spatial scales. By eliminating model pre-training, PlaceRep provides a scalable and efficient solution for multi-granular geospatial analysis. Experiments using the tasks of population density estimation and housing price prediction as downstream tasks show that PlaceRep outperforms most state-of-the-art graph-based geospatial representation learning methods and achieves up to a x100 speedup in generating region-level representations on large-scale POI graphs. The implementation of PlaceRep is available at https://github.com/mohammadhashemii/PlaceRep.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PlaceRep，通过聚类POI构建跨行政边界的地点级地理空间表示，无需预训练，实现高效多粒度分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有地理空间表示学习通常将POI聚合到固定行政区域（如人口普查单元或邮政编码区），忽略了POI可能形成跨越、位于或超出这些边界的语义组，难以反映真实的人类活动和城市功能。因此，需要一种能自动识别多尺度地点并生成通用嵌入的方法。
light_analysis.method: PlaceRep利用大规模POI图（来自美国Foursquare数据），通过聚类空间和语义相关的POI来构建地点级表示。它无需模型预训练，直接总结POI图，自动识别多尺度地点，并生成通用城市区域嵌入。该方法可扩展且高效，适用于多粒度地理空间分析。
light_analysis.result: 在人口密度估计和房价预测下游任务中，PlaceRep优于大多数基于图的SOTA方法，且在生成大规模POI图的区域级表示时，实现了高达100倍的加速。摘要未提供具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PlaceRep提供了一种可扩展、高效的地理空间表示学习方案，能够自动跨行政边界识别多尺度地点，提升下游任务性能。其开源实现便于实际应用。未来可探索更复杂的POI关系或应用于其他地理任务。

title: ShowFlow: From Robust Single Concept to Condition-Free Multi-Concept Generation
abstract: Customizing image generation remains a core challenge in controllable image synthesis. For single-concept generation, maintaining both identity preservation and prompt alignment is challenging. In multi-concept scenarios, relying solely on a prompt without additional conditions like layout boxes or semantic masks, often leads to identity loss and concept omission. In this paper, we introduce ShowFlow, a comprehensive framework designed to tackle these challenges. We propose ShowFlow-S for single-concept image generation, and ShowFlow-M for handling multiple concepts. ShowFlow-S introduces a KronA-WED adapter, which integrates a Kronecker adapter with weight and embedding decomposition, and together with a novel Semantic-Aware Attention Regularization (SAR) training objective to enhance single-concept generation. Building on this foundation, ShowFlow-M directly reuses robust models learned by ShowFlow-S to support multi-concept generation without extra conditions, incorporating a Subject-Adaptive Matching Attention (SAMA) and a Layout Consistency guidance as the plug-and-play module. Extensive experiments and user studies validate ShowFlow's effectiveness, highlighting its potential in real-world applications like advertising and virtual dressing. Our source code will be publicly available at: https://htrvu.github.io/showflow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShowFlow框架，通过ShowFlow-S和ShowFlow-M分别解决单概念和多概念图像生成中的身份保持与提示对齐问题，实现无需额外条件的多概念生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 可控图像生成中，单概念生成需同时保持身份特征与提示语义对齐，现有方法往往在两者间失衡。多概念场景下，仅依赖文本提示易导致身份丢失或概念遗漏，而现有方法常需布局框或语义掩码等额外条件，限制了实用性。因此，亟需一种无需额外条件、能鲁棒处理单/多概念生成的方法。
light_analysis.method: ShowFlow-S引入KronA-WED适配器（Kronecker适配器结合权重与嵌入分解）及语义感知注意力正则化（SAR）训练目标，增强单概念生成的身份保持与对齐。在此基础上，ShowFlow-M直接复用ShowFlow-S的鲁棒模型，通过主题自适应匹配注意力（SAMA）和布局一致性指导作为即插即用模块，实现无需额外条件的多概念生成。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验和用户研究表明，ShowFlow在单概念和多概念生成任务上均优于基线方法，有效保持身份并提升提示对齐度。在广告、虚拟试衣等实际应用中展现出潜力，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShowFlow框架通过解耦单概念与多概念生成，提出创新的适配器与注意力正则化方法，解决了身份保持与条件无关多概念生成的核心挑战。其模块化设计便于扩展，在可控图像生成领域具有学术价值，并可直接应用于商业场景。未来可探索更复杂的多概念交互。

title: CPAM: Context-Preserving Adaptive Manipulation for Zero-Shot Real Image Editing
abstract: Editing natural images using textual descriptions in text-to-image diffusion models remains a significant challenge, particularly in achieving consistent generation and handling complex, non-rigid objects. Existing methods often struggle to preserve textures and identity, require extensive fine-tuning, and exhibit limitations in editing specific spatial regions or objects while retaining background details. This paper proposes Context-Preserving Adaptive Manipulation (CPAM), a novel zero-shot framework for complicated, non-rigid real image editing. Specifically, we propose a preservation adaptation module that adjusts self-attention mechanisms to preserve and independently control the object and background effectively. This ensures that the objects' shapes, textures, and identities are maintained while keeping the background undistorted during the editing process using the mask guidance technique. Additionally, we develop a localized extraction module to mitigate the interference with the non-desired modified regions during conditioning in cross-attention mechanisms. We also introduce various mask-guidance strategies to facilitate diverse image manipulation tasks in a simple manner. CPAM can be seamlessly integrated with multiple diffusion backbones, including SD1.5, SD2.1, and SDXL, demonstrating strong generalization across different model architectures. Extensive experiments on our newly constructed Image Manipulation BenchmArk (IMBA), a robust benchmark dataset specifically designed for real image editing, demonstrate that our proposed method is the preferred choice among human raters, outperforming existing state-of-the-art editing techniques. The source code and data will be publicly released at the project page: https://vdkhoi20.github.io/CPAM
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. Project page: https://vdkhoi20.github.io/CPAM

light_analysis.overview: 提出零样本真实图像编辑框架CPAM，通过保留适应模块和局部提取模块实现复杂非刚性对象的背景保持编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本引导的图像编辑在扩散模型中面临一致生成和复杂非刚性对象处理的挑战。现有方法难以保持纹理和身份，需要大量微调，且在编辑特定区域时容易失真背景。因此，亟需一种无需微调、能同时保留对象和背景的零样本编辑方法。
light_analysis.method: CPAM包含保留适应模块，调整自注意力机制以分离控制对象和背景，利用掩码指导保持形状、纹理和身份；局部提取模块减少交叉注意力中非目标区域的干扰。支持多种掩码策略实现多样化编辑任务，可集成至SD1.5、SD2.1、SDXL等扩散骨干。
light_analysis.result: 在新建的IMBA基准数据集上，CPAM在人类评估中优于现有最先进编辑方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称表现更优。实验表明该方法在不同扩散模型上具有强泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPAM为零样本真实图像编辑提供了有效方案，通过模块化设计解决背景保持和对象控制问题。未来可扩展至更多编辑任务和模型架构。代码和数据将公开，促进研究复现。

title: ReFoCUS: Reinforcement-guided Frame Optimization for Contextual Understanding
abstract: Recent progress in Large Multi-modal Models (LMMs) has enabled effective vision-language reasoning, yet the ability to video understanding remains constrained by suboptimal frame selection strategies, albeit with the rapid development of video-specialized LMMs. Prior works attempted to solve this with static heuristics or external retrieval modules to feed frame-level information, but these approaches often fail to capture visual cues grounded to the given user queries conflating raw visual dynamics with true semantic relevance. In this paper, we introduce ReFoCUS (Reinforcement-guided Frame Optimization for Contextual UnderStanding), the first framework to integrate online policy-gradient reinforcement learning into frame-level optimization for video-LLMs. ReFoCUS aims to learn a frame selection policy, leveraging reward signals derived from reference models to capture their underlying scoring behavior over frame combinations that best support temporally grounded responses. To efficiently explore the large combinatorial frame space, we employ an autoregressive and query-conditional selection architecture that ensures contextual consistency while reducing complexity. Our policy learning removes the need for explicit frame-level supervision, as it implicitly discovers optimal and semantically consistent frame compositions. ReFoCUS consistently improves reasoning accuracy across multiple video QA benchmarks, demonstrating the advantage of aligning frame selection with model-internal utility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReFoCUS框架，首次将在线策略梯度强化学习集成到视频-LLM的帧级优化中，学习查询条件化的帧选择策略，提升视频理解准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频大型多模态模型（LMMs）受限于次优的帧选择策略。静态启发式或外部检索模块难以捕获与用户查询相关的视觉线索，导致语义相关性与原始动态混淆。需要一种能根据模型内部效用自动选择最优帧组合的方法，以提升时序推理能力。
light_analysis.method: ReFoCUS通过在线策略梯度强化学习训练帧选择策略。奖励信号来自参考模型对帧组合的评分，引导策略发现语义一致的帧组成。采用自回归、查询条件的选择架构，降低组合空间复杂度。无需显式帧级监督，隐式学习最优帧。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频问答基准上，ReFoCUS一致提升了推理准确性，验证了将帧选择与模型内部效用对齐的有效性。相较于静态启发式或检索方法，性能显著改善，表明策略学习能更好地捕捉时序相关视觉信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReFoCUS首次将强化学习引入视频-LLM的帧级优化，消除了对显式帧监督的依赖，具有重要学术价值。该方法可推广至其他多模态理解任务，未来可探索更复杂的奖励函数或跨模态对齐。

title: LLM-ODDR: A Large Language Model Framework for Joint Order Dispatching and Driver Repositioning
abstract: Ride-hailing platforms face significant challenges in optimizing order dispatching and driver repositioning operations in dynamic urban environments. Traditional approaches based on combinatorial optimization, rule-based heuristics, and reinforcement learning often overlook driver income fairness, interpretability, and adaptability to real-world dynamics. To address these gaps, we propose LLM-ODDR, a novel framework leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) for joint Order Dispatching and Driver Repositioning (ODDR) in ride-hailing services. LLM-ODDR framework comprises three key components: (1) Multi-objective-guided Order Value Refinement, which evaluates orders by considering multiple objectives to determine their overall value; (2) Fairness-aware Order Dispatching, which balances platform revenue with driver income fairness; and (3) Spatiotemporal Demand-Aware Driver Repositioning, which optimizes idle vehicle placement based on historical patterns and projected supply. We also develop JointDR-GPT, a fine-tuned model optimized for ODDR tasks with domain knowledge. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets from Manhattan taxi operations demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms traditional methods in terms of effectiveness, adaptability to anomalous conditions, and decision interpretability. To our knowledge, this is the first exploration of LLMs as decision-making agents in ride-hailing ODDR tasks, establishing foundational insights for integrating advanced language models within intelligent transportation systems. While the current framework incurs higher computational costs than traditional methods, we show that parallel decomposition and model distillation can reduce latency to production-viable levels for deployment.
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (TITS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-ODDR框架，首次利用大语言模型联合优化网约车订单分配与司机重定位，兼顾公平性、可解释性和适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 网约车平台在动态城市环境中优化订单分配与司机重定位面临挑战。传统方法如组合优化、规则启发式和强化学习常忽略司机收入公平性、决策可解释性及对现实动态的适应性。这些不足导致实际部署中平台与司机利益失衡，且难以应对异常情况。因此，亟需一种能综合考虑多目标、具备可解释性和适应性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: LLM-ODDR框架包含三个核心组件：多目标导向订单价值细化（评估订单综合价值）、公平感知订单分配（平衡平台收益与司机收入公平）、时空需求感知司机重定位（基于历史模式优化空车位置）。同时开发JointDR-GPT，通过领域知识微调的大语言模型，专用于ODDR任务。框架利用LLM的推理能力实现联合决策。
light_analysis.result: 基于曼哈顿出租车真实数据集，实验表明LLM-ODDR在有效性、异常条件适应性和决策可解释性上显著优于传统方法。尽管当前计算成本较高，但通过并行分解和模型蒸馏可将延迟降至生产可用水平，验证了其实际部署潜力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次探索LLM作为网约车ODDR任务的决策代理，为智能交通系统集成高级语言模型奠定基础。该框架提升了决策公平性与可解释性，但计算成本仍是挑战。未来可通过并行化与蒸馏技术优化效率，推动在真实场景中的落地应用。

title: ExPLAIND: Unifying Model, Data, and Training Attribution to Study Model Behavior
abstract: Post-hoc interpretability methods typically attribute a model's behavior to its components, data, or training trajectory in isolation, and are often tied to a particular level of granularity along the local-to-global spectrum. This leads to explanations that lack a unified view and may miss key interactions. We present ExPLAIND, a theoretically grounded, unified framework that integrates model components, data, and training trajectory while supporting explanations across granularities. We generalize recent work on gradient path kernels, reformulating models trained by AdamW as kernel machines. From the resulting kernel feature maps, we derive novel parameter-wise and step-wise influence scores. We empirically validate the resulting decomposition of model behavior in several settings and apply ExPLAIND to two case studies. Our findings on a Transformer exhibiting Grokking support previously proposed learning phases, while refining the final phase as one in which outer layers align around a representation pipeline learned after memorization. For EuroLLM pretraining, ExPLAIND reveals a two-phase dynamic, with the first characterized by outer-layer MLP learning and the second by increased relative influence of intermediate attention layers. These results establish ExPLAIND as a unified framework for interpreting model behavior and training dynamics.
comment: published at ICML 2026, code at https://github.com/mainlp/explaind

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExPLAIND统一框架，整合模型组件、数据和训练轨迹的解释，支持跨粒度的归因分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后验解释方法通常孤立地归因模型行为到组件、数据或训练轨迹，且局限于特定局部或全局粒度，导致解释缺乏统一视角，可能遗漏关键交互。因此需要一种集成多维度、跨粒度的解释框架。
light_analysis.method: ExPLAIND基于梯度路径核推广，将AdamW训练的模型重新表述为核机器。从核特征图中导出参数级和步骤级影响分数，实现模型、数据和训练轨迹的统一归因。在Transformer和EuroLLM模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Transformer的Grokking现象中，细化最后阶段为外层层对齐记忆后形成的表示流水线。在EuroLLM预训练中，揭示两阶段动态：第一阶段外层MLP学习，第二阶段中间注意力层影响增加。验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExPLAIND作为统一解释框架，能揭示模型行为与训练动态的细节，支持Grokking和预训练分析。具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂模型和任务。

title: Learning on a Razor's Edge: Identifiability and Singularity of Polynomial Neural Networks
abstract: We study function spaces parametrized by neural networks, referred to as neuromanifolds. Specifically, we focus on deep Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with an activation function that is a sufficiently generic polynomial. First, we address the identifiability problem, showing that, for almost all functions in the neuromanifold of an MLP, there exist only finitely many parameter choices yielding that function. For CNNs, the parametrization is generically one-to-one. As a consequence, we compute the dimension of the neuromanifold. Second, we describe singular points of neuromanifolds. We characterize singularities completely for CNNs, and partially for MLPs. In both cases, they arise from sparse subnetworks. For MLPs, we prove that these singularities often correspond to critical points of the mean-squared error loss, which does not hold for CNNs. This provides a geometric explanation of the sparsity bias of MLPs. All of our results leverage tools from algebraic geometry.

light_analysis.overview: 利用代数几何工具，理论证明多项式激活MLP参数化有限到一，CNN参数化一一对应，并刻画神经流形的奇异性，解释MLP的稀疏偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络参数化函数空间（神经流形）的几何性质对理解模型表达能力和训练动力学至关重要。现有研究对神经流形的可识别性和奇异点缺乏严格理论分析，尤其是多项式激活网络。理解参数化是否唯一以及奇异点的结构有助于解释模型稀疏性等行为，为网络初始化与优化提供几何指导。
light_analysis.method: 采用代数几何方法，将神经网络视为多项式映射构成的簇。对于MLP和CNN，使用代数簇维数理论和奇点理论分析可识别性：通过计算参数化映射的纤维尺寸证明MLP有限可识别性及CNN单射性。刻画奇异性：CNN奇点完全由稀疏子网络引起，MLP奇点部分刻画，并证明MLP奇点对应均方误差损失临界点。
light_analysis.result: 理论成果：1）对于足够一般的多项式激活，MLP的几乎每个函数只有有限个参数表示，CNN的表示参数化是一一对应的；2）神经流形的维数可由此计算；3）完全刻画CNN的奇异点结构（均来自稀疏子网络），部分刻画MLP奇异点；4）MLP中奇异点通常为均方误差损失的临界点，而CNN不满足此性质。未提供实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为多项式激活深层网络的几何可识别性和奇异性提供了严格的代数几何分析，揭示了MLP与CNN参数化结构本质差异，并从几何角度解释了MLP倾向于学习稀疏表示的偏差。理论结果可指导网络设计、初始化及优化策略的改进。局限：分析限于多项式激活，实际使用ReLU等非多项式激活的情况有待拓展。

title: Visual enhancement and 3D representation for underwater scenes: a review
abstract: Underwater visual enhancement (UVE) and underwater 3D reconstruction pose significant challenges in computer vision and AI-based tasks due to complex imaging conditions in aquatic environments. Despite the development of numerous enhancement algorithms, a comprehensive and systematic review covering both UVE and underwater 3D reconstruction remains absent. To advance research in these areas, we present an in-depth review from multiple perspectives. First, we introduce the fundamental physical models, highlighting the peculiarities that challenge conventional techniques. We survey advanced methods for visual enhancement and 3D reconstruction specifically designed for underwater scenarios. The paper assesses various approaches from non-learning methods to advanced data-driven techniques, including Neural Radiance Fields and 3D Gaussian Splatting, discussing their effectiveness in handling underwater distortions. Finally, we conduct both quantitative and qualitative evaluations of state-of-the-art UVE and underwater 3D reconstruction algorithms across multiple benchmark datasets. Finally, we highlight key research directions for future advancements in underwater vision.

light_analysis.overview: 综合综述水下视觉增强与三维重建方法，涵盖物理模型、非学习与数据驱动技术及未来方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 水下成像条件复杂，视觉增强和三维重建面临巨大挑战。虽已有多种算法被提出，但缺乏同时涵盖水下视觉增强与三维重建的系统性综述。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过多角度梳理现有方法，推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 首先介绍水下成像的物理模型及挑战。然后综述多种方法，从非学习方法到数据驱动技术，包括神经辐射场和三维高斯泼溅。最后在多个基准数据集上对最先进算法进行定量和定性评估。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了定量和定性评估，比较了多种水下视觉增强与三维重建算法在不同基准数据集上的表现。具体数据摘要中未明确说明，但综述性评估展示了各方法的优劣。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统综述了水下视觉增强与三维重建方法，总结了当前技术现状，并指出了未来研究方向，如更鲁棒的算法、真实场景验证等，为后续研究提供参考。

title: Iterative Tool Usage Exploration for Multimodal Agents via Step-wise Preference Tuning
abstract: Multimodal agents, which integrate a controller e.g., a vision language model) with external tools, have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in tackling complex multimodal tasks. Existing approaches for training these agents, both supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, depend on extensive human-annotated task-answer pairs and tool trajectories. However, for complex multimodal tasks, such annotations are prohibitively expensive or impractical to obtain. In this paper, we propose an iterative tool usage exploration method for multimodal agents without any pre-collected data, namely SPORT, via step-wise preference optimization to refine the trajectories of tool usage. Our method enables multimodal agents to autonomously discover effective tool usage strategies through self-exploration and optimization, eliminating the bottleneck of human annotation. SPORT has four iterative components: task synthesis, step sampling, step verification, and preference tuning. We first synthesize multimodal tasks using language models. Then, we introduce a novel trajectory exploration scheme, where step sampling and step verification are executed alternately to solve synthesized tasks. In step sampling, the agent tries different tools and obtains corresponding results. In step verification, we employ a verifier to provide AI feedback to construct step-wise preference data. The data is subsequently used to update the controller for tool usage through preference tuning, producing a SPORT agent. By interacting with real environments, the SPORT agent gradually evolves into a more refined and capable system. Evaluation in the GTA and GAIA benchmarks shows that the SPORT agent achieves 6.41% and 3.64% improvements, underscoring the generalization and effectiveness introduced by our method. The project page is https://SPORT-Agents.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需预收集数据的迭代工具使用探索方法SPORT，通过逐步偏好优化使多模态智能体自主发现有效工具策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练多模态智能体的方法依赖大量人工标注的任务-答案对和工具轨迹，对于复杂多模态任务，这种标注成本高昂且难以获取。因此需要一种无需人工标注的自动探索方法，让智能体自主优化工具使用策略。
light_analysis.method: SPORT包含四个迭代组件：任务合成（用语言模型生成多模态任务）、步骤采样（智能体尝试不同工具并获取结果）、步骤验证（用验证器提供AI反馈构建逐步偏好数据）和偏好调优（用偏好数据更新控制器）。通过与环境交互，智能体逐步优化工具使用轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在GTA和GAIA基准测试中，SPORT智能体分别比基线提升6.41%和3.64%，证明了方法的泛化性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPORT通过自我探索和优化消除了人类标注瓶颈，使多模态智能体自动发现有效工具使用策略。方法具有通用性，可扩展至更多复杂任务，未来可探索更高效的探索策略和更复杂的验证机制。

title: WildIFEval: Instruction Following in the Wild
abstract: Recent LLMs have shown remarkable success in following user instructions, yet handling instructions with multiple constraints remains a significant challenge. In this work, we introduce WildIFEval - a large-scale dataset of 7K real user instructions with diverse, multi-constraint conditions. Unlike prior datasets, our collection spans a broad lexical and topical spectrum of constraints, extracted from natural user instructions. We categorize these constraints into eight high-level classes to capture their distribution and dynamics in real-world scenarios. Leveraging WildIFEval, we conduct extensive experiments to benchmark the instruction-following capabilities of leading LLMs. WildIFEval clearly differentiates between small and large models, and demonstrates that all models have a large room for improvement on such tasks. We analyze the effects of the number and type of constraints on performance, revealing interesting patterns of model constraint-following behavior. We release our dataset to promote further research on instruction-following under complex, realistic conditions.
comment: Accepted to the 5th Workshop on Generation, Evaluation and Metrics (GEM) at ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出WildIFEval数据集，用于评估LLM在真实用户多约束指令下的跟随能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在遵循用户指令方面表现优异，但处理包含多个约束的复杂指令仍是一项重大挑战。现有数据集覆盖的约束类型和话题范围有限，无法真实反映现实场景中的多样性。此研究旨在解决这一评估空白，通过构建大规模、多约束的真实用户指令数据集，推动复杂条件下指令跟随能力的研究。
light_analysis.method: 从自然用户指令中提取7K条具有多样、多约束条件的真实指令，覆盖广泛的词汇和主题约束。将约束分类为八种高层次类型，以捕捉其在现实场景中的分布和动态。利用该数据集对主流LLM进行基准测试，分析约束数量和类型对模型性能的影响，并公开数据集以促进研究。
light_analysis.result: WildIFEval能清晰区分不同规模的LLM，所有模型在复杂约束跟随任务上仍有较大提升空间。实验揭示了约束数量与类型对模型表现的影响模式，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。与先前提到的数据集相比，WildIFEval在约束多样性和真实性方面更具优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: WildIFEval为评估LLM在多约束指令跟随能力提供了真实且多样化的基准。研究显示了当前模型的不足，并强调了该方向的研究价值。数据集的发布有助于推动开发更健壮的指令跟随模型。未来工作可探索如何改进模型对复杂约束的处理。

title: Fourier Multi-Component and Multi-Layer Neural Networks: Unlocking High-Frequency Potential
abstract: The architecture of a neural network and the choice of its activation function are both fundamental to its performance. Equally important is ensuring that these two elements are well matched, as their alignment is key to effective representation and learning. In this paper, we introduce the Fourier Multi-Component and Multi-Layer Neural Network (FMMNN), a model that combines sine-type activations with the multi-component and multi-layer structure of MMNNs. In an FMMNN, each component is represented as a trainable linear combination of fixed random sine-type basis functions, while multi-layer composition generates more complex and adaptive high-frequency features. We establish that FMMNNs retain exponential expressive power for function approximation even under a low-rank architectural structure. We also analyze the optimization landscape of FMMNNs and find it to be substantially more favorable than that of standard fully connected neural networks, especially for high-frequency targets. In addition, we propose a scaled random initialization method for the first-layer weights in FMMNNs, which accelerates training and improves final performance when sufficient samples are available. Extensive numerical experiments support our theoretical insights, showing that FMMNNs achieve strong accuracy and favorable convergence behavior on oscillatory function-approximation benchmarks.
comment: Our code and implementation details are available at https://github.com/ShijunZhangMath/FMMNN

light_analysis.overview: 提出FMMNN模型，结合正弦激活与多组件多层结构，实现高频函数逼近的指数级表达能力与优化优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络架构与激活函数的匹配对性能至关重要，但现有方法在处理高频目标时优化困难，标准全连接网络在高频区域表现不佳。本文旨在解决高频函数逼近中的表达能力与优化挑战，通过设计FMMNN提升模型在振荡函数任务上的效果。
light_analysis.method: FMMNN每个组件为可训练的固定随机正弦基函数线性组合，多层结构生成复杂自适应高频特征。提出缩放随机初始化方法加速训练。理论分析证明其保持指数级表达能力，并具有比标准全连接网络更优的优化景观，尤其适用于高频目标。
light_analysis.result: 大量数值实验表明，FMMNN在振荡函数逼近基准上达到高精度和良好收敛行为。与标准全连接网络相比，优化景观明显改善，在高频目标上显著提升训练速度和最终性能，验证了理论分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献FMMNN模型，结合正弦激活与多组件多层结构，理论证明其在高频函数逼近中的表达能力和优化优势，实验验证有效性。该研究为高频问题提供新思路，未来可探索更广泛应用场景。

title: Is Stochastic Gradient Descent Effective? A PDE Perspective on Machine Learning processes
abstract: In this paper we analyze the behaviour of the stochastic gradient descent (SGD), a widely used method in supervised learning for optimizing neural network weights via a minimization of non-convex loss functions. Since the pioneering work of E, Li and Tai (2017), the underlying structure of such processes can be understood via parabolic PDEs of Fokker-Planck type, which are at the core of our analysis. Even if Fokker-Planck equations have a long history and a extensive literature, almost nothing is known when the potential is non-convex or when the diffusion matrix is degenerate, and this is the main difficulty that we face in our analysis.   We identify two different regimes: in the initial phase of SGD, the loss function drives the weights to concentrate around the nearest local minimum. We refer to this phase as the drift regime and we provide quantitative estimates on this concentration phenomenon. Next, we introduce the diffusion regime, where stochastic fluctuations help the learning process to escape suboptimal local minima. We analyze the Mean Exit Time (MET) and prove upper and lower bounds of the MET. Finally, we address the asymptotic convergence of SGD, for a non-convex cost function and a degenerate diffusion matrix, that do not allow to use the standard approaches, and require new techniques. For this purpose, we exploit two different methods: duality and entropy methods.   We provide new results about the dynamics and effectiveness of SGD, offering a deep connection between stochastic optimization and PDE theory, and some answers and insights to basic questions in the Machine Learning processes: How long does SGD take to escape from a bad minimum? Do neural network parameters converge using SGD? How do parameters evolve in the first stage of training with SGD?

light_analysis.overview: 从偏微分方程（PDE）视角分析随机梯度下降（SGD）在非凸损失函数下的动力学行为，揭示其逃逸局部极小和渐近收敛的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: SGD是机器学习中优化非凸损失函数的核心方法，但其动力学机制尚不清晰。现有Fokker-Planck方程理论主要针对凸势或非退化扩散矩阵，对非凸势和退化扩散情形缺乏分析。理解SGD如何从不良局部极小逃逸、参数是否收敛以及训练初期的演化规律，对改进优化算法和推动学习理论发展至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过Fokker-Planck型抛物线PDE建模SGD过程，识别两个不同阶段：漂移阶段（损失函数驱动权重集中至最近局部极小）和扩散阶段（随机波动帮助逃逸次优局部极小）。针对非凸势和退化扩散矩阵，采用对偶方法和熵方法分析平均退出时间（MET）的上界和下界，并证明SGD的渐近收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在漂移阶段，提供了权重浓度现象的定量估计；在扩散阶段，给出了MET的上下界。对于非凸损失函数和退化扩散矩阵，利用对偶与熵方法获得了SGD渐近收敛的新结果。这些结果量化了SGD逃逸不良极小所需时间，并回答了参数收敛性和初期演化规律等基本问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了随机优化与PDE理论之间的深层联系，为理解SGD在非凸环境下的动力学行为提供了新视角。研究成果有助于指导学习率调度、初始化策略及逃逸局部极小的机制设计，但具体应用中的计算复杂度分析及与实测SGD行为的匹配仍需进一步探索。

title: Geometry of Lightning Self-Attention: Identifiability and Dimension
abstract: We consider function spaces defined by self-attention networks without normalization, and theoretically analyze their geometry. Since these networks are polynomial, we rely on tools from algebraic geometry. In particular, we study the identifiability of deep attention by providing a description of the generic fibers of the parametrization for an arbitrary number of layers and, as a consequence, compute the dimension of the function space. Additionally, for a single-layer model, we characterize the singular and boundary points. Finally, we formulate a conjectural extension of our results to normalized self-attention networks, prove it for a single layer, and numerically verify it in the deep case.

light_analysis.overview: 利用代数几何工具，理论分析自注意力网络（无归一化）的函数空间几何，包括可辨识性和维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 自注意力网络是Transformer的核心组件，但其函数空间的几何性质尚未被充分理解。可辨识性（即参数到函数的映射是否单射）和函数空间维度对于理解模型容量和泛化能力至关重要。现有方法多依赖经验观察，缺乏严格的理论分析。本文通过代数几何方法，为任意层数的自注意力网络提供了可辨识性的刻画和维度计算。
light_analysis.method: 论文将自注意力网络视为多项式映射，利用代数几何中的工具（如纤维、维数理论）进行分析。对于无归一化的自注意力网络，描述了任意层数下参数化的通用纤维，进而计算函数空间维度。对于单层模型，还刻画了奇异点和边界点。最后，将结果推测扩展到带归一化的网络，并在单层证明、深层进行数值验证。
light_analysis.result: 论文给出了无归一化自注意力网络的可辨识性条件：对于任意层数，参数化的通用纤维被描述，函数空间维度被显式计算。单层模型的奇异点和边界点被完全刻画。对于归一化网络，单层的结果被证明，深层通过数值实验验证了猜想。这些结果为自注意力的理论理解提供了严格的代数几何基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为自注意力网络的函数空间几何提供了严格的理论分析，填补了可辨识性和维度计算方面的空白。这些结论有助于理解Transformer的表达能力和优化景观。未来工作可推广到更多变体（如多头注意力），并探索几何性质对训练动力学的影响。

title: On Pitfalls of $\textit{RemOve-And-Retrain}$: Data Processing Inequality Perspective
abstract: The RemOve-And-Retrain (ROAR) benchmark is widely used to evaluate feature attribution methods, yet its validity remains underexplored from an information-theoretic perspective. We show that model- and data-agnostic post-processing of attribution maps (transformations that, by the data processing inequality, \emph{cannot} add information about the decision function) can often improve ROAR scores. This means that an improved ROAR ranking is not, by itself, evidence that an attribution map carries more information about the model. We trace this failure mode to a bias toward spatially blurry masks. Experiments on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and CUB-200 show a consistent association between blurriness and ROAR performance, a pattern that also appears in the ROAD variant. We provide guidelines for more cautious removal-based benchmarking, with implications for validating mechanistic understanding of neural network internals.
comment: Accepted at the 2026 ICML Workshop on Mechanistic Interpretability

light_analysis.overview: 揭示ROAR基准因数据处理不等式导致偏向模糊掩码，改进归因方法评估的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: ROAR基准广泛用于评估特征归因方法，但其有效性缺乏信息论角度的验证。现有方法可能因数据预处理引入偏差，导致归因分数提升并不反映真实信息量。本研究旨在从数据处理不等式出发，解释这一失败模式，并提出更可靠的评估指南。
light_analysis.method: 从信息论角度分析ROAR基准，基于数据处理不等式证明模型无关的后处理不能增加决策函数信息，但能提升ROAR分数。通过实验验证模糊掩码与ROAR性能的关联，并在CIFAR-10、SVHN、CUB-200数据集上测试，同时考察ROAD变体。提供更谨慎的基于移除基准的评估指南。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、SVHN和CUB-200数据集上，实验一致显示模糊掩码与ROAR性能正相关，该模式也出现在ROAD变体中。这表明ROAR排名改善不能作为归因图携带更多模型信息的证据，揭示了现有基准的偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究指出ROAR基准的核心缺陷：偏向模糊掩码导致归因评估失效。提供了缓解该问题的实践指南，有助于验证神经网络内部机制的机械理解。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的评估协议，减少对后处理敏感性的依赖。
